cathcart technology is partnering with a leading financial institution in thailand to find an experienced site reliability engineer (sre) to join their growing technology team.

 

you will play a key role in ensuring system reliability, scalability, and performance, while working closely with cross-functional teams to support critical financial platforms. candidates with strong expertise in cloud technologies, monitoring tools, automation, and incident management will be highly suited for this position.

 

responsibilities

define and maintain slos/slas, perform capacity planning, and optimize system performance to support high transaction volumes

build and manage monitoring, alerting, and dashboards to track system health and key metrics

act as a first responder, troubleshoot issues, and lead root cause analysis (rca) to prevent recurring incidents

develop ci/cd pipelines and automate deployments, rollbacks, and operational tasks

ensure systems meet security standards and regulatory requirements, including data protection controls

 

qualifications

bachelor’s degree in information technology, computer science, computer engineering, or a related field

minimum 3 years of experience in system engineering, sre, or related roles

strong background in system, network, and application troubleshooting

hands-on experience with monitoring and observability tools

familiarity with cloud platforms (aws, azure, or gcp) and container technologies (docker, kubernetes)

experience with ci/cd tools and devops practices (e.g., jenkins, azure devops)

understanding of security best practices and compliance standards in financial systems

 

this is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about advancing their careers in site reliability and cloud engineering within a banking environment. if you're interested, feel free to contact thunwarat (gee) at 094-991-0296 for more information.

Job_Title: QA / Software Tester (Manual / Automated) 2+ Years Experience
Job_Description:
job description

*** รับสมัครงาน qa / software tester ***

qa hive ให้บริการทดสอบระบบของลูกค้าด้วย automated testing ในหลากหลายธุรกิจ อาทิ ecommerce, ธุรกิจประกัน, การเงิน ซึ่ง ทีม qa เปรียบเสมือนหัวใจหลักในการควบคุมคุณภาพ software ของลูกค้า
ทีม qa มีหน้าที่ในการพัฒนา automated test script เราใช้ test framework อาทิ robot framework, cucumber และ spec flow อีกทั้งทีมยังมีการพัฒนา test library ขึ้นมาใช้เอง
การทำงานภายในทีม จะใช้รูปแบบ scrum process โดยทีมจะทำงานร่วมกันอย่างใกล้ชิดกับ product owner และ development team

business philosophy:

ความสำเร็จของลูกค้า คือความสำเร็จของเรา

งานของเราช่วยสร้างความเชื่อมั่นในด้านคุณภาพให้กับงานของลูกค้า ด้วยการตรวจสอบที่ครบถ้วน อีกทั้งช่วยลดภาระการทำงานในแต่ละวันได้จริง

พนักงานซื่อสัตย์ จริงใจต่อตัวเองและผู้อื่น เพื่อสร้างบรรยากาศของการทำงานร่วมกัน ช่วยเหลือซึ่งกันและกัน

พนักงานทุกคนเรียนรู้ และพัฒนาการทำงานให้ได้ประสิทธิภาพมากขึ้น เพื่อทำให้สามารถพัฒนางานที่มีคุณภาพ เพื่อส่งมอบให้กับลูกค้า

responsibilities:

design test case ตาม business requirement ไปจนถึง create automated test script สำหรับ web application และ mobile application

execute smoke test, regression test และ จัดส่ง test report

ดูแล และให้คำปรึกษากับ qa ในทีม

สามารถสื่อสาร และแบ่งงานกับสมาชิกในทีม

จัดทำรายงาน ความคืบหน้าของโปรเจค

สามารถเดินทางเพื่อไป on-site ลูกค้าได้

qualifications:

 มีประสบการณ์ manual / automated test ตั้งแต่ 2 ปี ขึ้นไป

มีความรู้และเข้าใจอย่างดีในเรื่อง การทดสอบระบบ, design test case, test execution รวมถึง test report

เข้าใจหน้าที่ ความรับผิดชอบของ qa ใน software development life cycle เช่น scrum

สามารถสื่อสารภาษาอังกฤษได้

สามารถทำงานภายใต้สภาวะกดดันได้

หากไม่มีความรู้ด้าน automated test ไม่เป็นไร เรามีผู้ช่วยเหลือและที่ปรึกษา พร้อมแผนการพัฒนาทักษะให้คุณโดยเฉพาะ

มี growth mindset และยินดีที่จะเรียนรู้สิ่งใหม่ๆ และสอนให้กับคนอื่นได้

ปริญญาตรีสาขาวิศวกรรมหรือวิทยาศาสตร์คอมพิวเตอร์ หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

qualifications plus:

 มีประสบการณ์ทำงานกับ automated test framework ในการทดสอบระบบ web application หรือ mobile application

 สามารถใช้ภาษา python, c# หรือ groovy เพื่อพัฒนาโปรแกรมได้อย่างชำนาญ

 มีความรู้ความเข้าใจการเขียน โปรแกรม เชิง oop เป็นอย่างดี

 เข้าใจการทำงานของหลักการ continuous integration และมีประสบการณ์ประยุกต์ใช้กับทีมมาก่อน

สามารถสื่อสารภาษาอังกฤษกับลูกค้าต่างชาติได้

benefits:

ทำงานจันทร์-ศุกร์

โบนัสประจำปี ตามผลประเมินการทำงาน

ปรับเงินเดือนประจำปี ตามผลประเมินการทำงาน

ประกันสังคม

provident fund

วันลาพักร้อน: 10 วัน/ปี

วันลาป่วย: 30 วัน/ปี

ค่ารักษาพยาบาล opd: 1,500 บาทต่อครั้ง ไม่จำกัดจำนวนครั้งต่อปี

healthcare ขั้นต่ำ 3,000 บาทต่อปี ตาม level

เข้าร่วมกิจกรรมการอบรมเพื่อพัฒนาสกิลในแต่ละเดือน

มีขนม และเครื่องดื่มฟรี เฉพาะ qa hive on-site สำนักงานใหญ่

job summary

we are looking for a qa engineer responsible for ensuring software quality through structured test planning, automated testing, and effective test execution. the role focuses on building and maintaining test automation frameworks, implementing api and end-to-end automation, and delivering clear test reports and quality insights to the development team. the ideal candidate has strong experience in api automation using pytest, e2e testing using playwright, and works closely with developers within an agile development environment.

key responsibilities

test plan

·       create and maintain test plans and test cases based on product requirements.

·       ensure coverage for functional, integration, and regression testing.

·       identify testing scope, quality risks, and critical scenarios for new features.

automate test

·       develop and maintain test automation frameworks for scalable and reliable testing.

·       implement api automated tests using pytest to validate responses, data integrity, and error handling.

·       develop end-to-end (e2e) automation tests using playwright for web applications and key user flows.

·       integrate automated tests into ci/cd pipelines.

·       execute manual and automated test suites and analyze failures with development teams.

test report

·       track and report test execution results and quality metrics.

·       prepare defect summaries and release quality reports.

·       monitor automation coverage, defect trends, and test stability.

qualifications

·       bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering or equivalent experience.

·       a minimum of 3 years’ experience in qa or test automation.

·       strong understanding of software testing methodologies and qa processes.

·       proactively seeks out and adapts to new technologies and workflows, driven by a continuous learning mindset.

skills

technical skills

·       programming: python (preferred) or typescript

·       api automation testing using pytest

·       end-to-end testing using playwright

·       experience with test management platform (qa sphere or else)

·       basic knowledge of rest api and json

·       experience with ci/cd tools (gitlab ci, jenkins, github actions)

·       familiar with git version control and issue tracking tools (jira/gitlab)

soft skills

·       strong analytical and troubleshooting skills

·       good communication with developers and stakeholders

·       ability to manage multiple testing tasks in agile environments

Job_Title: SAP S4 HANA Specialist (Location: Bangna/ Rayong)
Job_Description:
job title: sap s4 hana specialist

location : bangplee samutprakarn and rayong

company: summit group

industry: automotive manufacturing and other diverse business

summit group is a leading player in the automotive manufacturing industry, dedicated to delivering high-quality automotive parts that meet the needs of customers worldwide. we are seeking an experienced erp (sap s4 hana) specialist to join our team and contribute to the optimization of our sap systems to enhance efficiency and productivity within our manufacturing operations. as an erp (sap s4 hana) specialist, you will be responsible for managing, maintaining, and improving our sap systems to streamline operations and drive business growth. your expertise in sap and in-depth knowledge of the automotive manufacturing sector will be essential in helping us maintain our competitive edge.




key responsibilities:

sap implementation and optimization: lead the implementation of sap erp solutions and continually optimize them to align with the dynamic needs of the automotive manufacturing industry.

business process alignment: collaborate with cross-functional teams to analyze, understand, and optimize existing business processes by leveraging sap functionalities(sd,mm,qm,pp,fi,co).

configuration and customization(abap): configure and customize sap modules to suit the specific requirements of our manufacturing processes while maintaining data integrity and system stability.

data management: oversee data migration, integration, and data quality within sap systems to ensure accuracy and consistency.

user support and training: provide ongoing support and training to end-users, enabling them to effectively use sap systems, and resolve sap-related issues promptly.

system maintenance and upgrades: ensure the stability and security of sap systems through routine maintenance, updates, and system upgrades in line with industry best practices.

documentation: maintain comprehensive documentation of sap configurations, processes, and user guides.

compliance and security: ensure that sap systems are in compliance with industry and regulatory standards and implement robust data security measures.

sap reporting and analytics: develop and maintain sap reports and analytics tools to provide real-time insights into manufacturing processes and performance.

qualifications:

bachelor's degree in information technology, business, or a related field. a master's degree is a plus.

proven experience as an sap specialist in the automotive manufacturing industry.

expertise in sap modules such as sap ecc, sap s/4hana, sap business warehouse, finance and sap fiori.

in-depth understanding of automotive manufacturing processes and how they align with sap solutions.

strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team.

sap certification is a significant advantage.


summit group is an equal opportunity employer. we celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

key responsibilities:

lead and manage a team, ensuring high performance and alignment with business goals

oversee and drive revenue targets

develop and execute commercial strategies to achieve sales and growth objectives

directly manage key clients and strategic accounts

monitor market trends and identify new business opportunities

collaborate with internal stakeholders to optimize commercial operations and profitability

qualifications:

proven experience in a senior commercial or sales leadership role

strong track record of managing large revenue targets and teams

excellent leadership, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills

at celestica, our complete lifecycle solutions enable you to optimize your supply chain, help you meet local market challenges and minimize field costs - so your in-house team can focus on innovation and growth.

celestica thailand is the largest site of the celestica group, with highly skilled expertise in producing high-quality, high-technology products. strategic location in the export processing zone (epz) with quick access to the deep seaport and suvarnabhumi airport.

summary:

we are seeking a software project manager to lead embedded system development within our product design division. this role requires a balance of technical literacy and high-level organizational skills to manage complex workflows in a high-utilization environment. you will be the primary driver of project velocity, ensuring firmware milestones align perfectly with hardware design cycles.

detailed description:

performs tasks such as, but not limited to, the following:

project lifecycle management: lead the planning and execution of firmware projects from concept to final product integration.

resource allocation: monitor team utilization to ensure high-priority tasks are staffed effectively without burnout.

financial tracking: collaborate with the leadership team to handle project quoting and monitor revenue recognition milestones.

technical coordinating: act as the bridge between firmware engineers, hardware designers, and external clients.

knowledge/skills/competencies:

tools: proficient in jira/azure devops and other agile project management tools.

resilience: proven ability to thrive in high-utilization, fast-paced environments.

communication: strong interpersonal skills with the ability to "translate" technical hurdles into clear updates for non-technical customers.

technical literacy: a solid grasp of how firmware integrates with product hardware. knowledge in iec62304 or iso13485 is a plus.

high-pressure delivery: demonstrated experience working in high-utilization environments, with the ability to maintain team focus during tight deadlines.

customer advocacy: strong ability to handle customer pressure, negotiate timelines, and manage external expectations professionally.

financial aptitude: a readiness to take on project finance responsibilities, including quoting, revenue recognition, and cost management.

education and experience:

education: bachelor degree or higher in computer engineering, programming, electronics or related fields

experience: 5-8 years of experience in software project management or scrum master, with a specific focus on embedded systems or firmware.

technology operations lead - ascend bank




about the role

as technology operations lead at ascend bank, you'll lead a multi-disciplinary team of infrastructure, platform, cloud, and service management professionals, ensuring our systems are resilient, scalable, and always delivering for our customers. this is a hands-on leadership role for someone who thrives at the intersection of engineering excellence and operational discipline.

if you've been running great tech operations and are ready to lead at a higher level, in a regulated but fast-moving environment, this is the step up you've been looking for.




what you'll do

keep things running and continuous improvement

lead daily operations across infrastructure, cloud, platform, and it service management.

own service availability, performance, and sla/slo targets across all systems.

serve as incident commander for critical events — diagnose fast, communicate clearly, close the loop with proper post-mortems.

build the operational foundation

define and improve processes for incident, change, and problem management (itsm/itil).

drive observability and monitoring strategy, proactive, not reactive.

own disaster recovery and business continuity readiness.

lead and grow a high-performing team

manage, mentor, and develop engineers across four pillars: infrastructure, platform, cloud, and itsm.

build a culture of accountability, blameless reviews, and sustainable on-call practices.

champion career growth and clear development paths within the team.

own governance and compliance

ensure operations meet bot regulations, pdpa, iso 27001, and internal audit requirements.

report operational health and risk posture to senior leadership.

partner with development, security, architecture, and product teams to keep everything aligned.




what you bring

must-have

7+ years in technology operations, it operation, infrastructure or cloud operations, it service management or platform engineering.

at least 2 years leading a team.

hands-on experience in at least two of: infrastructure operations, cloud.

strong incident management skills, calm under pressure, fast to resolve, clear in communication.

experience in public cloud (aws) and private cloud (hci) and tools like datadog, grafana, opensearch, or logi.

experience in api management, mobile application or core banking systems.

experience in banking, fintech, or any regulated industry.

prior experience working under regulatory requirements.

itil v4 foundation or higher.

good english communication.

strong understanding of work-life integration and the agility of work culture.

positive, proactive mindset with empathy and a strong team-first attitude.




what makes this role different

you're building from the ground up, not inheriting a legacy system, but shaping operational standards for a new virtual bank.

real ownership, you're not just executing someone else's playbook; you're writing it.

direct impact, your decisions affect platform uptime, customer experience, and regulatory standing.

career accelerator, this role reports to the cto and head of technology operations and has full visibility across the organization.

strong team culture, we believe in spirit and use our passion to make everything possible and invest in people.

Company: Muang Thai Life Assurance Public Company Limited
Job_Description:
key activities & responsibilities

day-to-day operations: perform routine administrative tasks, manage capacity planning, execute backup and recovery procedures, and ensure high availability across all database platforms.

monitoring & cloud support: proactively monitor database health, performance metrics, and cloud infrastructure using centralized observability tools. configure and respond to system alerts to ensure 24/7 reliability.

deploy & patch data: deploy new database instances, execute schema changes, migrate data, and apply critical security patches and version upgrades with minimal downtime.

developer collaboration & tuning: work closely with programming and development teams to advise on database best practices, review code, and perform query/performance tuning to optimize system speed.

database security: manage database user accounts, roles, and access permissions. implement strict security protocols to safeguard sensitive data from unauthorized access.

support pdpa compliance: ensure that data storage, access controls, data masking, and retention policies fully comply with thailand’s personal data protection act (pdpa).

standby support: participate in an on-call standby rotation to provide out-of-hours support for critical, high-severity database incidents and ensure business continuity.




qualifications & requirements

experience: 1 to 4 years of hands-on experience in database administration.

core technical skills:

solid foundational knowledge of oracle database (experience with rac / asm is highly advantageous) and ms sql server.

familiarity with postgresql ,administration and architecture.

cloud & monitoring skills:

hands-on experience or familiarity with cloud database services (e.g., aws rds/aurora,redis,dynamodb,, azure sql, or google cloud sql).

experience using database monitoring tools (e.g., oracle enterprise manager, sql server extended events, datadog, zabbix). 

secondary technical skills: basic understanding or willingness to learn nosql databases (mongodb, redis) and other systems (mysql, mariadb, ibm db2).

soft skills:

strong analytical and problem-solving mindset.

strong communication skills to effectively advise development teams.

reliable and reachable during assigned standby periods.

nice-to-haves (not mandatory)

relevant it certifications (e.g., oracle certified associate, microsoft certified, or postgresql certifications).

basic scripting skills (bash, python, or powershell) for task automation.





technology stack & workload breakdown your daily responsibilities will be distributed across our technology stack as follows:

30% - oracle rac

30% - ms sql server

15% - postgresql

5% - mongodb / redis

5% - ibm db2

5% - mysql / mariadb

5% - anova

5% - other nosql & emerging database technologies

about tdcx?

singapore-headquartered tdcx is a leading global business process outsourcing (bpo) company that provides customer experience (cx) solutions, sales and digital marketing services, and content moderation for clients across various industries. these include digital advertising and social media, e-commerce, fintech, gaming, healthtech, media, technology and, travel and hospitality.

with a focus on helping companies enable the future, tdcx’s smart, scalable approach—driven by innovation and operational precision—positions it as a key partner for companies targeting tangible outcomes. with more than 20,000 employees across 37 locations worldwide, tdcx provides its clients with comprehensive coverage in asia, europe and the united states. for more information, please visit www.tdcx.com.

highgate international school thailand will open in august 2026. a premium international school located in the beautiful province of chonburi, it will cater for students between the ages of 2 and 18.

operated in partnership with siam motors group and highgate school, london, staff will enjoy access to a wide range of world-class facilities, to include a full-sized fifa approved football pitch, an olympic-sized swimming pool, a 450-seater auditorium, a black-box theatre, a stem building and a library and digital media centre. they will draw upon a rich academic heritage spanning 460 years.

workplace: banglamung in chonburi (near siam country golf course)

working time: monday - friday (8:00-17:00)


key responsibilities

·            provide technical support to staff and students for hardware, software, and network issues.

·            maintain and support school it infrastructure & equipments, including computers, printers, av equipment, and classroom technology.

·            assist in managing user accounts, system access, and cloud services (e.g., microsoft 365).

·            support all of the system use in school (isam, business central dynamic365, hr system - bipo)

·            monitor and troubleshoot network connectivity (lan/wi-fi) to ensure reliable service across the campus.

·            support deployment, configuration, and maintenance of staff and student devices.

·            maintain it asset & gadgets inventory and documentation.

·            ensure systems follow it security, data protection, and safeguarding policies.

·            assist with it projects, upgrades, and system improvements as assigned.


qualifications & experience

·            bachelor’s degree in information technology

·            computer science, or a related field.

·            2–5 years of experience in it support, system administration, or network support.

·            experience in education or international school environments is preferred




safeguarding & inclusion

highgate international school thailand is committed to the protection of children and the promotion of diversity, equity, inclusion, justice and belonging. 

candidates for all roles will be required to provide detailed information pertaining to their personal identity, employment history and qualifications. background checks will be undertaken to ensure the suitability of candidates to work in a school and alongside young people.

key responsibilities




technical leadership

cloud infrastructure (aws leadership)

– ec2

– s3

– rds

– cloudfront

– lambda (when applicable)

team enablement & engineering culture

ai & tooling enablement

quality, security & performance oversight

• support smooth transitions from development to production environments




cross-team collaboration

• align architecture decisions with ux/ui system requirements

• support presales discussions when technical validation is required

• guide solution feasibility during early project planning




qualifications

• 7–10+ years experience in software engineering with strong backend and architecture expertise

• proven experience leading development teams across multiple projects

• strong understanding of scalable system architecture and database design

• hands-on experience designing and deploying infrastructure on aws

• experience managing production environments and performance optimization

• familiarity with cms platforms, modern frameworks, and api-driven architectures

preferred (bonus) experience

คุณสมบัติ


- ระดับการศึกษา ปริญญาตรีขึ้นไป สาขา computer science, mis หรือสาขาอื่น ๆ ที่เกี่ยวข้อง- มีประสบการณ์ 1-2 ปี ด้านการพัฒนาระบบและสารสนเทศ 1-2 ปี ด้านการดูแลระบบฐานข้อมูล- มีความรู้ด้านภาษา สื่อสารภาษาอังกฤษได้ ทั้งการฟัง พูด อ่าน และเขียน- มีความคิดเชิงตรรกวิทยา (logical thinking)- มีความเข้าใจรูปแบบ และกระบวนการพัฒนาระบบเป็นอย่างดี- มีทักษะการสื่อสารและการประสานงานเป็นอย่างดี- มีความรู้ ความชำนาญเกี่ยวกับระบบการจัดการฐานข้อมูลเชิงสัมพันธ์และการออกแบบฐานข้อมูล เช่น mysql, microsoft sql server- มีความรู้เกี่ยวกับการรักษาความปลอดภัยของฐานข้อมูล- มีความกระตือรือร้นที่จะเรียนรู้เทคโนโลยี ใหม่ ๆ และสามารถศึกษาด้วยตนเอง- มีความละเอียดรอบคอบ- มีความขยัน อดทน และมีความกระตือรือร้นในการทำงาน- มีอัธยาศัยและมนุษย์สัมพันธ์ที่ดีกับบุคคลทั่วไป มีทัศนคติที่ดีในการทำงานร่วมกับผู้อื่น- มีทัศนคติที่ดีในการทำงานร่วมกับผู้อื่น- มีความสนใจและชอบการเรียนรู้เทคโนโลยีใหม่ ๆ ตลอดเวลา- สามารถรับมือกับแรงกดดันจากสิ่งต่าง ๆ ได้ดี- มีความคิดริเริ่มสร้างสรรค์ดี

monitor and operate enterprise data pipelines, batch jobs, scheduled jobs, and data workflows supporting banking business functions on an end-to-end basis

act as first tier support for data-related and batch processing incidents affecting banking operations.

experience with logging, monitoring, alerting, and incident management

drive practically with passion.

innovate to beat the best and adaptable to change.

strong teamwork and open communication.

proactive, resilient, and optimistic mindset.

Job_Description:
main objectives and activities:

monitor the availability of our services, follow up on incidents/problems and provide root cause analyzes to define permanent fixes, with a view to continuous improvement.

recommend, deploy and maintain security, network solutions, such as firewalls, waf, router, switch, load balancer, etc.

analyze application flows during incidents (tcpdump, wireshark).

analyze and implement traditional firewall rules (cisco csm/fmc, checkpoint firewall) and “pull-request” firewall rules (checkpoint cloudguard, aws, azure);

configure, support, document network access infrastructure such as authentication, authorization and device profiling. (nac).

implement content delivery solutions (cdn) and ddos protection.

implement network solutions for our campuses, branches and data centers.

analyze and assess the risks and vulnerabilities of various systems.

ensure all the equipment are compliant with security standards in accordance with the enterprise architecture.

analyze infrastructure change requests, assess impacts on existing applications, suggest and make appropriate changes.

identify and automate the processes in place with the objective of saving time or gaining quality for production releases.

provide management with all the information to influence the orientations and strategies related to the network and cybersecurity infrastructures.

perform and maintain documentation of our environments.

able to work outside normal working hours and do standby duty




experience:

at least 5 years of relevant experience as network engineer in relevant field.

good experience in network technologies/concepts (switch, router, vpn, dns, load-balancer, tcp, qos).

good experience in a cloud environment, aws, azure, gcp, etc.

good knowledge of data encryption concepts (ssl, vpn, tls, pki).

knowledge of programming languages to perform automation (python and use of different apis cisco or other).

knowledge of network tools (wireshark, zabbix, extrahop, etc.).

education

bachelor’s degree in computer science/engineering or equivalent experience.

language skills

good communication skills in english (both written and oral)


what you will get from ata it:

14 days’ vacation in first year

health insurance for staff & families

life insurance

dental fee for staff & families

provident fund

monetary assistance (childbirth, funeral, basket visit)

annual party

monthly activities- staff birthday & company activities

annual health check

multi-national company with flexible working hours, but professional company culture

hybrid work from home policy

Job_Title: Sales Representative /เจ้าหน้าที่ขาย (Software / IT Product)
Job_Description:
รายละเอียดงาน:

ติดต่อแนะนำบริษัทฯ (ซอฟต์แวร์) ผ่านทางโทรศัพท์เพื่อทำนัดหมายเข้าพบลูกค้า

ทำการ presentation ให้กับลูกค้าเป้าหมายและติดตามผลเพื่อปิดการขาย

จัดทำข้อมูลในระบบและจัดทำเอกสารต่าง ๆ ที่เกี่ยวกับงานขาย

เสริมสร้างความสัมพันธ์กับลูกค้าเดิม และจัดหาลูกค้ารายใหม่

ประสานงานกับหน่วยงานอื่น ๆ ในองค์กร เพื่อพัฒนาประสิทธิภาพงานขาย

ทางบริษัทฯ ให้เวลาการทำงานที่ยืดหยุ่น และสามารถจัดการงานขายด้วยตัวเอง

คุณสมบัติผู้สมัคร:

สัญขาติไทย 

จบการศึกษาระดับปริญญาตรี สาขาใดก็ได้

สามารถสื่อสารภาษาอังกฤษ พูด อ่าน เขียน ได้ ในระดับดี

มีประสบการณ์งานขายอย่างน้อย 1 ปี ขึ้นไป

หากมีความรู้และประสบการณ์เกี่ยวกับซอฟต์แวร์หรือไอที จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

มีความกระตือรือร้นในการทำงานและมีความเข้าใจในลักษณะงานขาย

welfare and rewards:

ท่องเที่ยวประจำปีบริษัท

เงินพิเศษเป็นของขวัญวันเกิดและเค้กวันเกิดให้บุคลากรทุกคน

เบี้ยขยันรายเดือน คนขยันต้องได้รับรางวัลอยู่แล้ว

ประกันชีวิตแบบกลุ่มให้เลย

สวัสดิการอาหารกลางวันรายเดือน

โอที+เบี้ยเลี้ยง

ค่าโทรศัพท์ + ค่าน้ำมัน และสวัสดิการอื่น ๆ ตามลักษณะโครงการ

จ่ายโบนัสตามโครงการที่ได้รับมอบหมายไม่ต้องรอสิ้นปี

โบนัสปลายปีอีกครั้งตามผลประกอบการ

ฟิตเนสในที่ทำงานชิล ๆ ไม่ต้องไปเสียรายเดือน

ทำงาน จันทร์-ศุกร์ หยุดวันเสาร์ อาทิตย์ และวันหยุดนักขัตฤกษ์

ประกันสังคมตามอัตราที่กฏหมายกำหนด

ทำงานร่วมกับผู้บริหารรุ่นใหม่มืออาชีพ วิสัยทัศน์ยอดเยี่ยม

เงินรางวัลพิเศษหากทำงานครบจำนวนปีตามที่ทางบริษัทฯกำหนด

มีรถยนต์ของทางบริษัทฯ ให้ใช้ สำหรับการติดต่องานภายนอก

ขนม ของทานเล่น ส่วนกลางมีให้ทุกเดือน




สถานที่ปฏิบัติงาน: เลขที่ 38/19-20 โครงการเดอะไพรด์ ซอยอ่อนนุช 30 ถนนสุขุมวิท 77 แขวงอ่อนนุช เขตสวนหลวง กรุงเทพมหานคร 10250

please submit your resume via "apply now", short numbers of candidates are required.

please send your application in english only!!

Job_Description:
about learn corporation

learn corporation is thailand’s leader in lifelong-learning edtech. guided by our conviction that “learning opportunities can improve one’s quality of life,” we harness technology to design engaging, age-inclusive learning experiences that help people develop new skills, achieve ambitious goals, and pass on good things to others—advancing thai society together.

across 12-plus business units—including ondemand, ignite, skooldio, learn satit pattana school, crest school, and more—we reach hundreds of thousands of learners every year. our dream is to serve as a private “ministry of education,” upgrading education nationwide and preparing every learner for the future.

we are seeking a highly motivated and experienced it infrastructure engineer to join our dynamic team. the ideal candidate will be responsible for defining, launching, and managing the success of our products. you will work closely with cross-functional teams including design, engineering, sales, and marketing to ensure our products meet market and customer needs.

join us and shape the next chapter of learning in thailand.


what you’ll drive

1. cloud platforms & infrastructure automation

operate and support public cloud environments such as aws, google cloud platform (gcp), or azure.

use infrastructure-as-code tools (e.g., terraform, ansible) to automate deployment and configuration management.

participate in hybrid-cloud architecture and cloud migration initiatives.

2. monitoring, incident response & root cause analysis

configure and manage it monitoring and alerting tools (e.g., zabbix, grafana, prometheus).

analyze system incidents, troubleshoot root causes, and drive preventive actions using itil or devops principles.

3. it infrastructure & systems administration

manage and maintain critical it systems including physical/virtual servers (windows/linux), virtualization platforms (vmware, proxmox, kvm), and enterprise storage solutions (nas/san).

ensure high availability, performance, and reliability of infrastructure in alignment with slas.

4. network & cybersecurity operations

maintain enterprise network infrastructure including switches, routers, firewalls, load balancers, vpns, and wireless access points (lan/wan/wifi).

administer security systems (siem/soc, ids/ips, nac), implement policies for zero trust and access control (ad, ldap, rbac).

conduct security assessments, patch management, and vulnerability remediation.

5. project execution & continuous improvement

collaborate with cross-functional teams on infrastructure upgrades, new deployments, and enterprise it projects.

evaluate emerging technologies and best practices to improve it operations, performance, and security posture.

what you’ll bring

bachelor's degree in computer engineering, it or any related fields.

have experience related to computer system admin, it, system engineer (system engineer, system administrator, it support) at least 1-3 years.

proficient knowledge to fix the problem in which are it infrastructure (server, storage, os, middleware, networking).

able to travel at least 1-2 times per month.

who we are

amerimax advance (thailand) co., ltd.
an it and enterprise solutions company, acting as a sub-distributor and business partner of leading global brands such as h3c and uniview.

amerimax is part of beijing netsmart technological company limited, a leading technology company from china, established in 2005.

key responsibilities

analyze customer needs and provide professional technical solutions

output product bom and technical solution presentations

project bidding and preparation of response materials

product development, feature presentation, and demonstration of basic product features and functions

cooperate with sales staff to assist in achieving sales performance goals

qualifications

english communication skills are preferred

basic knowledge of switches, routers, wlan, security, and servers

good communication and presentation skills with strong solution-oriented mindset

good public relations skills and ability to support company activities

positive attitude, strong responsibility, teamwork spirit, and customer service awareness

benefits

salary + performance bonus

mobile / notebook / travel allowance

overseas training & business trips

annual bonus & incentives

annual leave & public holidays

additional benefits based on experience

we are looking for an sap integration suite consultant to serve as the backbone of our enterprise connectivity. in this role, you will design, develop, and manage secure, scalable integrations between sap s/4hana, cloud applications, and third-party systems. your goal is to ensure seamless data orchestration while adhering to the "clean core" principle by moving custom integration logic away from the erp and into the sap business technology platform (btp).


responsibilities

integration flow (iflow) development:

design and develop end-to-end integration flows (iflows) using sap cloud integration (cpi) to handle complex data mapping, transformation, and routing.

implement advanced logic using groovy scripting and xslt for specialized message processing.

full lifecycle api management:

develop and expose enterprise-grade apis using sap api management.

configure api policies for security (e.g., oauth, rate limiting, ip filtering) and monitor api usage through the api portal.

event-driven & modern architecture:

design real-time, asynchronous integration patterns using sap event mesh or advanced event mesh.

leverage sap open connectors to simplify connectivity with non-sap cloud applications (e.g., salesforce, servicenow, slack).

b2b & partner integration:

manage b2b/edi communications using trading partner management (tpm) and the integration advisor (utilizing crowdsourced machine learning for mapping).

security & governance:

ensure data integrity and security by implementing certificate-based authentication, pgp encryption, and secure cloud connector setups.

monitoring & support:

proactively monitor integration health, troubleshoot message failures, and optimize performance for high-volume data traffic




technical qualifications

core platform: expert-level knowledge of sap integration suite (specifically cloud integration, api management, and open connectors).

protocols & standards: deep proficiency in odata, soap, rest, sftp, idoc, rfc, and as2.

programming skills: strong groovy script or java skills for custom integration logic.

data mapping: advanced experience with graphical mapping, xslt, and json/xml transformations.

security expertise: hands-on experience with oauth2, saml, ssl/tls certificates, and jwt.

sap ecosystem: solid understanding of sap s/4hana integration touchpoints and sap btp cockpit configuration.

soft skills & mindset

architectural thinking: ability to choose the right integration pattern (e.g., request-response vs. pub/sub) based on business needs.

detail-oriented: precision in data mapping and a strong focus on building "error-proof" interfaces.

collaborative spirit: experience working with cross-functional teams (functional consultants, abap developers, and external partners).





** interested candidates, please submit your profile through "apply now" button.*
for the further discussion please contact: human resources department (recruitment) tel. 0-2302-1500

the application solution designer bridges business, product, and engineering teams by translating business needs into clear, actionable solution designs. the role defines solution designs and user flows, aligns delivery with enterprise standards (security, compliance, and architecture), and supports teams from discovery through implementation to ensure quality outcomes.




key responsibilities:

solution & technical design

design high-level technical and application-level solutions aligned with business objectives, architecture roadmap, and organizational standards.

provide comprehensive end-to-end architectural solutions, encompassing conceptual design, high-level architecture, detailed application design, as well as infrastructure and cloud system integration.

define system components, data flows, integrations, and api interaction.

partner with product managers and project managers during discovery, estimation, and planning.

ensure solutions align with enterprise architecture principles, security controls, and compliance requirements.

lead poc activities by defining hypotheses, scope, and success criteria, and reviewing outcomes to inform solution design decisions.

evaluate technology options and recommend suitable tools and tech stacks in alignment with enterprise architecture, security, and compliance guidelines.

requirement analysis & translation

gather, analyze, and validate business and user requirements to inform solution design decisions.

translate requirements into user stories, functional specifications, and acceptance criteria aligned with the solution design.

define acceptance criteria to ensure shared understanding across teams.

design user flows, wireframes, and prototypes to validate user experience.

use ui/ux design tools (e.g., figma) to communicate and validate designs.

collaborate with engineers to ensure feasibility, consistency, and implementation quality.

delivery support & quality assurance

support development teams by clarifying requirements, user flows, and design intent.

work with qa teams to ensure test scenarios and acceptance criteria reflect expected behavior.

identify risks, edge cases, dependencies, and non-functional requirements early in the delivery lifecycle.

provide post-deployment operational support through issue analysis, solution improvements, and maintainable, monitorable designs.

guide development teams during implementation by clarifying design intent, ensuring alignment with standards, and proactively managing solution risks.




qualification:

bachelor’s degree in computer science, information technology, engineering, or a related field.

4+ years of experience in solution architect, application solution designer or a related field.

proven experience in application/solution design, solution architect, or systems analysis.

solid understanding of the software development lifecycle (sdlc) and agile delivery practices.

ability to produce clear, structured solution designs that balance quality, speed, and complexity.

working knowledge of ux/ui design tools (e.g., figma) and design collaboration workflows.

strong communication and facilitation skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

background in software development, system analysis, or product engineering.

experience working in enterprise, fintech, banking, or regulated environments.

familiarity with apis, microservices, and modern web/mobile application architectures.

ability to balance business needs, user experience, and technical constraints.

design, build, and maintain ci/cd pipelines to support continuous integration, delivery, and deployment.

continuously evaluate and improve existing tools, pipelines, and processes to enhance efficiency, quality, and delivery speed.

provide technical leadership and guidance to team members, contributing to key decisions across multiple teams and workstreams.

strong experience as a devops engineer or devops lead, with end‑to‑end ownership of ci/cd and infrastructure.

expert proficiency in devops practices, including ci/cd, automation, and monitoring.

strong experience with cloud platforms and cloud automation.

hands‑on experience with containerization and orchestration technologies.

solid understanding of configuration management, release management, and continuous improvement practices.

strong problem‑solving skills and ability to work across multiple teams.

excellent communication and stakeholder‑management skills.

experience implementing devsecops in enterprise or large‑scale environments.

exposure to financial services or regulated industries.

background in consulting or project‑based delivery environments.

experience with infrastructure‑as‑code tools and modern monitoring platforms.

main purpose of the role:

the deployment automation engineer will support a migration program to move applications from current deployment to fully automated deployment. the role focuses on converting existing deployment steps into ci/cd pipelines, maintaining workflows, and ensuring smooth and reliable releases across environments.

responsibilities of incumbent: role specific

work closely with engineers to analyse current deployment processes and translate them into automated pipelines.

design, build, and maintain ci/cd pipelines (using tools like jenkins, gitlab ci, github actions, or azure devops) to automate building, testing, and deploying applications.

configure and manage github repository settings, environments, secrets, and protection rules required for automation.

develop and maintain scripts (e.g., ansible, bash, powershell, python) used within github actions jobs.

assist in setting up and managing runners (hosted or self hosted) for executing workflows.

participate in testing and validation of new pipelines to ensure parity with existing deployments.

implement monitoring for deployment pipelines to detect failures early and troubleshoot integration issues during the migration phase.

create standardized deployment templates and documentation to ensure consistency across different development teams and environments (dev, qa, staging, prod).

support teams in adopting the new ci/cd processes, including basic training and guidance.

escalate issues to application deployment manager where required.

knowledge and technical skills

essential

experience in software development, application deployment, or release engineer.

proven experience moving projects from manual/ftp/script-based deployments to automated ci/cd systems.

practical experience with git and github (branches, pull requests, code review, repository configuration).

basic to intermediate scripting skills (bash, powershell, or python).

experience with at least one major ci/cd platform (jenkins, gitlab ci/cd, github actions, circleci, etc.).

understanding of ci/cd concepts (build, test, artifact, deploy, rollback).

familiarity with linux or windows server environments used for deployments.

strong problem-solving and troubleshooting skills; able to interpret build/deploy logs.

detail-oriented and systematic in following and improving procedures.

good communication skills and ability to work with cross functional teams.

ownership mindset with focus on reliability and repeatability

eager to learn and grow

desirable

experience with self-hosted github runners and their configuration.

exposure to containers (docker) and/or orchestration (kubernetes).

experience deploying to cloud platforms (aws, azure, gcp) or on-prem infrastructure.

knowledge of infrastructure-as-code or config management tools (terraform, ansible, etc.).

Job_Title: Technical Digital Data Insight (DDI) Analyst - Operational Bridge
Job_Description:
we help the world run betterat sap, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. we're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. the work is challenging – but it matters. you'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. what's in it for you? constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed. 

job summary

the technical ddi analyst is the essential link between our technical data infrastructure and our business operations. while our technical ddi lead builds the "engine," you are responsible for "driving" it to deliver business value. you will use your deep understanding of the internal sap data landscape to find, extract, and translate complex data into actionable sales insights. your role is to ensure that every technical update or automated process is successfully adopted by the broader ddi team and directly contributes to sales productivity and pipeline growth.

key responsibilities

· internal data navigation: act as the subject matter expert on where and how to extract data across fragmented internal systems. you will "connect the dots" between siloed data sources to create a unified view for the business.

· data-to-business translation: convert complex data outputs into "sales-ready" insights. you will ensure that data signals (ipos, funding, internal deal history) are translated into clear strategies for aes and sdes.

· process implementation: work alongside api/automation specialists to implement and maintain the data pipeline, focusing specifically on the usability and business logic of the data being delivered.

· operational enablement: serve as the bridge between the technical automation team and generalist ddi analysts. you will lead the training and rollout of new data processes, ensuring technical tools are used correctly to support sales.

· stakeholder bridging: act as the primary technical point of contact for customer-facing roles, helping them navigate data tools and ensuring their feedback is reflected in our technical roadmap.

knowledge, skills, and abilities

· expert data navigator: proven ability to work within complex, large-scale organizations (like sap) to locate and extract data from diverse and often fragmented sources.

· business intelligence & ops experience: strong understanding of the b2b sales cycle, sales operations, and how data impacts seller behavior and pipeline velocity.

· technical proficiency: expertise in sql and excel for data extraction and modeling.

· experience with python or r to interface with automated data pipelines.

· familiarity with crm/sales tools (e.g., outreach, sap crm) and data vendors (e.g., zoominfo, lusha).

· training & communication: ability to break down technical workflows into simple, actionable instructions for non-technical team members.

· analytical problem solving: ability to look at "data everywhere" and identify the specific signals that will drive revenue.

education & qualifications

· education: bachelor's or master's degree in business, data science, computer science, or a related field.

· experience: 5+ years in a data analyst or sales operations role, preferably within a large enterprise environment.

· demonstrated experience in a role that requires "connecting the dots" between technical teams and business stakeholders.

· experience in training or enabling teams on new technical processes.

foundational competencies

· the "bridge" mindset: naturally seeks to align technical capabilities with business needs.

· resourcefulness: a "detective" approach to finding data in complex environments.

· collaboration: high empathy for customer-facing roles and a drive to make their jobs easier.

the product director, manufacturing transformation is responsible for the strategic leadership and end‑to‑end ownership of pandora’s global manufacturing technology portfolio. this senior product role drives the vision, development, and scaling of smart factory capabilities — spanning iot integration, connected systems, and ai‑enabled manufacturing optimization.

key responsibilities

drive business value realization

stay current with vendor ai roadmaps and assess adoption aligned to business value, data privacy, and governance standards.

are you an experienced professional who is enthusiastic about business process improvements and technology innovation to drive high impact products within organizations?

if so, pandora is embarking on an ambitious path to deliver on our crafting & supply strategy and digital strategy to build an agile, flexible, and connected manufacturing. we are embracing agile methodology structured around product teams with clear focus on business outcomes. strong and passionate end-to-end business process excellence is a key component of realizing these ambitions. in this role, you will help to shape the direction and product domain as part of the product leadership team to ensure pandora is adapting industry best practices and processes at the heart of evolving our business and delivering growth. have we sparked your interest? if so, we would love to hear from you!

10+ years of manufacturing industry experience with business / technology transformation, process management, process execution, process optimization expertise

in-depth experience in end-to-end manufacturing operations processes preferably in luxury / fashion / jewellery industry

innovative thinker who can demonstrate design thinking techniques to drive process design workshops and help solve complex business problems

a ‘completer-finisher’ taking accountability for ideas from inception to delivery, in an environment that requires robust metrics to confirm success of continuous improvement programs and lean solutions

operational business experience, ideally in business process design and implementation

strong stakeholder management to ensure a holistic perspective is gathered and priorities is ensured

ability to proactively seek out various opinions and effectively collaborate with others

pragmatic in striking balance between short term gains and long-term strategic ambitions

strong verbal and written communication skills, ability to run effective meetings and drive results with large, diverse teams

willing to support rollout across multiple sites and locations (thailand & vietnam) and travel to the different sites as required

lean, business process management professional, six sigma, and/or agile certifications will be an advantage

welcome to our crafting & supply

the magic happens at our crafting facilities, where we combine centuries-old crafting traditions and high-quality materials with modern production techniques. you will be warmly greeted by over 13,000 craftspeople who are excellent at crafting and supplying the world’s largest jewelry brand with our craftsmanship. 

join a team that is as diverse and inclusive as our jewellery. we believe in and value creative thinking and ensure that there are equitable opportunities for all. foster growth and craft opportunities through our learning and development programmes. at pandora, no effort or contribution goes unnoticed. we offer a wide range of opportunities and benefits to ensure that our employees feel valued, supported, and cared for. transportation services are also available to drop you at the other community areas. 

about pandora

pandora is the world's largest jewellery brand, specialising in the design, crafting and marketing of accessible luxury jewellery made from high-quality materials. each piece is created to inspire self-expression, allowing people to share their stories and passions through meaningful jewellery. pandora jewellery is sold in more than 100 countries through 6,800 points of sale, including more than 2,700 concept stores. headquartered in copenhagen, denmark, pandora employs 37,000 people worldwide and crafts its jewellery using only recycled silver and gold. pandora is committed to leadership in sustainability and has set out to halve greenhouse gas emissions across its value chain by 2030. pandora is listed on the nasdaq copenhagen stock exchange and generated revenue of dkk 31.7 billion (eur 4.2 billion) in 2024.

about pandora production thailand

pandora started crafting its jewellery in thailand in 1989, where our founders fell in love with the delicate craftsmanship of the thai people. to date, there are two crafting facilities in thailand, bangkok, and lamphun, and we employ more than 13,000 skilled craftspeople. by the end of 2024, there are 113 million pieces sold globally, all of which were hand-finished here in thailand by our skilled craftspeople using high-quality raw materials and sustainable methods.

authority

รูปแบบการจ้าง : fix term contract 2 ปี
location : ploen chit, bangkok




role purpose

to design, develop, and deploy advanced machine learning (ml) and statistical models that transform structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data into actionable insights. this role will support business functions such as farming, factory operations, supply chain, finance, and sustainability




key responsibilities

·      model development: build predictive and prescriptive ml models (time-series, regression, classification, clustering, optimization).

·      feature engineering: extract, transform, and engineer features from diverse data (erp, iot, sensors, finance, external datasets).

·      data management: collect, clean, and validate large datasets from multiple internal and external systems.

·      deployment: deploy models into production environments with mlops practices (ci/cd, retraining pipelines).

·      collaboration: partner with product managers, data engineers, and business analysts to align ai solutions with bu requirements.

role overview

we are seeking an business solutions & implementation (ai) who is a problem-solver at heart. in this role, your primary objective is business improvement. you will lead a team to develop intelligent chat platforms and business tools (crm/erp) by observing existing inefficiencies and designing the implementation logic to fix them.

this role is not about technical complexity for its own sake; we value a leader who uses ai understanding to simplify operations, automate manual noise, and create measurable value for the company.


key responsibilities
1. observation & design thinking

workflow observation: proactively analyze how users and internal teams interact with our platforms to identify bottlenecks.

design thinking: apply a human-centered approach to ensure technical solutions are intuitive and address the root causes of business friction.

comprehensive problem solving: look at the "big picture" of a business process before proposing a technical fix.

2. implementation logic & automation

system architecture: design the "decision-making" flow of our systems, ensuring that ai-driven features follow reliable business rules.

process automation: architect and oversee the deployment of automated workflows that reduce manual labor and human error.

ai understanding: utilize natural language and contextual understanding tools to enhance the logic of our chat platforms and business applications.

3. strategy & business improvement

technique planning: evaluate and select the most efficient techniques for business improvement, ensuring high roi and system stability.

roadmap management: plan the rollout of features based on their impact on business performance and ease of implementation.

4. leadership & communication

engineering department leadership: lead and mentor a team of 3 engineers, fostering a culture of logical rigor, clean documentation, and "business-first" engineering.

stakeholder synthesis: act as the primary bridge between technical teams and non-technical leadership, explaining complex implementation logic in clear, actionable terms.




required qualifications

experience: a minimum of 4 years of proven experience in the following areas:

business process improvement: a track record of identifying and fixing operational gaps in a professional environment.

engineering department: experience working within or leading technical teams to deliver enterprise-grade software.

process & automation: hands-on experience building automated workflows that streamline operations.

system design: strong background in designing scalable, logical architectures for complex software systems.

communication skills: exceptional ability to articulate the "why" and "how" of a technical design to diverse audiences.

logic-first mindset: expert ability to map out complex workflows and "if-this-then-that" architectures without over-complicating the tech stack.

technical foundation: proficiency in python and cloud-based ecosystems (gcp preferred). experience with api integrations and database management is essential.

key responsibilities:

roles.

จัดทำแผนยุทธศาสตร์ แผนบริหารความเสี่ยงประจำปีการศึกษาของมหาวิทยาลัย และเผยแพร่ให้คณะวิชา/ฝ่ายทราบ

ประสานงานกับคณะวิชา/ฝ่าย/คณะทำงานต่าง ๆ ที่ได้รับมอบงานยุทธศาสตร์ของมหาวิทยาลัยเกี่ยวกับการจัดทำแผนกลยุทธ์ให้สอดคล้องกับทิศทางการพัฒนามหาวิทยาลัย

ขับเคลื่อน กำกับ ติดตาม และประเมินผลการดำเนินงานตามนโยบายแผนยุทธศาสตร์ และแผนบริหารความเสี่ยงของมหาวิทยาลัย

วิเคราะห์ กลั่นกรองอัตรากำลังอาจารย์ วิเคราะห์จุดคุ้มทุนการเปิดหลักสูตร ตลอดจนวิเคราะห์ความคุ้มค่าในประเด็นต่าง ๆ ก่อนเข้าคณะกรรมการบริหารมหาวิทยาลัย ให้สอดคล้องกับนโยบายของมหาวิทยาลัย

วิเคราะห์ กลั่นกรอง และจัดทำข้อเสนองบประมาณโครงการของคณะวิชา/ฝ่ายให้คุ้มค่าสอดคล้องกับนโยบาย กลยุทธ์ และ ยุทธศาสตร์ของมหาวิทยาลัย

วิเคราะห์ความสอดคล้องเชิงยุทธศาสตร์ของมหาวิทยาลัย อาทิ การลงนามข้อตกลงความร่วมมือระหว่างมหาวิทยาลัย หอการค้าไทยกับสถาบันอื่น, การยุบ/จัดตั้งหน่วยงาน, การเปิด/ปิดหลักสูตรต่าง ๆ เป็นต้น

คุณสมบัติผู้สมัคร

ไม่จำกัดเพศ อายุไม่เกิน 35 ปีบริบูรณ์

วุฒิการศึกษาระดับปริญญาโท สาขาวิชา data analytics สาขาวิชาสถิติ สาขาวิชาสถิติประยุกต์ สาขาวิชาวิทยาการคอมพิวเตอร์ สาขาวิชาเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ หรือสาขาวิชาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

สามารถวิเคราะห์ข้อมูลเชิงสถิติ โดยใช้โปรแกรม spss หรือโปรแกรมวิเคราะห์ข้อมูลอื่น ๆ ที่เกี่ยวข้อง

สามารถใช้เครื่องมือแสดงผลข้อมูล (data visualization tools) เช่น power bi, tableau หรือ google data studio

สามารถเขียนโปรแกรมเชื่อมกับฐานข้อมูลได้ ทั้งในลักษณะ client/service และ web application

มีทักษะในการนำเสนอข้อมูลเชิงวิเคราะห์ (presentation) ให้ผู้บริหารและผู้เกี่ยวข้องเข้าใจง่ายและนำไปใช้ตัดสินใจได้จริง หากมีประสบการณ์ตรงตามตำแหน่งงาน จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

เพศชายต้องผ่านการเกณฑ์ทหาร หรือได้รับการยกเว้นการเกณฑ์ทหารแล้ว

Job_Title: Presales / System Engineer (ประจำเชียงใหม่)
Job_Description:
aware’s sims overview

aware understands the complexities of integrating software and hardware. by providing systems integration management solutions (sims) that scale fast and complement existing systems and business processes, we have helped businesses around the world to maximize their results. from microsoft solutions, cloud & cloud migration to it infrastructure management with aware’s sims.

the presales engineer plays a critical role in supporting business growth by providing technical expertise, solution design, and pre-implementation consultation for it infrastructure, network, cloud, and managed services solutions.

location: chiang mai hq

employment type: permanent, full-time


responsibilities

• provide technical consultation and design end-to-end solutions covering systems infrastructure, networking, cybersecurity, cloud platforms, and managed it services.

• work closely with the sales team to understand customer requirements and translate them into scalable, cost-effective technical solutions.

• deliver technical presentations, solution demonstrations, and proof-of-concept (poc) sessions to customers.

• prepare technical proposals, bill of materials (bom), scope of work (sow), and response documents for rfp/rfq processes.

• participate in customer meetings to address technical questions, solution positioning, and competitive differentiation.

• coordinate with delivery, implementation, and support teams to ensure smooth handover and accurate execution of proposed solutions.

• stay updated on emerging technologies, vendor products, and industry best practices to enhance solution offerings.

• support post-sales activities when required, including solution clarification and technical documentation.




qualification & requirements

• bachelor’s degree in computer engineering, computer science, information technology, or related field.

• at least 2 years of hands-on technical experience in it infrastructure, networking, virtualization, cybersecurity, or cloud services.

• experience in presales it solutions will be a big plus.

• strong knowledge of server systems, storage, virtualization platforms, and enterprise networking.

• familiarity with cloud platforms such as aws, microsoft azure, or google cloud.

• analytical thinking, problem-solving mindset, customer-oriented , and team work attitude.

• willingness to travel to customer sites when required.

• have car and driver's license.

• fluent in thai, good presentation and communication skills in english.

• understanding of it service management (itsm) and managed service models will be advantage.

• relevant vendor certifications (e.g., cisco, microsoft, aws, vmware, itil) will be advantage.
 

benefits & welfare:

• social security fund

• provident fund up to 15%

• annual leave start from 8-day a year, business leave 3-day, sick leave

• health insurance program (opd, ipd, er) & life insurance

• welfare program: health subsidized (dental, eye-care, fitness, and medical)

• welfare program: smart phone/laptop/tablet subsidized

• welfare program: gadget subsidized

• financial support for your personal needs (for marriage, childbirth, and funeral arrangements)

• language, technical and business training, and support

• annual party & recreational activities

• performance bonus

• professional certificate allowance

job overview

we'll be honest with you — this is one of the most important and highest-expectation roles at gofive. we hold this seat to an extraordinary standard. but here's what's also true: you don't need to have done this job before to be the right person for it.

what we're really looking for is someone who can't stop asking why. someone who studies products in their free time not because they have to, but because they genuinely can't help it. someone who walks into a product, finds ten things that could be better, and immediately starts thinking about how. if you're the kind of person who obsesses over customer experiences, reads product teardowns for fun, and loses sleep over a clunky user flow — we want to meet you.

at gofive, we're a product-led, ai-first tech company that has been transforming how over 5,000 businesses across thailand work — from hr and payroll to sales crm, omnichannel chat, and etax. we've earned national recognition for our product quality. and we're just getting started.

this role sits at the absolute center of what we build and why. you'll work directly alongside our coo and ceo. you'll talk to stakeholders the morning and turn what you heard into something real by afternoon. you'll build prototypes, rally developers, dig into data, and argue passionately for your users.

you'll cover more ground here in one year than most people do in three. it will be a relentless, exhilarating, occasionally humbling ride — and if that sentence excites you more than it scares you, this role was written for you.

responsibilities

pursue the product relentlessly. spend real time studying our products, our competitors, and the market. don't wait to be told what's broken or what's missing — go find it. develop a point of view, back it up, and fight for it.

live inside the customer's world. talk to customers constantly. sit in on sales calls. read support tickets. run interviews. understand not just what users say they want, but what they actually need — and bring those insights back sharp enough to change what we build.

own the product vision end-to-end. you're not executing someone else's ideas. you research, synthesize, propose, debate, and decide. you take full ownership of outcomes — not just outputs.

build prototypes yourself. don't wait for someone else to make your idea tangible. sketch it, wireframe it, prototype it — fast and good enough to test. move ideas out of your head and into something people can react to.

drive ai-first thinking. every product decision carries the question: how does ai make this genuinely better for our users? not as a feature to check off — as a real force multiplier.

get everyone on board. bring developers, designers, sales, customer success, and leadership into the vision. explain the why behind every decision with clarity and conviction. make people believe in what you're building.

iterate without ego. ship. learn. throw away what isn't working. do it again, better. you treat every release as a conversation with your users, not a finish line.

obsess over every detail. the micro-copy. the three-click flow that should be one. the first-time user experience. nothing is too small if it shapes how a customer feels. we have an eye for every detail at gofive — and so will you.

do whatever it takes. there is no "that's not my job" here. if the product needs it, you find a way. you pick up what's dropped, you fill the gaps, you go the extra mile without being asked. the product's success is your success — and you feel that in your bones.

qualifications

we care far less about your resume than about how you think and how you operate. this role is open to candidates from any background — product, design, engineering, business, customer success, or none of the above — as long as you bring the right fundamentals.

what we're looking for:

relentless curiosity — you study products, markets, and customers not because someone asked you to, but because you genuinely can't stop

self-driven and hungry — you don't need to be told what to do next; you see what needs doing and you go do it

extreme ownership — you treat every outcome as yours, even when it's hard, even when it's inconvenient

comfort with ambiguity — you can operate in a fast-moving environment where the path isn't always clear and that energizes you, not paralyzes you

a natural communicator — you can make complex ideas simple and bring a room full of different stakeholders to the same page

data curiosity — you ask questions of numbers, not just accept them; you dig, hypothesize, and let evidence challenge your assumptions

empathy for users — you feel genuinely bothered when something is hard to use, and genuinely satisfied when you make it better

nice to have — but never required:

prior experience in product management, ux, or a technical role

familiarity with agile / scrum environments

exposure to ai tools or ai-integrated product thinking

experience in saas, b2b software, hr tech, or crm

ability to prototype in figma or no-code tools

job description:
design, develop, and maintain robust data pipelines using databricks, pyspark, and sparksql
implement and manage data workflows aligned with medallion architecture (bronze, silver, gold layers)
build and optimize data models, including star and snowflake schemas, to support analytics and reporting

work with relational databases such as mssql and postgresql for data storage and transformation
participate in agile ceremonies and contribute to continuous improvement of development processes
(optional) develop and maintain workflows using apache airflow
qualifications:
bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer engineering, computer science, or a related field
minimum 5 years of experience in technical or data-related roles
at least 2+ years of hands-on experience developing data pipelines using databricks, pyspark, and sparksql
strong understanding of medallion architecture and multi-hop data processing (bronze, silver, gold)
solid knowledge of data modeling techniques, including star and snowflake schemas
proficiency in python and sql
experience working with relational databases such as mssql and postgresql
experience working in agile or scrum environments
willingness to work on a 6-month contract

responsibilities

perform manual functional, integration, regression, and api testing (e.g., using postman) across web and mobile applications, while driving the transition toward test automation.
plan, design, and execute manual test planning and testing strategies for complex software systems.
develop and maintain automated test scripts using robot framework, playwright, and other appropriate tools.
write robust, scalable test code in python, javascript, and typescript.
collaborate closely with developers, product owners, and business analysts to understand requirements and ensure test coverage aligns with business goals.
define, maintain, and improve automation frameworks and ci/cd integration.
review and optimize existing test coverage and automation efficiency.
identify, document, and track defects.
provide mentorship and technical guidance to junior qa team members.
contribute to continuous improvement initiatives within the qa team and across engineering teams.
analyze test results and provide clear, actionable feedback to stakeholders.
ensure quality practices are embedded early through shift-left testing.


requirements


5+ years of experience in software testing, including automation.
proficient in robot framework for automation testing.
intermediate to advance level programming skills in python, javascript, and typescript for developing and maintaining automated test scripts.
solid understanding of web technologies, apis, and test automation frameworks.
experience integrating tests into ci/cd pipelines (e.g., jenkins, gitlab ci, github actions).
hands-on experience with sql and querying relational databases such as mysql or postgresql.
strong problem-solving skills and pay attention to details.
ability to independently plan and execute test activities.
strong communication skills, able to explain technical ideas clearly to both technical and non-technical team members.
experience coaching and mentoring junior testers or qa engineers.
self-driven, proactive, and able to work under pressure.
good command of english, both written and spoken.

position:                      business analyst (sap ewm/wm)
level:                           deputy department manager
work location:           bangkok (sm tower building), monday - friday: onsite

job purpose:
the business analyst is an impact role responsible for bridging the gap between business needs and technical solutions. this role plays a pivotal part in analyzing business processes, identifying opportunities for improvement, and translating requirements into actionable plans for project teams.

job responsibilities:
1. requirements elicitation and documentation
   - collaborate with stakeholders to gather, analyze, and document business requirements.
   - conduct interviews, workshops, and surveys to understand business needs.
   - translate high-level business goals into detailed functional and non-functional requirements.
   - create comprehensive requirement specifications, use cases, and user stories.
2. business process analysis
   - analyze current business processes to identify inefficiencies and areas for improvement.
   - model and document existing and proposed business processes using techniques such as bpmn.
   - collaborate with process owners to streamline workflows and optimize operations.
3. data analysis and reporting
   - analyze data to identify trends, patterns, and insights that support decision-making.
   - develop and maintain reports, dashboards, and data visualizations.
4. solution evaluation and recommendation
   - evaluate potential solutions and technologies to address business challenges.
   - provide recommendations based on cost-benefit analysis and alignment with business goals.
   - collaborate with it teams to ensure proposed solutions meet technical requirements.
5. change management and stakeholder communication
   - act as a liaison between business stakeholders and project teams.
   - manage change requests and communicate changes to all relevant parties.
   - facilitate communication and collaboration among project stakeholders.
   - assist in the development of change management plans.
6. testing and quality assurance
   - support in developing test plans and test cases based on business requirements.
   - participate in user acceptance testing (uat) and quality assurance processes.
   - ensure that delivered solutions meet the specified requirements.
7. documentation and training
   - create user manuals, training materials, and documentation for end-users.
   - involved in conducting training sessions and workshops for end-users.
   - ensure end-users are proficient in using new systems and processes.

education/training qualifications:
- bachelor's or master's degree in a relevant field (e.g., business, information technology).

experience:
- 5 to 10 years of experience in business analysis or related roles.
- strong proficiency in requirement elicitation and documentation.
- experience with business process modeling and data analysis.
 - knowledge of sap ewm/wm is a plus

about the role 

we are looking for an experienced microsoft dynamics 365 crm (ce) & power platform developer to design, develop, and implement enterprise-grade business applications. this role focuses on building scalable crm customizations and power platform solutions—including power automate, canvas apps, modeldriven apps, and power pages. 

you will work closely with business stakeholders to deliver end-to-end digital solutions that streamline operations, enhance customer engagement, and support the organization’s strategic goals. 

 

key responsibilities 

dynamics 365 customer engagement (crm) 

develop and customize modeldriven apps, entities, forms, views, and business rules. 

build and maintain custom plugins, custom workflow activities, and javascript client-side logic. 

configure and manage security roles, business process flows, and solution layering. 

integrate dynamics 365 with external systems via apis, azure functions, or middleware. 

optimize system performance and troubleshoot complex crm issues. 

power platform 

build end-to-end canvas apps, modeldriven apps, and power pages. 

create scalable and automated business processes using power automate. 

design data models in dataverse, ensuring clean architecture and governance. 

implement power platform best practices: alm, solution segmentation, environment strategy. 

general responsibilities 

collect and translate business requirements into technical designs. 

maintain technical documentation, architecture diagrams, and deployment guides. 

work with product, operations, and it teams to deliver integrated digital solutions. 

support upgrades, patches, and solution lifecycle management. 

 

required skills & qualifications 

3+ years of hands-on experience with dynamics 365 customer engagement (crm). 

strong experience with:  

power apps (canvas & model-driven) 

power automate 

power pages (preferred) 

dataverse 

proficiency in:  

c#, .net framework 

javascript / typescript 

sql server, fetchxml, linq 

proven experience developing:  

plugins 

custom workflow activities 

web resources 

integration with external apis 

understanding of alm using azure devops, git, and solution branching. 

strong analytical, communication, and problemsolving skills. 

 

preferred qualifications 

microsoft certifications such as:  

pl400 (power platform developer) 

mb210 / mb220 / mb230 (d365 functional tracks) 

pl200 (power platform functional) 

experience with:  

azure functions / logic apps 

ci/cd pipelines for power platform 

modern solution architecture (event-driven, microservices)
