• internal users support on it technical problems

 

job qualifications:

education: bachelor's degree or higher of computer science, it engineering or other related fields.

proven working experience as an it  or relevant experience

excellent knowledge of technical management, information analysis and of computer hardware/software systems

hands-on experience with network service, network device administration, linux, vmware.

knowledge in database such as ms sql server, oracle.

ability to manage personnel

strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem solving abilities

senior programmer

responsibilities:

วิเคราะห์และทำความเข้าใจความต้องการ : ทำงานร่วมกับผู้พัฒนาระบบ หรือ ผู้ใช้งานระบบ เพื่อทำความเข้าใจถึงความต้องการและวัตถุประสงค์ของระบบที่ต้องการพัฒนา
ออกแบบและวางโครงสร้าง (ในบางกรณี) : ช่วยในการออกแบบโครงสร้างระบบฐานข้อมูล หรือ ส่วนประกอบต่างๆ ก่อนเริ่มเขียนโปรแกรม
เขียนและพัฒนาโค้ด : พัฒนาระบบโค้ดด้วยภาษาโปรแกรมต่างๆ

o frontend: vuejs + quasar
o basckend: golang , nodejs
o database: neo4j
o report: jsreport
o erp: microsoft dynamics 365
o api กับ microsoft dynamics 365

ทดสอบและแก้ไขข้อบกพร่อง (debug): ทำการทดสอบฟังชั่นต่างๆ ของโปรแกรมเพื่อหาข้อผิดพลาด และทำการแก้ไขเพื่อให้ระบบทำงานได้อย่างถูกต้องและมีประสิทธิภาพ
บำรุงรักษาและอัปเดต : หลักจากนำโปรแกรมไปใช้งานจริ่ง (deploy) อาจมีหน้าที่ในการดูแล บำรุงรักษาแก้ไขปัญหาที่เกิดขึ้น และเพิ่มฟังชั่นใหม่ๆ ตามความต้องการในอนาคต
จัดทำเอกสารประกอบ : จัดทำเอกสารที่เกี่ยวข้องกับระบบและการพัฒนาโปรแกรม

qualifications:

จบการศึกษาระดับปริญญาตรี (หรือสูงกว่า) สาขาวิทยาการคอมพิวเตอร์ mis หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง.

ทักษะด้าน hard skills:

ความรู้ด้านภาษาโปรแกรม : เชี่ยวชาญภาษาโปรแกรมที่เกี่ยวข้องกับสายงาน เช่น vue.js + quasar, golang, nodejs, javascript, html/css, sql เป็นต้น
ความเข้าใจในวงการพัฒนาซอฟต์แวร์ : เข้าใจกระบวนการตั้งแต่การวิเคราะห์ ออกแบบ พัฒนา ทดสอบ ไปจนถึงการติดตั้งและบำรุงรักษา
การจัดการฐานข้อมูล : มีความรู้และสามารถจัดการฐษนข้อมูลได้ เช่น neo4j

ทักษะด้าน soft skill:

มีความเป็นผู้นำ มีทักษะการจัดการ การบริหารเวลา และการสื่อสารที่ดี
การแก้ปัญหา (problem-solving): สามารถวิเคราะห์ปัญหาและคิดหาวิธีแก้ไขได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ
ความละเอียดรอบคอบ : การทำงานกับโค้ดต้องใช้ความแม่นยำสูง เพื่อลดข้อผิดพลาด
การสื่อสารและการทำงานเป็นทีม : สามารสื่อสารและทำงานร่วมกับเพื่อนร่วมทีม (เช่น designer project manager) ได้ดี
ความกระตือรือร้นในการเรียนรู้ : อุตสาหกรรมเทคโนโลยีการเปลี่ยนแปลงอย่างรวดเร็ว จึงต้องพร้อมเรียนรู้สิ่งใหม่ๆ อยู่เสมอ

Company: ผู้ประกอบการไม่เปิดเผยชื่อบริษัท
Job_Description:
roles and responsibilities



work with a team to provide appropriate infrastructure server/network operational for system requirement from business need.

able to provide troubleshooting, provide the root cause analysis and permanence solutions to fix root cause.

learn, understand and respond with system requirement in order to create/ maintain infrastructure configuration documentation.

communicate to requester for system requirement discussion.

monitor and take actions as a system engineer to complete task according to agreed quality standards.

coordinate and communicate with any parties to fix issues and apply the permanent solution to stop the continuous issues.

responding in timely manner to service issues.

qualifications



bachelor degree in computer engineer or related fields.

at least 1-2 years’ experience in it infrastructure engineer or related it position.

has a skill or experience in infrastructure server operational/ configuration/ scripting change under server/ operating system / network requirements

self-motivated and results-driven

good communication and presentation

good communication skills, both verbal and written in english

positive attitude and open mind

able to work under pressure and flexible time

บริษัทกำลังมองหา software engineer – digital transformation ที่มีประสบการณ์ เพื่อพัฒนาและปรับปรุงระบบดิจิทัลขององค์กร โดยมีหน้าที่หลักในการออกแบบและพัฒนาซอฟต์แวร์เพื่อช่วยให้ทุกแผนกในบริษัทสามารถทำงานได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพมากขึ้น ผ่านการใช้ระบบอัตโนมัติ การวิเคราะห์ข้อมูล และการเชื่อมต่อระบบต่าง ๆ ภายในองค์กร

ผู้สมัครจะมีบทบาทสำคัญในการ ปรับปรุงกระบวนการทำงานขององค์กรให้เป็นระบบดิจิทัล (digital transformation) ครอบคลุมตั้งแต่ฝ่ายขาย การผลิต การจัดซื้อ คลังสินค้า ไปจนถึงการบริหารจัดการข้อมูล




responsibilities / หน้าที่ความรับผิดชอบ:

analyze and design software systems to improve departmental processes

วิเคราะห์และออกแบบระบบซอฟต์แวร์เพื่อปรับปรุงกระบวนการทำงานของแต่ละแผนก

develop web applications and internal tools for organizational use

พัฒนาเว็บแอปพลิเคชันและเครื่องมือภายในองค์กรเพื่อใช้งาน

develop dashboards and data analytics to support management decision-making

พัฒนาระบบวิเคราะห์ข้อมูลเพื่อช่วยในการตัดสินใจของผู้บริหาร

connect various systems (erp, crm, mes, and inventory systems)

เชื่อมต่อระบบต่าง ๆ (erp, crm, mes, and inventory systems)

develop apis and integration systems between internal and external software

พัฒนา api และระบบการเชื่อมต่อระหว่างซอฟต์แวร์ภายในและภายนอกองค์กร

develop automation systems to reduce repetitive tasks

พัฒนาระบบอัติโนมัติเพื่อลดงานที่ทำซ้ำ

collaborate with engineering, sales, production, and management teams to design appropriate systems

ทำงานร่วมกับทีมวิศวกร ฝ่ายขาย ฝ่ายผลิต และฝ่ายบริหาร เพื่อออกแบบระบบที่เหมาะสม

maintain and develop the organization's software systems to ensure stability and future scalability

ดูแลและพัฒนาระบบซอฟต์แวร์ขององค์กรให้มีความเสถียรและสามารถขยายได้ในอนาคต




qualifications / คุณสมบัติ:

bachelor's degree or higher in computer engineering, software engineering, or a related field.

จบปริญญาตรีหรือสูงกว่าในสาขาวิศวกรรมคอมพิวเตอร์ วิศวกรรมซอฟท์แวร์ หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

at least 5 years of experience in software development

มีประสบการณ์ด้านการพัฒนาซอฟท์แวร์อย่างน้อย 5 ปี

experience developing web applications or enterprise systems

มีประสบการณ์พัฒนาแอปพลิเคชันบนเว็บหรือระบบองค์กร

knowledge of programming languages such as python, javascript / node.js or other related languages.

มีความรู้ภาษาโปรแกรม python, javascript / node.js หรือภาษาอื่นที่เกี่ยวข้อง

experience with databases (sql / postgresql / mysql)

มีประสบการณ์การทำงานฐานข้อมูล (sql / postgresql / mysql)

understanding of api systems and system integration

มีความเข้าใจระบบ api และระบบเชื่อมต่อ

skills in system analysis and software architecture design

มีทักษะในการวิเคราะห์ระบบและออกแบบโครงสร้างซอฟต์แวร์




special qualifications / คุณสมบัติที่พิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ :

มีประสบการณณ์เกี่ยวกับ erp / mes / manufacturing systems

มีประสบการณ์ด้าน data analytics / dashboard development

มีความเข้าใจ industry 4.0 / smart factory

มีประสบการณ์ทำ automation / workflow systems




skills / ทักษะ:

system analysis / การวิเคราะห์ระบบ

software architecture technical / การออกแบบซอฟต์แวร์

problem solving / การแก้ไขปัญหาเชิงเทคนิค

collaboration with multiple departments within the organization / การทำงานร่วมกับหลายแผนกในองค์กร

systems thinking and process improvement / ความคิดเชิงระบบและการปรับปรุงกระบวนการทำงาน

responsibilities
1. technical support & troubleshooting

provide it support to internal users (onsite and remote).

diagnose and resolve issues related to computers, peripherals, software, email, printers, and networking.

install, configure, and maintain desktops, laptops, operating systems, and business applications.

perform root-cause analysis and apply systematic troubleshooting methods.

2. device & system administration

manage and maintain it assets including computers, mobile devices, network equipment, and peripherals.

keep it inventory and asset records up to date.

ensure data backup compliance and maintain endpoint security (antivirus, patches, system updates).

3. network & security support (basic)

support basic network tasks such as lan/wifi setup, ip address configuration, and network troubleshooting.

coordinate with network engineers/isps for advanced or escalated network issues.

4. documentation & user training

create and maintain user guides, troubleshooting steps, and technical documentation.

provide basic user training on new software, tools, and it policies.

5. vendor & internal coordination

coordinate with external vendors for equipment maintenance, purchasing, and repairs.

report incidents, resolutions, and ongoing issues to the it supervisor/manager.

รายละเอียดงาน 

ให้คำปรึกษาและจัดทำเอกสารสำหรับระบบมาตรฐานด้าน it และ cybersecurity เช่น iso 27001, iso 20000, iso 27701, iso 38500 เป็นต้น

สนับสนุนการพัฒนาและประเมินระบบบริหารความเสี่ยงด้าน it, it security และการปฏิบัติตามกฎหมาย

วางแผนและออกแบบมาตรการควบคุมด้าน it ให้สอดคล้องกับข้อกำหนดของหน่วยงานกำกับ เช่น bot, oic, sec, pdpa และ พ.ร.บ.ไซเบอร์

ตรวจประเมินภายใน และจัดทำรายงานตามมาตรฐานสากลและข้อกำหนดด้าน it

ร่วมตรวจสอบระบบ it ให้กับองค์กรชั้นนำ รวมถึงบริษัทในตลาดหลักทรัพย์

ทำงานแบบ hybrid ส่วนใหญ่ work from home และไป onsite บ้างตามการนัดหมายกับลูกค้า


คุณสมบัติ 

วุฒิการศึกษาระดับปริญญาตรีขึ้นไป ในสาขาเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ, วิศวกรรมคอมพิวเตอร์, ความปลอดภัยไซเบอร์ หรือสาขาอื่นที่เกี่ยวข้อง

มีประสบการณ์อย่างน้อย 2 ปีในงานด้าน it compliance, it audit, iso standard หรือ it governance หรือน้องจบใหม่ก็ยินดีพิจารณา

มีความรู้หรือประสบการณ์ในการปฏิบัติงานตามมาตรฐานสากลและข้อกำหนด เช่น

iso/iec 27001, iso/iec 20000

พ.ร.บ. คุ้มครองข้อมูลส่วนบุคคล (pdpa)

กฎเกณฑ์จากหน่วยงานกำกับดูแล เช่น ธปท. (bot), คปภ. (oic), กลต. (sec)

พ.ร.บ. ความมั่นคงปลอดภัยไซเบอร์

สามารถวิเคราะห์ข้อกำหนด กฎหมาย และมาตรฐานต่างๆ และแปลงเป็นแนวทางปฏิบัติสำหรับองค์กรได้อย่างชัดเจน

มีทักษะในการสื่อสารที่ดี ทั้งการนำเสนอ การเขียนรายงาน และการทำงานร่วมกับทีมและลูกค้า

หากมีใบรับรองวิชาชีพที่เกี่ยวข้อง เช่น iso 27001 la, cisa, cism, cissp หรือ itil จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

มีทัศนคติที่ดี มีความรับผิดชอบ กระตือรือร้น และพร้อมเรียนรู้สิ่งใหม่ๆ อยู่เสมอ

สามารถบริหารจัดการเวลาได้เป็นอย่างดี และบริหารจัดการงานได้ภายใต้แรงกดดัน




สิ่งที่คุณจะได้รับ

ได้ทำงานกับลูกค้าองค์กรชั้นนำ ทั้งภาครัฐ และเอกชน

ได้พัฒนาทักษะในมาตรฐานสากลและกฎหมายด้าน it compliance & cybersecurity

ได้ร่วมงานกับทีมที่มีความเชี่ยวชาญเฉพาะทาง พร้อมบรรยากาศการทำงานที่สนับสนุนการเติบโต

โอกาสในการสอบใบรับรองทางวิชาชีพ พร้อมการสนับสนุนด้านการเรียนรู้

Job_Title: Senior IT Manager - Technical & Infrastructure Service (BJC-DSC Logistics)
Job_Description:
responsibilities:

support the country it lead in defining short- and long-term it infrastructure strategy, fully aligned with regional and global it directions.

ensure infrastructure standards, methodologies, and governance (including depict) are understood and embedded in all deployments.

contribute to the execution of it integration programs and strategic digitalization initiatives.

lead end-to-end it infrastructure implementation for internal and external customer sites, including network, servers, cloud solutions, end-user devices, warehouse & transport operational systems connectivity and site readiness & go-live execution.

manage project budgets and cost controls, ensuring delivery within financial targets.

escalate issues and drive timely resolutions across technical, operational, and vendor teams.

ensure all infrastructure solutions meet customer operational requirements and support business continuity.

drive continuous improvement, identify technology gaps, and recommend optimization opportunities.

support the adoption of new technologies and innovations that accelerate digitalization and standardization across sites.

build strong working relationships with internal business units, country it teams, regional it, and global pmo.

support business development initiatives by providing infrastructure insights for new customer solutions.




qualifications:

minimum 10 years working experience in it preferably in logistics industry

minimum 5 years of project management experience (team member, leader, or manager)

demonstrated experience implementing or managing infrastructure-related it projects

experience in it infrastructure and support for wms/tms system 

deep understanding of it infrastructure (network, servers, cloud, systems connectivity)

ability to influence, negotiate, and manage stakeholders

knowledge of supply chain systems (wms, tms, inventory, logistics systems) is a strong advantage

fluent in thai and able to communication in english

Job_Title: IT Business Partner Lead - Technical and Production
Job_Description:
we're nestle. we are the world's leading food and beverage company that contributes to thailand's economy, society and the environment. join us in delivering our purpose of 'unlocking the power of food to enhance quality of life for everyone, today and for generations to come'




position snapshot

location: bangkok, head office
company: nestlé
business unit/division: it (full - time)
strong knowledge in manufacturing execution system (mes)




a day in a life...

acts as principal contact for function leadership team and it stakeholders through the products and services lifecycle.

understands business requirements and provides receivers with a consistent and effective experience in working with it teams starting from the creation of  (multi-) functional roadmaps to deployments, sustain and up to elimination of functional legacy solutions. where applicable the frm is accountable for the demand management processes within it streams.

work closely with finance leadership team to define joint technology roadmap- inclusive of legacy and global solution and will be a part for functional leadership team and it leadership team. 

partner with internal and external stakeholders to define, plan, execute and refine strategy, definitions, and roadmaps to supports the market’s digital roadmaps

accountable for ensuring all applications within their market are delivered and maintained secure and compliant with internal standards and external regulations, including privacy requirements, business continuity plans etc.

supports the prompt deployment of global digital t&p solutions and processes in the market and ensures proper knowledge build up during deployments

responsible for tracking the markets knowledge levels through relevant metrics and driving continuous improvement through learning modules

responsible for operational support to the technical function

responsible for isms compliance for it solutions in technical function

follow up progress of t&p initiatives with market and bam team.

works closely with corp engineer to ensure proper  support of automation layer for digital deployments

provide support for market audits




are you a fit?

bachelor’s degree in an engineering or it field

15+ years of experience in business operations/ factory and projects with 4-5 year of proven experience of leading digital transformation

strong working relationship with the t&p business community across all levels

interest in technology solutions to improve business performance

stakeholder management experience with proven record of successfully managing complex stakeholder network

experience working for or with a global matrixed organization including with virtual teams

strong knowledge of manufacturing processes & product categories  within their market

about placed au 

placed au is a recruitment company that connects thai professionals with australian businesses. we support australian companies in building high-quality teams in thailand. 

our client is currently looking for an ai specialist to join their bangkok team to build and implement ai solutions for client's business operations. 

role overview 

this role focuses on designing and implementing ai solutions to improve clients' business processes, efficiency, and scalability. you will act as a problem-solver, delivering practical ai tools, automations, and systems used across the organization. 




key responsibilities 

identify opportunities to apply ai in internal business processes.  

design, build, and implement ai solutions (automation, chatbots, internal tools, analytics).  

translate business needs into functional ai workflows and systems.  

integrate ai tools into existing internal platforms and operations.  

develop and maintain ai-powered automation and process improvements.  

collaborate with cross-functional teams (operations, hr, finance, etc.).  

continuously optimize and scale ai solutions across the business.  




requirements 

2–5 years of experience in ai, data, automation, or related roles.  

proven experience in building and implementing ai solutions for business use.  

hands-on experience with ai tools, apis, or automation platforms.  

experience with tools such as python, sql, or workflow automation tools (e.g., zapier, make).  

ability to take solutions from concept through implementation to deployment. 

strong problem-solving skills with a focus on execution.  

good english communication skills (written and spoken).  




nice to have 

experience working in a startup, consulting, or fast-paced environment.  

familiarity with process improvement or digital transformation.  

experience integrating ai into business operations (hr, sales, finance, etc.).  

experience working in an international setting. 


 benefits

12 days of annual leave

travel allowance 

birthday voucher + additional leave 

health insurance 

flexible benefits budget


additional information 

at this time, we are unable to offer visa sponsorship or work permits for candidates. applicants must have existing authorization to work in thailand. 

shortlisted candidates will receive an invitation to complete a video interview before proceeding to the next step of the recruitment process.

Company: ttb spark - TMBThanachart Bank or ttb
Job_Description:
job summary:

developing, maintaining, and enhancing software applications, working closely with cross‑functional teams throughout the sdlc. the ideal candidate has strong experience in java, spring boot, sql/nosql, and agile development, with additional advantages in microservices, devops, and cloud technologies. this role requires analytical thinking, problem‑solving skills, and the ability to provide technical support and guidance.


job description:

develop and maintain software applications.

collaborate with cross-functional teams

participate in the software development life cycle (sdlc)

write clean and efficient code

conduct software testing and debugging

collaborate on code reviews

monitor and maintain existing software systems

stay updated with industry trends and technologies

document software processes and specifications

provide technical support


qualifications:

degree in engineering, mis, computer science, or related fields

at least 3-8 years of experiences in software development in (mobile banking is a plus)

main programming languages in java, spring boot framework.

pl/sql, sql/nosql database e.g., mysql, postgresql, oracle, mongodb

microservices architecture is a plus

container (docker, kubernetes, openshift) platform is a plus

deployment and devops is a plus

Job_Title: Senior IT Support Specialist (Securities / Brokerage business)
Job_Description:
position description 

we are seeking an experienced senior it support specialist with strong expertise in back-office it systems used by the thai capital market, particularly systems supporting the stock exchange of thailand (set). this role will lead technical support, system operations, and enhancements to ensure smooth trade matching, clearing, and settlement processes.

the ideal candidate is a hands-on professional with securities industry experience who can collaborate effectively with both local and global it teams. this role focuses on delivering high-quality technical support, meeting project deadlines, and continuously improving system reliability and end-user satisfaction.

this position suits a motivated professional seeking a dynamic environment with opportunities to work with advanced trading technologies and financial systems.

key areas of responsibilities

collaborate with front-office, back-office, and settlement teams to ensure data accuracy and timely processing.

support daily reconciliation, settlement activities, and resolve discrepancies promptly.

assist in system upgrades, patches, and configuration changes to enhance operational efficiency.

monitor system performance, troubleshoot issues, and coordinate with vendors for resolution.

document all systems, applications, and scheduled maintenance activities.

participate in meetings with set, sec regulators, and internal teams to discuss issues, projects, and strategy.

provide technical support for the pre-settlement matching system (psms) used in the thai market.

deep understanding of the set and sec reporting requirements.

worked with local vendors on client confirmation reports.

knowledge of thai trading applications, exchange connectivity, and trade clearing/settlement processes.

support trade settlement activities, troubleshooting promptly to ensure smooth operations.

understand trade reconciliation from post trade to settlement to ensure correct and timely settlement.

support the testing and implementation of new functionality or system enhancements

validate and ensure the correctness of regulatory reports filed with set.

ensure compliance with local regulations and support regulatory reporting requirements.

supporting existing staff with their day-to-day needs is a secondary responsibility.

requirements

bachelor’s degree in information technology, computer science, or related field.

minimum 10 years of experience in securities or brokerage business, supporting trading or back-office it systems related to the thai stock market.

strong knowledge of set trading processes, clearing, settlement, and regulatory reporting requirements.

experience supporting trading platforms, exchange connectivity, and market data systems.

familiarity with tools such as bloomberg, ifis, or thaiquest is an advantage.

understanding of it infrastructure including windows desktop environments, networking, voice systems, and data center operations.

strong troubleshooting, analytical, and problem-solving skills.

ability to work effectively under pressure in a fast-paced financial environment.

fluent communication skills in both thai and english.

able to work independently while collaborating effectively within a small team.

Company: University of The Thai Chamber of Commerce
Job_Description:
บทบาทและความรับผิดชอบ:

สำรวจและนำเทคโนโลยี generative ai เช่น llms (large language models), diffusion models, และ gans มาใช้ในโครงการและบริการขององค์กร

ออกแบบและพัฒนา web application และ mobile application ที่บูรณาการความสามารถของ generative ai เพื่อสร้างประสบการณ์ใช้งานที่ทันสมัยและใช้งานง่าย

พัฒนา api และ backend services เพื่อเชื่อมต่อโมเดล ai เข้ากับระบบงานต่าง ๆ ขององค์กร

สร้างและบริหาร ai pipeline สำหรับการฝึกอบรมและปรับแต่งโมเดล generative ai ให้เหมาะกับการใช้งานเฉพาะด้าน

ทดสอบและประเมิน ประสิทธิภาพของโมเดลและระบบ ai-integrated applications ในสภาพแวดล้อมจริง

ทำงานร่วมกับทีม ux/ui เพื่อออกแบบ user experience ที่เหมาะสมและสอดคล้องกับศักยภาพของ generative ai

ติดตามความก้าวหน้าและอัปเดตเทคโนโลยี generative ai, web frameworks และ mobile platforms เพื่อนำมาปรับใช้กับโครงการ

ให้การสนับสนุนด้านเทคนิคและแก้ไขปัญหาที่เกี่ยวข้องกับการใช้งาน generative ai ภายในระบบ web และ app

จัดทำรายงานผลการดำเนินงานและนำเสนอแนวทางการพัฒนาอย่างต่อเนื่องเพื่อให้ระบบ ai สอดคล้องกับมาตรฐานคุณภาพและความต้องการขององค์กร

คุณสมบัติ:

ประสบการณ์การทำงานในสายงาน ai/ml โดยเฉพาะในด้าน generative ai

ปริญญาตรีหรือสูงกว่าในสาขา computer science, artificial intelligence, หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

มีความเชี่ยวชาญในเทคโนโลยี generative ai เช่น hugging face transformers, stable diffusion, dall·e, midjourney หรือ gpt

มีประสบการณ์ในการใช้งาน api และ sdk ของโมเดล generative ai เช่น openai api, cohere api หรือ aws bedrock

มีความเข้าใจในสถาปัตยกรรมโมเดล nlp และ computer vision

มีทักษะในการวิเคราะห์ข้อมูลและการจัดการ pipeline สำหรับ ai

มีทักษะด้าน web development (เช่น html, css, javascript, react, หรือ vue.js) เพื่อสร้าง frontend ที่ผสาน generative ai

มีทักษะด้าน app development (เช่น flutter, react native, หรือ swift/java/kotlin) สำหรับพัฒนา mobile application ที่เชื่อมต่อกับ ai services

มีความเข้าใจด้าน backend development (เช่น node.js, python django/flask, หรือ fastapi) เพื่อเชื่อมต่อระบบ ai กับฐานข้อมูลและบริการขององค์กร

Job_Title: System Administrator / IT Infrastructure Engineer (English Speaking)
Job_Description:
job summary

we are looking for a hands-on system administrator / it infrastructure engineer to support and maintain our internal it infrastructure, network systems, and security controls. this role will be responsible for ensuring system reliability, network performance, and secure access across the organization.




key responsibilities

manage and maintain windows server and/or linux environments, including installation, configuration, patching, and performance monitoring.

administer and support active directory (ad) and group policy (gpo), including user access control and policy enforcement.

configure and maintain network infrastructure, including firewalls, vlans, vpns, and wi-fi systems.

monitor system performance and ensure availability of infrastructure through monitoring tools and alert systems.

perform backup and recovery operations, and ensure data integrity and business continuity.

handle incident response and troubleshooting for infrastructure and network-related issues.

implement and maintain it security practices, including access control, endpoint protection, and basic security hardening.

collaborate with internal teams and external vendors to support it operations and projects.

maintain documentation for systems, configurations, and processes.




qualifications

bachelor’s degree in it, computer science, or related field.

2–3 years of experience in system administration / it infrastructure / network roles.

hands-on experience with windows server and/or linux systems, active directory and group policy, network configuration. (firewall, vlan, vpn, wi-fi)

experience with backup systems, monitoring tools, and incident handling.

basic understanding of it security and access control concepts.

familiarity with cloud environments (e.g., aws, azure) is a plus.

strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently.




what we offer

opportunity to work in a fast-growing fintech environment.

exposure to modern infrastructure and payment systems.

collaborative and dynamic work culture.

competitive compensation and career growth opportunities.

Job_Description:
job summary

the automate test engineer is responsible for designing, developing, and executing automated test scripts to ensure the quality, reliability, and performance of the bank’s digital platforms across mobile, web, and tablet channels. the role analyzes business and functional requirements, prepares test data, enhances testing tools and processes, and drives continuous improvement of automation practices. this position ensures timely test execution, supports uat and unit testing activities, and contributes to delivering secure and seamless digital banking experiences.

job description

create test strategy and related documentation when required

understand business requirements, functional specifications, and other project artifacts to develop extensive test scripts which include all exception possibilities. test are designed with a focus on reuse and maintainability

prepare test data and assist with the scheduling of testing during projects

drive continuous improvement of test processes

identify and enhance testing tools to streamline testing process (example: test tracking, test case templates, defect management)

ensure that the test execution is done according to the timeline set including planning for contingency in case of errors

monitor ระบบ ให้สามารถทำงานได้ราบรื่น หากพบสิ่งผิดปกติสามารถแก้ไขปัญหาได้ก่อนที่จะเกิดปัญหาและกระทบต่อการใช้งาน

บริหารวางแผนการสำรองข้อมูล, กู้คืนข้อมูล, กำหนดสิทธิ์ในการเข้าถึงในระบบที่ดูแล

ทำงานร่วมกับทีม infra เพื่อจัดการเรื่อง monitoring, logging และ alerting system

วิเคราะห์และหาแนวทางป้องกัน downtime ของระบบ

ดูแลและพัฒนาเครื่องมือที่ช่วยให้ทีมพัฒนาทำงานได้สะดวกขึ้น (เช่น automation tools, kubernetes, terraform เป็นต้น)

dermaster เป็นสถาบันสุขภาพและความงามชั้นนำของประเทศไทย ให้บริการด้านศัลยกรรมความงามและเวชศาสตร์ความงาม ด้วยเทคโนโลยีทางการแพทย์ที่ทันสมัยและมาตรฐานความปลอดภัยระดับสากล

2. it support & infrastructure management

กำกับและดูแลการให้บริการ it support แก่พนักงานทุกหน่วยงาน

วางมาตรฐานการแก้ไขปัญหา it (incident / request / priority)

ดูแลระบบเครือข่าย อุปกรณ์ it และระบบพื้นฐานให้พร้อมใช้งาน

3. system security & data protection

กำกับดูแลสิทธิ์การเข้าถึงระบบ (user access control)

วางแนวทางการสำรองข้อมูล (backup) และการป้องกันข้อมูลสูญหาย

สนับสนุนการใช้งานระบบที่เกี่ยวข้องกับข้อมูลลูกค้าและการดำเนินงานของคลินิกอย่างปลอดภัย

ประสานงานด้าน it security กับผู้ที่เกี่ยวข้อง

4. vendor & external system management

ประสานงานและควบคุมการทำงานของ vendor / outsource ด้านระบบ it

ประเมินคุณภาพงาน ค่าใช้จ่าย และความคุ้มค่าในการใช้บริการภายนอก

ดูแลการเชื่อมต่อระบบภายในกับระบบภายนอก (ถ้ามี)

5. planning, reporting & continuous improvement

วางแผนงาน it ระยะสั้น–กลาง ให้สอดคล้องกับทิศทางองค์กร

จัดทำรายงานสถานะระบบ ปัญหา และแนวทางปรับปรุง เสนอผู้บริหาร

เสนอแนวคิดในการพัฒนาระบบและกระบวนการทำงานด้าน it ให้มีประสิทธิภาพมากขึ้น

6. งานอื่น ๆ

ปฏิบัติงานให้เป็นไปตามนโยบาย ระเบียบ และมาตรฐานขององค์กร

รายละเอียดงาน

ทำงานร่วมกับทีม ในการทดสอบเจาะระบบหรืออ่านโค้ดเพื่อหาช่องโหว่ให้ระบบขององค์กรชั้นนำทั้งในไทย และต่างประเทศ (เราดำเนินงานตามมาตรฐานสากล และถูกต้องตามกฏหมาย)

งานหลัก ๆ ส่วนมากจะเป็นการทดสอบระบบที่เป็นเว็บ กับแอปพลิเคชันโทรศัพท์มือถือ

หาความรู้ทางด้านความปลอดภัยของระบบเพื่อแนะนำลูกค้า และพัฒนาตัวเองอยู่ตลอดเวลา

นอกจากการทำการทดสอบความปลอดภัยเว็บ และแอปโทรศัพท์มือถือจะได้ทำงานที่มีความท้าทาย เช่น หาช่องโหว่ใน firmware ของ embedded device ในโรงงาน, driver ของ os, ประเมินความสามารถของผลิตภัณฑ์ด้านความปลอดภัย เช่น anti-virus, fireeye หรือ mdm solution ต่าง ๆ, ทดสอบความปลอดภัยระบบป้องกันการโกงเกม, e-kyc, mfa/otp, ตรวจสอบกระบวนการเข้ารหัสของแอป, การทำ reverse engineering/binary exploitation และอื่น ๆ

job purpose

the senior infrastructure architect is responsible for designing, evaluating, and implementing it infrastructure solutions that support the organization’s business operations and long-term strategy. they work across teams to ensure infrastructure components—including hardware, cloud services, and network systems—are integrated, scalable, secure, and aligned with enterprise architecture standards.

key responsibilities

collaborate with enterprise and solution architects to align infrastructure designs with business requirements and architectural standards.

design infrastructure solutions covering cloud, on-premise, and hybrid environments that ensure performance, availability, and security.

evaluate and recommend infrastructure technologies to meet evolving business needs.

support the deployment and integration of infrastructure components, working with cross-functional teams and external vendors.

contribute to ensuring infrastructure solutions meet disaster recovery and business continuity requirements.

maintain up-to-date knowledge of emerging infrastructure technologies and contribute to proof-of-concept and pilot implementations.

provide architectural guidance during infrastructure implementation and troubleshooting phases.

qualifications

bachelor’s degree or higher in computer/it engineering, electrical engineering, computer science, it management, or related fields.

minimum 3 years of experience in infrastructure design or architecture.

minimum 3 years of experience as system engineer / infrastructure engineer, especially in large-scale enterprise or banking environments.

strong knowledge in:

operating systems (windows, linux, unix)

middleware and database (weblogic, websphere, tomcat, sql and nosql, etc.)

microservices architecture and container platforms (docker, kubernetes, openshift)

server technologies (intel-based, bare-metal, virtualization, cloud)

network and security fundamentals

familiar with architecture frameworks such as togaf, it governance, and compliance standards (e.g. iso 27001).

strong analytical, problem-solving, and documentation skills.

excellent communication and collaboration skills with cross-functional teams.

good command of english (for coordination with vendors and partners).

preferred skills

experience with hybrid cloud or private cloud architecture.

familiar with automation / infrastructure as code (iac) tools (e.g., ansible, terraform).

background in it service management (itsm/itil) process understanding.

experience in banking or critical mission environments is a plus.

professional certifications such as cisa or cism is desirable

ability to work independently and a reliable attitude.

possess good analytical, troubleshooting, and interpersonal skills.

Job_Title: Associate Spatial AI Engineer, SCG Digital Office
Company: The Siam Cement Public Company Limited (SCG)
Job_Description:
job summary:

as a spatial ai engineer within our ai innovation center, you will architect the engine that translates 2d sensory data into high-fidelity 3d representations. by leveraging spatial intelligence and computer vision, you will build a system that understands the physical world and reconstructs it digitally for the next generation of digital platforms.

key responsibilities:

ai-to-3d pipeline: develop and optimize ai models for 3d reconstruction (e.g., gaussian splatting, nerf, or mesh generation) to transform 2d images into 3d assets.

web graphics architecture: architect high-performance 3d viewers and interactive tools using three.js and react three fiber.

spatial logic: implement complex 3d mathematics (linear algebra, quaternions, projection matrices) to handle camera perspectives, spatial transformations, and coordinate mapping.

full-stack integration: build robust python (fastapi) backends to handle ai inference and typescript/react frontends for seamless user experiences.

qualifications:

bachelor's or master's degree in computer science, ﻿ai, engineering, or related fields﻿

1–3 years of experience in ai, computer vision, 3d graphics, or spatial computing

knowledge of 3d reconstruction (e.g., nerf, gaussian splatting, mesh generation)

experience in developing ai/ml models and pipelines for image or 3d data

proficiency in python for backend development (e.g., fastapi)

experience with web-based 3d technologies (react, typescript, three.js)

understanding of 3d concepts (camera systems, projection, coordinate systems)

strong problem-solving and analytical skills

ability to design scalable systems

good communication and teamwork skills

key responsibilities:

develop and maintain web applications using nestjs, typescript, and react integrate with blockchain technology and services

design and manage sql databases with a focus on performance and scalability.

containerize applications using docker for consistent development, testing, and production environments.

create and consume restful apis, ensuring efficient and secure data transfer.write comprehensive unit tests to ensure code reliability and quality.

utilize jira for project tracking and adhere to scrum methodologies for agile development.develop and optimize server-side rendering applications using nextjs.

(optional) configure and maintain ci/cd pipelines with github pipelines.

qualifications:

strong experience with nestjs, typescript, and react.

experience with blockchain concepts such as accounts, transaction, transaction hash

solid understanding of sql database design and management.

experience with docker and creating containerized environments.

demonstrated ability to build and integrate restful apis.

familiarity with jira, scrum, and agile development practices.

what we offer:- remote work options to provide flexibility.

key responsibilities

achieve and exceed assigned sales targets

identify and pursue new business opportunities (hunter sales)

manage and maintain a strong sales pipeline with weekly reporting

present and propose tailored it / security solutions to clients

handle full sales cycle: prospecting → proposal → negotiation → closing

build and maintain long-term relationships with enterprise & government clients

support bidding and tender processes for large-scale projects

work closely with pre-sales and technical teams

monitor market trends and competitor activities

strong track record in achieving sales targets

job responsibilities

• support system changes, enhancements, and deployments in coordination with it and related stakeholders

• ensure system operations comply with internal procedures and control requirements

________________________________________

qualifications

• bachelor’s degree or higher in information technology, computer science, information systems, or related fields

• 1–5 years of working experience in it support, system operations, application support, or back office operations

• no prior knowledge of sba systems or securities business is required; however, candidates must be willing and able to learn new systems and business processes

• basic understanding of it systems, applications, and data processing workflows

• experience with batch processing, eod operations, or night-shift system support is an advantage

• ability to follow operational procedures and work effectively under time constraints

• strong sense of responsibility, attention to detail, and problem-solving skills

Job_Title: Data Center Security Manager , DC Security
Job_Description:
aws infrastructure services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all aws global infrastructure. in other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. we support all aws data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. we work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.

you’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. you’ll collaborate with people across aws to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. and you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.

amazon data services (thailand) is looking to hire a highly motivated, customer-obsessed data center security manager to provide hands-on support to our data center infrastructure operations teams across the bkk cluster.

as a dsm, you will be tasked with running day-to-day data center security operations, supporting and executing security projects and programs, as well as assuring audit compliance with aws policies and procedures.

key job responsibilities
- direct and manage contract guard force to run daily data center operations.
- handle site security incidents, escalations or any other security related issues.
- provide after-hours on-call management support and participate in emergent, large scale event response when needed.
- participate in re-occurring data center security audits and reviews.
- executes established compliance processes with aws policies, standards, guidelines and relevant legal and regulatory requirements.
- provides input on, and may develop security methodologies, policies and procedures.
- write reports and communicate with management on the status of physical security operations.
- oversee new security construction or retrofit projects.
- manage the security p&l for assigned site(s), assist management with financial analysis and contribute to financial decisions for security requirements.
- collaborate with other teams to protect aws data center personnel, information and assets.

a day in the life
mission: deliver pioneering physical security by working vigorously to earn and keep customer trust; providing a safe and secure environment for our people, assets, and customer data.

vision: develop exceptional security professionals, consistently apply security processes, and pioneer new technologies that effectively balance security requirements with operational needs.

about the team
diverse experiences
aws values diverse experiences. even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. if your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.

why aws?
amazon web services (aws) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. we pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.

inclusive team culture

aws values curiosity and connection. our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.

mentorship & career growth
we’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become earth’s best employer. that’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.

work/life balance
we value work-life harmony. achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. when we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.

- extensive experience in corporate security and workplace safety, and experience designing and implementing investigative tactics including interviewing and documentation.
- considerable knowledge of laws and practices of investigations and workplace safety, and considerable knowledge of current security technology including access control, cctv, identification and special applications, with high ethical standards with proven ability to handle highly confidential and sensitive information; excellent judgment, discretion and diplomacy, with exhibiting excellent problem solving skills and attention to detail.
- strong written and verbal english and thai language

Company: Bank of Ayudhya Public Company Limited
Job_Description:
scope overview

the digital architect (aec) serves as a principal strategic advisor to senior management, providing enterprise-level governance and steering the alignment of business objectives with technological investments across subsidiaries.

this role establishes regional architecture standards and frameworks, overseeing the convergence of enterprise strategy, process optimization, and scalable technology. acting as the authority on business capability models and technical solution reviews, the architect perform m&a due diligence, post-deal integration strategies, on top of cross-border architectural compliance, ensuring all regional systems and acquired entities natively integrate with mufg and krungsri principles.




what you'll do

business architecture governance & strategy

strategic oversight: provide executive guidance to senior stakeholders on translating regional business strategy into standardized capability models and long-term architectural roadmaps.

artifact governance: govern and review business architecture artifacts (e.g., capability maps, value streams) to ensure regional alignment with overarching enterprise standards.

process consultation: consult on the definition of target operating models and organizational processes, ensuring regional transformation initiatives adhere to the broader enterprise vision.

requirement validation: review and validate complex business requirements and user journeys to guarantee architectural traceability to strategic business objectives.

readiness steering: steer organizational readiness evaluations and advise regional leadership on the architectural implications, risks, and synergies of major business shifts.

regional business capability governance: own and govern regional business capability models to ensure consistency and strategic alignment across aec entities.

strategy‑to‑capability alignment: translate business strategies into clear target‑state capability roadmaps that guide transformation and integration priorities.

capability‑based investment & prioritization: ensure investments are driven by business capabilities, with clear traceability from strategic objectives to enabling solutions.

operating model & value stream alignment: align target operating models, value streams, and end‑to‑end processes with the future‑state capability architecture.

capability readiness & maturity oversight: assess capability readiness, maturity, and risk to support executive decision‑making and m&a integration.

 

technical architecture review & assurance

design approval: evaluate and approve scalable, high-availability technical designs proposed by regional delivery teams, ensuring adherence to approved enterprise technology stacks and modern architecture patterns.

integration governance: govern integration architectures across the aec region, mandating robust api management, api gateway strategies, and secure service-to-service communication standards.

resiliency consulting: consult on and review cloud-native deployment topologies and system observability frameworks, guaranteeing cross-border application resilience and performance transparency.

security enforcement: enforce enterprise security, centralized secret management, and data sovereignty compliance policies for all regional applications and cross-border data flows.

standard leverage: identify opportunities to leverage standard design / solution between subsidiaries and ks.

 

mergers & acquisitions (m&a) and regional integration advisory

due diligence (dd) oversight: review scope and architecture assessments for prospective targets. critically evaluate target technology stacks, digital channels, api readiness, and innovation capabilities against enterprise standards.

m&a advisory: provide executive debriefs and definitive architectural rulings in dd reports, advising the m&a steering committee on technical debt, integration risks, and technological capabilities. maintain and optimize the standard frameworks and templates for digital assessments.

integration governance (post-deal): define the architectural blueprints and technical mandates for integrating newly acquired entities into the ks group ecosystem.

impact review: review and validate integration impact assessments provided by delivery teams, ensuring that proposed development efforts are structurally sound and align with enterprise integration patterns.

post-deal advisory (bau): serve as the principal architectural consultant for ks partners and mufg entities regarding digital solutions, actively championing cross-group technology reuse, platform sharing, and continuous architectural improvement.




apply now if you have these advantages

bachelor’s or master’s degree (preferred) in business administration (mba), information system, information technology, computer science, finance or related field.

7+ years of solid, demonstrable experience in the financial services sector or financial services consulting sector, with a focus on enterprise-scale environments.

3+ years of experience operating in an enterprise architecture, governance, or strategic advisory role, bridging both business architecture and technical/solution architecture domains.

enterprise & business architecture: knowledge of architecture frameworks (e.g., togaf, bian) and banking domain standards (e.g., iso-20022, open banking).

integration & api strategy: understanding of api-led connectivity, enterprise api gateways, connection pool management, and microservices communication patterns.

cloud-native & infrastructure: knowledge of container orchestration platforms, network configurations, and hybrid-cloud deployment topologies.

enterprise security & compliance: understanding of zero-trust architecture, centralized secrets management, identity access management (iam), and cross-border data privacy regulations.

observability & performance governance: knowledge of enterprise application performance monitoring (apm) and full-stack observability platforms to establish standards for system health, telemetry, and issue resolution across regional entities.

architectural governance & review: ability to evaluate, critique, and approve technical designs and business requirement documents submitted by regional delivery teams or vendors.

technical assessment: skill in reviewing multi-disciplinary tech stacks to assess whether a target entity's architecture is viable for enterprise integration.

strategic translation: capability to translate business expansion strategies into technology roadmaps, capability models, and technical integration mandates.

due diligence execution: ability to assess a target company's digital maturity, identify security vulnerabilities, evaluate technical debt, and synthesize findings into advisory reports.

cross-cultural stakeholder management: facilitation, negotiation, and influence skills required to drive architectural consensus across regional teams, krungsri subsidiaries, and mufg partners.

analytical problem solving: analytical skills to map dependencies between business processes and legacy it systems during post-deal integrations.

good in english skill both written and speaking is a must.

must be able to undertake short-term overseas assignments (approximately 3–6 months) to support critical programs or platform replacement initiatives at subsidiary locations.




why join krungsri?

as a part of mufg (mitsubishi ufj financial group), we a truly a global bank with networks all over the world.

we offer a striking work-life balance culture with hybrid work policies (3 days in office per week).

unbelievable benefits such as attractive bonuses, employee loan with special rates and many more.

Company: Thai Group Holdings Public Company Limited
Job_Description:
about the role

as the application modernization lead, you will be the visionary driving our enterprise-wide transition from legacy systems to a modern, agile, and secure technological landscape. reporting directly to the svp of it modernization, you will define the roadmap, design target architectures, and lead the charge in reducing technical debt while enabling future growth through cloud-native and api-driven solutions.

key responsibilities

1. strategy & roadmap development

define and drive the enterprise-wide application modernization strategy and roadmap.

prioritize modernization projects based on business value, technical debt, cost, and risk.

develop modernization blueprints for transitioning legacy systems into future-ready architectures.

2. target architecture design

design and oversee the implementation of modular, cloud-native, and api-first target architectures.

establish reference architectures, design guidelines, and reusable patterns for the organization.

3. technology portfolio rationalization

analyze the current technology stack to select appropriate technologies that align with organizational goals.

identify systems for retirement, replacement, or replatforming to reduce complexity and operational costs.

present tco (total cost of ownership) and roi analysis to senior management to facilitate decision-making.

4. vendor & partner management

collaborate with external vendors to design modernization solutions.

evaluate technical proposals and maintain high-quality delivery standards from partners.

5. leadership & capability building

manage and mentor the application modernization team.

build internal capabilities to reduce long-term dependency on external vendors.

who we are looking for

qualifications:

education: bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer engineering, computer science, it, or a related field.

experience: at least 8 years of experience in application architecture, integration, or modernization.

leadership: proven track record in a leadership role (lead, manager, or head) within software development.

background: experience working within medium to large-scale organizations with complex system environments.

core technical skills:

architecture expertise: deep knowledge of transitioning from monolithic to microservices, modular architecture, and api-first design.

modernization strategies: practical experience with the 6rs (refactor, replatform, rebuild, retire, replace, etc.).

integration & cloud: proficiency in integration architecture (api gateways, middleware, message queues) and cloud-native patterns (containers, orchestration, observability).

devops: strong understanding of ci/cd, infrastructure as code (iac), and automation.

legacy knowledge: understanding of legacy systems (e.g., older java/.net versions, esb) and effective migration pathways.

about learn corporation

learn corporation is thailand’s leader in lifelong-learning edtech, but at our core, we are simply a group of people who believe that education changes lives. we use technology to make learning accessible for all ages, with a dream to serve as a private 'ministry of education' that genuinely supports learners nationwide.

but to transform education at a national scale, our internal engine must operate at the speed of tomorrow. we cannot build the future of learning on legacy workflows. this is where your true impact begins. by rewiring our operations with ai, you are doing much more than eliminating bottlenecks—you are creating a massive multiplier effect. every hour of manual work you automate is an hour our teams redirect toward innovating education, expanding our reach, and fundamentally helping to make thailand's future better and better.

about this role

as a core member of the ceo office’s ai special team, your mission is to elevate the organization's systemic capabilities by redesigning workflows with ai to maximize productivity and quality. moving beyond a traditional advisory role, you will be embedded directly into specific business units or corporate functions. as the technical co-lead of a dedicated workstream, you will work hand-in-hand with domain experts to resolve bottlenecks, unlock new possibilities, and drive measurable transformation from the ground up. you are expected to seamlessly map ai solutions to business workflows—ranging from suggesting genai prompts for immediate quick wins, to taking a hands-on approach to independently build small-to-medium automations and pocs, to ultimately scoping larger, complex initiatives to collaborate with our core development teams.

what you'll drive

1. ai solution mapping & workflow redesign

partner with business unit / corporate function teams and domain experts to deep-dive into current workflows, identifying inefficiencies, systemic bottlenecks, and potential areas where ai can help drive new capabilities.

deliver immediate 'quick wins' by identifying simple, high-impact use cases and providing genai prompts to help teams solve daily operational tasks instantly.

evaluate and select the most appropriate ai tools, models, or automation platforms to solve specific business pain points effectively.

2. rapid prototyping & proof of concept (poc)

act with a 'maker mindset' to independently build, test, and deploy small-to-medium automations and ai prototypes (using genai, prompt engineering, low-code/no-code platforms, or basic scripting).

execute fast-paced pocs with pilot teams to validate technical feasibility, user acceptance, and business roi before company-wide scaling.

strategically scope larger, more complex initiatives that require enterprise-grade development, acting as the key liaison to collaborate with core it/development teams.

take shared accountability for the project's success, ensuring that the implemented technology actually delivers the promised productivity and improvement in quality.

3. change facilitation & tech unblocking

serve as the bridge between cutting-edge technology and non-technical staff, translating complex ai concepts into practical, everyday language.

coach and guide frontline employees during the adoption phase to minimize resistance and ensure seamless integration of ai into their daily routines.

actively resolve technical roadblocks (e.g., data security concerns, it policy constraints, system integrations) to keep the task force moving at speed.

4. ai culture & capability building

champion ai adoption across learn corp by driving upskilling and reskilling initiatives to empower our employees with ai capabilities.

foster and boost an internal ai community, leading related activities and workshops to cultivate a future-ready, ai-driven culture within the organization.

what you’ll bring

1. ai fluency & tech-savviness

great knowledge of the current ai landscape, including generative ai (llms), ai agents, and copilot / cowork ecosystems.

a clear understanding of both the capabilities and limitations/risks of ai technologies, ensuring safe and compliant implementations (e.g., data privacy awareness).

2. maker mindset & prototyping skills

great prompt engineering skills.

proficiency in low-code/no-code automation tools or basic programming (e.g., python, api integrations) to build working prototypes independently.

3. strong business acumen & soft skills

solution-oriented mindset: highly focused on solving problems and delivering results, measuring technology impact in terms of business metrics (roi, cost-saving, speed, quality).

empathy and communication skills; capable of listening to operational pain points without technical bias, and collaborating seamlessly with cross-functional teams.

thrives in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment and possesses a 'skin in the game' mentality—treating the project's success or failure as their own.

education & experience

bachelor’s degree in computer engineering, industrial engineering, business technology, or other related fields.

3-5 years of proven experience in digital transformation, tech consulting, process optimization, or automation implementation.

note: highly capable new graduates with a strong portfolio or proven experience in real-world ai/automation projects are also warmly welcome for consideration.

about us

our ascend vision is to create life opportunities with innovative digital services. operating in southeast asia, we are able to help one of the world’s largest populations of underbanked, the people from some of the poorest provinces who are disregarded by traditional banks. so many lives are waiting for our help.

in 2018, we served over 30 million customers in 6 countries (thailand, cambodia, myanmar, vietnam, indonesia, philippines), and processed over 4.5 billion usd. this makes us by far the largest fintech company in se asia and growing quickly.

as a member of our talented engineering team, you will help to bring this vision to reality by leveraging the most modern cloud-native technologies. at ascend, you will be part of a team who are directly responsible for improving the lives of millions




responsibilities

job title: tester engineer

company: sony device technology (thailand) co., ltd. (sdt)

location: bang kadi industrial park, pathum thani

employment type: full-time




about sony device technology (thailand)

sony device technology (thailand) co., ltd. (sdt) serves as a core production and testing facility for sony’s semiconductor business. our facility in bang kadi industrial park specializes in the assembly and testing of image sensors and microscale semiconductor devices integrated into automotive safety and imaging systems.




job summary

as a tester engineer, you are responsible for maintaining and optimizing the high-precision semiconductor testing environment. your role involves managing the technical lifecycle of test hardware, performing deep-dive circuit analysis to resolve failures, and utilizing data automation to drive yield improvements. you will ensure all testing processes comply with automotive-grade quality standards and support seamless product transitions from npi to mass production.




key responsibilities

manage the end-to-end technical setup, calibration, and hands-on maintenance of automatic test equipment (ate), including load boards, probers, and specialized fixtures. perform advanced circuit analysis at the component level to diagnose complex hardware failures and electrical signal integrity issues. utilize multimeters, oscilloscopes, and logic analyzers to execute hardware repairs and ensure 100% equipment readiness for new product introduction (npi) and sustained mass production.

analyze large-scale production datasets to identify yield detractors, cycle time bottlenecks, and manufacturing inefficiencies. develop and implement excel macros (vba) and custom automation scripts to streamline data processing, validate test result integrity, and automate technical reporting. lead root cause analysis (rca) investigations into non-conforming (ng) defects using 8d or why-why methodologies to deploy permanent technical solutions and improve overall test stability.

standardize technical documentation, including operating procedures (sops) and ic qualification protocols, ensuring strict adherence to automotive quality standards (iatf 16949). partner with design, production, and quality teams to evaluate "design for testability" (dft) based on circuit performance data. manage test correlation activities across multiple equipment platforms to ensure consistent accuracy and reliability across all production lots.




qualifications & competencies

minimum qualifications:

bachelor’s degree in electronics engineering, electrical engineering, or a related technical discipline.

0 – 3 years of experience in test engineering, equipment maintenance, or electronics manufacturing.

demonstrated ability in circuit analysis and hardware diagnostics; skilled in using multimeters, oscilloscopes, and logic analyzers for troubleshooting.

high proficiency in microsoft excel, including the ability to develop and debug macros and vba scripts for data automation and analysis.

strong logical and systematic problem-solving skills with experience in technical root cause analysis.




preferred qualifications:

direct experience in semiconductor testing or electronics manufacturing.

proficiency with statistical analysis software (e.g., jmp, minitab) or data visualization tools.

knowledge of automotive quality management systems (iatf 16949) and esd control protocols in a production environment.

relevant internship or senior project experience related to ic testing or automated systems.




language & professional skills:

ability to read and write technical documentation and reports in english. toeic 600+ is preferred.

ability to communicate technical findings clearly to cross-functional teams in a fast-paced environment.

strong attention to technical detail and disciplined adherence to safety and quality protocols.




working conditions

ability to work in a cleanroom environment, necessitating the use of a full cleanroom suit.

ability to support on-call duties as required by the production schedule to ensure minimal downtime.


what we offer

5-day work week: monday – friday

annual bonus

provident fund

language allowance: monthly incentives for both toeic & jlpt with no expiry date throughout your career

overtime pay: every extra hour is paid

health insurance: comprehensive annual medical coverage

fuel allowance for private vehicles or company shuttle bus/van service plus an additional travel allowance

continuous learning: access to mandatory and elective training courses.

accident insurance

attendance bonus

annual trip & party

financial support for marriage, new baby, and ordination.

financial support for the loss of a family member or natural disaster relief for your home.

fitness support: weekly incentive for staying active

financial support for english and japanese language classes.

financial support for dental treatments

exclusive sony discounts: special employee prices on sony products.

about bluebik digital

bluebik digital is a subsidiary under bluebik group, the leading consultancy focusing on comprehensive advice on digital transformation to transform the capabilities of our clients through technological application. bluebik digital focuses on it consulting and technology solution. leveraging world-class technology to deliver outstanding experiences with trust and quality.

about the role

the role of a business analyst in an it consulting company encompasses understanding the client's business processes, workflows, and areas for improvement or change within their organization. additionally, business analysts facilitate effective communication, identify and prioritize business needs, and ensure that it solutions align with the clients' strategic objectives. they serve not only as gatherers and followers of user requirements but also as partners with the client, collaborating towards achieving the organization's long-term goals.

work you will do

understand project objectives and organizational goals. gather business requirements and analyze pain points from clients and stakeholders.

clarify business requirements and analyze solutions, weighing pros and cons based on the identified requirements.

conduct risk assessments and prioritize tasks or features for development.

manage and plan your own tasks as well as the tasks of entry business analysts within the team.

collaborate with the client's working team, product owner, and internal team members, including the project manager, ux/ui designer, system analyst, developer, and quality assurance.

implement documentation such as business flows, business requirement documents and functional specifications.

support and investigate issues raised by clients and the internal team

let us talk about you
if you are someone with:

information technology, computer science, computer engineering or related field.

3 years+ experience in a business analyst role.

logical thinking, analytical, and problem-solving skills.

understanding of the software development lifecycle (sdlc), it systems, and databases would be an advantage.

experience in the banking or insurance industry would be an advantage.

experience in project assessment would be an advantage.

strong project and risk management skills.

strong leadership qualities and ability to work well within a team.

positive work attitude and strong teamwork skills.

proficiency in documentation in both thai and english.

excellent verbal and written communication skills.

why work with us

we are a team of experts in a talented community, a collaborative atmosphere where creativity is encouraged. people first, by putting people at the heart of our priorities, we foster a work environment where you can excel and grow personally and professionally. bluebik is strived for growth and expansion, and you can be part of our success story. we combine strategy, digital delivery excellence and deep technology advisory to help our clients transform their business. at bluebik, your career advancement starts with actions. you can manage your own career and will advance based on performance. we collaborate to create unique and outstanding experiences with our talents to empower learning and growth opportunities. whatever your ambitions, bluebik digital offers you with a highly inclusive community of talents from both tech and business worlds to realize your full potential.

what we offer

we offer impactful and challenging work with mentorship and support from direct managers and subject matter experts. you will have autonomy to manage your career path with endless opportunities for professional growth. our comprehensive benefit package covers medical insurance, life, accident and disability insurance, wellness allowance, vaccination allowance, providence fund, flexible working arrangement, and professional certification. bluebik digital provides opportunities to become the best version of yourself!

equal opportunity

bluebik digital is an equal opportunity employer. we owe our success to the talents of our diverse team and the varying perspectives they add to our thriving community.

recruitment agencies
bluebik does not accept unsolicited resumes sent by recruiting agencies. please do not forward resumes to our job postings, bluebik employees or other parts of the business. bluebik will not be liable to pay any fees to agencies for candidates hired as a result of unrequested resumes.

Job_Title: Software Developer Senior/ Manager (1 Year Contract)
Job_Description:
about the role

we are seeking a highly skilled and experienced senior software developer to join our dynamic tech team on a 1-year contract basis. based at our phra khanong office with hybrid flexibility, this pivotal role involves leading the design, development, and maintenance of robust, scalable software solutions for our proptech web and mobile platforms.


what you'll be doing

lead the full-cycle development (design, code, test, deploy) of high-quality, scalable, and secure applications for web and mobile platforms.

design and implement complex system architecture and technical specifications, ensuring high performance, reliability, and maintainability.

write clean, efficient, and well-documented code in languages relevant to our stack (e.g., python, javascript/typescript, go, java, c#) and review code from other team members to maintain high quality standards.

collaborate closely with product managers, ux/ui designers, and qa engineers to translate business requirements into technical solutions and ensure seamless product delivery.

drive adoption of best practices in software development, including agile/scrum, devops, ci/cd, testing methodologies, and performance optimization.

troubleshoot and resolve complex production issues, providing technical expertise to support and maintain existing systems.

mentor and guide junior and mid-level developers, fostering a culture of technical excellence and continuous learning.


what we're looking for

3 - 5 years of proven professional experience in full-stack or backend software development.

strong expertise in at least one modern programming language (e.g., python, node.js/typescript, go) and relevant frameworks.

extensive experience with software architecture, design patterns, and building scalable microservices or distributed systems.

proficiency in working with relational (e.g., postgresql, mysql) and/or nosql (e.g., mongodb) databases, including query optimization.

deep understanding of api design (rest/graphql) and integration across various platforms.

solid experience with cloud platforms (e.g., aws, azure, or gcp) and devops practices, including containerization (docker/kubernetes).

working knowledge of agile development methodologies and git version control.

strong analytical, problem-solving, and leadership skills.

excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to articulate technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.

bachelor’s degree in computer science, information technology, or a related technical field.




what we offer 

work from home on tuesdays and fridays (depending on your team and role) while staying connected with the team during 10:00–19:00. 

competitive compensation and performance-based bonuses. 

group health insurance and annual health check-up. 

learning support and career growth opportunities. 

a collaborative and friendly startup culture where ideas and ownership are valued. 




how to apply 

click “apply now” on jobsdb and submit your updated cv (and portfolio if applicable). shortlisted candidates will be contacted via jobsdb or email for the next steps.

com7 is looking for a mid-level ai engineer to join our professional services team. you'll design and ship autonomous workflows, multi-agent pipelines, and llm-powered applications for our clients — leveraging aws-native ai infrastructure including bedrock and agent core. beyond the technical work, you'll play an active role in translating business requirements into scalable ai solutions, leading pocs from concept to validation, and taking successful prototypes all the way through to production.




responsibilities

technical development

• build multi-agent workflows and autonomous pipelines using langgraph, crewai, or autogen

• develop and deploy llm-powered apps on aws bedrock and amazon agent core

• implement rag pipelines, vector search, and embedding-based retrieval

• build backend apis and services using python and node.js

• instrument pipelines with logging, tracing, and monitoring for production reliability




poc & production delivery

• lead end-to-end pocs from requirement gathering to client demo and validation

• rapidly prototype agentic solutions and assess feasibility for production

business & cross-functional collaboration

• support the sales team with pre-sales scoping and technical demonstrations

• work with project managers and delivery teams to ensure on-time, on-scope delivery

• communicate technical concepts clearly to non-technical stakeholders






requirements
