Job_Title: Solution Sales Executive- SAP Finance and Spend Management - Thailand
Job_Description:
we help the world run betterat sap, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. we're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. the work is challenging – but it matters. you'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. what's in it for you? constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed. 

role overview

the solution account lead (sal) is a strategic leader who combines deep sap expertise, business acumen, and end-to-end solution area domain knowledge to drive lob cloud revenue, customer success, accelerate adoption of innovation (especially ai), and position the organization as a market leader. the sal shapes transformative solutions and delivers measurable value to customers through thought leadership, innovation, and strategic execution—supporting both finance and spend management and the overall “one sap” strategy.

key responsibilities


account ownership & strategy: serve as the sap finance and spend management owner for assigned accounts, developing and executing strategic account plans that align with customer goals, business objectives and broader account plans by account team.

drive end-to-end customer value journey with domain expertise: provide solution area domain expertise and thought leadership to understand and address high-priority business challenges. lead end-to-end process mapping and the customer value journey, owning the transformation roadmap for sap finance and spend management.  

pipeline & opportunity management: identify and develop new business opportunities within existing accounts, contributing to pipeline growth and revenue targets.

product success & innovation: drive go-to-market for new products, engage early with customers, validate solutions, and influence the product roadmap. lead ai and innovation initiatives (e.g., bdc, knowledge graphs, scalable pocs, joule agents).

enablement, demos & prototypes: support solution advisors to ensure demo system readiness and manage enablement programs. collaborate with demo & learning teams to provide updated assets and trial environments as part of scalable enablement programs as well as customized demos, pocs and prototypes with customer specific data.

value proposition & executive engagement: collaborate with value advisors to create compelling narratives articulating roi, value leakage and competitive advantages. conduct strategic discovery, run value leakage, aotp workshops and deliver persuasive pitches with ways of solving distinct customer business/buying-center challenges to accelerate executive buy-in and drive demand independently of rfps.

commercial negotiations: navigate complex pricing and contractual discussions, balancing client expectations with organizational profitability and cloud revenue growth.

adoption & consumption: support customer success management (csm) communities, secure references, and manage escalations. collaborate with cs and cs&d adoption teams to ensure successful delivery of solutions and services, monitoring outcomes and driving continuous improvement to maximize customer value.

customer success & field impact: own sap finance and spend management deal cycles, renewals, enablement, and executive engagement. elevate customer discussions to prioritize investment and drive measurable outcomes.

relationship building & governance: drive c-suite engagements and buying center alignment by fostering long-term high-value relationships and convert executives into advocates and brand ambassadors. conduct quarterly business reviews (qbrs) with customers and internal stakeholders focused on solution adoption, innovation, risks and opportunities.

ecosystem & partner engagement: own relationships with strategic consulting partners (e.g., mckinsey, bain, accenture, deloitte, pwc, ey) to co-innovate, develop joint go-to-market strategies, and shape disruptive solutions. maintain direct, high-quality relationships with partner account leads.

collaboration & orchestration: align closely with sales, product, and marketing to ensure sal impact is fully integrated into the go-to-market engine with tailored gtm approach. drive joint accountability and coordination across internal stakeholders for maximum market impact.

competitive & industry expertise: maintain deep technical and functional knowledge across sap solutions. stay at the forefront of emerging technologies and competitive trends to craft differentiated solutions that win in the market.

qualifications & competencies

bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, information technology, or related field.
management consulting type profile with 10-15 years industry or practitioner experience; executive relationship building skills with proven c-suite influence.  
b2b enterprise experience with multi-stakeholder saas cycles, plus top-tier consulting and deep industry expertise.
proven experience in account management, solution sales, or customer success roles.
strong understanding of solution sales, customer value realization, and account planning methodologies; expansion selling track record (account growth).
deep sap and domain expertise, with strong understanding of ai and innovation trends.
maps value levers and tell a quantified roi storytelling and compelling business case creation
strategic thinking, business acumen, relationship building and client advocacy skills.
excellent communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management abilities.
ability to work collaboratively in a matrixed environment and influence without direct authority.
analytical mindset with a focus on problem-solving and continuous improvement.
12 plus years’ experience in a quota carrying role 
4 plus years’ domain experience in applicable sub solution area domain either from related industry or consulting (spend management solutions)
 

why this role matters

the sal is pivotal in shaping sap’s market leadership by delivering transformative solutions, driving innovation (especially in ai), and orchestrating value across the customer lifecycle. this role is at the intersection of strategy, technology, and relationship management, ensuring customers realize the full value of their sap investments while positioning the organization for sustained growth.

bring out your bestsap innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (erp) software, sap has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. as a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. at sap, you can bring out your best.

about the job


as a network implementation engineer, you will be the initial point of our efforts to execute deployment, maintenance, and operations of private data networks worldwide. you will work with technical program managers, network engineers, design and infrastructure engineers, field engineers within google, as well as construction and telecommunications vendors and contractors, all to position your team and organization for success.

you will facilitate faster, better, and more efficient, positive outcomes for the business and our customers. your objective will be to build the world’s most reliable, cost-effective and scalable network to support all of our current and future customers and users globally.

the ai and infrastructure team is redefining what’s possible. we empower google customers with breakthrough capabilities and insights by delivering ai and infrastructure at unparalleled scale, efficiency, reliability and velocity. our customers include googlers, google cloud customers, and billions of google users worldwide.

we're the driving team behind google's groundbreaking innovations, empowering the development of our ai models, delivering unparalleled computing power to global services, and providing the essential platforms that enable developers to build the future. from software to hardware our teams are shaping the future of world-leading hyperscale computing, with key teams working on the development of our tpus, vertex ai for google cloud, google global networking, data center operations, systems research, and much more.

work with project management, network engineering, and rest of the engineering team to identify in advance potential issues in network installations, including in the areas of facility power alternating current/direct current (ac/dc), cooling, security/access, rack layout, and cable management.
own network documentation, updating, and maintaining network drawings and plans.

as the sap project manager is responsible for leading, planning, and executing the implementation, maintenance, and continuous improvement of the sap s/4hana system across the group of companies.

this role oversees end-to-end sap project delivery, ensuring alignment with business objectives, effective resource management, and successful collaboration between internal resource teams and external vendors.

the incumbent will work closely with sap functional teams, business key users, end users, and system integrators to ensure seamless operations, system stability, and future scalability of sap solutions. in addition to core erp responsibilities, this role plays a pivotal part in driving digital innovation, data management, analytics, and process optimization initiatives within the organization.

key responsibilities

6. excellent communication, leadership, and stakeholder management skills.

Job_Title: Physical Security & ICT Design Engineer (Data Center)
Job_Description:
role description:

we are seeking an experienced physical security & ict design engineer to join our mission-critical data center design team. the ideal candidate will lead end-to-end design and coordination of ict infrastructure and physical security systems for greenfield and brownfield data center projects. this includes structured cabling, telecom/network infrastructure, mmr/cr/mda design, hyperscale compliance, system integration, and commissioning. the role requires strong knowledge of industry standards (tia-942, iso/iec 11801, iso/iec 22237, iso/iec 27001, sbd) and collaboration with internal teams, clients, architects, mep consultants, carriers, and vendors.

key responsibilities

ict system design & development

lead full lifecycle ict design for data centers, covering structured cabling (copper/fiber), mmr/carrier rooms, meet-me rooms, mdas, tenant rooms/racks, oob/oa/enterprise networks, fiber backbone (isp/osp), containment systems (tray/ladder/racks), conduits, and wi-fi/iot planning.

produce ict high-level and detailed designs: slds, schematics, risers, rack elevations, cable schedules, bom/boq, technical specs, and tender documents.

design end-to-end telecom infrastructure including fiber entry pathways, redundant routing, and cross-connect architectures.

ensure compliance with tia-942, iso/iec 11801, iso/iec 22237, uptime tier guidelines, and hyperscaler design guides (aws, meta, google, microsoft).

physical security system design

lead design of access control, intrusion detection, cctv/video surveillance, pids, mantraps/secure portals, and control room/gsoc layouts.

select compliant hardware: cameras, vms, ndaa-compliant devices, biometric/osdp card readers, nvrs/servers/storage, turnstiles, electric locks, and egress devices.

conduct security risk assessments, cpted reviews, and security by design evaluations.

ensure alignment with local codes, dc operator standards, and international security guidelines.

project management & coordination

coordinate with architects, mep, hyperscale/tenant teams, carriers/isps, ict/security vendors, gcs, and subcontractors.

review shop drawings, material submissions, rfis, and provide technical guidance throughout the lifecycle.

track schedules, manage deliverables, and prepare reports, presentations, and client-facing documentation.

commissioning & testing

develop commissioning plans and test scripts for structured cabling, fiber/copper testing (tier 1/tier 2), security fat/sat, and integrated security systems.

lead/support commissioning: validate installations, conduct inspections, prepare punch lists, acceptance tests, coordinate with carriers/integrators, and complete test reports, as-builts, and handover packages.

documentation & compliance

produce technical designs, method statements, risk assessments, commissioning reports, as-builts, and o&m manuals.

ensure compliance with local regulations, international ict/security standards, and client/corporate quality requirements.

qualifications & technical requirements

degree in engineering, ict, security, telecommunications, or related field (preferred).

minimum 3 years’ experience in ict and security system design/engineering/commissioning for critical infrastructure (data centers preferred).

proven experience designing/integrating:

access control systems

intrusion detection systems

cctv/video surveillance

perimeter detection & monitoring

control room operations

structured cabling (cat6a, os2, mpo/mtp)

cross-connect/patching architectures

redundant fiber routing, cable management, containment

carrier/isp fiber delivery methods

network room environmental requirements (power/cooling/space)

proficiency with design tools (autocad, revit/bim, visio), bluebeam, ms project.

preferred certifications: rcdd (bicsi) or equivalent, psp/cpp, security by design credentials, cdcp/cdcs/dcdc.

strong understanding of local security codes, building regulations, iso 27001, tia-942, and low-voltage/structured cabling fundamentals.

knowledge of network basics (layer 1/2, vlans, oob networks) is advantageous.

experience collaborating with architects, mep consultants, telecom/ict teams.

strong english communication skills and project management proficiency (ms project, trello, etc.).

preferences

ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and manage multiple projects.

excellent attention to detail, problem-solving skills, and stakeholder management.

strong analytical and proactive approach.

reliable, professional, and able to maintain confidentiality.

team player with leadership capabilities.

able to thrive under tight deadlines in fast-paced environments.

willing to travel for site visits and inspections.

previous data center ict/security design and commissioning experience.

experience with international dc standards (tia-942, iso/iec 27001, uptime tier guidelines).

our client is an internationally recognized multidisciplinary engineering and design consultancy with a strong presence across asia pacific and the middle east. known for delivering complex projects across architecture, building services, structural engineering, façade, and sustainability, the firm brings together architects, engineers, and digital specialists to deliver high-quality commercial, hospitality, mixed-use, and institutional developments.

the ict / elv engineer is responsible for supporting the design coordination, implementation, and supervision of information and communication technology (ict) and extra low voltage (elv) systems in building and infrastructure projects. the role ensures that ict and elv systems are installed and integrated according to project specifications, engineering standards, and project schedules. the engineer will work closely with m&e teams, consultants, contractors, and project stakeholders to ensure efficient system delivery and performance. 

responsibilities

review ict and elv system design drawings, specifications, and technical submissions to ensure compliance with project requirements
coordinate with m&e engineers, consultants, and contractors to ensure proper integration of ict and elv systems within the project
provide technical input and support during design development and implementation phases
supervise the installation of ict and elv systems to ensure compliance with engineering standards and project specifications
monitor installation progress and ensure alignment with project schedules
support technical troubleshooting and problem-solving during project execution
assist in the implementation and coordination of systems including structured cabling, cctv, access control, public address (pa), data networks, telephone systems, fiber optic networks, and building communication systems
participate in system testing, commissioning, and integration activities to ensure systems meet operational and performance requirements
support system handover and documentation at project completion
maintain technical documentation, system records, and progress reports in accordance with project and company standards
requirements

bachelor’s degree in electrical engineering, telecommunications engineering, ict engineering, or related field.
at least 5 years of experience in ict/elv engineering within building construction, engineering consultancy, or m&e projects.
experience working with elv systems such as cctv, access control, structured cabling, pa systems, and network infrastructure.
ability to review technical drawings and specifications.
good coordination and communication skills to work with multidisciplinary teams.
proficient in english communication.
experience in large building projects, commercial buildings, hospitals, airports, or mixed-use developments.
knowledge of ict network systems, fiber optic infrastructure, or smart building technologies.
familiarity with engineering standards and m&e system integration.

report to: digital director

key responsibilities:

implement and configure security systems—including firewalls, endpoint detection and response (edr), antivirus, and intrusion detection systems (ids/ips)—to safeguard the company’s network.

monitor network traffic and system logs proactively to detect anomalous activities, potential cyber threats, or data breaches in real-time.

execute vulnerability assessments and basic penetration testing on existing it infrastructure and factory operational technology (ot) to identify and patch weak points.

respond swiftly to security incidents (incident response), mitigate damages, and perform root cause analysis to prevent future recurrences.

collaborate with the head of digital / dpo to enforce data governance, access controls, and pdpa compliance technically, ensuring oem client data remains strictly confidential.

conduct cybersecurity awareness training and phishing simulation campaigns to educate employees at all levels (factory and office) on best security practices.




qualifications:

bachelor’s degree in computer science, cybersecurity, information technology, or a related field.

minimum 3-5 years of hands-on experience in it security, network administration, or systems engineering.

strong technical knowledge of network protocols, firewalls, vpns, endpoint protection, and microsoft 365 / cloud security.

experience in incident response and troubleshooting security breaches.

professional certifications such as comptia security+, ceh (certified ethical hacker), ccna security, or equivalent are highly preferred.

industry background in manufacturing, specifically understanding ot (operational technology) security in a factory setting, is a plus.

job responsibilities:


support ระบบ sap ส่วนของ business process, configuration, functional spec และ implementation เพื่อให้สอดคล้องกับกระบวนการทำงานตามนโยบายบริษัท รวมถึงการสื่อสารกับ abaper ได้เป็นอย่างดี เพื่อให้เกิดประสิทธิภาพสูงสุดกับธุรกิจขององค์กร

นำเสนอแนวทางในการเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพในการทำงานให้ดีขึ้น รวมถึงวิเคราะห์ความต้องการของธุรกิจเกี่ยวกับกระบวนการทำงานของระบบ sap และ interface ต่างๆที่เกี่ยวข้อง

แนะนำและเสนอแนะแนวทางการแก้ไขปัญหาที่เกิดขึ้น ให้กับผู้ใช้งานในระบบ sap เพื่อให้การทำงานเป็นไปอย่างราบรื่นและเกิดประสิทธิภาพสูงสุด

ประสานงาน ระหว่างทุกฝ่าย ที่เกี่ยวข้องกับซอฟต์แวร์ sap และ ซอฟแวร์ อื่นๆ เพื่อให้เข้าใจเหตุการณ์หรือข้อมูลที่เกิดขึ้นภายในองค์กรได้ถูกต้อง และเกิดประสิทธิภาพสูงสุด

ตรวจสอบและบริหารจัดการ เอกสารต่าง ๆ ที่เกี่ยวข้องกับระบบ sap และ ซอฟแวร์ อื่นๆ ให้ทันสมัยและถูกต้องอยู่เสมอ

qualifications:


ปริญญาตรี สาขา วิศวกรรมคอมพิวเตอร์, วิทยาการคอมพิวเตอร์, สาขาเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ หรือเทียบเท่า

มีประสบการณ์ทำงานทาง ด้านระบบ erp sap หรือ อื่นๆ ที่เกี่ยวข้องไม่ต่ำกว่า 2 ปี

มีความรู้ การทำงานของระบบ erp sap อย่างน้อย 1 โมดูล เช่น mm, sd ในหน้าที่ support และมีความรู้พื้นฐานเกี่ยวกับระบบงาน erp ในแต่ละโมดูล

สามารถวิเคราห์ความต้องการของผู้ใช้งาน sap (as-is) พร้อมทั้งให้คำปรึกษาออกแบบระบบเพื่อพัฒนา application สำหรับผู้ใช้งาน (to-be) ได้อย่างเหมาะสม

มีความเข้าใจ และสามารถออกแบบกระบวนการทำงานทางธุรกิจ (business process), function, technical ระบบงาน sap ได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

มีทักษะในการทำงานร่วมกับทีมงาน ที่เกี่ยวข้อง erp และซอฟแวร์ อื่น มาอย่างน้อย 2 ปี

1. ศึกษารวบรวมความต้องการและวิเคราะห์กระบวนการทาง business ในปัจจุบัน (current state analysis)  2. สรุปขอบเขตการทำงานของแต่ละโครงการ (project scope) 3. ตรวจสอบและวิเคราะห์รายละเอียดการดำเนินโครงการ ให้เป็นหมวดหมู่ และประสานงานร่วมกับฝ่ายกลยุทธ์และดิจิทัลเทคโนโลยี รวมถึง business user 4. ประเมินความต้องการของ business user และนำไปออกแบบเครื่องมือที่เหมาะสมให้สอดคล้องกับความต้องการใช้งาน 5. ควบคุมการทดสอบและติดตามระบบให้เป็นไปตาม software development life cycle (sdlc) รับผิดชอบหน้าที่ business analysis ของโครงการขนาด s-xs 6. ออกแบบ/ปรับแก้ไขกระบวนการทาง businessใหม่และกำหนด use case รวมถึงจัดทำ test case ที่เกี่ยวข้อง (to-be process design) 7. สื่อสารกับผู้ใช้งานให้เข้าใจถึงการเปลี่ยนแปลงที่เกิดขึ้น และฝึกอบรมหน่วยงานที่เกี่ยวข้อง (change management & training) 8. จัดทำและตรวจสอบเนื้อหาความถูกต้องครบถ้วนของข้อมูลในคู่มือการใช้งาน และเอกสารที่เกี่ยวข้องกับการฝึกอบรมผู้ใช้งานก่อนส่งมอบโครงการ 9. แนะนำให้คำปรึกษาแนวทางแก้ไขของปัญหาเชิงธุรกิจที่เกิดจากการใช้งานระบบ (hyper case)

Job_Title: IT Infrastructure Manager (System Integration), Pluakdaeng, Rayong Thailand
Company: Monroe Recruitment Consulting Group Co., Ltd.
Job_Description:
salary: 120,000 thb
additional benefits: hybrid working policy, business trip allowance, dental allowance, group insurance, life insurance, long service award (upon reaching 5, 10, 15 years), up-country allowance (monthly in cash)

company profile

award-winning executive recruitment company, monroe consulting group, is recruiting on behalf of a leading it services and system integration provider with a strong and growing presence in thailand. our respected client specializes in delivering end-to-end digital transformation solutions, supporting enterprise clients across infrastructure, enterprise applications, and industrial technology platforms


job summary

the it infrastructure manager will be responsible for leading the design, implementation, and management of enterprise it infrastructure solutions, supporting business growth and client delivery across thailand. this role oversees end-to-end infrastructure projects within a system integration environment, including network, server, cloud, and security solutions, ensuring high performance, scalability, and reliability for both internal operations and external clients. the position involves managing the full project lifecycle — from requirement gathering and solution design to deployment, optimization, and ongoing support. the successful candidate will work closely with cross-functional teams, including sales, presales, and delivery units, to ensure solutions are aligned with client requirements and industry best practices.
 
job responsibilities

lead infrastructure delivery: oversee the design, implementation, and management of enterprise it infrastructure solutions, including network, server, cloud, and security systems, ensuring high availability and performance for client environments.

manage end-to-end projects: take ownership of the full project lifecycle — from requirement gathering and solution design to deployment, testing, and post-implementation support — ensuring delivery within scope, timeline, and budget.

drive technical excellence: provide hands-on technical leadership and guidance to engineering teams, ensuring adherence to best practices, architecture standards, and security compliance.

collaborate with stakeholders: work closely with presales, sales, and client stakeholders to translate business needs into scalable and effective infrastructure solutions.

optimize operations: monitor system performance, troubleshoot complex issues, and implement continuous improvements to enhance reliability, efficiency, and scalability of it environments.

support digital transformation: contribute to enterprise and industrial digitalization initiatives, including cloud adoption, system modernization, and integration with smart factory or industry 4.0 solutions.

lead and develop team: manage, mentor, and develop a team of infrastructure engineers, fostering a high-performance culture and supporting career growth and capability building.

ensure governance & compliance: maintain compliance with internal policies, client requirements, and industry standards related to it infrastructure, security, and data protection.

manage vendor & partner relations: coordinate with technology vendors and partners to ensure successful solution delivery, support, and alignment with project requirements.

report & communicate effectively: provide regular updates on project status, risks, and performance metrics to senior management and key stakeholders.

job requirements

proven years of experience in it infrastructure within a system integration or enterprise it services environment.

strong knowledge of it infrastructure technologies, including network, server, virtualization, cloud platforms, and cybersecurity solutions.

proven ability to manage end-to-end infrastructure projects, with solid experience in planning, execution, risk management, and delivery within timelines and budget.

demonstrated experience in leading, mentoring, and managing technical teams, with the ability to drive performance, accountability, and continuous improvement.

ability to work closely with cross-functional teams (e.g., sales, presales, and clients) to translate business requirements into effective technical solutions.

experience working with enterprise clients, preferably within manufacturing or industrial sectors, is highly advantageous.

strong communication and presentation skills in both thai and english, with the ability to engage both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

strong analytical thinking and troubleshooting skills, with the ability to manage complex technical challenges in dynamic environments.

Job_Title: Regional Security Manager (Risk, Crisis, Protective, Assistance, Army, Police)
Job_Description:
a: overall purpose of the job

the security manager, southeast asia, delivers professional security assistance and operational oversight to international sos clients across southeast asia. the role manages complex security cases, provides clear leadership to security specialists (ssa), and ensures all security planning and decision-making are intelligence-led and aligned with global standards.

working closely with lead security analysts and assistance centre teams, integrates security risk assessments into routine and crisis responses. the role also supports client-facing consulting, training, and regional sales initiatives, while contributing to operational improvements and staff development.




b: role summary – core support & consulting

the role provides end-to-end security assistance support to clients, delivering high-quality, intelligence-led security risk assessments and managing complex assistance cases across southeast asia and the wider apac region. the position ensures operational planning and case management are fully aligned with intelligence analysis, geopolitical developments, and global standards.

responsibilities include leading and guiding security specialists (ssa), overseeing high-risk and crisis cases, supporting regional and global escalations, and participating in incident and on-call response. this role also develops and maintains a trusted network of security providers, contributes to operational improvements and training programs, and supports global knowledge management.

in addition, the position supports client-facing consulting, training, and advisory activities, working closely with sales and marketing teams to articulate security services and provide subject-matter expertise during client engagements, forums, and briefings.




c: required experience

• typically, 10 years of experience in security / assistance / security / risk & protection operations delivery and planning, including deployment in challenging environments across public, private, or nonprofit sectors inclusive 5 years of team lead or manage people.

• experience in multiple domains of security (for example: military, police, intelligent unit, assistance, executive protection, crisis management, business continuity, protective services, natural disaster response, supply chain risk management, investigations, k&r etc.)

• excellent thai language skills (verbal and written).

• degree (or equivalent professional training and experience) in security studies, war studies, international politics, international relations, or a related field.

• high level spoken and written english.

• proficiency in the use of ms office suite, contact center telephony systems, and case management systems.




preferred experience:

• crisis management.

• planning, coordination and delivery of executive / close protection operations, or similar complex security operations.

• security consulting and training delivery.

• public speaking, client presentations, and/or media engagement.

• business development and quality management.

we help the world run betterat sap, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. we're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. the work is challenging – but it matters. you'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. what's in it for you? constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed. 

the partner business manager (pbm) is individual contributor or leads a team of pbms that covers channel business for all sap cloud solutions (s/4 hana rise & s/4hana grow, hcm, fsm, btp, scm, ai, cx, etc.).  the pbm is responsible for proactively developing the partner's sap business by helping finalize their business plan, driving sales (to net new customers and to the partner's current customer base), demand generation, build on partner capabilities to grow sap's cloud subscription revenue across the sap solution portfolio in designated territories. 

the pbm is the main point of contact for building the partner relationship with sap. the pbm is the central advisor to the partner, owning the partner relationship end to end, and responsible for coordinating all sap interactions (with executives, solutions teams, peers, etc.) to drive partner investments and growth in sap's solutions portfolio. the pbm is responsible for appropriately managing/balancing the use of sap assets (i.e. pre-sales, training, psa, etc.) without under- or over-utilizing those assets. he or she develops partners for long term engagements, maintaining health-of-business and transformation to new solutions, technologies and models. the partner business manager supports partner enablement to drive partner self-sufficiency, from demand generation to closing deals. the pbm also supports partners in sales cycle via coaching, mentoring and shadowing in customer facing sales activities. position is measured on the following metrics - revenue, year-over-year growth, market share growth, build on partner maturity, adoption and renewals of strategic solutions (i.e. rise, cloud) and corporate segment impact including scaling partner led territories business with partners.


key responsibilities:


strategic value and business development

responsible for the holistic management and representation of the partner to sap, and for proactively managing and developing the partner following a disciplined business planning process to expand their business with sap. 


1. understands the partner's basic financial structure and key drivers which influence their business and decisions
2. proactively develops active and long-term partner relationships across all roles in the partner (executives, sales, marketing, technical, and keeps up to date with all changes to the partners' organization as well as with the changing environment at sapa. articulates the relevant sap portfolio in terms of the customer value proposition and the partner value proposition (including partner economics, partner roi, advise the partner on investments into various solutions as is seen fit, using available sap experts);
3. presents sap opportunities (i.e. new product, new solutions area) in financial terms including potential revenue, required partner investment, break-even, and return on investment to gain partner adoption;
a. mainly focusing on extending the partner's sweet spot (vs. entering completely new business areas)
4. assists partner in building transformational plans to differentiate themselves and add value to customers.
a. explains economic trends and industry knowledge to support the partner's investment in developing their sap business and to gain trusted advisor status
5. develops and executes effective joint annual business planning with partner to ensure proper planning and execution of sales, marketing, and enablement.
a. works on investment and expansion plans,

we are looking for a devops/cloud infrastructure engineer to join our team. this isn't a "fetch the coffee" kind of internship—you’ll be right in the engine room, helping us manage multi-cloud environments (aws, gcp, and tencent cloud) and building the bridges between code and production. we don’t expect you to be an expert in everything on day one, but we do expect curiosity, a love for linux, and a "security-first" mindset.

key responsibilities

●       container orchestration: support our container environments, managing deployments including kubernetes.

●       pipeline maintenance: keep our ci/cd workflows (git/gitlab/bitbucket) running smoothly so our developers can ship code with confidence.

●       cloud operations: help manage resources across aws, gcp, and tencent cloud, ensuring optimal performance and cost-efficiency.

●       monitor & log: keep a watchful eye on system health and application logs to troubleshoot issues before they become "emergencies."

●       security & ai: implement access management policies, alert and experiment with ai prompt engineering to optimize our internal devops workflows.

●       building the "source of truth": author and maintain high-quality documentation for infrastructure architecture, deployment workflows, and disaster recovery procedures.




technical requirements

we’ve built a modern stack, and we want someone who is excited to master it:

●       cloud literacy: basic experience or strong theoretical knowledge of aws, gcp, or tencent cloud.

●       containerization: familiarity with docker (building images, multi-stage builds, and optimization).

●       the command line: comfort with linux bash—you should feel at home in a terminal.

●       version control: solid understanding of git workflows.

●       service knowledge: general awareness of rdbms, mongodb, kafka, or mq systems. monitoring, upgrade, backup, restore operation.

●       kubernetes knowledge: basic understanding of k8s cluster, including helm chart development, ingress controllers, and troubleshooting complex issues.

about minor technology 

we are modernizing our food & beverage technology landscape to deliver faster, safer, and more insightful digital capabilities across our brands. our focus is practical innovation: resilient store systems, accurate operational data, and seamless integrations from order to kitchen to rider. if you thrive on clear architecture, measurable business outcomes, and hands-on collaboration with product, operations, and vendors, you will feel at home here. 




role purpose 

design and govern end-to-end solution architectures for point-of-sale (pos), back-of-house (boh) platforms (menu, inventory, recipe/costing, labour /roster), and last-mile delivery integrations (minor’s own channel, food aggregators). ensure secure, scalable, and observable solutions that reduce manual effort, improve data quality, and accelerate time-to-market.

clear, concise communicator with strong documentation skills and the ability to influence senior stakeholders.  

good english communication skills, both written and verbal

our systems engineering team ensures we have the right software requirements and specifications documented for our systems and that we have the right verification and validation in place to demonstrate them. there is a strong focus in the team on working with stakeholders from across the organization to make sure that the right information is being documented in the right place. system integrators help support modeling of complex systems to help build common understanding of current and future system design and functionality.

we are looking for individuals who know how to analyze complex systems, recognize patterns and understand the relationships between components, their inputs and outputs and the properties of each. team members should be strong communicators who can work with cross-functional teams to ensure that complex technical concepts are understood by all.




responsibilities

system assessment: evaluate  systems and components’ existing technology infrastructure, integration specifications to identify integration needs and opportunities.

integration test development: develop, configure, automate and customize continuous integration tests to ensure seamless data flow, and correct functional and non-functional behavior.

troubleshooting: diagnose and resolve integration issues, troubleshoot compatibility problems, and implement solutions to optimize performance.  investigate system complaints, perform root cause analysis of failures, and propose remediation in a timely fashion.

documentation: maintain detailed documentation of integration processes, configurations, and changes to ensure clarity and transparency.

system modeling: understanding of uml, sysml or other modeling languages to build accurate models of our systems and views for various stakeholders.

collaboration: communicate effectively with various stakeholders, both internal and external, providing updates, addressing inquiries, and offering support throughout the system integration process. challenging peers while improving processes and proposing process optimizations. promoting continuous improvement initiatives.

training and support: provide training and support to stakeholders to ensure understanding and effective utilization of the integrated systems and products.

defect management: report defects in defect tracking system and verify fixes for defects.

support the continuous improvement initiatives within the organization.

support adhoc project initiatives in the organization especially during non release periods.

factorytalk are offering an exciting career development opportunity for candidates from the life sciences manufacturing, or similar industries, to become a pre-sales solution consultant. the role works closely with potential customers to understand and assess their needs and challenges and offer transformative digital solutions in the area of quality management systems (qms) and related business areas. we offer world-leading enterprise software, empowered with ai, through a range of technology partners. these, combined with our experienced services teams, will be at your disposal to offer cutting-edge solutions recognised globally. this role is ideal for candidates with a quality assurance or quality management background who enjoy meeting new people, uncovering customer pain points, and delivering consultative solutions in both digital and commercial areas.

working closely with sales and project teams, you will be part of the end-to-end customer lifecycle—from lead qualification, solution demonstrations, closing deals, and after sales account engagement.




what you will contribute

-   engage with prospects to understand their business, quality, and compliance requirements

-   translate customer needs into suitable software and service solutions

-   support proposal preparation, quotations, and other pre-sales documentation

-   collaborate closely with sales, marketing, and project teams throughout the sales lifecycle

-   build and maintain trusted relationships with customers and partners




what makes you a strong fit

-   3 years of experience working in pharmaceutical/life sciences or related industries (e.g. cosmetic, food and beverage, etc.) within quality assurance (qa) or quality management (qm) functions. or, experienced using or selling electronic quality management systems (eqms) or other quality-related software

-   good understanding of quality management systems, ideally gmp/iso 9001 based, other regulated environments

-   proficient in microsoft office, especially word, excel, and powerpoint




how you work

-   strong communication skills in english (written and spoken), with confidence in delivering presentations.

-   a consultative mindset with the ability to map solutions to customer needs, balancing what is best for both the customer and the company.

-   a motivated and proactive attitude hungry to create and convert opportunities.

-   a growth mindset, with a strong desire to continuously learn and improve the way you work.

-   well-organized and able to manage multiple opportunities simultaneously.

-   client-oriented, professional, and comfortable working both independently and as part of a team.

-   willingness to travel when required.




why join factorytalk

-   the leading company in its class in south-east asia, and one of the leading companies globally.

-   an opportunity to leverage your qa or qm expertise in a new career path combining sales and consulting.

-   an opportunity to build on your existing experiences to develop a career in sales, business development, and consulting in the high-growth, specialist life sciences digitisation industry.

-   an international working environment that welcomes new ideas and encourages open communication, including direct interaction with top management when needed.

-   opportunities to travel abroad for sales meetings, marketing events, and training.

imagine being a part of safeguarding the world’s largest jewellery brand. if you are passionate about advanced security technologies, operational excellence, and building a resilient environment that protects people, assets, and operations, then you might be our next manager, security systems at pandora production thailand.

ensure all security systems—cctv, access control, intrusion alarms, and panic/duress systems—are properly designed, integrated, deployed, and maintained to meet pandora’s global security minimum requirements (smrs).

identify system gaps, propose continuous improvements, and ensure compliance with relevant standards and thai regulatory requirements.

technical excellence & data‑driven insights

serve as the technical subject-matter expert for all security platforms and infrastructure.

oversee system design, integrations, performance validation, and architecture documentation.

build analytics dashboards and reporting mechanisms to strengthen operations, compliance, and performance transparency.

leverage technology and automation to streamline processes, reduce manual tasks, and enhance overall system efficiency.

security operations & compliance

partner with local security teams to ensure smooth operations, incident readiness, and strong alignment with sops and governance requirements.

conduct audits, maintain access logs and documentation, and enforce pandora’s smrs across all sites.

support cross-functional alignment with hr, it, facilities, global security, and project teams.

project management

lead new system installations, refurbishments, upgrades, and expansion projects from concept to deployment.

review technical drawings, specifications, and vendor proposals to ensure high-quality delivery and compliance with global standards.

ensure new-build and refurbishment projects meet security design requirements and go-live readiness.

vendor and contractor management

manage third-party system integrators, service providers, and contractors.

review and approve technical designs, boms, and quotes.

monitor sla compliance, conduct quality audits, and drive continuous improvement in vendor performance.

ensure teams understand system use, incident escalation processes, and emergency protocols.

act as a regional expert for thailand and potential upcoming facilities in vietnam.




we love that you are…

equipped with a bachelor’s degree in electronics engineering, security technology, it networks, or a related field, with 5–8 years of hands‑on experience in enterprise security systems such as cctv, access control, and alarm platforms—preferably within manufacturing, distribution, or high‑value goods environments.

technically strong, with practical knowledge of ip networking, system administration, solution integration, reading schematics, and evaluating system designs, including experience in troubleshooting and managing vendors and projects.

professionally credentialed or working toward certifications such as psp, cpp, or oem system certifications (genetec, lenel, axis, milestone).

skilled in analysing incidents, identifying risks, and transforming operational data into clear, actionable insights to support leadership decision‑making.

a confident communicator, fluent in thai and proficient in english, capable of influencing senior stakeholders and collaborating effectively across multiple functions and regions.

a forward‑thinking, self‑motivated team player who is organized, detail‑oriented, and able to balance multiple priorities while maintaining high standards of quality, accuracy, and operational continuity.




about pandora

pandora is the world’s largest jewellery brand, specialising in the design, crafting, and marketing of high-quality jewellery made from recycled precious metals. with presence in over 100 countries through 6,800 points of sale, including more than 2,700 concept stores, we inspire millions to express themselves through meaningful jewellery.

headquartered in copenhagen, pandora employs 37,000 people worldwide and is committed to cutting greenhouse gas emissions across its value chain by 2030.

about pandora production thailand

thailand has been at the heart of pandora’s craftsmanship since 1989. with two major manufacturing facilities in bangkok and lamphun and more than 13,000 skilled craftspeople, every piece of pandora jewellery sold globally is hand-finished in thailand using high-quality and sustainable methods.

role overview

the pmo – project implementation supports the smooth delivery of altotech’s projects by helping with documentation, budget tracking, and coordination across teams. you’ll help keep purchase orders organized, support expense tracking, and make sure project information is well-documented and easy to find.

we’re looking for someone organized and detail-oriented who enjoys keeping things in order — whether it’s tracking pos, helping prepare reports, or coordinating between teams.




key responsibilities

1. project documentation & tracking

• help set up and maintain po records, project schedules, and issue logs — keeping start dates, deadlines, and milestones organized and easy to follow.

• prepare and organize project documents (material approvals, delivery letters, handover packages, etc.) following altotech global standards.

• keep project management tools and portfolio data up to date so the team has clear visibility on project status.

• help prepare weekly status reports summarizing progress, action items, and any issues.




2. budget control & reporting

• help monitor project expenses against budgets and flag early when costs are trending over, with suggestions for corrective actions.

• support project performance analysis (profit/loss, expense breakdown) and coordinate vendor invoice and po tracking.

• assist in preparing monthly and quarterly revenue forecasts and summary reports for management.




3. coordination & communication

• act as a coordination point between internal teams, customers, and vendors to help keep project implementation running smoothly.

• help organize meetings, prepare agendas, take meeting notes, and follow up on action items.

support the preparation of customer quotations, weekly summary reports for company meetings, and other tasks as assigned by supervisors.




qualifications

education & experience

• bachelor’s degree in engineering, business administration, computer science, or other related fields.

• at least 2 years of experience in project coordination or project support roles (experience in technology or engineering is a plus).




skills & competencies

• good attention to detail and enjoy keeping documents and data well-organized.

• comfortable communicating in both thai and english.

• familiar with microsoft office and google workspace.

• able to handle multiple tasks and prioritize work effectively.

• good problem-solving skills and a willingness to learn.

• team player who works well across different departments.

• responsible, reliable, and positive attitude toward work.




nice to have

• some familiarity with pmo frameworks (pmbok, prince2) or project management certifications.

• experience in technology, engineering, or construction project environments.

• experience using tools like asana, jira, confluence, or ms project.

• experience coordinating with corporate clients in real estate, hospitality, or facility management.




core competencies

organized: enjoys keeping project records, documents, and data in good order so information is easy to find.

budget aware: keeps an eye on project finances and helps flag issues early.

good communicator: keeps stakeholders informed and shares updates clearly and on time.

reliable: follows through on tasks and commitments — the team can count on you.

detail-oriented: takes care to produce accurate documents and catch inconsistencies.

client-friendly: professional and approachable in all client interactions.

team player: works well across different teams and departments to get things done together.




what we offer

• competitive salary commensurate with experience and qualifications.

• direct exposure to cutting-edge technology and energy management projects shaping thailand’s built environment.

• a high-growth startup environment with real ownership and impact from day one.

• collaborative team culture with a mission-driven focus on sustainability and net-zero impact.

• opportunity to work with thailand’s most prominent commercial real estate and hospitality brands.

Job_Description:
position overview 

we are looking for a highly skilled and detail-oriented squard lead (golang) to join our backend engineering team. this position is ideal for professionals who have a strong foundation in system design, distributed architecture, and high-performance service development using go. you will play a key role in building scalable backend systems that power mission-critical business applications. 

 key responsibilities 

design, implement, and maintain scalable, reliable, and high-performance backend services using go (golang). 

develop apis and microservices that align with product requirements and architectural standards. 

collaborate with product managers, devops engineers, and front-end developers to deliver seamless end-to-end solutions. 

write clean, efficient, and testable code, adhering to industry best practices and internal coding guidelines. 

participate in system architecture and design reviews to ensure robustness and scalability. 

monitor application performance, troubleshoot issues, and continuously improve system reliability. 

contribute to continuous integration and delivery (ci/cd) workflows and development process improvements. 

mentor junior developers and provide technical leadership as needed. 

 qualifications 

bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related technical field. 

5+ years of professional experience in backend development with a strong focus on golang. 

solid understanding of go runtime, goroutines, channels, and memory management. 

proficiency in building and consuming restful and/or grpc apis. 

experience with relational (postgresql, mysql) and non-relational (mongodb, redis) databases. 

familiarity with docker, kubernetes, and cloud environments such as aws, gcp, or azure. 

strong understanding of distributed systems, microservices architecture, and event-driven design. 

practical experience with version control systems (git) and agile/scrum methodologies.

Job_Title: Head of PMO (Business Transformation - Government Sector)
Job_Description:
overview

เรากำลังมองหาผู้นำทีม pmo ระดับมืออาชีพที่มีประสบการณ์สูงในธุรกิจ si และมีความเชี่ยวชาญในการส่งมอบโปรเจกต์ business transformation ให้กับหน่วยงานภาครัฐ คุณจะมีบทบาทสำคัญในการวางมาตรฐานการทำงาน (governance) บริหารจัดการทรัพยากร และควบคุมดูแลทีม project manager (pm), business analyst (ba) และ quality assurance (qa) เพื่อให้มั่นใจว่าโครงการระดับประเทศจะสำเร็จลุล่วงตามแผนงาน คุณภาพ และงบประมาณ

 

key responsibilities

team leadership: บริหารจัดการและพัฒนาศักยภาพทีม pm, ba และ qa ให้ทำงานสอดประสานกันอย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

project governance: กำหนดมาตรฐาน standard operating procedures (sops), templates และ methodology (waterfall & agile) สำหรับการส่งมอบงานระบบสารสนเทศเพื่อการให้บริการขนาดใหญ่

government delivery: ควบคุมการส่งมอบงานตามงวดงานในสัญญา (tor) ของภาครัฐ ประสานงานการตรวจรับงาน และบริหารจัดการความเสี่ยง (risk management) ที่อาจส่งผลต่อการเบิกจ่าย

resource management: วางแผนการใช้ทรัพยากร (capacity planning) ในทุกโครงการ เพื่อลดคอขวดในขั้นตอนการเก็บ requirement (ba) หรือการทดสอบระบบ (qa)

stakeholder management: เป็นตัวกลางประสานงานระหว่างทีมเทคนิค ผู้บริหารระดับสูง และคณะกรรมการตรวจรับของหน่วยงานภาครัฐ

quality assurance: กำหนดเกณฑ์มาตรฐานการทดสอบระบบ (uat/sit) และกระบวนการประกันคุณภาพเพื่อให้ระบบที่ส่งมอบมีความเสถียรและปลอดภัยตามมาตรฐานความมั่นคงปลอดภัยไซเบอร์

 

qualifications

experience: มีประสบการณ์รวมไม่น้อยกว่า 10-15 ปี โดยต้องมีประสบการณ์อย่างน้อย 5 ปีในระดับบริหารจัดการทีม (pmo/project director) ในธุรกิจ si

domain knowledge: มีประสบการณ์ตรงในการทำโครงการ technology transformation หรือวางระบบ core system ให้กับ หน่วยงานภาครัฐ/รัฐวิสาหกิจ (เข้าใจระเบียบพัสดุและ e-gp เป็นอย่างดี)

technical savvy: เข้าใจ sdlc (software development life cycle) อย่างลึกซึ้ง และสามารถคุยภาษาเทคนิคกับทีม developer ได้

skills: มีทักษะการเจรจาต่อรอง (negotiation) และการแก้ปัญหาเฉพาะหน้าภายใต้ความกดดันสูง

certification: ได้รับใบรับรอง pmp, prince2 หรือ agile certification จะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

language: สามารถสื่อสารได้อย่างมืออาชีพ รวมถึงการเขียนรายงาน/เอกสารโครงการ และสื่อสารภาษาอังกฤษได้ดี

Company: ผู้ประกอบการไม่เปิดเผยชื่อบริษัท
Job_Description:
leighton asia
established in 1974 and headquartered in hong kong, leighton asia delivers a portfolio of high-profile infrastructure projects throughout asia. we are a proven leader in the delivery of complex tunnel, rail and road networks, offering a comprehensive range of services spanning key sectors including civil infrastructure, advanced technology, buildings, energy and resources, and mep.

leighton asia currently operates in hong kong, macau, singapore, philippines, indonesia, malaysia, india and thailand.

leveraging our international expertise and local knowledge, we are committed to delivering value-added solutions, bespoke and high-quality projects, and generating sustainable returns for our clients, while providing safe, rewarding and fulfilling careers for our people. our ability to deliver results to our clients, stakeholders and communities across a wide and culturally diverse region is made possible by our committed and high performing “one leighton asia team”.

leighton asia is a member of the cimic group, an engineering-led construction, mining, services and public private partnerships leader with a history dating back to 1899.

key responsibilities

plan and coordinate the integration of elv systems, including building management system (bms), energy performance monitoring system (epms), and structured cabling systems.

review system requirements, points lists, and integration design in accordance with project specifications and basis of design.

coordinate with consultants, contractors, vendors and internal teams to ensure smooth implementation of elv integration works.

oversee installation, configuration and commissioning of elv hardware, software and networking components.

conduct testing, validation and troubleshooting of integrated systems to ensure reliability and compliance with project standards.

verify system performance including end-to-end testing (point to graphics) and functional testing of controllers, plcs and i/o panels.

prepare integration documentation, technical reports and system records for project management and client review.

support training and handover activities for operation and maintenance teams.

ensure all elv works comply with relevant electrical safety regulations and site safety requirements.

qualifications

bachelor’s degree in electrical engineering, control engineering or related discipline.

professional certification or relevant technical qualifications will be an advantage.

strong knowledge of elv systems integration within data center, industrial or critical facilities environments.

experience & skills

minimum 5 years of hands-on experience in elv systems integration or commissioning.

proven experience in bms, epms, plc systems and structured cabling.

good knowledge of communication protocols such as bacnet, modbus, and networking fundamentals.

experience in data center, industrial facility, or infrastructure projects will be advantageous.

strong analytical and troubleshooting skills for system integration issues.

ability to coordinate with multiple stakeholders including consultants, vendors and project teams.

proficiency in microsoft office applications.

excellent english communication skills, both spoken and written.

amazon web services (aws) is leading the next phase of ai adoption and is seeking a hands-on ai specialist solution architect (ssa). aws specialist solutions architects (ssas) are technologists with deep domain-specific expertise, able to address advanced concepts and feature designs.

as part of the aws sales organization, ssas work with customers who have complex challenges that require expert-level knowledge to solve. ssas craft scalable, flexible, and resilient technical architectures that address those challenges. this might involve guiding customers as they refactor an application or design an entirely new cloud-based system.

specialist sas play a critical role in capturing customer feedback, advocating for roadmap enhancements and anticipating customer requirements as they work backwards from their needs. as domain experts, ssas also participate in field engagement and enablement, producing content such as whitepapers, blogs, and workshops for customers, partners, and the aws technical field.

this role focuses on converting ai ambition into programs that can be delivered, operated, and scaled in production environments.

key job responsibilities
- the ai specialist sa team builds technical relationships with customers of all sizes and operate as their trusted advisor, ensuring they get the most out of the cloud at every stage of their journey while adopting genai/ml and agentic technologies across their organisation.
- you’ll manage the overall technical relationship between aws and our customers, making recommendations on security, cost, performance, reliability and operational efficiency to accelerate their challenging genai/ml and agentic projects.
- internally, you will be the voice of the customer, sharing their needs with regard to their usage of our services impacting the roadmap of aws genai/ml and agentic features.
- in this role, your creativity will link technology to tangible solutions, with the opportunity to define cloud-native genai/ml and agentic architectural patterns for a variety of use cases.
- you will participate in the creation and sharing of best practices, technical content and new reference architectures (e.g. white papers, code samples, blog posts) and evangelize and educate about running genai/ml and agentic workloads on aws technology (e.g. through workshops, user groups, meetups, public speaking, online videos or conferences).
- technical leadership & mentorship: lead hands-on deep dives and technical workshops, contributing reusable code, reference architectures, and internal technical assets for the broader engineering organization.

about the team
diverse experiences
aws values diverse experiences. even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. if your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.

why aws?
amazon web services (aws) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. we pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.

inclusive team culture
here at aws, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. ongoing events and learning experiences, including our conversations on race and ethnicity (core) and amazecon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.

mentorship & career growth
we’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become earth’s best employer. that’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.

work/life balance
we value work-life harmony. achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. when we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.

- 7+ year design/implementation/consulting experience of distributed applications.
- 5+ years customer facing experience in design/implementation of production ai systems.
- experience implementing ai solutions that can include integration of llms/multi-modal fms in large scale systems, fine-tuning llms, deployment and distributed inference of llms, rag, fm evaluation, vector dbs, agentic workflows, prompt/context engineering, and mlops.
- hands-on experience with aws ecosystems (including bedrock, agentcore, and sagemaker) or equivalent to set up secure, private-network ai environments, and practical experience implementing retrieval-augmented generation using embeddings, vector stores, and semantic search optimization.
- able to effectively communicate across an increasing diversity of audiences internally and externally.
- ability to influence customer and internal business decision makers as a technical thought leader.

ภาพรวม project owner รับผิดชอบบริหารโครงการคอนโดมิเนียมในภาพรวม ทำหน้าที่กำหนดทิศทาง วางกลยุทธ์ และกำกับการดำเนินงานของโครงการ เพื่อให้สามารถสร้าง ยอดขาย การโอนกรรมสิทธิ์ และผลกำไร (p&l) ได้ตามเป้าหมายของบริษัท

บทบาทของตำแหน่งนี้เปรียบเสมือน business owner ของโครงการ ที่ต้องมองภาพรวมของธุรกิจ วิเคราะห์โอกาสและความเสี่ยง พร้อมขับเคลื่อนทีมที่เกี่ยวข้องให้โครงการประสบความสำเร็จตามเป้าหมาย

หน้าที่และความรับผิดชอบ (key responsibilities)

บริหารภาพรวมโครงการ

ดูแลภาพรวมของโครงการที่รับผิดชอบให้ดำเนินไปตามแผนธุรกิจและเป้าหมายของบริษัท

ติดตามและประเมินผลการดำเนินงานของโครงการในด้าน ยอดขาย การโอนกรรมสิทธิ์ และผลกำไร วิเคราะห์สถานการณ์ของโครงการ และกำหนดแนวทางการดำเนินงานเพื่อให้โครงการสามารถแข่งขันในตลาดได้

กำหนดทิศทางและกลยุทธ์ของโครงการ

ร่วมกำหนดกลยุทธ์หลักของโครงการในด้าน people strategy, digital strategy, sales strategy, marketing strategy และ customer experience

ประเมินผลของกลยุทธ์ที่ใช้อยู่ และปรับแนวทางให้เหมาะสมกับสถานการณ์ของตลาดและโครงการสนับสนุนทีมที่เกี่ยวข้องในการดำเนินกลยุทธ์ให้สอดคล้องกับเป้าหมายของโครงการ

บริหารผลประกอบการโครงการ (p&l)

วิเคราะห์ข้อมูลทางธุรกิจของโครงการ เช่น รายได้ ต้นทุน และผลตอบแทนจากการลงทุน

ติดตามสถานะทางการเงินของโครงการ เพื่อให้สามารถสร้างผลกำไรตามเป้าหมาย

เสนอแนวทางปรับปรุงกลยุทธ์เพื่อเพิ่มยอดขาย ลดต้นทุน หรือเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพของโครงการ

ประสานงานและกำกับทีมที่เกี่ยวข้อง

ทำงานร่วมกับทีมขาย การตลาด และทีมสนับสนุนอื่น ๆ เพื่อให้การดำเนินงานของโครงการเป็นไปตามแผน

กำกับทิศทางการทำงานของทีมต่าง ๆ เพื่อให้สอดคล้องกับเป้าหมายของโครงการสนับสนุนการแก้ไขปัญหาเชิงกลยุทธ์ที่อาจส่งผลต่อยอดขาย การโอน หรือผลกำไรของโครงการ

ติดตามและรายงานผลการดำเนินงานของโครงการ

ติดตาม kpi หลักของโครงการ

ยอดขาย (sales performance)

อัตราการโอนกรรมสิทธิ์ (transfer rate)

ผลกำไรของโครงการ (project profitability)

วิเคราะห์ข้อมูลเพื่อประเมินแนวโน้มของโครงการ

จัดทำรายงานสรุปผลการดำเนินงานและนำเสนอผู้บริหาร




คุณสมบัติผู้สมัคร (qualifications)

ปริญญาตรี สาขา บริหารธุรกิจ การตลาด การเงิน อสังหาริมทรัพย์ หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง**

สำเร็จการศึกษาจาก *มหาวิทยาลัยชั้นนำของประเทศไทย (top 5) หรือ มหาวิทยาลัยในต่างประเทศ

มีผลการเรียนดี โดยได้รับ *เกียรตินิยมอันดับ 2 ขึ้นไป หรือเทียบเท่า

ยินดีรับ *นักศึกษาจบใหม่ที่มีศักยภาพสูง (high potential talent)

มีทักษะการคิดเชิงธุรกิจ (business thinking) และสามารถวิเคราะห์ข้อมูลได้

สามารถมองภาพรวมของธุรกิจและโครงการได้ดี

มีทักษะการสื่อสารและการประสานงานกับทีมที่หลากหลาย

มีความรับผิดชอบสูง และมี *ownership mindset

job summary

we are seeking a senior architect – core bank architect with strong experience in core banking architecture and implementation, particularly with thought machine or equivalent core banking platforms. this role will lead the design, modernization, and integration of core banking solutions, providing technical leadership across system architecture, cloud migration, and api‑driven platforms.

you will collaborate closely with business, technology, and regulatory stakeholders to deliver secure, scalable, and high‑performance banking platforms, driving end‑to‑end project delivery and innovation.

key responsibilities

solution design & architecture

lead the design and architecture of core banking systems (e.g. thought machine, fis profile, systematics, ibs, or other fis platforms).

ensure alignment with business requirements, regulatory standards, and enterprise architecture principles.

technical leadership

define and drive system modernization, cloud migration, and api‑driven banking solutions.

provide architectural guidance on scalability, security, performance, and resiliency.

integration & customization

design and implement integration strategies between core banking platforms and digital banking, payment systems, and regulatory/compliance solutions.

address product limitations and customization requirements, especially within thought machine environments.

stakeholder engagement

work closely with business leaders, product owners, developers, and vendors to ensure successful solution delivery.

act as a trusted advisor on core banking architecture decisions.

performance & security

ensure systems meet high availability, performance, security, and regulatory compliance standards.

innovation & emerging technology

stay up to date with ai, genai, cloud computing, and digital banking trends.

proactively recommend innovative solutions to enhance banking architecture and customer experience.

project delivery

lead end‑to‑end project implementation, from planning and design through go‑live and post‑implementation support.

ensure delivery within scope, timeline, and budget.

qualifications & experience

8+ years of direct experience in core banking architecture and implementation.

strong knowledge of banking processes, digital transformation, and regulatory frameworks.

hands‑on experience implementing and architecting solutions on thought machine, including understanding its limitations.

proven experience with cloud platforms (aws, azure, or gcp), microservices architecture, and api integrations.

strong background in databases (oracle, sql, nosql) and devops practices.

experience working in agile/scrum environments and leading cross‑functional teams.

excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.

ability to work independently and manage multiple complex initiatives.

effective issue handling, escalation to concerned units, monitoring statuses, and closing actions within expected timelines.

able to handle multiple initiatives and special projects.

Job_Title: เภสัชกร ประจำโรงพยาบาลศัลยกรรม
Company: เจอโน่นเจอนี่
Job_Description:
ตำแหน่ง: เภสัชกร ประจำโรงพยาบาลศัลยกรรม กำลังมองหาเภสัชกรที่มีความรู้และประสบการณ์ในการบริหารจัดการด้านเภสัชกรรมในโรงพยาบาล ผู้ที่ได้รับคัดเลือกจะมีบทบาทสำคัญในการดูแลและจัดการด้านยาของผู้ป่วยอย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ สนับสนุนการรักษาพยาบาล และช่วยให้ผู้ป่วยได้รับการดูแลที่ดีที่สุดหน้าที่หลัก:
- จัดการและควบคุมสต็อกยาและอุปกรณ์ทางการแพทย์ในโรงพยาบาล
- ตรวจสอบและควบคุมคุณภาพยาและเวชภัณฑ์ให้ถูกต้องตามมาตรฐาน
- ให้คำแนะนำและข้อมูลด้านยาแก่แพทย์ พยาบาล และผู้ป่วย
- เป็นผู้ประสานงานหลักระหว่างทีมแพทย์และพยาบาล
- ให้คำปรึกษาและสนับสนุนการรักษาพยาบาลแก่ผู้ป่วยทักษะ คุณสมบัติ และประสบการณ์

เวลาทำการ
- วันละ 8 ชั่วโมง (10.00 - 19.00 น.) 5 วันต่อสัปดาห์ / แขวนป้าย
คุณสมบัติที่จำเป็น:
- ได้รับใบอนุญาตเป็นเภสัชกร
- มีประสบการณ์ในการปฏิบัติงานด้านเภสัชกรรมในโรงพยาบาลหรือสถานพยาบาลอย่างน้อย 1 ปี
- มีความรู้และประสบการณ์ในการบริหารจัดการด้านยาอย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ
- มีทักษะการสื่อสารที่ดี สามารถให้คำแนะนำและข้อมูลด้านยาแก่บุคลากรทางการแพทย์และผู้ป่วยได้อย่างชัดเจน
- มีความละเอียดรอบคอบในการปฏิบัติงานสมัครเลย เพราะเรายินดีที่จะต้อนรับคุณเข้าร่วมเป็นส่วนหนึ่งของทีม
- มีทักษะทำคอนเทนต์และสามารถออกหน้ากล้องได้ เพื่อนำเสนอข้อมูลและให้คำแนะนำด้านสุขภาพเบื้องต้นบน social media ของโรงพยาบาล
- เภสัชกรหญิง ไม่เกิน 30 ปี

Job_Title: นักกลยุทธ์อาวุโส 2
Job_Description:
คุณสมบัติเฉพาะตำแหน่ง

1.       สำเร็จการศึกษาระดับปริญญาตรีขึ้นไป ในสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง เช่น เทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ /วิทยาการคอมพิวเตอร์/เศรษฐศาสตร์/รัฐศาสตร์/รัฐประศาสนศาสตร์/บริหารธุรกิจ หรือ สาขาอื่นที่เกี่ยวข้อง

2.       มีประสบการณ์ทำงานอย่างน้อย 5–8 ปี ขึ้นไป ในงานด้านใดด้านหนึ่ง เช่น

·      การวางแผนเชิงยุทธศาสตร์ / นโยบายสาธารณะ

·      การบริหารโครงการ (program / project management)

·      การวิเคราะห์นโยบายหรือการพัฒนาระบบงานภาครัฐ

·      การติดตามประเมินผลโครงการ (project evaluation)

3.       มีความสามารถในการวิเคราะห์ข้อมูล/สังเคราะห์ประเด็นเชิงนโยบาย/จัดทำข้อเสนอเชิงยุทธศาสตร์ (strategic recommendation)

4.       สามารถจัดทำรายงานเชิงวิเคราะห์ / policy brief / executive summary สำหรับผู้บริหารระดับสูงได้

5.       มีความเข้าใจเกี่ยวกับกระบวนการจัดทำงบประมาณของหน่วยงานภาครัฐ รวมถึงการบริหาร

งบประมาณโครงการ หรือการจัดทำข้อเสนอโครงการ

6.       มีทักษะการนำเสนอและการสื่อสารเชิงนโยบายต่อผู้บริหารหรือหน่วยงานภายนอก มีประสบการณ์เกี่ยวกับ digital transformation / digital government / govtech

ความรู้ความเชี่ยวชาญที่จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

1.       มีประสบการณ์ทำงานกับ หน่วยงานภาครัฐ หรือโครงการเชิงนโยบาย

2.       มีความเข้าใจเรื่อง data / ai / digital platform / cloud computing

3.       มีประสบการณ์ขับเคลื่อนโครงการที่เกี่ยวข้องกับ digital government

4.       สามารถใช้เครื่องมือวิเคราะห์ข้อมูล เช่น excel advanced power bi / tableau หรือเครื่องมือ data analysis

คุณลักษณะเชิงพฤติกรรมที่ต้องการ

1.       มีความคิดเชิงยุทธศาสตร์ (strategic thinking)

2.       มีทัศนคติการทำงานแบบเชิงรุก (proactive attitude)

3.       สามารถปรับตัวพร้อมรับสถานการณ์ที่มีการเปลี่ยนแปลง (change management)

4.       เปิดรับความคิดเห็น (open-mindedness)

ready to say goodbye to the boring, traditional 9-5 routine and embrace a dynamic and exciting work environment that puts you in control? this position offers you the flexibility to set your own schedule and complete exciting tasks using an innovative web-based evaluation tool.     


a day in the life of a media search analyst:    

in this role, you will be doing a comprehensive assessment of diverse task categories, encompassing music, video, books, podcasts and home pod evaluations spanning various media domains    

analyzing and evaluating search outcomes for app store content and conducting research using online tools to assess and validate query accuracy and intent by applying market expertise in conjunction with provided directives to evaluate the relevance and purpose of task-related information for your specific market.    




join us today and be a key player in our community revolutionizing digital media content!    




qualification path    

no previous professional experience is required to apply to this role, however, working on this project will require you to pass the basic requirements and go through a standard assessment process. this is a part-time long-term project and your work will be subject to our standard quality assurance checks during the term of this agreement.     


basic requirements    

speaker of the english & thai language, with fluency in both written and spoken forms    

being a resident in thailand for the last 12 months and having familiarity with current and historical business, media, sport, news, social media, and cultural affairs in thailand    

having an email address associated with an apple id and experience and know-how of apple products    

up-to-date familiarity with prevailing trends in applications, music & video with a keen interest in internet research
