key responsibilities/accountabilities:

about the role

we are looking for an experienced techno‑functional digitalization lead to drive the digital transformation of our order management, production planning, and supply/materials processes. in this role, you will partner with business stakeholders and it delivery teams to modernize end‑to‑end planning flows, improve efficiency, and enable true “ease of doing business.”

if you enjoy translating complex business needs into scalable it solutions and leading change across functions and geographies—this role is for you.

 

·         drive digitalization of order & production planning processes by engaging stakeholders and enabling adoption of modern technologies.

·         apply strong end‑to‑end (e2e) business flow and logic knowledge to shape requirements and bring change requests to relevant process forums.

·         identify and lead process improvements linked to order and planning it solutions.

·         find synergy and optimization opportunities and collaborate with business managers, process & solution key users, and it delivery teams to deliver impactful changes.

·         partner with global order, production planning, supply, and materials functions to gather requirements, align initiatives, and support prioritization.

·         assess training needs and strengthen organizational capability by developing, maintaining, and delivering training sessions.

·         optimize e2e processes through it solutions to improve productivity, quality, and operational efficiency.

·         lead and contribute to it change management investigations from an e2e perspective (pre‑studies, projects, and ad‑hoc analyses).

·         support and promote data culture initiatives, including better use of data for decision‑making and performance improvement.

·         bring it platform and solution experience to align with ud’s future digital and it architecture strategy.

·         communicate critical business priorities to it teams to ensure timely development and delivery that meets customer expectations.

 

qualifications:

·       bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science or a related field

·       10–12 years of hands‑on experience in planning & supply chain operations

·       at least 3 full-cycle global system implementations in a techno‑functional role

·       service‑minded, structured, and highly organized

·       a strong communicator with excellent stakeholder management and networking skills

·       a proactive problem‑solver who enjoys working across teams and cultures

·       a true team player who contributes positively to collaboration and team spirit

·       fluent in english (spoken and written); japanese language skills are a strong advantage

job overview

we are seeking an enthusiastic ai engineer to design, develop, and maintain ai systems with a primary focus on utilizing open ai and azure ai services. the successful candidate will collaborate with a dynamic technology team to drive innovation and deliver effective ai solutions that address business challenges.

what you'll do

design and develop ai models using the open ai api and azure ai services

create and manage data pipelines for storing, analyzing, and processing large datasets

enhance and maintain cloud infrastructure and database systems

collaborate with software engineers, data analysts, and business stakeholders to ensure efficient and impactful ai solutions

research and stay up-to-date with emerging ai technologies and trends to integrate into organizational strategies

what we're looking

bachelor’s degree or higher in computer science, computer engineering, or a related field

fresh graduates are welcome to apply. candidates with relevant work experience will be given special consideration.

proficient in using the open ai api and azure ai services

strong programming skills in python and a solid understanding of cloud computing concepts

experience with database design, data pipeline development, and management (experience is a plus)

excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team

proficiency in both english and thai is an advantage

Company: Sustainable Rice Platform Services Co., Ltd.
Job_Description:
about the role

the project manager is responsible for the day-to-day operational management of the project on behalf of srp. this role focuses on coordination, planning, and administrative management to ensure project activities across three countries are delivered on time, within budget, and in compliance with donor requirements.

the project manager ensures the project remains organized and on schedule, supports financial tracking and reporting, coordinates team activities and meetings, and maintains effective communication among team members and partners. technical quality is led by the technical specialist and senior advisors.


about the sustainable rice platform (srp)

srp thailand serves as the secretariat office for the sustainable rice platform e.v. (srp), leading the promotion and implementation of the srp standard, related tools, guidance, and training programs. the office works closely with national stakeholders to accelerate adoption, strengthen local capacity, and deliver measurable impact at scale across thailand’s rice sector.

the sustainable rice platform (srp) is the executing agency for a three-year regional project funded by the global environment facility (gef) through the least developed countries fund (ldcf) and the special climate change fund (sccf). the project — "public-private blended finance facility for climate-resilient rice landscapes" (gef id: 10929) — operates across three pilot countries: bangladesh, cambodia, and viet nam, with fao serving as gef implementing agency. 

the project's objective is to catalyse public and private investment in climate-resilient rice landscapes, value chains, and livelihoods. it is structured around three components: (1) design of an integrated blended finance facility; (2) capacity development of farmers, cooperatives, and financial intermediaries; and (3) governance, monitoring, and knowledge management. the project is now in active implementation — the inception phase has been completed.

learn more: www.sustainablerice.org

we are currently transitioning to a new official website at www.srpglobal.org


tasks and responsibilities 

1. work planning and coordination

maintain and update the project workplan, timelines, and deliverables across countries

prepare annual work plans and budgets (awp/b) in coordination with the project team

track progress of activities and follow up on delays or risks

maintain project calendars and send deadline reminders

2. financial and budget management

monitor project expenditure and maintain budget tracking tools

prepare regular financial summaries and support financial reporting

process consultant and subcontractor payments in coordination with finance staff

3. team and meeting coordination

organize project meetings and prepare agendas, minutes, and action points

coordinate logistics for missions, workshops, and events

serve as the main day-to-day coordination focal point for the project team

4. reporting and compliance

lead preparation of project progress reports and support annual donor reporting

maintain risk logs, documentation systems, and compliance records

track co-financing commitments and project documentation

5. contracts and procurement

manage consultant and subcontractor contracts

coordinate procurement processes in line with organizational and donor policies


qualifications

bachelor’s degree or higher in project management, business administration, international development, or a related field

minimum 5 years of experience in project management or project coordination roles, preferably in an international ngo, un agency, or development organization context. 

demonstrated experience managing project budgets, workplans, and reporting for donor-funded projects. experience with gef, fao, or similar multilateral-funded projects is a strong advantage. 

experience preparing formal progress reports and financial reports for institutional donors. 

experience supervising small teams and coordinating across multiple countries or locations. 

familiarity with procurement and contract management procedures. 

excellent organizational skills and attention to detail; ability to manage multiple workstreams simultaneously. 

strong command of excel or similar tools for budget tracking and workplan management. 

clear written and spoken english for reporting and communication. 

proactive, reliable, and solutions-oriented working style. 

ability to work effectively in a lean team environment with significant autonomy. 

knowledge of thai, bangla, or vietnamese is an advantage but not required. 




reporting line

the project manager reports to the srp partnerships manager and supervises project support staff and country specialists. the role serves as the central coordination point for project implementation and reporting.


please submit your application to hr@srpglobal.org including: resume, cover letter, expected salary, indication of where you found this job posting

your role and responsibilities

as an application architect for cloud applications, you will design web technology in cloud applications that may run on multiple platforms and be composed of multiple software packages. you will be responsible for ensuring the performance, availability, and scalability of these applications. 

your primary responsibilities will include: 

design cloud applications: design web technology in cloud applications, considering multiple platforms and software packages to ensure seamless functionality. 
ensure performance and scalability: develop and maintain the functional interface to the application infrastructure, ensuring high performance, availability, and scalability of cloud applications. 
maintain application infrastructure: oversee the maintenance of the functional interface to the application infrastructure, guaranteeing smooth operation and integration of cloud applications.

about business unit

make an impact with ntt data
join a company that is pushing the boundaries of what is possible. we are renowned for our technical excellence and leading innovations, and for making a difference to our clients and society. our workplace embraces diversity and inclusion – it’s a place where you can grow, belong and thrive.

your day at ntt data
as a collaboration managed services engineer (l1) at ntt data, you will be the go-to person for ensuring our clients' collaboration, contact centre and voice systems stay up and running. your main focus will be on providing first-line support by monitoring private and public cloud infrastructure, identifying problems early, and resolving technical incidents efficiently. you'll play a crucial role in ensuring we meet our service level agreements and deliver an excellent client experience.

throughout the day you’ll be monitoring client infrastructure for any issues and proactively addressing them before they escalate. if incidents occur, you'll investigate and get to the root cause swiftly to restore services. your tasks will also include executing approved maintenance activities like patching and configuration changes and providing telephonic or chat support to clients when needed.

your role doesn't stop at issue resolution; you'll also be identifying opportunities to optimize work processes and reduce incidents. whether it's updating existing knowledge articles, creating new ones, or finding ways to automate routine tasks, you'll actively contribute to enhancing service delivery. your ability to adapt to changing circumstances and keep a positive outlook will be key to your success.

effective communication is essential in this role. you'll collaborate across different cultures and social groups, plan activities comprehensively, and ensure smooth handovers during shift changes. your commitment to placing clients at the forefront of all interactions will help create a positive client experience throughout their journey with us.



to thrive in this role, you need to have:
basic troubleshooting skills and knowledge in network, voice, collaboration, and contact centre services.
the ability to triage client cases effectively, ensuring that severity and impact is accurate as well as key information is documented in the case.
active listening techniques to confirm understanding and gather relevant information.
strong communication skills, able to work across different cultures and social groups.
flexibility and adaptability in changing circumstances.
positive outlook and resilience under pressure.
commitment to creating a positive client experience by understanding their requirements and keeping them clearly updated on progress of their case.
willingness to put in extra hours when necessary.
diploma, bachelor's degree, or relevant qualification in information technology or computing (or equivalent experience).
relevant partner certifications are also desirable.

on-site working

hands-on experience in real iot product development

exposure to end-to-end engineering workflow (design → prototype → field testing)

we are looking for a product analyst to support the early-stage product definition and help turn vision into a structured, executable roadmap. this role will work closely with business, design, and technical teams to convert ideas into a clear, phased product roadmap and well-defined user experiences.

the ideal candidate understands online trading platforms and can bridge business objectives with user experience and technical feasibility.




key responsibilities

conduct market and competitor research to identify opportunities, trends, and best practices.

analyze potential user personas, their motivations, and behavior patterns to define the product direction.

create detailed user flows, feature flows, and functional requirements.

build and maintain a product roadmap, breaking features into realistic milestones based on priority and team capacity.

collaborate closely with ui/ux designers to ensure clarity, usability, and consistency in flows.

work with technical teams to validate feasibility, dependencies, and api-driven data limitations.

review product requirements from both a user experience and technical perspective, ensuring clarity before design handoff.

support planning and alignment with pmo to ensure smooth execution.




skills & experience

3 - 4 years of experience as a product analyst, business analyst, or associate product owner.

strong understanding of product development lifecycle, especially early-stage discovery and definition.

familiarity with saas products or technology-driven environments.

hands-on experience in creating user flows, wireframes, and structured product documentation.

proficiency with tools such as figma, trello, jira, confluence, google workspace etc.

basic understanding of software development concepts, apis, and system integrations.

good communication in english.

prior experience with trading platforms, fintech products is highly preferred.

บริษัท ดิทโต้ (ประเทศไทย) จำกัด (มหาชน) บริษัทหนึ่งในเครือดิทโต้กรุ๊ปซึ่งก่อตั้งขึ้นเมื่อปี 2542 คือผู้เชี่ยวชาญด้านการวางระบบบริหารจัดการงานเอกสารด้วยเทคโนโลยีและนวัตกรรมทางเลือกที่ทันสมัย ภายใต้แนวคิด “ครบวงจร คุ้มค่า ประหยัด รักษ์สิ่งแวดล้อม”             นอกจากจะนำเสนอระบบถ่ายเอกสารมัลติฟังก์ชั่นสมรรถนะสูงที่รวมการทำงานของเครื่องถ่ายเอกสาร พริ้นเตอร์ แฟกซ์ และสแกนเนอร์ไว้ในเครื่องเดียว ทั้งแบบสีและขาว-ดำ ให้เลือกหลากหลายรุ่นตามความเหมาะสมในการใช้งานแล้ว ดิทโต้ยังมีทีมงานที่ปรึกษาให้บริการวิเคราะห์ปัญหาด้านการจัดการเอกสารเพื่อวางรูปแบบโครงสร้างระบบเครือข่ายบริหารงานเอกสารและเครื่องใช้สำนักงานให้ตรงกับความต้องการของลูกค้าเฉพาะราย รวมถึงเชื่อมต่อเครือข่ายการใช้งานให้ครอบคลุมทุกแผนกเพื่อเพิ่มศักยภาพและความคล่องตัวในการดำเนินงานขององค์กร             ด้วยความยึดมั่นในแนวทางดำเนินธุรกิจแบบ 3rs (reduce / reuse / recycle) ซึ่งเน้นระบบคุณภาพและการรักษาสิ่งแวดล้อมตั้งแต่ต้นน้ำจนถึงปลายน้ำ ดิทโต้ได้นำเสนอทางเลือกสุดคุ้มด้วยเครื่องถ่ายเอกสาร ‘รีคอนดิชั่น’ (recondition) ที่ได้รับการปรับสภาพตามมาตรฐาน iso ขั้นสูง โดยไม่เพียงมีข้อดีในเรื่องต้นทุนที่ต่ำลง แต่ยังช่วยรักษาสิ่งแวดล้อมด้วยการลดขยะอิเล็กทรอนิกส์และเป็นการใช้ทรัพยากรอย่างคุ้มค่าสูงสุด             สินค้าและบริการที่หลากหลายครบครัน ประกอบกับทีมช่างเทคนิคผู้เชี่ยวชาญ ตลอดจนบริการก่อน ระหว่าง และหลังการขายที่แข็งแกร่งของดิทโต้ ช่วยให้ลูกค้าสามารถบริหารงานเอกสารได้อย่างเต็มประสิทธิภาพและไร้กังวล ส่งผลให้เกิดความได้เปรียบในการแข่งขันทางธุรกิจ เพิ่มศักยภาพในการดำเนินงาน ลดการสูญเสียเวลาและลดต้นทุนค่าใช้จ่ายลงได้อย่างชัดเจน …การมีส่วนผลักดันธุรกิจของลูกค้าให้ก้าวไปสู่การเติบโตที่มั่นคงและความสำเร็จอย่างยั่งยืนเช่นนี้ คือ ความภาคภูมิใจที่เป็นพลังขับเคลื่อนให้ดิทโต้มุ่งมั่นพัฒนาต่อไปอย่างไม่หยุดยั้ง บริษัท ดิทโต้ (ประเทศไทย) จำกัด (มหาชน)  ผู้ให้บริการเพื่อตอบสนองต่อความต้องการของลูกค้าในทุกมิติ ทั้งในด้านเครื่องพิมพ์ ซอฟต์แวร์จัดการเอกสารแบบอิเล็กทรอนิกส์ และงานสแกนเอกสาร  รวมถึงกลุ่มบริษัทฯ ที่ให้บริการงานด้านวิศวกรรมสาขาต่างๆ อย่างรอบด้าน ครอบคลุมตั้งแต่การศึกษา ออกแบบ จัดหา ติดตั้ง และทดสอบระบบ การจัดทำแผนการบริหารการจัดการทรัพยากร การศึกษา จัดทำและประยุกต์แบบจำลองทางคณิตศาสตร์ การบริหารโครงการและบำรุงรักษา ตลอดจนการควบคุมงานก่อสร้างโครงการ     มีความประสงค์จะรับบุคลากรจำนวนมาก เพื่อรองรับการเข้าสู่การเป็นบริษัทมหาชน ดังต่อไปนี้

role overview

we are looking for a proactive data engineer to build and strengthen our data foundation. in this role, you will be the architect of our information flow—designing, maintaining, and optimizing the pipelines that power our insights. if you enjoy the challenge of high-performance data warehousing and want to bridge the gap between raw data and machine learning innovation, we want you on our team.




key responsibilities

data pipeline management: design, build, and maintain robust, scalable data pipelines to ensure seamless data flow across the organization.

pipeline optimization: continuously monitor and tune pipeline performance to handle increasing data volumes with high reliability.

data ingestion: master various data ingestion tools to collect and process data from diverse sources into our ecosystem.

warehouse utilization: optimize data warehouse architecture and queries to ensure cost-effectiveness and rapid retrieval speeds.

ml integration (poc): develop proof of concept (poc) products that integrate data architectures with machine learning models for advanced analytics.

architectural research: stay ahead of the curve by researching and implementing new technologies to evolve our existing data infrastructure.




qualifications

proven experience in data engineering, building etl/elt processes and managing complex datasets.

proficient in python, sql, and modern data orchestration tools.

strong hands-on experience with data warehouse solutions (e.g., bigquery, snowflake, or redshift).

familiarity with ingestion frameworks and tools (e.g., airflow, fivetran, or kafka).

strong problem-solving skills with a focus on optimizing architectural efficiency and cost.

ability to work closely with data scientists and devops teams to deploy data-driven solutions.




why join us?

competitive salary with performance bonus.

work from home with flexible working hours.

group health insurance.

choose your own gear: mac or windows – you pick!

grab credits: allowance for grabfood and grab transportation.

learning & growth: free language courses, certificate fee coverage, and specialized technical training.

office life: free snacks & drinks in an agile, innovation-driven environment.

time off: 10+ days of annual leave.

Job_Title: Language Data Quality Reviewer for Thai - Transcriptionist(Freelance/Task-based)
Job_Description:
volga partners, a u.s.-based company, specializes in artificial intelligence and machine learning, catering to top technology giants and multinational corporations. beyond that, we offer a spectrum of services including it, business process outsourcing, advanced professional services, and crowdsourcing in both established and emerging markets.

our client is seeking candidates interested in freelance/task-based work for an ongoing project. the hours will align with the ist time zone.

please review the mandatory requirement before applying:

must be able to read and write in thai and english.
must be comfortable and understand this is a task-based role.

task-based project scope

this is a freelance, task-based role designed for those seeking supplemental income. it’s essential to understand the nature of freelance work—tasks will be assigned as they become available, and work may be irregular or intermittent. notifications will be sent via whatsapp, email, or slack (after onboarding through the client’s portal). all tasks are offered on a first-come, first-served basis, making this role ideal for individuals who are comfortable with flexible, on-demand work.

mandatory requirements

must have reliable high-speed internet and a functioning device (laptop, desktop, etc.) to ensure seamless communication and productivity.
urgency: due to the nature of the role, it is essential that all candidates have these resources in place from day one to avoid any delays in onboarding or task completion.

position

we are looking for a language data and quality reviewer with proficiency in thai and english to join our team.

this role is critical in researching and analyzing data for various entities, tools, and datasets that will be introduced through on-the-job training. the ideal candidate should have a background in technology, with strong logical and analytical skills to assess data and provide valuable insights.

while prior experience in similar roles is beneficial, we encourage candidates with some experience in data analysis, quality assurance, or related fields to apply, especially those looking to grow their skills in a global, dynamic work environment.

key responsibilities

data interpretation: analyze datasets, translating raw data into actionable insights that can support business improvement strategies.
data manipulation: handle data batches, apply labeling techniques, and manipulate data according to project requirements, ensuring high accuracy.
quality assurance: oversee the quality of training data, identify issues or anomalies, and implement corrective measures to maintain data integrity.
language translations: provide translations and contextual understanding where necessary to ensure data is aligned with language and cultural nuances.
recommendations: offer suggestions aimed at improving business processes and outcomes based on your data analysis.
transcription: transcribe and annotate audio or video files according to detailed project guidelines. please note: there may be transcription work involved. if you have this skill set, please be sure to note it in your application.

desired qualifications

some experience in data labeling, manipulation, or quality assurance, particularly in technology or related fields.
a proactive attitude towards continuous improvement, staying updated with new advancements in ai technologies and data analysis techniques.
logical and analytical skills to ensure data accuracy and support project goals.

required skills

proficient in thai and english.
excellent logical reasoning and analytical skills, with the ability to interpret complex datasets and derive meaningful insights.
experience with data labeling and manipulation techniques, ensuring accuracy and reliability in data processing.
strong attention to detail and a proactive approach to identifying and addressing data quality issues.
excellent listening, comprehension, and written communication skills.

required qualifications

proficiency (reading, writing, and/or speaking) in thai and english.
strong computer skills, particularly in typing and writing.
meticulous attention to detail.
proactive attitude with a commitment to fostering positive experiences for others.
if you are certified as a linguist, it is considered a plus!

interview process

submissions are reviewed by a recruiter.
selected candidates will be invited to complete an applicant response form and may be invited to a first and final interview.

additional requirements

must have own device (laptop/desktop).
currently hiring for freelance/task-based (ranging from 0 to 20 hours a week!).
candidate must be available in ist (preferred 8am ist onwards).
must have access to good wi-fi connection during working hours.
this role is a 1099 independent contractor position.
please note that this classification may vary based on your location and local regulations.

position : system analyst

key responsibilities

analyze business requirements and create functional specifications, from architecture down to database schema and software components/classes.

analyze business processes, identify problems, and create business process/system designs to improve the efficiency of business operations.​

analyze and verifies requirements for completeness, consistency, comprehensibility, feasibility, and conformity to standards.

design features/apis/solutions, as well as integration, flow for the platform.

design mock screen/ux/ui to confirmed with users before developing.

discuss pros and cons the design solution with related teams.

strong problem-solving, and excellent analytical skills combined with an ability to communicate with business and technical teams.

prioritize the requirements to assure that the most critical issues are addressed.

provide the feasibility solution and possible outcomes by cooperating with solution team.

identify project scope and estimate timeline.

monitor project progress by tracking activity, resolving problems, publishing progress reports, and recommending actions.​

coordinate with developers, product owner, solution teams and related teams.

testing systems with teams.

carry out professional and competent code reviews of code written by developers.

handling multiple tasks and responsibilities in a dynamic environment.​




qualifications

bachelor or higher of information technology, computer science, computer engineering, business computer, information system, any it related fields.

at least 2-5 years experienced in software development, web application, backend and api.

experienced of working within both agile and waterfall framework.

experienced in system analyst and design with documentation of uml, er diagram, dfd, srs. test case , test plan , user manual

experienced in ux/ui, wireframe design.

knowledge in python , odoo framework , flutter , c# mvc, .net framework, restful api, crystal report.

knowledge of object-oriented programming and well understanding sdlc process.

positive and analytical thinking, good mindset with can do attitude, teamwork, initiative, and good communication skills.

having experience in erp project would be advantage.
please attach your cv, transcript, copy of your id card, and certificates (if any) to careers@biggolddigital.com.
only applicants who submit complete documents will be considered.

at omise, we believe the digitalization of the economy has opened up the world and offers endless opportunities to grow and make meaningful connections with one another. omise is powered by its payment infrastructure sister company, omise payment holdings, which provides one-stop online payment solutions.

omise connects people, businesses and society in innovative ways to provide fair and open access to a growing economic ecosystem under its vision of enabling access to the digital economy for everyone. we are on a mission to make digital finance seamless and borderless for people and businesses. our solutions are used by thousands of companies worldwide including toyota, bytedance, icbc, scb, true, allianz ayudhya, mcdonald’s, bmw, king power and pomelo.

we are obsessed with solving financial coordination problems and developing new business models and technology that enable businesses to grow. we focus on addressing financial complexities and chokepoints by offering seamless and borderless solutions for our customers because we want them to focus on their core business and value proposition. 

as a value-driven organization, we are dedicated to selecting and retaining the sharpest minds across all functions. help us make digital finance seamless and borderless for people and businesses. 

why we need you

omise powers payments for thousands of merchants across key asia-pacific markets including singapore, thailand, malaysia, indonesia, and japan. accepting payments is only part of the story. the merchant experience, the dashboard they use every day, the tools that help them grow, the analytics that help them understand their business is what keeps them around.

we're looking for a mid-level tpm to own this domain. you'll work at the intersection of product, engineering, design, and data to improve how merchants engage with omise's core platform. this isn't a backlog-management role. you'll define what we build, why it matters, and how it connects to merchant retention and platform growth.

what you will be doing

discovery

establish and guide the product vision and strategic roadmap for merchant-facing platform features, encompassing all aspects from dashboard user engagement to advanced, ai-powered analytics.
identify high-impact opportunities through data analysis, customer interviews, and competitive research
translate merchant pain points and business objectives into clear problem statements before jumping to solutions
stay close to what merchants actually need by partnering with commercial, customer experience, and support teams
run customer interviews directly - prepare discussion guides, facilitate conversations with merchants or partners, synthesize findings, and use that evidence to support or challenge product decisions

delivery

drive end-to-end delivery of features across engineering, design, qa, and operations
develop comprehensive yet concise user stories, acceptance criteria, and product specifications to provide the engineering team with clear direction without being overly prescriptive.
lead sprint ceremonies in collaboration with the engineering manager: planning, reviews, and retrospectives
monitor delivery against outcomes - not just ticket completion - and adjust when things drift

stakeholder alignment

maintain a single source of truth for your domain: roadmap, open decisions, and blockers, structured so any stakeholder can get context without needing to ask you directly
communicate trade-offs to leadership before decisions become urgent
manage competing priorities from multiple stakeholders without losing the engineering team's trust or momentum

you

3-5 years as a product owner or product manager in agile delivery teams, ideally in fintech, saas, or a high-growth environment
leverages ai tools (e.g., chatgpt, claude, copilot) to enhance various aspects of work, including research, content drafting, data analysis, and workflow automation.
manages multiple workstreams simultaneously without losing strategic direction or dropping details
switches contexts quickly - technical discussions, merchant escalations, and roadmap reviews can all land in the same afternoon
data-driven: can build a funnel view, work in analytics tooling, and distinguish signal from noise
technically fluent: understands engineering concepts and speaks the language of the team without needing to write code or lead system design
communicate complex information effectively, both in writing and speaking, to diverse audiences. this includes generating executive summaries, product requirements documents (prds), and regular asynchronous updates.
fluency in english and thai languages
experience shipping or evaluating ai and ml-adjacent features is a plus
high pace, multiple markets. own your time, flag risks early, and ask for help before things become blockers.


nice to have

show proven analytics and data skills. you are experienced using data to make decisions and influence other decision makers.
have experience working in agile development methodology, preferably scrum.
have an entrepreneurial mindset. you are effective at breaking down complex problems, driving change, and managing multiple and sometimes competing stakeholders and projects.
fintech and payment industry experience 

how to apply

if you liked what you read and believe to be up for the challenge, we'd be pleased to welcome you to the recruitment process for this position. simply click on apply and submit your contact info. afterward, this will happen next:

the hiring team will review your application

2-3 interviews with the hiring team, people operations team and all stakeholders involved in the process

why you’ll love it here

work with other talented, ambitious international colleagues who love their craft
a modern and well-equipped work environment
flexible working hours
a medical healthcare plan and annual health check-up
a friendly bunch of colleagues

what we believe in

we cultivate teamwork and a trust-based working culture
we celebrate diversity and continuous improvement
giving our employees the opportunity and create for their own success

about omise

founded in 2013, 500 people
headquartered in japan, with operational headquarters in bangkok and  offices in singapore, indonesia, and malaysia.
raised over $236m of funding to date from institutional investors including scb10x, sparx group co. ltd., toyota financial services corporation, jic venture growth investments, mufg bank, mars growth capital,  ascend venture group, and more
won digital startup of the year at digital thailand big bang 2017
won forbes japan startup of the year 2018
won 3 awards from international business magazine award 2020
most innovative electronic payment platform for singapore
most innovative seamless transactions provider for singapore
best payment solutions provider in singapore
won mizuho innovation award 2022 (q2)

life at omise

nearly 500 employees work from our six office locations as well as remotely from home or co-working spaces. while we are a global company, a lot of our thinking goes into how to solve payment problems at the hyper-local level to help businesses scale and reach their customers. 

our core values — simple, real, and beautiful serve as our north star and are integrated into how we work and the results of our work. 

at omise, we empower people to embrace project-ownership and take initiative. we love to see our employees act as the owner of the outcome and confidently provide solutions to each challenge, taking a collaborative teamwork approach. our fellow employees are encouraged to discuss and share ideas, and are given the freedom to explore all areas of their work, in order to achieve the expected results.

people at omise are from different backgrounds and together, we contribute to creating an inclusive, friendly, and safe working environment. as a company, we embrace diversity and value open discussions, a learning mindset, professionalism, and respect. “growing with us” means to celebrate the challenges and to always look for opportunities to learn, develop your skills, and move one step forward each day. if this is the work environment you are looking for, then get in touch with us.

we look forward to hearing from you. omise embraces diversity and nourishes an open and inclusive work environment. we are home to over 27 nationalities and all decisions to hire, promote or discharge are based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs.

we do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other applicable legally protected characteristics.

at techbiz global, we are providing recruitment service to our top clients from our portfolio. we are currently seeking a

avaloq business analyst/functional leads to join one of our clients' teams. if you're looking for an exciting opportunity to grow in a innovative environment, this could be the perfect fit for you.

about the role

act as the bridge between business stakeholders and technical teams, ensuring requirements are clearly defined and understood.

gather, analyze, and document business and functional requirements for avaloq implementation or enhancement projects.

support solution design and align functional specifications with system capabilities.

facilitate workshops, training sessions, and provide subject matter expertise to ensure successful project outcomes.

key responsibilities

lead requirement gathering and functional analysis sessions with stakeholders.

translate business processes into functional specifications and ensure alignment with the avaloq platform.

support test planning, test case design, and validation of system changes.

act as a functional lead in project streams, ensuring deliverables meet business objectives.

provide ongoing support and guidance to developers and testers during the project lifecycle.

minimum 3–5 years of experience as a business analyst or functional consultant, ideally within banking or financial services.

solid understanding of core banking processes such as payments, securities, client lifecycle management, and regulatory reporting.

experience with avaloq parameterization or avaloq projects is highly desirable.

strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to translate business needs into functional requirements.

excellent communication skills in english; ability to work with senior stakeholders and cross-functional teams.

qualifications

university degree in business administration, finance, computer science, or arelated field.

avaloq certification (acp/acfp) is an advantage.

previous experience in wealth management, private banking, or financial services consulting is beneficial.

why join us


exciting international projects: work with global teams and clients in the fintech and banking domain.

professional growth: gain hands-on experience in advanced avaloq development and financial technology.

long-term opportunity: initial 6-month contract with a strong likelihood of extension.

collaborative environment: join a supportive, high-performing team that values innovation, efficiency, and knowledge sharing.

flexibility: enjoy the benefits of a fully remote role while working in a dynamic, global setting.

the ideal candidate will be responsible for planning, coordinating, and managing it software and infrastructure projects implementation to achieve project objectives and within the decided-upon budget, timeline, and scope. they will also effectively monitor and present project updates to relevant stakeholders, clients, and project team members.


preferred background

candidates with prior experience from a system integrator (si) environment or software house will be highly preferred. proven experience managing projects for enterprise-scale b2b clients, particularly in complex, multi-stakeholder environments, is considered a strong advantage.


responsibilities

lead and manage it projects (software development and/or infrastructure system integration) for clients in government, public / or private sectors

assist in defining project scope, time and budget objectives that technically feasible and agreed upon by all relevant parties

develop detailed plan, coordinate resource allocation and monitor overall project performance to ensure deliverables meet the quality, budget and schedule committed

lay out communication strategies and serve as a liaison for all information related to the projects to relevant stakeholders, customers and team members

conduct and facilitate effective meetings including project kickoffs, clarify requirements, project updates, issue tracking, change requests, and executive reports and communication

create and maintain comprehensive project documentations.

follow up, support and direct team for any project issues until solved

perform other related duties as assigned


qualifications

minimum bachelor's degree in computer science, computer engineering, it, or other computer-related fields

at least 3-7 years experience in medium-large project management

experienced in software development would be a big plus

full cycle of project leading experience from rfp/tor development until project delivery is ideal

familiar with government project bidding process and documentation is a big plus

excellent technical knowledge and ability to communicate to different stakeholders

excellent verbal and written communication skills (thai and english)

strong leadership, planning and organizational skills with attention to detail and multitasking abilities

strong analysis, problem-solving and negotiation skills

job responsibilities: it support

provide technical support for cross-border payment services in thailand, independently troubleshooting, analyzing, and resolving customers’ day-to-day business and technical issues, with the ability to manage issues end-to-end and ensure full resolution.

establish fast-response communication channels among customers, operations, product, and engineering teams; monitor existing development platforms and tools, proactively identify issues, and drive optimizations to improve service efficiency and quality.

review and analyze customer complaints and user experience issues, summarize product and technical improvement suggestions, and address recurring business pain points through systematic initiatives.

leverage accumulated technical support experience to participate in competitive analysis, and drive product and technology iteration and optimization from the perspective of combining customer experience with product and technical capabilities.

be responsible for two-way translation and clarification of technical requirements, api documentation, and issue feedback, ensuring accurate and efficient communication; additionally, support internal teams in understanding thailand’s local payment ecosystem, regulatory requirements, and technical standards, and provide localization and adaptation recommendations.


qualifications

bachelor’s degree or above in computer science or a related field, with 3+ years of relevant experience in it or the payment industry, such as technical support, technical consulting, testing, or operations.

proficient in using management tools such as git and jenkins, with practical experience in git.

familiar with common linux commands, capable of using them to assist in troubleshooting and locating system issues.

proficient in mysql and mongodb databases, with the ability to optimize indexes and queries.

skilled in using middleware such as redis and kafka, with a clear understanding of their use cases and limitations.

familiar with common design patterns, with a strong awareness of software engineering principles and a focus on code quality.

possess strong documentation and reading skills, along with excellent teamwork and self-learning abilities.

stay sensitive to new technologies and be willing to learn and understand the latest advancements.

experience in cross-border payments, four-party payment models, or e-commerce is a plus. software development experience is also a plus.

strong teamwork mindset with a proactive approach to issue resolution; excellent cross-functional communication skills, problem decomposition abilities, and the ability to work under pressure; capable of clearly articulating technical issues and driving collaboration across multiple teams.

fluent in english, able to use english as a working language.




working days: monday – friday

annual leave: 6–12 days

salary: negotiable based on experience

Company: บริษัท เอ็ม ไวบ์ เทค จำกัด
Job_Description:
requirements & analysis

- วิเคราะห์ความต้องการของลูกค้า (โรงงานผลิต sme) และแปลงเป็น system requirements

- จัดทำ functional specification และ technical specification

- วิเคราะห์กระบวนการผลิตของลูกค้าเพื่อออกแบบ solution ที่เหมาะสม

- ทำ gap analysis ระหว่างระบบปัจจุบันและความต้องการ

### 🎨 system design (การออกแบบระบบ)

- ออกแบบสถาปัตยกรรมระบบ (system architecture)

- ออกแบบ database schema และ data flow

- ออกแบบ dashboard และ report ตามความต้องการ

- สร้าง wireframe และ mockup ร่วมกับทีม

### 🤝 customer & team collaboration (การทำงานร่วมกันระหว่างลูกค้าและทีม)

- ประสานงานกับลูกค้าในการสำรวจ site และเก็บข้อมูล

- นำเสนอ solution และ demo ระบบให้กับลูกค้า

- ทำงานร่วมกับทีม developer, data engineer และ support

- จัดทำเอกสาร user manual และ training material

### 📊 project management (support)

- ช่วยวางแผนโครงการและติดตามความคืบหน้า

- จัดการ uat (user acceptance testing) กับลูกค้า

- รวบรวม feedback และปรับปรุงระบบ

## คุณสมบัติผู้สมัคร:

### ✅ คุณสมบัติที่จำเป็น (required):

- การศึกษา: ปริญญาตรีขึ้นไป สาขา computer science, it, engineering หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

- ประสบการณ์: 2-5 ปี ในตำแหน่ง system analyst, business analyst หรือที่เกี่ยวข้อง

- **🚗 มีรถยนต์ส่วนตัว + ใบขับขี่ (จำเป็น! ต้องเดินทางไป site ลูกค้าบ่อย)

- **💼 ทำงานแบบ project-based ได้ - จัดการหลายโปรเจคพร้อมกันได้

- **🏠 สามารถทำงานที่บ้านได้ - มีพื้นที่และอินเทอร์เน็ตที่เหมาะสม

- **🗺️ พร้อมเดินทางต่างจังหวัด - ทั้งไป-กลับวันเดียวและค้างคืน

- ทักษะการวิเคราะห์: สามารถวิเคราะห์ปัญหาและออกแบบ solution ได้

- technical knowledge:

  - เข้าใจ database (sql, postgresql, mongodb)

  - เข้าใจ api และการทำงานของระบบแบบ client-server

  - อ่าน erd, flowchart, uml ได้

- communication: สื่อสารเก่งทั้งภาษาไทยและภาษาอังกฤษ (พูด เขียน)

- presentation: สามารถนำเสนอและอธิบายเทคนิคให้คนไม่ใช่ technical เข้าใจได้

- tools: ใช้งาน ms office, google workspace, figma/draw.io หรือ tools ออกแบบ

### ⭐ คุณสมบัติพิเศษ (preferred):

- มีประสบการณ์กับ manufacturing/production management system

- เข้าใจกระบวนการผลิตและ oee (overall equipment effectiveness)

- มีความรู้เรื่อง iot, machine connectivity, plc

- เคยทำงานกับ erp, mes, wms

- มีประสบการณ์ใช้ power bi, tableau หรือ dashboard tools

- สามารถเขียน sql query ได้

### 🎯 soft skills:

- มีทักษะการคิดเชิงวิเคราะห์และแก้ปัญหา (analytical & problem-solving)

job descriptions:

สวัสดิการ:

ค่าตำแหน่ง ค่าภาษาอังกฤษ โบนัส ปรับขึ้นเงินเดือนประจำปี ที่พักใกล้สถานที่ทำงาน รถรับส่ง ชุดพนักงาน ข้าวฟรี อาหารราคาย่อมเยาว์ กองทุนสำรองเลี้ยงชีพ ค่ารักษาพยาบาลของพนักงาน และครอบครัว ตรวจสุขภาพประจำปี อาหารญี่ปุ่น ราคาย่อมเยาว์ (มื้อเย็น) งานเลี้ยงสังสรรค์ประจำปี

key responsibilities 

รับและจัดการ production support ticket จากลูกค้าและทีมภายใน 

วิเคราะห์และแก้ไข bug ที่เกิดขึ้นในระบบ production 

ตรวจสอบ log, error, และข้อมูลในระบบเพื่อวิเคราะห์ปัญหา 

ดำเนินการ hotfix และ deploy แก้ไขปัญหาเฉพาะหน้าอย่างปลอดภัย 

ทำ root cause analysis (rca) และสรุปแนวทางป้องกันไม่ให้ปัญหาเกิดซ้ำ 

ประสานงานกับทีม development, devops และ infra เมื่อปัญหาเกี่ยวข้องหลายส่วน 

สื่อสารสถานะปัญหาและแนวทางแก้ไขกับลูกค้าอย่างชัดเจน 

จัดทำเอกสาร incident report และ knowledge base สำหรับปัญหาที่พบบ่อย 

ช่วยปรับปรุงกระบวนการ support และ monitoring ของระบบ production 




required qualifications 

ปริญญาตรีสาขา computer science, it หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง 

มีประสบการณ์ด้าน software development หรือ application support อย่างน้อย 1–3 ปี 

เข้าใจระบบ production environment และการทำงานของระบบจริง 

มีทักษะในการ debug และวิเคราะห์ปัญหาเชิงเทคนิค 

สามารถอ่านและเข้าใจ source code ได้ (backend / api / database) 

มีทักษะการสื่อสารที่ดี สามารถอธิบายปัญหาเชิงเทคนิคให้ลูกค้าเข้าใจได้

job description

เรากำลังมองหาทีมงาน it support ที่มีความกระตือรือร้นและมีวินัยในการทำงาน เข้ามาดูแลระบบสารสนเทศและแก้ไขปัญหาทางเทคนิคให้กับพนักงานในองค์กร เพื่อให้การดำเนินธุรกิจเป็นไปอย่างราบรื่น

key responsibilities:

ดูแลและแก้ไขปัญหาเบื้องต้นด้าน hardware, software และ network ภายในสำนักงาน

ติดตั้ง ปรับปรุง และบำรุงรักษาอุปกรณ์คอมพิวเตอร์ (desktop/laptop) และอุปกรณ์ต่อพ่วงต่างๆ

ให้คำแนะนำและช่วยเหลือผู้ใช้งาน (end-users) ในการแก้ปัญหาทางเทคนิคประจำวัน

ประสานงานกับ vendor หรือหน่วยงานที่เกี่ยวข้องเมื่อมีปัญหาด้านระบบ

บันทึกและจัดทำรายงานสรุปปัญหา รวมถึงคู่มือการใช้งานเบื้องต้น

qualifications:

วุฒิการศึกษา: ปริญญาตรี สาขา computer science, information technology, computer engineering หรือสาขาอื่นที่เกี่ยวข้อง

ทักษะทางภาษา: สามารถสื่อสารภาษาอังกฤษได้ในระดับที่สามารถเข้าใจเอกสารทางเทคนิค หรือประสานงานเบื้องต้นได้

วินัยการทำงาน: มีความรับผิดชอบสูง ตรงต่อเวลา และมีใจรักงานบริการ (service mind)

ยินดีรับนักศึกษาจบใหม่ที่มีความตั้งใจเรียนรู้ หรือผู้ที่มีประสบการณ์ 1-3 ปี

มีความเข้าใจพื้นฐานด้าน network (tcp/ip, lan, wan) และระบบปฏิบัติการ windows

หน้าที่หลัก:
ดูแลระบบเครือข่าย เซิร์ฟเวอร์ และความปลอดภัยของโรงเรียนให้ทำงานได้อย่างเสถียร รวมถึงบริหารระบบ virtualization (vmware) และ docker พร้อมสนับสนุนระบบ ict สำหรับการเรียนการสอนและงานบริหาร

คุณสมบัติ:

ปริญญาตรีด้าน it/computer science หรือที่เกี่ยวข้อง

ประสบการณ์อย่างน้อย 3 ปี ด้าน network และ system

มีความรู้ด้าน firewall, vlan, linux/windows server, vmware, docker

หากมี certificate (aruba/cisco) จะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

ทักษะที่ต้องมี:
แก้ไขปัญหาได้ดี ทำงานเป็นทีม มีความรับผิดชอบ และใส่ใจด้านความปลอดภัยของระบบ

Company: Asia Sermkij Leasing Public Company Limited
Job_Description:
job summary:
asia sermkij is seeking an experienced and motivated web application development manager to lead our web development team. in this role, you will oversee the design, development, and maintenance of scalable and secure web applications. you will work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high-impact digital solutions that align with business objectives.




key responsibilities:

lead and manage a team of web developers in designing, developing, and maintaining enterprise-level web applications.

set technical direction and establish development standards, coding practices, and quality benchmarks.

collaborate with product managers, designers, and other stakeholders to define project scope and timelines.

monitor project progress, manage resources, and ensure timely delivery within budget.

provide technical guidance, code reviews, and mentorship to team members.

stay updated on emerging web technologies and recommend innovative solutions.

ensure the security, scalability, and performance of web applications.

manage external vendors or contractors when necessary.

qualifications:

bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, information technology, or related field.

at least 7 years of experience in web development, with 3+ years in a leadership or managerial role.

strong knowledge of web development frameworks and technologies (e.g., javascript/typescript, react, angular, vue, php, python, node.js, etc.).

experience with database systems such as mysql, postgresql, or mongodb.

familiarity with version control (git), ci/cd pipelines, and agile development methodologies.

excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills.

ability to manage multiple projects and prioritize tasks effectively.

medical fee (ipd, opd, dental)

provident fund

uniform (woman)

job responsibilities: service delivery

as a key liaison between our clients and internal teams, you will ensure the successful delivery and operation of our services. your role is to bridge business needs with technical solutions, ensuring client satisfaction and operational excellence.




key responsibilities

partner relationship management: serve as the primary point of contact for client teams, leading strategic discussions to deeply understand their business objectives and translate them into technical requirements.

cross-border collaboration: partner closely with our engineering and product teams to transform client requirements into actionable, scalable technical solutions.

daily operation support: proactively resolve clients' day-to-day business and operational issues. manage inquiries end-to-end, ensuring complete and timely resolution.

end-to-end service delivery: depending on your background and strengths, you will drive success in one or more of the following key areas:

project management: oversee project timelines and deliverables, ensuring the smooth and successful implementation of new projects.

product advocacy: develop a deep understanding of our product features to independently conduct demos and deliver compelling presentations to clients.

operational excellence: ensure the stability of day-to-day client business operations through proactive monitoring and efficient troubleshooting.




qualifications

education: bachelor’s degree in computer science, information technology, or a related field.

experience: 2+ years of experience in it support, service delivery, or project management. experience within the payment industry is highly preferred.

technical literacy: solid understanding of api fundamentals, system workflows, and payment product architecture. ability to speak confidently with both business and technical stakeholders.

communication & collaboration: exceptional interpersonal skills with the proven ability to navigate complex discussions and bridge the gap between business stakeholders and technical developers.

language proficiency: fluency in english is required for seamless international coordination and effective communication with our headquarters in china.

mindset & soft skills: a proactive, "can-do" attitude paired with strong analytical and problem-solving skills. ability to thrive in a fast-paced, cross-cultural environment.




working days: monday – friday

annual leave: 6–12 days

salary: negotiable based on experience

venture smarter was founded by experts in law, finance, and strategy who saw a need for a more holistic approach to business consultancy. united by core values of innovation, integrity, and impact, we offer a 360-degree suite of solutions tailored to each client's needs. over the years, we've successfully guided businesses through growth, market transitions, and legal complexities. as we look to the future, we're excited to continue being the catalyst that propels businesses to new heights. join us in venturing smarter. our mission is to be the driving force behind your business success. we offer specialized consultancy services that address your legal and business challenges, propelling you towards a future of limitless opportunities. by integrating innovation, integrity, and impact into our approach, we create tailored solutions that not only solve immediate issues but also position you for long-term growth. we're not just consultants; we're your partners in navigating the complex landscape of business evolution.

the role

company: venture smarter

location: remote

salary: $4,000 - $5,000 per month (based on experience)

job description

venture smarter is seeking a technical support specialist to join our growing team. in this role, you'll be responsible for providing exceptional technical support to both our clients and internal teams. as a remote position, you'll have the flexibility to work from the comfort of your home while helping to solve technical issues, troubleshoot systems, and provide solutions to enhance the customer experience.

**** given the high number of applications we receive, we will only respond to those who meet the qualifications for the positions applied for.

please note that we will not reply to job application inquiries sent to our social media accounts. all communication from us will be conducted via email.

if you do not receive a response, you are welcome to re-apply after six months for another suitable position within our company. ****

venture smarter has been featured in media outlets such as cbs news, digital journal, and go banking rates. check us out – you’ll know we’re the place to be.

key responsibilities

provide support for technical inquiries via phone, email, and live chat.
troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, and network issues.
guide clients through system installations, configurations, and updates.
maintain detailed logs of support requests and solutions provided.
collaborate with the development and it teams to improve system performance and support protocols.
stay up-to-date with industry trends and new technologies to enhance customer service.
competitive monthly salary.
flexible work-from-home setup.
health and wellness benefits.
opportunities for career growth and development.

ideal profile

requirements

proven experience in technical support or it-related roles.
strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.
excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.
experience with remote work tools and customer service platforms.
ability to work independently and manage time effectively.
benefits

what's on offer?

work within a company with a solid track record of success
flexible working options
opportunity to make a positive impact

Job_Description:
หน้าที่ความรับผิดชอบ
1. สามารถออกแบบและนำเสนอโซลูชันเกี่ยวกับผลิตภัณฑ์ทางด้านระบบสื่อสารโทรคมนาคม , it network , cyber security ,cctv และอื่นๆ ตามความต้องการของลูกค้า

3.จัดทำเอกสาร terms of reference (tor) และเอกสารประกวดราคา (bidding document)

4.จัดทำ diagram เช่น system architecture / network diagram และ bill of quantity สำหรับเสนอลูกค้า

5.สามารถทำงานร่วมกับ product vendor/supplier หรือทีม outsource และทีมขายเพื่อจัดหาโซลูชันที่ดีที่สุดให้กับลูกค้า

6.สนับสนุนทำงานร่วมกับฝ่ายขายเพื่อรวบรวมความต้องการและจัดหาโซลูชั่นที่เหมาะสมสำหรับลูกค้า

คุณสมบัติ
1. วุฒิการศึกษาปริญญาตรีขึ้นไป ในสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง เช่น วิศวกรรมโทรคมนาคม, วิทยาการคอมพิวเตอร์, วิศวกรรมคอมพิวเตอร์, เทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

2.มีประสบการณ์ทำงานด้าน telecommunication และ it network อย่างน้อย 3-5 ปี

3.มีทักษะในการนำเสนอ (presentation) และสามารถสื่อสารกับลูกค้าได้ดี

4.สามารถทำงานล่วงเวลา และเดินทางไปปฏิบัติงานต่างจังหวัดได้

5.สามารถทำงานอย่างอิสระ จัดการลำดับความสำคัญที่หลากหลาย และตรงตามกำหนดเวลา

6.สามารถทำงานภายใต้แรงกดดันได้ดี

7.มีความรับผิดชอบ ขยัน อดทน ได้ดี

8.สามารถในสื่อสารภาษาอังกฤษได้ดี จะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

9.มีประสบการณ์เคยร่วมงานกับ หน่วยงานของรัฐ จะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

the opportunity

mingmongkhon international trading co.,ltd. is seeking an experienced and talented full stack developer (team lead) to join our dynamic team. in this role, you will have the opportunity to lead a team of developers and play a crucial part in the development and implementation of innovative technology solutions that drive the company's growth and success.

key responsibilities

lead and manage a team of developers, providing guidance, mentorship, and ensuring efficient and effective delivery of projects

design, develop, and maintain high-quality, scalable, and secure web applications using modern full-stack technologies

collaborate with cross-functional teams, including project managers, designers, and stakeholders, to understand requirements and deliver solutions that meet business needs

identify and implement process improvements, best practices, and innovative approaches to enhance the team's productivity and the quality of our products

stay up-to-date with the latest industry trends, technologies, and best practices, and share your knowledge with the team

contribute to the overall technology strategy and roadmap of the company

what we're looking for

extensive experience (8+ years) in full-stack web development, with a strong understanding of both front-end and back-end technologies

proficiency in programming languages such as javascript, python, or php, as well as experience with popular frameworks and libraries (e.g., react, angular, node.js, django)

hands-on experience in designing and implementing database solutions (e.g., mysql, postgresql, mongodb)

proven track record of leading and managing a team of developers, including experience in mentoring, coaching, and fostering a collaborative work environment

strong problem-solving, critical thinking, and analytical skills to tackle complex challenges

excellent communication and interpersonal skills to effectively collaborate with cross-functional teams

passion for staying up-to-date with the latest technology trends and a willingness to continuously learn and adapt

what we offer

at mingmongkhon international trading co.,ltd., we are committed to providing a rewarding and fulfilling work environment for our employees. we offer:

competitive salary and performance-based bonuses

comprehensive health and life insurance coverage

generous paid time off and holiday policies

opportunities for professional development and career advancement

collaborative and supportive team culture

modern and well-equipped office space in the heart of bangkok

if you are passionate about technology, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and are ready to take on a challenging leadership role, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity. join our team and help shape the future of mingmongkhon international trading co.,ltd.!

decathlon thailand


if you are looking for a promising career in the sports retail industry, then you have come to the right place. we are an international company that has opened 28 stores in thailand over the past 10 years, and we are now gearing up to open more and more stores in thailand. we are in search of dynamic, enthusiastic, and reliable individuals to join our team. our company is growing rapidly and we offer exciting opportunities for personal and professional growth. if you are up for the challenge, we welcome you to join us on this exciting journey.

job description
guarantee a smooth and reliable it environment for teammates and customers by managing all in-store technology, ensuring operational continuity, cybersecurity, and a “best in class” omnichannel experience.


responsibility 1: develop, enrich, and take care of human capital

embody and transmit decathlon purpose, values, and human fundamentals in daily work.

train and support teammates on it systems to build autonomy.

cooperate with store director and leaders to create a safe, efficient digital workplace.

ensure compliance with all it, safety, and data protection standards within the store.

responsibility 2: lead and manage in-store it operations as an intrapreneur

act as the main point of contact for all it topics in the store.

provide level 1 and level 2 it support to teammates, ensuring quick resolution.

manage it assets, track inventory, and ensure accuracy for finance and fixed-asset controls.

coordinate with vendors for technical support and incident resolution.

implement digital tools and it systems to improve omnichannel customer experience.

responsibility 3: guarantee “best in class” it-enabled customer experience

ensure it equipment, networks, and systems run smoothly to support sales, payments, stock accuracy, and customer journey.

communicate it news, alerts, and incidents to all teammates.

support store operations by ensuring reliable wifi, pos, mobile devices, and store systems.

contribute to customer satisfaction by ensuring technology works seamlessly.

responsibility 4: manage in-store it performance (people / planet / business)

analyze it performance, incidents, and risks to propose improvements.

support store activity planning through reliable system availability.

maintain cybersecurity, access control, data protection, and system integrity.

ensure the store follows group it standards, processes, and sustainable practices.

responsibility 5: guarantee safety, security, and risk prevention

ensure company property, it assets, and data are secure.

monitor risk-prevention systems and contribute to daily store safety routines.

ensure business continuity plans and emergency procedures are in place.

requirements

people & culture leadership

able to work autonomously while collaborating well with store leaders.

able to train and guide teammates with patience and clarity.

technical & operational expertise

strong understanding of networking concepts: tcp/ip, dns, dhcp, vlans, routing.

experience troubleshooting wireless, security, and switching issues.

in-depth knowledge of meraki cloud platform: device management, configuration, troubleshooting.

understanding of it systems, cybersecurity, hardware and software environments.

knowledge of windows server, windows, macos, android, and common applications.

able to manage it projects end-to-end.

comfortable providing fast, high-quality support.

operational excellence

able to maintain accurate it inventory.

flexible working hours when support is required.

strong coordination with vendors and external partners.

what makes you a great fit

goal-oriented with strong planning and follow-up.

calm and solution-focused when solving technical issues.

strong service mindset toward teammates and customers.

well-organized and able to manage priorities.

curious, eager to learn, and open to changes in technology.

emotionally intelligent, respectful, and empathetic when supporting others.

able to give and receive feedback objectively.

job description:
senior trading data & operations analyst

ระดับตำแหน่ง: เจ้าหน้าที่อาวุโส (senior officer) / ผู้ช่วยหัวหน้าทีม ฝ่าย: trading desk & operations รายงานตรงต่อ: head of trading / chief investment officer (cio) ประสานงานหลัก: ทีมบัญชี (accounting), ทีมกระทบยอด (reconcile), ทีมบริหารความเสี่ยง (risk management)

job summary (สรุปภาพรวมตำแหน่ง):

job summary (สรุปภาพรวมตำแหน่ง): รับผิดชอบการออกแบบและบริหารจัดการโครงสร้างข้อมูล (data architecture) สำหรับทีม trading ของโปรเจกต์เป๋าทอง โดยมุ่งเน้นการแปลงข้อมูลเชิงคุณภาพให้เป็นเชิงปริมาณ สร้างกระบวนการ etl สร้างเกราะป้องกันความเสี่ยง (risk management) และพัฒนาระบบตรวจสอบความถูกต้องของการทำธุรกรรม (system integrity) เพื่อยกระดับประสิทธิภาพการทำกำไรและรองรับการขยายตัวสู่ระบบ automation ขององค์กร

core responsibilities (ขอบเขตความรับผิดชอบหลัก)

1. risk architecture & advanced hedging (การวางโครงสร้างและกลยุทธ์บริหารความเสี่ยง)

risk process optimization: ประเมินและอุดช่องโหว่ (gap analysis) ในทุก touchpoint ของกระบวนการเทรด ตั้งแต่ order execution จนถึงกระบวนการ hedging เพื่อควบคุม exposure ให้อยู่ในระดับความเสี่ยงที่กำหนด

financial instrument strategy: วิเคราะห์และนำเสนอเครื่องมือป้องกันความเสี่ยง (เช่น gold futures, fx forward) เพื่อบริหารต้นทุนและจัดการความผันผวนของค่าเงินบาทและราคาทองคำ

ai integration: ออกแบบกระบวนการนำ ai มาใช้ในระบบงานเทรด เช่น การคัดกรองข่าวสาร real-time และระบบตรวจจับความผิดปกติของคำสั่งซื้อขาย (anomaly detection)

2. data intelligence & performance engineering (วิศวกรรมข้อมูลและตัวชี้วัดผลงาน)

data pipeline & etl design: ออกแบบ workflow การดึง แปลง และโหลดข้อมูล (etl process) จากระบบเทรด เพื่อให้ได้ clean data สำหรับทำ daily performance และการทำ p/l แบบ real-time

master data & db schema: ปรับปรุงโครงสร้าง master data ของทีมเทรด กำหนด data validation และ relational database เบื้องต้น เพื่อความถูกต้องในการทำ data audit

customer & behavioral analytics: จัดทำ data segmentation เพื่อวิเคราะห์พฤติกรรมลูกค้ากลุ่ม high net worth และหาโอกาสในการทำกำไรของแต่ละกลุ่ม

3. system integrity & quality assurance (การตรวจสอบระบบและควบคุมคุณภาพธุรกรรม)

end-to-end bug hunting: ทดสอบระบบบนสภาพแวดล้อมจริง (real account) เพื่อตรวจหา system latency, process vulnerabilities และ service/ux bugs

feature validation: ตรวจสอบและยืนยัน logic ของฟีเจอร์ใหม่ๆ (เช่น ระบบออมทอง, การถอนทองจริง) ให้เป็นไปตามมาตรฐานก่อน roll-out สู่ลูกค้า

key strategic missions (ภารกิจหลักเชิงกลยุทธ์)

mission 1: hedging data standardization: ปรับรื้อและจัดระเบียบ sop ของ hedger ให้เป็น standardized format ลดการใช้ free-text เพื่อให้ข้อมูลพร้อมเชื่อมต่อกับฐานข้อมูลกลาง (clean data entry)

mission 2: qualitative to quantitative analysis: แปลงบทวิเคราะห์ทิศทางตลาด (qualitative) ให้เป็นชุดข้อมูลเชิงปริมาณ (data points/checklist) พร้อมระบบ log เพื่อทำ backtesting วัดผลความแม่นยำ (accuracy rate)

mission 3: automation dashboard readiness: เตรียมโครงสร้างชุดข้อมูล (data sets) ที่ครอบคลุมตัวชี้วัดความสำเร็จ (win-rate, pnl, drawdown) เพื่อเสียบเข้ากับ bi tools (power bi/tableau) สำหรับทำ automated kpi dashboard

คุณสมบัติผู้สมัคร (qualifications)

วุฒิการศึกษาปริญญาตรี สาขาการเงิน, เศรษฐศาสตร์, สถิติ, หรือการจัดการข้อมูล

มีประสบการณ์ 1-3 ปี ในงานสนับสนุนการลงทุน (back/middle office) หรือการจัดการข้อมูลธุรกิจ

ทักษะคอมพิวเตอร์: เชี่ยวชาญ excel ในระดับสูง (pivot table, vlookup, power query) หากใช้ bi tools ได้จะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

เป็นคนละเอียดรอบคอบ (detail-oriented) และมีความซื่อสัตย์สุจริตสูง

มีทักษะในการสื่อสารและประสานงานระหว่างแผนกที่โดดเด่น

โอกาสในการเติบโต (career path)

ตำแหน่งนี้ถูกวาง roadmap ให้เติบโตไปเป็น data management officer หรือ trading operations manager ในอนาคต โดยจะเน้นการพัฒนางานจากระดับ operation ไปสู่ระดับการวิเคราะห์ข้อมูลเชิงลึกและการวางระบบ automation เพื่อเพิ่มขีดความสามารถในการแข่งขันของบริษัท

key responsibilities

plan and manage network services, communication systems, and network security operations aligned with it policies.

analyze network equipment and system usage to support installation, maintenance, and performance improvements.

define technical specifications and requirements for network and security systems.

supervise installation, monitoring, maintenance, and troubleshooting of network infrastructure and security systems.

ensure system backup and business continuity for network-related services.

maintain strong relationships with vendors and technology partners.

lead and mentor the network & security team.

requirements

bachelor’s degree or higher in telecommunication engineering, it, or related field.

minimum 7 years of experience in network roles.

minimum 5 years in team management / supervisory role.

strong communication, planning, and leadership skills.

we are seeking a business analyst with strong logical thinking and proven experience in insurance, banking, or financial domains. this role does not require deep technical skills, but rather a solid understanding of business processes, transaction flows, and financial logic. the ideal candidate is someone who can bridge the gap between business users and technical teams, ensuring requirements are well understood, clearly communicated, and effectively delivered.

key responsibilities

gather, analyze, and document business requirements from stakeholders.

map and design process flows (business flow / data flow) for complex financial or insurance systems.

translate business requirements into functional specifications for development teams.

collaborate with developers, qa, and business users to ensure alignment and clarity.

support uat (user acceptance testing), issue tracking, and ensure solutions meet business needs.

provide insights into financial processes such as policy, claim, premium, debit/credit transactions, loan, or credit operations.

act as a subject matter expert to advise stakeholders on process improvements and solutions.

qualifications

bachelor’s degree in business, finance, it, or related field.

3–7+ years of experience as business analyst, system analyst, or functional consultant.

domain expertise in insurance (policy, claim, premium, underwriting, bancassurance) or banking (loan, credit, core banking, payment, reconciliation, aml/kyc).

strong logical thinking and ability to understand complex transaction flows.

experience in requirement gathering, brd/frd documentation, and process mapping.

basic understanding of accounting logic (debit/credit) is a plus.

excellent communication skills with ability to translate business needs into clear specifications.

experience with agile/scrum methodology is an advantage.

are you someone who is looking to work in ecommerce, one of the most desirable sectors in today’s market? you’ve come to the right place, at acommerce, asia’s leading e-commerce enabler, we’re looking for talented individuals to create and deliver innovative solutions to multinational brands such as l’oréal, samsung, adidas, johnson & johnson and so much more.

what you’ll be doing:

goal: the role of business intelligence analyst will be a part of ecommerce market insights analytics team to design and develop world-class analytical information to support ecommerce businesses across southeast asia. a successful candidate will be working with platform users, business process owners and other team members for a given requirement or process. this includes taking part of the design, extraction, analysis, and visualization of the data along with creating feedback loops with key stakeholders to continuously improve the competency of the reports and platform. further, the candidate should be capable of extracting, designing, and analyzing business requirements.

responsibilities: we want you to own your master data, take responsibility for keeping it organized, well understood, clean and available for real-time decision making by humans and ai. you are our guru for data cleanliness, guiding our engineering teams, clients, operations and finance colleagues on keeping our data clean and reliable. specifically, this role will be doing:

development of bi reporting required to meet and inform business needs
monitor data / information management processes to ensure data quality and consistency in support of business initiative
prepare and analyze data using sql, power bi, excel, or other reporting/visualization tools to support the client
create and develop powerful dashboards to present data in a clear and concise manner
lead category/channel/functional deep-dive analysis to identify portfolio opportunities / business drivers’ opportunities to accelerate business e.g., forecasting on market size estimates, performance indicators, promotion/pricing analysis, trend analysis
provide insights and recommendations to business partners
continuously look for improvement areas across the business and how bi can support these
qualifications

must have:

bachelor’s degree in information science, computer science, mathematics, statistics
2-4 years of experience with a business intelligence tool such as ms power bi, tableau
advanced and demonstrated knowledge of sql
business fluency in english
able to think logically, organize work flows efficiently, and solve problems independently
reliable, self-motivated, and self-disciplined individual capable of planning and executing multiple projects simultaneously within a fast-paced environment
nice to have:

experience in ecommerce, market research is a plus
excel vba programming, python and etl are plus
experience of alternative data analysis tools is a plus
what makes acommerce a great workplace:

free lunch every day (at the office)
options to work remotely
on-site gaming rooms and massage services
flexible work hours
company activities and events all year round!
company workshops to learn new concepts and skills
company product auctions – opportunities to buy various products at great prices.
and so much more!

about the role

bangkhen-ram-intra bangkok 3 person.

and onsite every 08:30-17:30 in factory.

what you'll be doing

designing and executing comprehensive performance testing plans for automotive software applications

identifying and documenting performance issues, and collaborating with development teams to resolve them

conducting load, stress, and scalability testing to validate the system's ability to handle increasing workloads

optimizing software performance by analyzing test results and suggesting improvements

reporting on test results and making recommendations to improve overall system performance

minimum 1 years of experience in performance testing of automotive software applications

strong understanding of performance testing methodologies and best practices

familiarity with automotive industry standards and regulations

excellent analytical and problem-solving skills

experience in test automation and scripting (e.g., python, java, or shell scripts) but not necessaries!!

Job_Title: Business Analyst (ฺBanking and insurance Health or Life Claim)
Job_Description:
รายละเอียดงาน

·       requirements elicitation: collaborate with stakeholders to understand their business needs and objectives. use various techniques such as interviews, pain point analysis, workshops, and document analysis to gather and clarify requirements.

requirement analysis and documentation: analyze gathered requirements to identify inconsistencies, gaps, and conflicts. document requirements using standardized

·       requirement prioritization: prioritize requirements based on business value, urgency, and feasibility. work closely with stakeholders to ensure alignment on prioritization and address any conflicts or discrepancies.

·       requirement traceability: develop rtm (requirement traceability matrix) that maps original requirements/tor/rfp form customers with the software/technical solutions (epic, stories, use cases, functions. batches, reports, interfaces.)

requirement verification and validation: collaborate with stakeholders to review and validate requirements to ensure accuracy, completeness, and alignment with business needs. conduct requirement walkthroughs, reviews, and sign-off sessions to obtain stakeholder approval and acceptance

change control: manage changes to requirements throughout the project lifecycle, including assessing impacts, obtaining approvals, and updating documentation. maintain a change log to track and document changes, including reasons, impacts, and resolutions

·       solution definition: work with solution architects and developers (engineering and product teams) to translate business requirements/pain points/journeys into functional design and design solutions. validate proposed solutions with stakeholders to ensure they meet business needs and objectives and solve pain points.

business process design: design end to end business process, application process and data flow based on scope matrix in rtm

·       user journey design: design user journey and wireframe to meet business process, application flow and data flow.

·       functional design: develop functional specification detailing the business processes, functionalities, modules, epics, stories, use cases and non-functional requirements (security, performance, etc.)

·       application design: develop application design specification to provide detailed specification for user interfaces (screens), business rules, calculation/logics, data validation, batch programs, reports and dashboards.

system interface design: develop system interface specification detailing

·       solution validation: provide input and feedback on solution designs to ensure alignment with business requirements and objectives.

·       solution presentation: deliver excellent presentation and convince customers to the proposed design.

act as a liaison between project manager, engineering, product and customer support teams to ensure clear understanding and alignment of project goals and requirements
