Job_Description:
key responsibilities

workflow maintenance (n8n): monitor and optimize existing n8n workflows, including ocr processing for orders and expense claims.

appsheet development: maintain and improve the appsheet frontend (inventory, attendance, expense tracking) with an english ui.

data management: manage google sheets as a database, ensuring data integrity in "flat tables" generated by n8n.

ai integration: manage gemini api settings for ocr tasks, ensuring high accuracy in data extraction.

system documentation: create and update internal manuals (in thai/english) to ensure the system is not a "black box".

future erp integration: support the integration with flowaccount via api for seamless data synchronization.

qualifications

logical thinking: ability to map out business processes and translate them into "if/then" logic.

google workspace expert: advanced knowledge of google sheets (understanding data structures is more important than complex formulas).

ipaas experience: proven experience with n8n, make (integromat), or zapier.

appsheet skills: ability to build and modify appsheet apps, including slice/ux and basic relational design.

api knowledge: understanding of rest apis, json, and webhooks for connecting different services.

language: good command of english (to communicate with the owner and external developers).

technical stack

frontend: appsheet

backend/ipaas: n8n

database: google sheets

ai/ocr: gemini api

erp: flowaccount

job description:

•   strong communicator. hands-on, self-starter. passionate about learning and working efficiently as a team.

company description

publicis sapient is a digital transformation partner helping established organizations get to their future, digitally enabled state, both in the way they work and the way they serve their customers. we help unlock value through a start-up mindset and modern methods, fusing strategy, consulting, and customer experience with agile engineering and problem-solving creativity. united by our core values and our purpose of helping people thrive in the brave pursuit of next, our 20,000+ people in 53 offices around the world combine experience across technology, data sciences, consulting, and customer obsession to accelerate our clients’ businesses through designing the products and services their customers truly value.


overview

the business analyst will act as a key liaison between business stakeholders and technical teams to drive the successful delivery of data products, dashboards, and self‑service datasets. the role focuses on manufacturing, supply chain, and finance domains, ensuring business requirements are accurately translated into high‑quality, data‑driven analytics solutions. this position requires close collaboration with data analysts, sap business analysts, and analytical engineers, with a strong emphasis on data availability, usability, and business impact.

the business analyst will bridge business and technical teams to deliver impactful analytics solutions for manufacturing, supply chain, and finance functions. the role involves eliciting and prioritizing business requirements, ensuring data readiness, and supporting the design, development, and validation of dashboards and self‑service datasets. this is an on-site role based at the thailand manufacturing facility.

key responsibilities

business requirements elicitation: collaborate closely with business stakeholders across manufacturing, supply chain, and finance to understand requirements, define business value, and identify the data needed for dashboards and self‑service datasets.
requirement prioritization: prioritize business requirements and dashboard features to ensure maximum business impact and alignment with strategic objectives.
ensure data availability & quality: partner with data analysts and sap business analysts to identify required data fields, validate data sources (particularly sap s/4hana), and ensure high data quality and availability for reporting.
design & user experience: design professional dashboard mock‑ups and wireframes, focusing on intuitive, user‑friendly ux/ui and ease of use.
solution development & delivery: work closely with analytical engineers to support the development, testing, and deployment of high‑value dashboards and self‑service datasets
testing & validation: define comprehensive test cases and coordinate user acceptance testing (uat) to ensure delivered solutions meet all specified business requirements.

qualifications

3-6 years of experience as a business analyst, preferably within the manufacturing industry
strong exposure to supply chain and finance domains
proficiency in sql for data querying and analysis
experience working with sap s/4hana master and transactional data
excellent communication skills in both thai and english (verbal and written)
willingness to work onsite at the thailand manufacturing facility

key skills

business requirements analysis and documentation

stakeholder management across business and technical teams
sql‑based data analysis

ux‑focused dashboard design

strong sql skills for data analysis
ability to translate business needs into technical and data requirements
experience creating requirements documents, user stories, and functional specifications
experience coordinating uat and defining test cases
proficiency in thai and english communication

good to have skills

hands‑on experience with sap s/4hana data models
experience designing dashboard mock‑ups and wireframes
exposure to self‑service analytics platforms
prior onsite manufacturing facility experience

hybrid work - 4 days a week work from the office

office address - gemopolis industrial, prawet, bangkok

native thai speaker

contract - 1 year

an inclusive workplace that promotes diversity and collaboration.
access to ongoing learning and development opportunities.

project and vendor supervision

exposure to isp, fiber deployment, or infrastructure projects is preferred

🚀 รับสมัคร full-stack developer มาร่วมทีมกับเรา! 🚀

เรากำลังมองหา full-stack developer ที่ชอบความท้าทายและสามารถรับผิดชอบงานได้ตั้งแต่ต้นจนจบ (end-to-end ownership) เพื่อมาสร้างโปรดักต์ที่ยอดเยี่ยมด้วยกันบนสแต็กที่ทันสมัย

✨ หน้าที่ความรับผิดชอบหลัก (what you'll do):

1. ออกแบบและพัฒนาระบบตั้งแต่ต้นจนจบ ตั้งแต่การเก็บ requirement, ออกแบบสถาปัตยกรรม, ไปจนถึงการส่งมอบงาน

2. พัฒนา frontend (vue 3/nuxt, next.js, react.js) ที่รวดเร็วและมีประสิทธิภาพ

3. ออกแบบและพัฒนา backend/api (nestjs, django/fastapi) ที่แข็งแรงและปลอดภัย

4. จัดการฐานข้อมูล (postgresql, mysql, mongodb, mssql), caching (redis), และ background jobs (queues)

5. ดูแล ci/cd, devops (docker), monitoring (elk/loki), และ security (owasp top 10)

6. เชื่อมต่อกับ 3rd-party services เช่น xendit (payment), line messaging/login, google drive

7. สื่อสารกับทีมธุรกิจและเป็นพี่เลี้ยงให้กับทีม

✅ คุณสมบัติที่เรามองหา (who you are):

1. มีประสบการณ์สร้างระบบ production มาแล้วอย่างน้อย 5 ปี

2. เชี่ยวชาญ typescript/javascript และคุ้นเคยกับการทำงานกับ python

3. มีประสบการณ์จริงกับ vue 3/nuxt หรือ next.js และ nestjs/express

4. เข้าใจลึกซึ้งเรื่อง http, การออกแบบ api, database (indexing, transaction), caching และ queues

5. ใช้งาน docker และตั้งค่า ci/cd pipeline ได้

6. สื่อสารชัดเจน และสามารถแปลงความต้องการทางธุรกิจเป็นแผนทางเทคนิคได้

7. ใช้ ai จนชำนาญ

🌟 พิจารณาเป็นพิเศษหากคุณมีประสบการณ์กับ:

1. mssql/azure sql, digitalocean, minio, krakend, cloudflare tunnel

2. การเชื่อมต่อ xendit, line apis, google drive

💻 เทคโนโลยีที่เราใช้ (our stack):

1. languages: typescript, javascript, python

2. frameworks: vue 3/nuxt, next.js, nestjs, express, fastapi, django

3. databases: postgresql, mysql, mongodb, mssql, redis

4. infra/devops: docker, pm2, minio, elk, loki, grafana, krakend, cloudflare

🎉 สิ่งที่คุณจะได้รับ (what we offer):

1. ทำงานแบบ hybrid / remote-friendly ยืดหยุ่นได้

2. เงินเดือนที่น่าสนใจ และโบนัสตามผลการดำเนินงาน

3. งบสนับสนุนอุปกรณ์การทำงาน และงบพัฒนาทักษะ

4. ประกันสุขภาพ

5. วัฒนธรรมองค์กรที่เน้นความโปร่งใส ความเป็นเจ้าของ และลงมือทำจริง

Job_Title: QA Automation Tester (5 days on-site) - All levels
Job_Description:
about capco

capco, a wipro company, is a global technology and management consultancy specializing in driving digital transformation in the financial services industry. with a growing client portfolio comprising of over 100 global organizations, capco operates at the intersection of business and technology by combining innovative thinking with unrivalled industry knowledge to deliver end-to-end data-driven solutions and fast-track digital initiatives for banking and payments, capital markets, wealth and asset management, insurance, and the energy sector. capco’s cutting-edge ingenuity is brought to life through its innovation labs and award-winning be yourself at work culture and diverse talent.

responsibilities;

• develop and execute automated test scripts, analyze test results, and prepare automation test reports.

• prepare test data, mocks, and stubs required for automation testing.

• design appropriate automated test scripts based on business and technical requirements.

• identify defects within test automation solutions and infrastructure, resolve issues when possible, and validate fixes.

• support manual qa engineers in adopting and implementing test automation solutions.


qualifications:

• has good thai and english communication proficiency.

• expertise in creating test automation frameworks with robot framework (selenium/appium), cypress, python, java, or c#

• expertise in test automation in ci/cd pipelines

• experience in ui/api automated testing solutions

• knowledge of tools and processes for results reporting

• experienced with agile and cross-functional team environment

• experienced with jira or any other issues tracking software

• experienced with designing and implementing automated testing

other desired qualifications:

• ability to work onsite 5 days per week at the office in sathorn, bangkok.

• bachelor’s or master’s degree in it, computer science, or a related field.

• experience testing applications in accordance to required non-functional quality attributes (e.g. availability, performance)

• highly energetic, responsible, organized, self-disciplined and self-motivated

• demonstrate ability to work independently and in a team environment

• experienced coding in java is a plus

• experienced with jmeter is a plus

• experienced with mock up service is a plus

• experienced with xml, json, and other markup languages

• experienced with mongodb or other no-sql technologies

we have been informed of several recruitment scams targeting the public. we strongly advise you to verify identities before engaging in recruitment related communication. all official capco communication will be conducted via a capco recruiter.

#li-js1

#li-hybrid

at ey, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. and we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help ey become even better, too. join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.

technology consulting - ai & data

ey delivers unparalleled tech consulting services in data strategy, big data engineering, business intelligence, digital, machine learning and artificial intelligence. we help clients understand, architect, select and implement leading-edge solutions to drive their business. we leverage leading practices and a high degree of business acumen that has been compiled over years of experience to deliver the highest level of execution and satisfaction for our clients. our approach is focused on analysing business needs and making sure that the solutions delivered meet our client’s goals.

the opportunity

ey is investing significantly in the build out of data and ai services that leverage microsoft azure. this is a rapidly growing area, and you will have the opportunity to lead and develop your skill set to keep up with the ever-growing demands of data strategy, the modern data platform and enterprise data fabric landscape, that support data science, business intelligence, artificial intelligence, and cloud applications at scale.

expand your horizons solving real-world challenges with complex data sets and advanced-analytics tools. work with exceptional colleagues and clients to build analytics capabilities that break new ground, transform industries, and shape markets. you will help clients in developing tactical strategies and roadmaps for designing and building data, analytics, and ai solutions that will enable better business outcomes for clients. you will work across client business and technology stakeholders to provide strategic advice, determine solution requirements and success criteria and rationalize architecture and operating decisions. you will manage teams that will clean, transform, and aggregate data; compile and install database systems; write complex queries; scale to multiple machines; and put disaster-recovery systems in place—all with a sharp eye on what is important for the client. this is a high growth, high visibility area with plenty of opportunities to enhance your skillset and build your career. 

your key responsibilities

as an data analytics, you will be focusing on translating client’s business ambitions and objectives into detailed target states and tactical roadmaps, leading more junior team members, and working with a wide variety of clients to deliver technology consulting services. you will be the go-to resource for understanding our clients’ problems through data gathering and analysis. you will use your background in big-data problem solving to collect, analyze, and present findings and solutions.

skills and attributes for success

translating business requirements to technical solutions leveraging strong business acumen.

you will be a core member of the ey microsoft data and ai team, responsible for extracting large quantities of data from client’s it systems, developing efficient etl and data management processes, and building architectures for rapid ingestion and dissemination of key data.

apply expertise in quantitative analysis, data mining and presentation of data to develop compelling and accurate analytical reports and dashboards to support metrics, historical data trend analysis, and identification of opportunities to drive continuous improvement

extremely flexible and experience managing multiple tasks and priorities on deadlines

applying technical knowledge to architect solutions that meet business and it needs, create data platform roadmaps, and enable the data platforms to scale to support additional use cases

staying abreast of current business and industry trends relevant to the client's business

monitoring progress, managing risk, and ensuring key stakeholders are kept informed about progress and expected outcomes.

understanding customers’ overall data estate, it and business priorities and success measures to design implementation architectures and solutions.

strong team collaboration and experience working with remote teams.

working on large-scale client engagements. fostering relationships with client personnel at appropriate levels. consistently delivering quality client services. driving high-quality work products within expected timeframes and on budget.

demonstrated significant professional experience of commercial, strategy and/or research/analytics interacting with senior stakeholders to effectively communicate insights.

execute on building data solutions for business intelligence and assist in effectively managing and monitoring the data ecosystem of analytics, data lakes, warehouses platforms and tools

provide directional guidance and recommendations around data flows including data technology, data integrations, data models, and data storage formats

to qualify for the role, you must have

thai nationality / thai native 

bachelor’s degree, or ms degree in business, economics, technology entrepreneurship, computer science, informatics, statistics, applied mathematics, data science, or machine learning.

minimum of 3-5 years of relevant consulting experience with focus on advanced analytics and business intelligence or similar roles. 

communication and critical thinking are essential, must be able to listen and understand the question and develop and deliver clear insights

experience communicating the results of analysis to both technical and non-technical audiences

independent and able to manage and prioritize workload

ability to adapt quickly and positively to change

breadth of technical passion, desire to learn and knowledge services

willingness and ability to travel to meet client if need

ideally, you’ll also have

experience working business or it transformation projects that have supported data science, business intelligence, artificial intelligence, and cloud applications at scale

ability to communicate clearly and succinctly, adjusts to a variety of styles and audiences with ability to tell compelling stories with the data.

experience with c#, vba, javascript, r

a vast understanding of key bi trends and the bi vendor landscape

working experience with agile and/or scrum methods of delivery

working experience with design led thinking

microsoft certifications in the data & ai domain

what we look for

we’re interested in passionate leaders with strong vision and a desire to deeply understand the trends at the intersection of business and data and ai. we want a customer-focused professional who is motivated to drive the creation of great enterprise products and who can collaborate and partner with other product teams, and engineers. if you have a genuine passion for helping businesses achieve the full potential of their data, this role is for you.

what we offer

we offer a competitive compensation package where you’ll be rewarded based on your performance and recognized for the value you bring to our business. in addition, our total rewards package includes medical and dental coverage, pension and 401(k) plans, and a wide range of paid time off options. under our flexible vacation policy, you’ll decide how much vacation time you need based on your own personal circumstances. you’ll also be granted time off for designated ey paid holidays, winter/summer breaks, personal/family care, and other leaves of absence when needed to support your physical, financial, and emotional well-being.

• continuous learning: you’ll develop the mindset and skills to navigate whatever comes next.

• success as defined by you: we’ll provide the tools and flexibility, so you can make a meaningful impact, your way.

• transformative leadership: we’ll give you the insights, coaching and confidence to be the leader the world needs.

• diverse and inclusive culture: you’ll be embraced for who you are and empowered to use your voice to help others find theirs.

if you can demonstrate that you meet the criteria above, please contact us as soon as possible.

the exceptional ey experience. it’s yours to build.

ey | shape the future with confidence

ey exists to build a better working world, helping to create long-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.

enabled by data and technology, diverse ey teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.

working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, ey teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

ey is an equal opportunity, affirmative action employer providing equal employment opportunities to applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, protected veteran status, disability status, or any other legally protected basis, in accordance with applicable law.

position overview:  

we are seeking a motivated and results-driven account executive to join our team. the ideal candidate will have extensive experience in b2b sales, preferably in the fintech or online payment gateway industry. as a account executive, you will be responsible for building and maintaining relationships with key clients, identifying new business opportunities, and driving revenue growth. you should be comfortable with managing a sales pipeline, negotiating contracts, and working in a fast-paced environment.

reports to: sales director / head of sales

key responsibilities:

client relationship management:

build and maintain strong, long-lasting relationships with key clients and partners.

serve as the primary point of contact for client communication and inquiries.

understand client needs and provide solutions that fit their payment gateway requirements.

sales development:

manage the entire sales cycle from prospecting to closing deals.

meet and exceed quarterly and annual sales targets.

present and demonstrate company products and services to prospective clients.

negotiation & contract management:

negotiate contracts and pricing with clients, ensuring profitable and sustainable agreements.

collaborate with internal teams (legal, compliance, and operation teams) to facilitate smooth contract finalization and implementation.

reporting & sales forecasting:

prepare regular sales reports and forecasts for management.

use crm tools to track sales activities, pipeline, and client communication.

provide insights into market conditions and sales progress to the leadership team.

requirements:

experience in the fintech or payment gateway industry is preferred.

minimum of 3 years of b2b sales experience or business consultant experience with a proven track record of achieving sales targets.

strong communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.

ability to manage multiple clients and tasks effectively under pressure.

basic understanding of payment gateways or online payments.

passion for learning and adapting in a fast-evolving industry.

bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, finance, or a related field is preferred, but relevant experience will be considered.

familiarity with crm tools and sales software is advantageous.

willingness to travel occasionally for client meetings or industry events.

willing to work outside of normal hours. including public holidays to achieve the organization's goals.

experience in building web applications

at least 2 years works experienced in front-end, back-end and web application

knowledge of back-end languages and libraries (node.js)
familiarity with databases (e.g. mysql, postgresql, mongodb)

Company: บริษัท ทรานส์ฟอร์เมชั่นนอล จำกัด
Job_Description:
type: onsite 5 days per week

location: chaengwattana - bangkok, thailand

nationality: thai national required

account focus: requirements & analysis, delivery governance & domain expertise



the transformational mandate

you will work on-site with client stakeholders to uncover real business problems, validate requirements, and produce brds that are stable, risk-assessed, and ready for development. your sign-off is the gate between analysis and build — and you are accountable for what goes through it.




key responsibilities

requirement study & elicitation: engage business users, operations teams, and technical owners to gather requirements across functional, operational, and technical dimensions — distinguishing structural issues from ad-hoc requests.

root cause analysis: diagnose the real problem behind each request, accounting for legacy system constraints, integration limitations, compliance boundaries, and scalability gaps before recommending solutions.

requirement validation & scoping: assess the feasibility, structural fit, and cost-benefit of each requirement. produce wireframes or proof of concepts (pocs) where needed to confirm understanding before development begins.

brd & specification ownership: draft, review, and sign off on business requirements documents (brds) and system specifications — ensuring all documents are complete, stable, and formally accepted by business owners prior to handover (brd readiness sign-off).

business case support: support the development and review of business cases, providing data on impact, effort, and roi to enable informed prioritization decisions by management.

impact & effort assessment: contribute to impact–effort scoring and t-shirt sizing exercises, evaluating projects against strategic alignment, system dependencies, and resource constraints.

domain-specific analysis: apply specialist knowledge across relevant domains — including logistics operations, digital payment systems, or bi/data analytics — to produce technically credible analysis for each engagement.

uat & delivery support: define uat checklists and acceptance criteria; coordinate with qa teams and end users during testing phases to ensure delivery meets requirements.




who you are

pecise thinker: you don't just document what users say — you interrogate requirements until you understand what they actually need and why.

structured communicator: you can produce brds, specs, and wireframes that leave no room for misinterpretation, and present findings clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

domain-aware: you bring real-world knowledge of at least one relevant industry domain — logistics, payments, or data analytics — and apply it to elevate the quality of your analysis.

delivery-oriented: you understand that a requirement not ready for development is a risk, not a work-in-progress. you own the readiness gate.




requirements

bachelor's degree or above in information technology, computer science, engineering, business information systems, or a related field.

3–5 years of experience in business analysis, requirements engineering, or a related it delivery role.

proven ability to produce brds, system specifications, and process documentation for enterprise it projects.

experience working closely with business users, it owners, and multi-stakeholder environments in structured governance settings.

proficient in requirement elicitation techniques, including interviews, workshops, process mapping, and gap analysis.

ability to create wireframes or basic prototypes to validate requirements prior to development.

solid understanding of sdlc, agile/scrum delivery frameworks, and uat coordination.

strong documentation skills — clear, structured, and appropriately detailed for the audience.

professional proficiency in thai and english, both written and spoken.

logistics & last-mile delivery: understanding of track-and-delivery operations, cod reconciliation, and courier api integration.

digital payments & e-payment: familiarity with promptpay, qr code, card payments, digital wallets, and regulatory requirements (bot / pci-dss).

bi / data analytics: experience with kpi design, dashboard requirements, data dictionaries, and self-service reporting for operational and executive audiences.

about the job

why amaris?

at amaris consulting, we believe in creating a thriving, positive workplace where every team member can grow, connect, and make a real impact. here’s what you can expect when you join our dynamic community:

global diversity: be part of an international team of 110+ nationalities, celebrating diverse perspectives and collaboration.

trust and growth: with 70% of our leaders starting at entry-level, we’re committed to nurturing talent and empowering you to reach new heights.

continuous learning: unlock your full potential with our internal academy and over 250 training modules designed for your professional growth.

vibrant culture: enjoy a workplace where energy, fun, and camaraderie come together through afterworks, networking events, and more.

meaningful impact: join us in making a difference through our csr initiatives, including the wecare together program, and be part of something bigger.

equal opportunity

at our company, we are committed to creating an inclusive workplace that promotes and values diversity. all qualified applicants will be considered for employment without regard to gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws.

who are we?

amaris consultingis an independent technology consulting firm providing guidance and solutions to businesses. with more than 1000 clients across the globe, we have been rolling out solutions in major projects for over a decade – this is made possible by an international team of 7,600 people spread across 5 continents and more than 60 countries. our solutions focus on four different business lines: information system & digital, telecom, life sciences and engineering. we’re focused on building and nurturing a top talent community where all our team members can achieve their full potential. amaris is your steppingstone to cross rivers of change, meet challenges and achieve all your projects with success.

at amaris, we strive to provide our candidates with the best possible recruitment experience. we like to get to know our candidates, challenge them, and be able to give them proper feedback as quickly as possible. here's what our recruitment process looks like:   

brief call: our process typically begins with a brief virtual/phone conversation to get to know you! the objective? learn about you, understand your motivations, and make sure we have the right job for you! 

interviews(the average number of interviews is 3 - the number may vary depending on the level of seniority required for the position). during the interviews, you will meet people from our team: your line manager of course, but also other people related to your future role. we will talk in depth about you, your experience, and skills, but also about the position and what will be expected of you. of course, you will also get to know amaris: our culture, our roots, our teams, and your career opportunities!

case study: depending on the position, we may ask you to take a test. this could be a role play, a technical assessment, a problem-solving scenario, etc.   

as you know, every person is different and so is every role in a company.  that is why we have to adapt accordingly, and the process may differ slightly at times. however, please know that we always put ourselves in the candidate's shoes to ensure they have the best possible experience. 
we look forward to meeting you!

this role is responsible for building and implementing machine learning models to solve business problems. machine learning engineer works closely with data scientists and engineers to develop, train, and deploy ml models, ensuring they are efficient, scalable, and aligned with business needs. the job holder focuses more on foundational skills in model development and deployment. 

 

duties and responsibilities 

design and develop machine learning models based on business requirements. 

preprocess large datasets and ensure data quality for model training. 

train, test, and validate machine learning models using various algorithms and techniques. 

deploy models into production environments and monitor their performance. 

collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate machine learning solutions into existing products and services by considering model accuracy and efficiency through experimentation and hyperparameter tuning. 

document the model development process and maintain detailed records of experiments. 

demonstrate a commitment to improve and comply with sshe policy, environment regulations as well as labor law 

perform other related duties as assigned 

 

key measurements 

successful rate of machine learning models deployment. 

performance metrics on model accuracy, precision, and recall. 

% of reduction in model training time and resource consumption. 

number of new machine learning features or algorithms developed and implemented. 

model uptime and reliability in production environments. 

 

 job specification 

education and experience: 

bachelor degree of computer science, machine learning, data science, mathematics or related field. 

minimum of 1-4 years of experience in training and deploying machine learning models, with a focus on model optimization and evaluation.  

experience in training and deploying machine learning models, with a focus on model optimization and evaluation. 

understanding of model optimization techniques and experience with testing and validation. 

experience with machine learning frameworks and libraries. 

 

required skills/abilities:  

proficiency in programming languages for building ml models. 

basic understanding of cloud platforms for deploying ml models. 

expertise in machine learning libraries and frameworks. 

knowledge of deep learning, reinforcement learning, natural language processing or computer vision. 

familiarity with big data tools and databases. 

knowledge of data preprocessing, feature engineering, and hyperparameter tuning. 

ability to troubleshoot and solve complex machine learning and data-related problems. 

ability to follow best practices in machine learning and contribute to documentation and process improvement 

strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently or as part of a team. 

good communication skills to effectively collaborate with cross-functional teams.

as an ai specialist, you will play a pivotal role in accelerating ai adoption for enterprise clients, bridging advanced ai capabilities with tangible business impact. your mission is to enable organizations to become “frontier firms” by identifying high-value use cases, designing scalable solutions using microsoft copilot studio and related tools, and driving adoption through workshops and enablement programs. this is a technical role ideal for professionals passionate about ai innovation and business transformation within the microsoft ecosystem.

ออกแบบและพัฒนา ระบบซอฟต์แวร์และบริการ (applications / services) ทั้งฝั่ง frontend และ backend เพื่อสนับสนุนการดำเนินงานขององค์กร

พัฒนาและดูแล web-based application ที่เชื่อมต่อกับระบบฐานข้อมูลและบริการภายในองค์กร
ทำงานร่วมกับทีม ai เพื่อออกแบบและพัฒนา ai applications / ai services ที่ช่วยเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพการทำงาน เช่น ระบบวิเคราะห์ข้อมูลอัจฉริยะ หรือระบบสื่อสารอัตโนมัติ

ปรับแต่ง (fine-tune) หรือเชื่อมต่อ large language models (llms) และเทคโนโลยี machine learning อื่น ๆ ผ่าน api ให้สามารถใช้งานได้จริงในบริบทธุรกิจ

ออกแบบและปรับปรุง retrieval pipelines และโครงสร้างข้อมูล เพื่อให้ระบบ ai เข้าถึงและประมวลผลข้อมูลได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

ดูแลความถูกต้อง ความปลอดภัย และประสิทธิภาพของระบบ พร้อมตรวจสอบและแก้ไขปัญหาที่เกิดขึ้นระหว่างการใช้งาน

ทำงานร่วมกับทีมวิเคราะห์ระบบ เพื่อพัฒนาฟีเจอร์ใหม่ ๆ ที่ตอบโจทย์การใช้งานของผู้ใช้




คุณสมบัติ

วุฒิปริญญาตรีขึ้นไป สาขา software engineering, computer engineering, ai, หรือสาขาอื่นที่เกี่ยวข้อง

มีประสบการณ์ในการพัฒนาโปรแกรมด้วยภาษา เช่น python, javascript, typescript, node.js, หรือ react

เข้าใจหลักการออกแบบระบบที่ปลอดภัย มีประสิทธิภาพ และสามารถขยายระบบ

มีทักษะการวิเคราะห์ แก้ไขปัญหา และการสื่อสารที่ดี สามารถทำงานร่วมกับทีมข้ามสายงานได้

Job_Title: Data Center Technician - Thailand - Pathumthani - On-site
Job_Description:
reboot monkey is a global leader in it solutions, specializing in data center management that simplifies your it operations. we provide hosting space, future-proof upgrades, and 24/7 support through our smart or remote hands, ensuring seamless, secure, and sustainable service. our fully remote, round-the-clock management frees businesses from supervision hassles, setting new benchmarks in data center solutions. we’re seeking skilled freelance data center technicians to join our growing team. if you have expertise in data center operations and want flexible work, we’d love to hear from you.


job overview:

as a freelance data center technician, you will play a key role in delivering on-demand support to our global data centers. your responsibilities will include hardware installation, troubleshooting complex issues, and managing network operations, ensuring optimal performance and reliability. we’re looking for someone with deep expertise in data center equipment and software who can work independently while collaborating with remote teams. in this role, you’ll be essential to maintaining smooth, secure, and efficient data center operations, contributing to our high standards of service excellence.

key responsibilities:

install, configure, and maintain servers, networking equipment, and other hardware to ensure optimal performance and maximum uptime, facilitating seamless operations within the data center.


monitor data center operations both remotely and on-site, quickly diagnosing and resolving hardware, software, and connectivity issues to minimize downtime and maintain service reliability.

configure, manage, and troubleshoot networking devices, including cisco and juniper routers, switches, and firewalls, to ensure secure and efficient network operations that align with organizational standards.

manage and troubleshoot both linux and windows-based systems, performing essential updates, patches, and security enhancements to keep systems secure and up-to-date.

document all installations, repairs, maintenance tasks, and system performance, providing comprehensive reports to the remote management team to ensure transparency and accountability in operations.

implement and maintain security protocols to protect the integrity of the data center infrastructure, ensuring compliance with industry standards and best practices for data security.

collaborate with remote it teams, vendors, and stakeholders to enhance data center operations, actively participating in the planning and execution of projects that drive efficiency and innovation.

what we offer:

flexibility: work around your existing freelance or permanent job. you choose the tickets you want to pick up, with no minimum hour commitment.

professional environment: join a professional work environment where you can reconnect with the practical side of it.

competitive compensation: we offer competitive rewards for your compensation and efforts.

growth opportunities: work with compelling clients and seize opportunities to grow in your field.

education:

associate or bachelor's degree in computer science, information technology, or a related field is preferred but not required.

experience:

3+ years of experience in data center operations, with a strong focus on independent or freelance projects.

technical skills:

extensive hands-on experience with cisco and juniper networking devices.

strong proficiency in managing and troubleshooting windows and linux-based systems.

solid understanding of networking principles (tcp/ip, dns, vpn, vlans).

experience with virtualization technologies such as vmware or hyper-v is a plus.

certifications:

valid certifications like cisco ccna/ccnp, juniper jncia/jncis, or comptia linux+ are highly desirable.

general requirements:

ability to travel to various data center locations on short notice.

flexibility to work outside regular hours, including nights and weekends if required.

must have access to necessary tools and equipment to perform data center tasks.

strong problem-solving skills, with the ability to work independently and remotely.

excellent communication skills for collaboration with remote teams.
Work_Arrangement: Office, Remote, Flexible Hours, Regular Hours, Shift Work

what you'll do:

deliver high-quality customer service by providing phone and deskside support, ensuring timely resolution of incidents and requests with full ownership through to closure or escalation

why join us?:

innovative and research-driven mindset: open-minded with the ability to explore emerging technologies, propose creative / out-of-the-box solutions, and drive continuous improvement in advanced analytics and data intelligence capabilities. 
strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to assess processes and identify opportunities for improvement under tight timelines. 
willingness to travel as needed.

Job_Title: Software Development Team Lead/ Technical Lead
Job_Description:
we are seeking a software development team lead to drive innovation and guide our development team to the next level. our technology stack includes java, javascript/typescript, html5/css3, and golang, enabling us to build scalable and high-performance applications that support business growth.

the ideal candidate is a strong leader, mentor, and problem solver who is passionate about fostering a culture of collaboration, continuous learning, and technical excellence.




key responsibilities:

· lead and inspire the development team, fostering a high-performance culture.

· develop web/mobile applications based on figma/adobe xd designs.

· design and implement restful apis, web services, and microservices.

· mentor and coach developers to improve technical skills and efficiency.

· collaborate with designers and product teams to ensure seamless ui/ux integration.

· review and optimize source code for scalability, security, and performance.

· define best practices and ensure code quality and maintainability.

· identify and resolve technical challenges, driving continuous innovation and improvement.

· design and manage databases for web applications.

· ensure projects are delivered on time and with high quality.




requirements:

· bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related field.

· 5+ years of experience in software development, with leadership experience preferred.

· strong expertise in javascript/typescript (frontend & backend), java.

· proficiency in golang for backend services and api development.

· experience with rest apis, websockets, and microservices architecture.

· solid understanding of databases like postgresql, mysql, or nosql solutions.

· hands-on experience with git (github, gitlab, bitbucket) for version control.

· proven ability to motivate, mentor, and lead a development team.

· strong communication skills to align technical execution with business goals.

· a proactive mindset, eager to drive growth, efficiency, and innovation.

title: full-stack engineer

reports to: engineering manager

location type: onsite 100%

location: bts chong nonsri, bangkok

employment type: full-time




build the operating system for wellness—starting from thailand, scaling globally.

aura wellness is creating a new tech startup to power the next decade of wellness services: aesthetic clinics, spas, longevity/anti-aging clinics, hospitals, and others. we’re building:

this team will work directly under the ceo office, with fast decisions, direct access to real operating clinics for testing, and a clear multi-year roadmap. if you want to build a real platform with real usage—not slideware—this is it.




about the role

we are looking for a high-performing full-stack engineer to join the engineering team at aura wellness. you will be architecting scalable systems, handling high-concurrency traffic, and building robust backend services using .net core, scala, kotlin and go with clean architecture.

you will bridge the gap between complex backend logic and seamless frontend user experiences using react and the bff (backend for frontend) pattern. uniquely, we embrace modern efficiency: you will utilize ai tools (like claude) to accelerate delivery while exercising strong engineering judgment to ensure code quality and security.




what you’ll do

backend architecture: build and maintain new backend services using .net core, scala, kotlin and go following clean architecture principles.

high-performance apis: design and implement secure, high-performance apis and core business logic optimized for high concurrency and large-scale traffic.

database management: own the postgresql layer, including schema design, query optimization, indexing strategies, and performance tuning.

distributed systems: implement caching and distributed state management using redis, and build asynchronous, event-driven workflows using rabbitmq or kafka.

frontend development: develop modern, responsive frontend features using react, utilizing a backend-for-frontend (bff) approach to streamline data delivery.

ai-augmented development: actively use ai coding assistants (e.g., claude) to speed up boilerplate and logic generation, while applying strict code reviews and architectural judgment to the output.




qualifications

experience: bachelor’s degree in computer science or equivalent practical experience, with a strong portfolio of shipping production code.

we are hiring across multiple levels and welcome applications from fresh graduates, junior, and senior candidates.

technical stack:

expertise in  .net core, scala, kotlin and go and the ability to implement clean architecture.

strong proficiency in javascript/typescript and react.

experience with postgresql /mongodb (not just using an orm, but understanding sql optimization).

familiarity with redis and message brokers (rabbitmq/kafka).

engineering context: experience debugging and optimizing systems for high concurrency and scalability.

ai proficiency: comfort working with ai tools to accelerate workflows without sacrificing code quality or security standards.

soft skills: strong problem-solving skills, the ability to explain complex technical decisions, and a collaborative mindset.

thai citizen only.




nice-to-have

experience with workflow-heavy products (operations tools, booking, payments, membership, crm, internal tools).

familiarity with rbac/permissions, audit logs, and basic security/privacy patterns.

experience working in a “build from zero” or startup environment.




if you’re excited to build a category-defining wellness platform with real-world scale, direct access to live clinics, and ceo-level sponsorship, apply with your resume and a short note on the most operationally complex product you’ve shipped.

unlike many startups, this platform is backed by a profitable, scaled operator (aura bangkok clinic) —so we can move with startup speed, invest for the long term, and build the right foundations without being forced into quarter-by-quarter fundraising decisions.




life at aura

semi-flexible office hour: 9.30-18.30

smart casual dress code  

2-min walk from bts chongnonsi (sathon)

premium health and life insurance with family benefits

high yield, high pop up provident fund plan

child education benefits

travel allowance

clinic service for free or at great cost.

extra benefits to keep your professional look and feel fit.

free lunch (select days).

positive-energetic teammates

entertainment zone; nintendo switch, ps, board games etc.

shower room with hotel amenities.

luxury massage chair to keep office syndrome away

sleep box, take a rest and get up with fresher energy

Job_Title: Software Architect (C#, Python, Docker, JavaScript, SQL/NoSQL)
Job_Description:
at alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. from high-speed trains, metros, monorails, and trams, to turnkey systems, services, infrastructure, signalling and digital mobility, we offer our diverse customers the broadest portfolio in the industry. every day, 80,000 colleagues lead the way to greener and smarter mobility worldwide, connecting cities as we reduce carbon and replace cars.




could you be the full-time software architect in bangkok we’re looking for?

your future role

take on a new challenge and apply your software development expertise in a cutting-edge field. you’ll work alongside collaborative, innovative, and resourceful teammates.

you'll play a pivotal role in shaping the future of railway signalling systems by contributing to the development of alstom's healthhub product, which enhances monitoring and maintenance capabilities for signalling equipment. day-to-day, you’ll work closely with teams across the business (bangkok, france, and india) to ensure healthhub meets user expectations and delivers value for railway operators and maintainers, define software requirements, and much more.

you’ll specifically take care of elaborating and maintaining the software architecture of the healthhub software with a focus on configurability, but also implementing, testing, and delivering full-stack software within a complex software platform.

we’ll look to you for:

deeply understanding system requirements and defining software requirements accordingly

elaborating and maintaining the software architecture of healthhub software

defining software internal interface specifications

implementing, testing, and delivering full-stack software

managing configurations and deployments of applications

participating in technical meetings with system and software engineers across multiple global locations


all about you

we value passion and attitude over experience. that’s why we don’t expect you to have every single skill. instead, we’ve listed some that we think will help you succeed and grow in this role:

bachelor's or master's degree in computer engineering, software engineering, electrical engineering, electronic engineering, information systems, telecommunications, or a related field

experience in railway signalling systems

proficiency in programming languages such as c# and python

proven experience in web application development, including docker, javascript, and sql/nosql databases

knowledge of kubernetes (a plus)

experience with ci/cd configuration using gitlab

knowledge of network engineering

professional working proficiency (or above) in english

soft skills: autonomous, thorough, team-oriented, curious, quick learner, communicative, and resourceful


things you’ll enjoy join us on a life-long transformative journey – the rail industry is here to stay, so you can grow and develop new skills and experiences throughout your career. you’ll also:

enjoy stability, challenges and a long-term career free from boring daily routines

work with new security standards for rail signalling

collaborate with transverse teams and helpful colleagues

contribute to innovative projects

utilise our flexible and inclusive working environment

steer your career in whatever direction you choose across functions and countries

benefit from our investment in your development, through award-winning learning

progress towards senior leadership or expert technical roles

benefit from a fair and dynamic reward package that recognises your performance and potential, plus comprehensive and competitive social coverage (life, medical, pension)




you don’t need to be a train enthusiast to thrive with us. we guarantee that when you step onto one of our trains with your friends or family, you’ll be proud. if you’re up for the challenge, we’d love to hear from you!


important to note

as a global business, we’re an equal-opportunity employer that celebrates diversity across the 63 countries we operate in. we’re committed to creating an inclusive workplace for everyone.

freshket is a platform for restaurant food supplies. we streamline the entire food supply chain process and make it simple, efficient and transparent. we’re growing fast and looking for people who are committed, ambitious, team-oriented and planned.

we’re looking for someone who has demonstrated the ability to build high-quality and scalable products, strong knowledge of systems architecture, and is comfortable working.

you will work in a fast-paced startup environment to translate a business need into a robust and integrated technology solution. you will be working on developing and solving unique and challenging innovative solutions and developing our platform. join us!

please see freshket tech stack and capabilities for more detail.




role and responsibilities

being a major contributor to not just building the product, but deciding how it is built in a high quality standard from an engineer perspective.

ownership of technical designs, code development, and component test execution to demonstrate alignment to the functional specification.

applying knowledge of common, relevant architecture frameworks in defining and evaluating application architectures.

developing and demonstrating a broad set of technology skills, open source libraries and frameworks, and technology architecture concepts.

own problems end-to-end, thinking through everything from user experience, data models, scalability, operability and ongoing metrics.




qualification

general

a can-do attitude and growth mindset

a proven track record of successful project/product implementation/development

2+ years of experience in software development

intermediate level of english, both written and spoken

ability to work independently, open mind and in collaboration with team members

write testable code (unit test, integration test, ui automated test)

experience with amazon aws or other cloud hosting service skills

agile experience, you know what is definition of done

experience with ci and cd

this position is open to thai nationals only.




experience and technology skills

strong knowledge of oop - (node.js or golang is a plus)

strong knowledge of database design (sql, nosql)

proficiency of html5/css and javascript

experience with any mvc frameworks

experience with design patterns (very useful to have)

experience with unit tests/tdd

experience with command line, such as linux, git, ssh

understand foundation of front-end stack, not just using frameworks

experience with responsive design and grid-based layouts

familiar with css preprocessors (scss, less, etc.)

have experience with react is a plus




perks and benefits

hybrid remote working (1 days / week in the office)

flexible work hours (e.g., 10 am-11 am to 7 pm-8 pm)

10 days annual paid vacation

health insurance and annual health checkup

office at mrt phetchaburi




how to apply

please submit your cv and homework test (required) together, plus anything else you'd like to tell us, to recruit-tech@freshket.co or upload it to dropbox or google drive (or similar) and send us a link.

thanks for your time – we look forward to hearing from you!

Company: TOYOTA TSUSHO NEXTY ELECTRONICS (THAILAND) CO., LTD.
Job_Description:

design, development and testing of embedded software in automotive industrial vehicle

application support job description

🌟 about the role

we’re on the lookout for a curious, tech-savvy, and proactive application support engineer who loves solving real-world problems and making technology work smarter for people.

in this role, you’ll help keep our customers’ systems running smoothly, collaborate with talented engineers and client it teams, and continuously improve how we deliver great service. you’ll be a go-to problem solver — turning technical issues into seamless experiences.

💡 what you’ll do

monitor, troubleshoot, and maintain software applications in live customer environments.

work closely with the service manager, project manager, and client teams to keep systems reliable and secure.

respond to and resolve incidents or escalate as needed — ensuring top-tier service quality and slas are met.

analyze application performance, recommend improvements, and collaborate with developers to enhance user experience.

manage code migration, document configuration changes, and ensure synchronization across environments.

support end-users by training, communicating updates, and building strong relationships.

keep an eye on application performance metrics and help shape future updates.

a service-minded problem solver who enjoys helping others succeed.

strong understanding of business processes and experience in enterprise applications (erp, scm, crm).

proven experience in application support or related roles — ideally in secure environments.

quick learner, self-motivated, and eager to explore new tech tools.

experience managing application servers (ibm websphere or similar) and performance tuning.

bachelor’s degree in computer science, information systems, software engineering, or a related field.

🕓 balance that matters — we understand that great work happens when life is balanced.

ready to make an impact?

if you’re someone who gets excited about solving problems, learning new things, and making technology more human — we’d love to hear from you.

apply now and help us keep the world running smoothly, one system at a time.

Job_Title: IT Customer Support - Global Tech E-Commerce
Job_Description:
เกี่ยวกับตำแหน่งงาน

transcosmos (thailand) กำลังมองหาคนรุ่นใหม่ไฟแรงและผู้ที่มีใจรักในสายเทคโนโลยีมาร่วมงานกับทีม it product ของเรา! นี่คือโอกาสสำคัญสำหรับนักศึกษาจบใหม่หรือผู้ที่มีประสบการณ์ในสาย it/engineering ที่จะได้ทำงานร่วมกับแพลตฟอร์ม e-commerce ระดับโลก

ด่วน! เปิดรับสมัคร 2 อัตราหลัก:

it support (ทักษะภาษาไทย): ดูแลและให้ความช่วยเหลือร้านค้าและผู้ใช้งานชาวไทย

it support (ทักษะภาษาอังกฤษ): ดูแลและให้ความช่วยเหลือร้านค้าและผู้ใช้งานระดับนานาชาติ (global support)

หน้าที่ความรับผิดชอบหลัก

ให้คำปรึกษาและแก้ไขปัญหาทางเทคนิค (troubleshooting) บนระบบเบื้องต้นให้กับร้านค้าและผู้ใช้งานบนแพลตฟอร์ม e-commerce

วิเคราะห์หาสาเหตุของปัญหาทางเทคนิค (root cause analysis) และประสานงานกับทีม engineer เพื่อดำเนินการแก้ไขอย่างทันท่วงที

ดูแลและรักษามาตรฐานการให้บริการเพื่อสร้างความพึงพอใจสูงสุดให้แก่ลูกค้าตามมาตรฐานของแบรนด์ระดับโลก

บันทึกข้อมูลปัญหาและขั้นตอนการแก้ไขลงในระบบฐานข้อมูลของบริษัทอย่างถูกต้อง

คุณสมบัติผู้สมัคร

การศึกษา: จบการศึกษาระดับ ปวส ขึ้นไป ในสาขา computer science, information technology, engineering หรือสาขาอื่นๆ ที่เกี่ยวข้อง

ประสบการณ์: ยินดีรับนักศึกษาจบใหม่ (new graduates are welcome) หรือผู้ที่มีประสบการณ์ด้าน it support

ทักษะทางภาษา: * สำหรับตำแหน่งภาษาไทย: สื่อสารภาษาไทยได้อย่างถูกต้องและเป็นมืออาชีพ

สำหรับตำแหน่งภาษาอังกฤษ: สามารถสื่อสารภาษาอังกฤษได้ดี (เทียบเท่าคะแนน toeic 550 ขึ้นไป)

ความพร้อม: สามารถทำงานแบบหมุนเวียนกะได้ (ทำงาน 5 วัน/สัปดาห์)

มีทักษะในการแก้ไขปัญหาเฉพาะหน้า (problem-solving) และมีความสนใจในธุรกิจ e-commerce

สวัสดิการและผลตอบแทน

เงินรางวัลพิเศษ (incentives): พิจารณาตามผลการปฏิบัติงาน

ai native company 📍 remote (thailand-based, full-time hire through thai entity) | 🌐 global company with thailand work hours | 💸salary + benefit allowance

join us at toruz (www.toruz.ai) — a uk-based start-up revolutionising airport and logistics operations with ai. we're on a mission to digitise and optimise how ground handlers work, helping them streamline billing, manage tasks in real-time, and gain deep operational insights.

we're now looking to expand our technical team in thailand. this is a unique opportunity to join at a fast growing ai company and help shape the culture and practices of our thai dev team. this is a role for high performers with a focus on react frontend / .net c# back end, we only hire the best talent and pay accordingly - please only apply if you fit our tech stack

applications will only be considered if:

you have proven commercial experience with react, typescript, c#, and .net

you are currently based in thailand

what you'll do

as a full stack developer, you'll work closely with our founders and thai dev team (4 in total) to design and build new product features, solve complex real-world challenges, and take ownership of your code through to production. you'll be involved in:

building modern web applications with react and typescript

developing robust apis using c#, asp .net core , and entity framework core

exploring how ai/llms (openai, azure ai) can enhance our product

getting involved with agentic ai and model context protocols

writing tests to ensure quality and maintainability (unit, integration, e2e)

collaborating with business stakeholders to turn requirements into working software

deploying and monitoring applications on azure

contributing to devops pipelines (ci/cd, build & release automation)

what we're looking for

5+ years of experience with full stack development using react and .net

proficiency in typescript, c#, asp .net core, and ef core

strong understanding of web architecture and restful api design

comfortable writing clean, tested, and maintainable code

experience with cloud platforms, preferably azure

good english communication and comfort working in a remote-first team

a self-starter with a passion for technology, ai, and building meaningful products

🌏 why join toruz?

early opportunity to join a founder-led start-up with real-world customers in europe, the us, and the caribbean

be part of building our bangkok-based development team from the ground up

work directly with experienced founders

flexible remote work within thailand

long-term with potential for growth into a core team role

80k to 120k thb per month depending on experience

working hours flexible (usually 10am to 7pm thailand time)

📩 how to apply

send your cv, github/portfolio (if you have one), and a brief introduction. let us know why you're interested and what excites you about working with us.

เกี่ยวกับเรา (about connectx)

connectx คือผู้ให้บริการแพลตฟอร์ม customer data & engagement ชั้นนำ ที่ช่วยให้ธุรกิจสามารถรวบรวมข้อมูลลูกค้าจากทุกช่องทางมาไว้ที่ศูนย์กลาง และนำข้อมูลนั้นไปใช้สร้างปฏิสัมพันธ์กับลูกค้าได้อย่างชาญฉลาดและเป็นอัตโนมัติ เรากำลังมองหาบุคลากรที่มีความสามารถและรักในเทคโนโลยีมาร่วมเป็นส่วนหนึ่งของทีมเพื่อขับเคลื่อนความสำเร็จให้กับลูกค้าของเรา

ภาพรวมของตำแหน่ง (role overview)

technical solution consultant (senior level) คือผู้เชี่ยวชาญด้านเทคนิคของแพลตฟอร์ม connectx ที่ทำหน้าที่เป็นสะพานเชื่อมที่สำคัญระหว่าง ความต้องการทางธุรกิจของลูกค้า กับ การนำโซลูชันไปใช้งานจริงบนระบบ คุณจะต้องทำงานอย่างใกล้ชิดกับลูกค้าเพื่อวิเคราะห์ความต้องการ, ออกแบบโซลูชัน, และลงมือตั้งค่า (configure) ระบบ connectx ให้สามารถตอบโจทย์และสร้างคุณค่าทางธุรกิจให้กับลูกค้าได้อย่างสมบูรณ์แบบ

หน้าที่ความรับผิดชอบหลัก (key responsibilities)

วิเคราะห์และออกแบบโซลูชัน (system analysis & solution design):

ทำงานร่วมกับลูกค้าและทีม project management เพื่อรวบรวมและวิเคราะห์ความต้องการทางธุรกิจ (business requirements)

จัดทำเอกสาร requirement flow, user journey, และ process diagram เพื่อสรุปความต้องการของลูกค้าให้เป็นภาพที่ชัดเจนและป้องกันการหลุดขอบเขต

ออกแบบโซลูชันทางเทคนิค (technical solution design) โดยใช้ความสามารถของแพลตฟอร์ม connectx ให้ตอบโจทย์ลูกค้าได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

ตั้งค่าและติดตั้งระบบ (system configuration & implementation):

ดำเนินการตั้งค่า (configure) โมดูลต่างๆ บนแพลตฟอร์ม connectx ตามโซลูชันที่ได้ออกแบบไว้

บริหารจัดการการเชื่อมต่อและทำ data mapping ระหว่างระบบของลูกค้ากับ connectx platform

ตั้งค่า marketing automation flows, segmentation rules, และฟังก์ชันอื่นๆ ตามความต้องการของโครงการ

สนับสนุนโครงการและลูกค้า (project & client support):

ทำงานร่วมกับ project lead เพื่อติดตามความคืบหน้าของงานในส่วนที่เกี่ยวกับด้านเทคนิค

เป็นที่ปรึกษาและให้คำแนะนำทางเทคนิคแก่ลูกค้าตลอดระยะเวลาโครงการ

ช่วยวิเคราะห์และแก้ไขปัญหาทางเทคนิค (troubleshooting) ที่เกิดขึ้นระหว่างการติดตั้งและทดสอบระบบ

การจัดทำเอกสาร (documentation):

จัดทำเอกสารที่เกี่ยวข้องกับโซลูชันที่ออกแบบ เช่น solution design document, configuration guide, และ data mapping specification

คุณสมบัติที่ต้องการ (qualifications)

ประสบการณ์:

มีประสบการณ์อย่างน้อย 2-3 ปีในตำแหน่ง technical consultant, system analyst, implementation specialist, หรือตำแหน่งอื่นที่เกี่ยวข้องกับการนำซอฟต์แวร์ไปติดตั้งให้ลูกค้า

มีประสบการณ์ในการทำงานกับลูกค้าโดยตรง (client-facing role)

(จะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ) หากมีประสบการณ์ทำงานกับแพลตฟอร์มประเภท cdp, marketing automation, crm, หรือ social media management

ทักษะด้านเทคนิค (technical skills):

มีความเข้าใจในหลักการทำงานของ saas platform, api, และการเชื่อมต่อข้อมูลระหว่างระบบ

สามารถทำความเข้าใจและออกแบบ requirement flow และ process diagram ได้

มีความคุ้นเคยกับโครงสร้างข้อมูลพื้นฐาน เช่น json, csv

สามารถตั้งค่าและ configure ระบบซอฟต์แวร์ตามคู่มือและข้อกำหนดได้

ทักษะอื่นๆ (soft skills):

มีทักษะการวิเคราะห์และแก้ปัญหาที่ยอดเยี่ยม (strong analytical and problem-solving skills)

มีทักษะการสื่อสารที่ดี สามารถอธิบายเรื่องทางเทคนิคที่ซับซ้อนให้ผู้ที่ไม่ใช่สายเทคนิคเข้าใจได้ง่าย

มีความละเอียดรอบคอบและใส่ใจในรายละเอียด

สามารถทำงานร่วมกับผู้อื่นได้ดีและทำงานภายใต้แรงกดดันได้

job description: technical consultant

position: technical solution consultant
department: solution delivery

about connectx

connectx is a leading customer data & engagement platform that helps businesses consolidate customer data from all channels into a central hub and use that data to build intelligent, automated interactions with their customers. we are looking for talented, tech-loving individuals to join our team and drive success for our clients.

role overview

the technical consultant (senior level) is a product expert who acts as a critical bridge between the client's business needs and the practical implementation of the solution on our platform. you will work closely with clients to analyze their requirements, design solutions, and configure the connectx system to perfectly meet their needs and deliver tangible business value.

key responsibilities

system analysis & solution design:

collaborate with clients and the project management team to gather and analyze business requirements.

create requirement flow documents, user journeys, and process diagrams to clearly define client needs and prevent scope creep.

design effective technical solutions using the capabilities of the connectx platform to address client objectives.

system configuration & implementation:

configure various modules on the connectx platform according to the designed solution.

manage integrations and perform data mapping between the client's systems and the connectx platform.

set up marketing automation flows, segmentation rules, and other functionalities as required by the project.

project & client support:

work with the project lead to track the progress of technical tasks.

serve as a technical advisor and provide guidance to clients throughout the project lifecycle.

assist in troubleshooting and resolving technical issues that arise during implementation and testing.

documentation:

prepare solution-related documents, such as the solution design document, configuration guide, and data mapping specification.

qualifications

experience:

a minimum of 2-3 years of experience as a technical consultant, system analyst, implementation specialist, or a similar role involving software implementation for clients.

proven experience in a client-facing role.

(highly desirable) experience with platforms such as cdp, marketing automation, crm, or social media management.

technical skills:

a solid understanding of how saas platforms, apis, and data integrations work.

ability to understand and design requirement flows and process diagrams.

familiarity with basic data structures like json and csv.

capable of configuring software systems based on technical guides and requirements.

soft skills:

strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

excellent communication skills, with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.

meticulous and detail-oriented.

a great team player with the ability to work effectively under pressure.

benefits:

รายละเอียดงาน

1.ออกแบบ พัฒนา และดูแล data pipeline และ etl/elt สำหรับรวบรวม แปลง และจัดเตรียมข้อมูลจากแหล่งต่าง ๆ ให้พร้อมใช้งาน
2.ออกแบบและบริหารจัดการโครงสร้างข้อมูล data warehouse, data mart ให้รองรับการใช้งานด้าน analytics และธุรกิจ
3.จัดเตรียมและดูแลข้อมูลสำหรับการใช้งานด้าน data analytics, bi, dashboard และ ai / machine learning model
4.สนับสนุนการสร้างรายงาน bi และ dashboard โดยทำงานร่วมกับ data analyst, data scientist และ business team
5.ดูแลคุณภาพ ความถูกต้อง ความสมบูรณ์ และประสิทธิภาพของข้อมูล รวมถึงปรับปรุงประสิทธิภาพของระบบข้อมูล

คุณสมบัติผู้สมัคร

1.ปริญญาตรี สาขา information engineering, computer science, information technology, mis หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

2.มีประสบการณ์ทำงานอย่างน้อย 2 ปี ในด้าน data engineer, business intelligence, etl หรือ data platform หากมีประสบการณ์ทำงานด้าน data engineer ในบริษัทประกันภัย หรือธุรกิจการเงิน จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

3.มีประสบการณ์ออกแบบและพัฒนา data pipeline และกระบวนการ etl/elt รวมถึงการทำงานกับ data warehouse / data mart

4.สามารถเขียน pl/sql ได้เป็นอย่างดี มีประสบการณ์พัฒนา stored procedure, package และสามารถทำ query & performance tuning ได้

5.มีความรู้ความเข้าใจและสามารถวิเคราะห์ข้อมูล, ทำ bi report / dashboard (เช่น tableau) ได้

6.ยินดีรับนักศึกษาจบใหม่ที่มี skill พื้นฐานตามที่ระบุ, เคยทำ project ที่เกี่ยวข้อง และพร้อมเรียนรู้

what you’ll do

collaborate closely with developers to understand system logic and ensure end-to-end quality across backend services and apis.

design and execute manual test cases, with strong emphasis on api, backend testing or mobile testing.

use postman to send, verify, and manipulate requests/responses.

write and execute sql queries to validate data integrity and backend transactions.

perform exploratory and regression testing in development, staging, and production environments.

actively participate in agile/scrum ceremonies — sprint planning, grooming, stand-ups, and retrospectives.

what you bring

bachelor’s degree in computer science, it, or a related field.

3+ years of experience in software testing (manual focus with api testing exposure).

strong skills in postman, sql, and data validation.

familiarity with backend architecture and client/server applications.

basic knowledge of test automation tools is a plus.

analytical mindset, problem-solving attitude.

about phillip technology team

phillip securities (thailand) is actively expanding our technology team to support multiple internal transformation projects.

our key initiatives include investment platforms such as pocket and poems, along with several mission-critical systems that drive our digital financial ecosystem.

if you’re someone with strong passion, high energy, and a mindset ready to take on challenging projects from the ground up — this is the place where your drive truly matters. you’ll have the opportunity to grow, experiment, and build impactful products together with a committed tech team.

about the role 

we are looking for backend developers / senior backend developers to join our engineering team at techlead npn. in this role, you will help build and improve backend systems, apis, and services that support product innovation and business growth.

for mid-level candidates, this role offers the opportunity to strengthen your backend engineering foundation, deliver quality code, and grow through collaboration and feedback. for senior-level candidates, this role offers the opportunity to take ownership of complex backend features, make sound technical decisions, mentor others, and help raise engineering standards across the team.




what you’ll do 

own and deliver features end-to-end, from design to production. 

make well-reasoned technical decisions and trade-offs that balance speed, quality, and scalability. 

write clean, testable, and maintainable code across backend (node.js, typescript, golang, sql/nosql) and frontend (react or similar). 

communicate technical design clearly through architecture docs, prs, and discussions. 

mentor junior developers, providing feedback via pairing, code reviews, and technical guidance. 

proactively identify unclear requirements, performance bottlenecks, or architectural gaps before they cause issues. 

collaborate cross-functionally with product, design, and qa to ensure smooth delivery. 

take initiative — fix bugs, refactor, and improve developer experience without waiting for assignment. 

contribute to demos, tech talks, and internal best practices, sharing knowledge openly. 

deliver reliable, bug-free releases and maintain high test coverage in ci/cd pipelines. 

support system reliability by monitoring, troubleshooting, and improving deployed services. 


what we’re looking for 

bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience

3+ years of experience in backend development (javascript/typescript, node.js, golang, sql/nosql). 

solid understanding of web architecture, apis, and cloud environments. 

strong grasp of testing, ci/cd, and performance optimization. 

ability to break down complex problems into clear, actionable tasks. 

excellent communication and cross-functional collaboration skills. 

bonus points 

experience in fintech, payments, or large-scale web platforms. 

familiarity with docker, kubernetes, and cloud infrastructure (aws/gcp). 

understanding security, observability, and api performance tuning. 

contributions to internal tooling, open source, or developer enablement initiatives. 




what we offer 

opportunity to work on real products and backend systems with visible user and business impact

a collaborative engineering culture that values learning, ownership, and continuous improvement

exposure to modern backend engineering practices, scalable systems, and cross-functional product development

opportunity to grow your career, whether you are building your backend foundation or stepping into a more senior technical role

hybrid work arrangement to support flexibility and productivity




about us

at techlead, we build technology with purpose. we believe great digital products come from people who care deeply about quality, collaboration, and creating solutions that improve experiences for users.

we are a fast-moving team that values ownership, practical execution, and continuous growth. if you enjoy building backend systems, solving real problems, and creating meaningful impact through technology, we would love to hear from you.

about innoviz solutions
innoviz solutions co., ltd. is the largest implementer of microsoft dynamics 365 for finance and operations (formerly microsoft dynamics ax) in thailand, operating as part of bluebik group pcl. we have a strong presence across six versions of the software, serving more than 400 customers in industries such as automotive, consumer products, manufacturing, retail, finance, energy, real estate, and government.


work you will do

design, develop, and implement technical solutions.

configure and customize microsoft dynamics 365 based on client requirements.

title: devsecops engineer

reports to: product manager

location type: 100% onsite

location: bangkok (head office – sathorn)

role type: full-time




build the operating system for wellness—starting from thailand, scaling globally.

aura wellness is creating a new tech startup to power the next decade of wellness services: aesthetic clinics, spas, longevity/anti-aging clinics, hospitals, and others.

this team will work directly under the ceo office, with fast decisions, direct access to real operating clinics for testing, and a clear multi-year roadmap. if you want to build a real clinic platform with real usage—not slideware.




about the role
we are looking for a devsecops engineer to embed security into every phase of the software development lifecycle while enabling fast, reliable delivery across aura wellness group's multi-brand digital platforms. this role sits at the intersection of development, operations, and information security — owning the ci/cd pipeline, cloud infrastructure security, and observability practices that keep our systems secure and our teams moving quickly.

you will work closely with the software engineering team and the information security & governance team.





what you’ll do

design, build, and maintain ci/cd pipelines with integrated security controls — including sast, dast, sca, and container scanning (e.g., sonarqube, snyk, trivy, owasp zap) — enforcing quality and compliance checkpoints before every release.

automate infrastructure provisioning, configuration management, and operational tasks using scripting (python, bash) and iac tools (terraform, cloudformation, ansible), including secrets management via aws secrets manager or equivalent.

manage and optimize aws cloud infrastructure — ec2, ecs, fargate, rds, s3, vpc, and iam — with a focus on security posture, reliability, and cost efficiency; enforce cis benchmarks and least-privilege access across all environments.

configure and manage network security controls including waf, security groups, vpc policies, dns filtering, tls, and load balancing across development, staging, and production environments.

implement and manage container security across docker, kubernetes, and amazon ecs/fargate, including image scanning, registry policy enforcement, and runtime protection.

implement and maintain observability stacks covering metrics, logs, and distributed tracing (prometheus/grafana, cloudwatch, opentelemetry, or datadog); define and track slos/slas for critical services.

lead incident response — triage, contain, investigate, and drive timely resolution; conduct blameless post-mortemsand ensure root cause analysis is completed and acted upon.

conduct regular vulnerability assessments across application, infrastructure, and third-party components; operate siem tools for threat detection and alerting; coordinate penetration testing and track findings to closure.

champion a shift-left security culture — conduct developer security onboarding, provide hands-on guidance to engineering teams, and track devsecops metrics.





qualifications

must have

bachelor's degree or higher in computer science, information technology, cybersecurity, or a related field.

minimum 3–5 years of hands-on experience in devops, sre, devsecops, or cloud infrastructure roles.

proficiency with aws services including ec2, ecs, fargate, rds, s3, vpc, and iam.

hands-on experience with ci/cd platforms (github actions, gitlab ci, jenkins, or equivalent) and pipeline security integration.

strong scripting skills in python and bash; experience with iac tools (terraform, cloudformation, ansible).

docker and kubernetes or amazon ecs/fargate experience, including container security.

experience with observability tools such as prometheus/grafana, cloudwatch, or opentelemetry.

experience with sast/dast/sca tooling such as sonarqube, owasp zap, snyk, trivy, dependency-track, or dependabot.

understanding of networking fundamentals: dns, tls, load balancing, firewalls, and network segmentation.



nice to have

aws certifications (e.g., aws solutions architect associate, aws devops professional, aws security specialty).

professional security certification: ccsp, ceh, oscp, or comptia security+.

familiarity with cloud cost optimization practices and finops principles.

knowledge of nist csf, cis benchmarks, or csa ccm as complementary security frameworks.





if you’re excited to build a category-defining wellness platform with real-world scale, direct access to live clinics, and ceo-level sponsorship, apply with your resume and a short note on the most operationally complex product you’ve shipped.

unlike many startups, this platform is backed by a profitable, scaled operator (aura bangkok clinic) —so we can move with startup speed, invest for the long term, and build the right foundations without being forced into quarter-by-quarter fundraising decisions.

Job_Description:
technical systems architect / platform integration lead

📍 location: bangkok, thailand
