about the role

we are looking for a technical systems architect / platform integration lead to spearhead

the design and integration of our next-generation intelligent health os — a connected

healthcare ecosystem that brings together ai analytics, laboratory information systems

(lis), clinic information systems (cis), and patient applications.

this role is pivotal in architecting a secure, scalable, and interoperable health-tech

infrastructure that supports data-driven health insights and ai-powered services across

clinics, laboratories, and patients.




key responsibilities

• design and implement scalable system architectures for healthcare technology

integrations.

• lead the overall platform integration strategy, ensuring seamless data flow between

lis, cis, ai engine, and mobile applications.

• define and manage api standards, protocols, and documentation (rest, graphql,

soap).

• collaborate with ai engineers, product managers, and stakeholders to translate

business and clinical requirements into robust technical solutions.

• ensure security, performance, and compliance with healthcare data standards (hipaa,

iso, fda-related frameworks).

• oversee cloud infrastructure deployment and management (aws, azure, or google

cloud).

• provide technical leadership and mentorship to development teams in system design

and implementation.




requirements

• bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, information technology, or a

related field.

• 5+ years of experience in systems architecture and platform integration, ideally in

healthcare, fintech, or data-driven industries.

• strong expertise in api design, integration frameworks, and data interoperability.

• proficient in programming languages such as python, java, or node.js.

• experience with cloud platforms (aws, azure, or google cloud).

• solid understanding of database design and management (sql and nosql).

• knowledge of security, encryption, and compliance best practices for handling sensitive

data.

nice-to-have

• experience with healthcare data standards (hl7, fhir, dicom).

• background in ai system integration or data pipeline architecture.

• familiarity with devops tools and ci/cd environments.




why join us

• be part of a pioneering team building thailand’s first intelligent health os.

• work at the intersection of ai, health, and data technology.

• contribute to innovations that make healthcare more connected, accessible, and

intelligent.

• dynamic and collaborative startup environment with opportunities for rapid growth.

ภาพรวมของงาน (job purpose)

รับผิดชอบการนำระบบ software ของบริษัทไปติดตั้งและเปิดใช้งานจริง ณ พื้นที่ปฏิบัติงานของลูกค้า (ศูนย์กระจายสินค้า) โดยทำหน้าที่เป็นพี่เลี้ยงในการสอนการใช้งาน ตรวจสอบความพร้อมของระบบหน้างาน และประสานงานแก้ไขปัญหาเบื้องต้นร่วมกับทีมพัฒนา (international team) เพื่อให้การเปลี่ยนผ่านระบบเป็นไปอย่างราบรื่น

หน้าที่และความรับผิดชอบ (key responsibilities)

·       system deployment & set-up: ดำเนินการติดตั้งและตรวจสอบความพร้อมของระบบ hardware/software หน้างานก่อนการเริ่มใช้งานจริง

·       on-site support & troubleshooting: ประจำการ ณ ศูนย์กระจายสินค้าในช่วงการขึ้นระบบ (roll-out) เพื่อแก้ไขปัญหาเฉพาะหน้าและตอบข้อซักถามจากผู้ใช้งาน

·       user training: สอนและแนะนำวิธีการใช้งานระบบ (เช่น ระบบรับออเดอร์, การจัดสินค้า, การจัดเส้นทางขนส่ง) ให้กับพนักงานหน้างาน

·       process monitoring: สังเกตการณ์ขั้นตอนการทำงานจริง (workflow) และตรวจสอบว่าระบบทำงานสัมพันธ์กับหน้างานอย่างถูกต้อง

·       global coordination & feedback: บันทึกปัญหาที่พบจากการใช้งานจริงหน้างาน เพื่อนำมาสรุปและประสานงานร่วมกับทีม software developer (ชาวต่างชาติ) เป็นภาษาอังกฤษ เพื่อปรับปรุงระบบให้ดียิ่งขึ้น

·       documentation: จัดทำคู่มือการใช้งานเบื้องต้น หรือรายงานสรุปผล (issue report) การเข้าปฏิบัติงานในแต่ละศูนย์ฯ

คุณสมบัติผู้สมัคร (qualifications)

o    education: ปริญญาตรี สาขาเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ (it), คอมพิวเตอร์ธุรกิจ, การจัดการโลจิสติกส์ หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

o    experience: ยินดีรับนักศึกษาจบใหม่ที่มีความกระตือรือร้น หรือมีประสบการณ์ 0-2 ปี ในงาน it support, system implementer หรือประสานงานโครงการ

o    language skills: มีทักษะภาษาอังกฤษพื้นฐาน (ฟัง พูด อ่าน เขียน) ที่สามารถใช้สื่อสารประสานงานด้านเทคนิคเบื้องต้นกับทีมงานต่างชาติได้

o    technical skills: มีพื้นฐานความเข้าใจในระบบ it และ software เบื้องต้น รวมถึงทักษะการแก้ปัญหาเฉพาะหน้า (problem solving)

o    soft skills: มีใจรักบริการ (service mind) มนุษย์สัมพันธ์ดี และสามารถสื่อสารข้อมูลที่เข้าใจง่ายให้กับผู้ใช้งานหลากหลายระดับ

o    mindset: มีความรับผิดชอบสูง ตรงต่อเวลา และสามารถทำงานภายใต้สภาวะกดดันหน้างานได้

เงื่อนไขพิเศษในการทำงาน (work condition)

o    mobility: สามารถเดินทางไปปฏิบัติงาน on-site ณ ศูนย์กระจายสินค้าของลูกค้าได้ (กรุงเทพฯ และต่างจังหวัด)

o    flexibility: สามารถค้างแรมในพื้นที่เพื่อดูแลการขึ้นระบบต่อเนื่องเป็นเวลา 3-5 วันต่อศูนย์ฯ (บริษัทมีค่าเบี้ยเลี้ยงและที่พักให้ตามนโยบาย)

job responsibilities:

ตรวจสอบสคริปต์และเนื้อหาต่าง ๆ ภายในเกมตามที่ได้รับมอบหมาย

ตรวจสอบคุณภาพภาษาและการแสดงผลข้อความภายในเกม ให้ถูกต้องตามมาตรฐานของภาษาที่เปิดให้บริการ

รายงานบั๊กหรือปัญหาที่เกี่ยวข้องกับภาษา รวมถึงข้อผิดพลาดด้านการแสดงผล (text display issues)

ประสานงานกับทีมที่เกี่ยวข้อง และให้คำแนะนำด้านภาษาเพื่อปรับปรุงคุณภาพของเนื้อหา

สนับสนุนงานด้าน localization qa (lqa) อื่น ๆ ตามที่ได้รับมอบหมาย

qualifications:

วุฒิการศึกษา ปริญญาตรีขึ้นไป

สามารถตรวจสอบและแก้ไขข้อผิดพลาดด้านภาษา เช่น คำแปลผิด คำตกหล่น การสะกดคำผิด และประโยคที่ไม่เป็นธรรมชาติ

มีความเข้าใจการใช้ภาษาให้เหมาะสมตามบริบทของเกม เช่น บทพูดตัวละคร คำอธิบายสกิล และข้อความระบบ

มีความละเอียดรอบคอบ และสามารถปฏิบัติงานที่ได้รับมอบหมายได้เป็นอย่างดี

สามารถทำงานร่วมกับผู้อื่นและทำงานเป็นทีมได้ดี

หากมีประสบการณ์ด้าน lqa หรือ game qa จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

title: senior qa engineer

rank: senior associate, team lead

reports to: engineering manager

location type: onsite 100%

location: bangkok (head office – sathorn)

employment type: full-time, permanent




aura wellness group is one of thailand’s fastest-growing aesthetics and wellness platforms, with a portfolio that includes aura bangkok clinic, aura xpress, and aurasol wellness & spa. we serve both local and international clients with a full range of beauty, skin, and wellness solutions – from botox and fillers to laser treatments and spa programs.  from our head office in sathorn, we support a rapidly expanding network of clinics and wellness outlets in bangkok and key provinces. we are a performance-driven, yet friendly and collaborative organisation where ideas are valued, speed matters, and people who take ownership can grow quickly.




about the role 

we’re looking for a qa engineer to help us build a reliable and high-quality clinic platform across web, mobile, tablet, and api layers. 

this role goes beyond manual testing. you will work closely with product manager, designers, and engineers to improve requirement clarity, provide acceptance criteria, identify gaps early, and ensure that every release is safe and ready for production. 

you will play an important role from requirement discussion through release, with direct impact on product quality, workflow clarity, and release confidence. this is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys hands-on testing, cares deeply about quality, and wants to be part of a collaborative team where qa is involved early, not just at the end. 

this role is primarily focused on manual testing, with the opportunity to expand into test automation over time as the team and product continue to grow. 


what you’ll do:

perform manual testing across web, mobile, tablet, and api layers

design and execute risk-based test scenarios focused on real workflows such as payments, permissions, approvals, and data accuracy

create and maintain test cases for new features and regression coverage, using ai tools to draft and refine them before execution

review and double-check acceptance criteria (ac) to ensure they are clear, complete, and testable 

work closely with the product manager to help gather, refine, and clarify requirements and user stories 

join requirement discussions and provide qa input early in the process 

design and execute risk-based testing based on real workflows such as payments, permissions, approvals, and data accuracy 

validate data integrity across ui, apis, and database 

perform api testing using tools such as postman to verify functionality, response structure, error handling, and data flow 

write clear, detailed, and actionable bug reports with evidence, expected vs. actual result, and severity

review logs when needed and collaborate with developers to troubleshoot issues 

support regression testing, release validation, and post-release checking 

help improve team quality discipline around acceptance criteria, definition of done, release readiness, and continuous improvement 


must have:

5+ years experience in manual qa / software testing for web, mobile, or platform products 

strong ability to write test cases, test scenarios, and bug reports 

good understanding of user stories, acceptance criteria, and requirement validation 

able to use basic sql queries to verify and validate data during testing 

able to perform api testing using tools such as postman 

strong attention to detail and ability to spot edge cases, logic gaps, and unclear requirements 

comfortable working closely with product managers, designers, and engineers 

good communication skills and confidence in asking questions when something is unclear 



nice to have:

experience testing healthcare, clinic, operations, or workflow-based systems 

familiarity with logs review and basic troubleshooting with developers 

experience using ai tools to support test preparation 

interest in learning or growing into test automation in the future

title: data engineer

rank: senior associate, team lead

reports to: product manager

location type: 100% onsite

location: bangkok (head office – sathorn)

role type: full-time







build the operating system for wellness—starting from thailand, scaling globally.

aura wellness is creating a new tech startup to power the next decade of wellness services: aesthetic clinics, spas, longevity/anti-aging clinics, hospitals, and others.

this team will work directly under the ceo office, with fast decisions, direct access to real operating clinics for testing, and a clear multi-year roadmap. if you want to build a real clinic platform with real usage—not slideware.




about the role

we are looking for a data engineer to design, build, and own the data platform and pipelines that power analytics, reporting, and ai initiatives across aura wellness group’s four brands — aura bangkok clinic, aura xpress, solaura, and aurasol.

this is a foundational, hands-on role. you will build the data engineering practice largely from scratch, working closely with the software engineering team and business teams to turn raw data from our clinic, retail, and customer systems into reliable, governed, analytics-ready datasets.

the right person is comfortable owning the data platform end-to-end — from ingestion and transformation to data quality monitoring and bi enablement — and equally at ease working with business stakeholders to understand what the data needs to answer.





what you’ll do

design and build batch and near-real-time elt/etl pipelines to ingest data from source systems including sap s/4hana, pos, crm, opd records, and third-party apis — ensuring reliability, freshness slas, and automated alerting.

build and maintain a centralised data warehouse or lakehouse on a cloud provider (aws/gcp/azure) to serve bi, analytics, and ai workloads across all brands — including dimensional modelling and storage optimisation.

implement data quality checks, validation rules, and anomaly detection so business teams can trust the data they rely on for decisions.

apply appropriate technical controls — masking, encryption, access logging — for highly sensitive data, in coordination with the information security & governance team.

partner with bi analysts to deliver clean, well-modelled datasets that power dashboards and visualisations across tools such as powerbi, tableau, and metabase — for executive, operational, and clinical reporting across the group.

build reusable dbt models and a shared data catalogue so analysts can find, understand, and use data independently — reducing duplication and enforcing consistent business logic.

manage and evolve the data platform infrastructure on cloud using infrastructure-as-code, with monitoring, cost management, and dr coverage.

prepare feature-ready datasets to support ai/ml use cases including customer segmentation, churn prediction, and treatment recommendation — as the group’s ai roadmap matures.

maintain pipeline documentation, data lineage records, and data dictionaries for all managed sources; contribute to data auditability requirements.


must have

bachelor’s degree or higher in computer science, data engineering, information systems, statistics, or a related field.

3–5 years of hands-on data engineering experience in a production environment, with end-to-end ownership of pipelines from ingestion through to bi consumption.

proficiency in python for data engineering tasks (pandas, pyspark, boto3) and strong sql skills for data modelling and transformation.

hands-on experience with a pipeline orchestration framework — apache airflow, aws glue, prefect, or equivalent— supporting both batch and near-real-time ingestion patterns based on business requirements.

experience designing and querying a cloud data warehouse or lakehouse — amazon redshift, snowflake, databricks, bigquery, or delta lake/apache iceberg — including schema design and query optimisation.

experience with dbt or equivalent sql transformation frameworks for building tested, documented, reusable data models.

working experience on a cloud data platform (aws, gcp, or azure) with an understanding of data security best practices and cost management.


nice to have

experience ingesting and integrating data from social media platforms and digital marketing channels into analytics pipelines.

experience extracting data from sap s/4hana via hana views, bw/4hana, or third-party sap connectors.

knowledge of healthcare or clinical data structures — opd records, appointment data, treatment and product catalogues.

aws, gcp, or azure data certification (e.g., aws certified data analytics specialty, google professional data engineer, or equivalent).





if you’re excited to build a category-defining wellness platform with real-world scale, direct access to live clinics, and ceo-level sponsorship, apply with your resume and a short note on the most operationally complex product you’ve shipped.

unlike many startups, this platform is backed by a profitable, scaled operator (aura bangkok clinic) —so we can move with startup speed, invest for the long term, and build the right foundations without being forced into quarter-by-quarter fundraising decisions.

Job_Title: IT Service Management Specialist / Manager Level
Job_Description:
key responsibilities (หน้าที่ความรับผิดชอบหลัก):

ตรวจสอบมาตรฐาน กำกับดูแล และบริหารจัดการด้าน it service management

บริหารจัดการเหตุการณ์สำคัญ (major incident) พร้อมประสานงานกับทีมที่เกี่ยวข้องเพื่อแก้ไขอย่างรวดเร็ว

ทำหน้าที่เป็นผู้จัดการปัญหาด้านเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ (problem manager)

Job_Title: IT Support Engineer / IT Support Officer
Job_Description:
we are hiring for an experienced it support engineer to work in a leading global company involved with medical technologies. they are highly regarded as a good place to work.




end user support for desktop, laptop and other devices.

support printer and network related issues. 

basic level support for server, network and other site specific it devices.

image and build desktops, laptops and mobile devices.

troubleshoot and repair software and hardware related problems.

handle service requests and incidents.

escalate issues to next level and coordinate resolution with other team members.

project working (installation, networks / cabling, machine staging etc).

support a/v equipment

maintain record of it inventory

monitor and update ticketing system

reporting as needed.




requirements

service minded

experience in windows 10/11 environement including office apps, teams, a/v

able to resolve printer issues, basic network issues.

able to help diagnose and resolve user issues.

trustworthy

can communicate in english (basic-medium level minimum).




benefits

opportunity to learn new sklls

5 day work week

medical insurance

laptop provided

good staff welfare

about agoda 

agoda is an online travel booking platform for accommodations, flights, and more. we build and deploy cutting-edge technology that connects travelers with a global network of 4.7m hotels and holiday properties worldwide, plus flights, activities, and more. based in asia and part of booking holdings, our 7,100+ employees representing 95+ nationalities in 27 markets foster a work environment rich in diversity, creativity, and collaboration. we innovate through a culture of experimentation and ownership, enhancing the ability for our customers to experience the world.

our purpose - bridging the world through travel 

we believe travel allows people to enjoy, learn and experience more of the amazing world we live in. it brings individuals and cultures closer together, fostering empathy, understanding and happiness.
we are a skillful, driven and diverse team from across the globe, united by a passion to make an impact. harnessing our innovative technologies and strong partnerships, we aim to make travel easy and rewarding for everyone.

the opportunity:  

agoda is looking for a talent who is interested in knowing how we manage database infrastructure for 1000+ database servers with milliseconds response time and more than 99.9999% uptime of mssql server databases. you will be involved in the database design, data managing and database development with automated database continuous integration/continuous delivery (ci/cd) pipelines. you will learn how to build a docker image for the product development team in order to use it in their development life cycle. 

this role is a 6-month contract based in bangkok, thailand and the succeeded candidate will be assigned to the project.

in this role, you'll get to:   

build database docker in different engines to provide for developers to use in their development 

develop database sql code with quality and performance optimization  

setup, migrate, and re-architect agoda production database to support business growth. 

proactive monitoring is used to detect unusual behavior on the production database, i.e., high query resource usage, unusual database traffic, and database server capacity, and coordinate with the engineering team to optimize query performance before it affects user experience.  

research and implement automation tools to help reduce human time daily, i.e., installation and upgrade tool, database deployment tool, anomaly detection, etc.  

 what you'll need to succeed:  

b.sc. in computer science / information systems / computer engineering or related field

fresh graduates are welcome to apply. preferably less than two years of experience.

understand database design concepts, er diagrams, and ability to write sql query 

love to solve problems with good analysis skills and always try to make things better  

familiar with relational and/or non-relational databases  

excellent english written and verbal communication  

 it's great if you have:  

have knowledge about database high availability or query performance tuning  

knowledge of docker or kubernetes  

practical knowledge of database management, windows, powershell, linux, and shell script  

proficient in python 

#bangkok #it #entrylevel

n-infinite is looking for a high-calibre analytical talent to drive performance and profitability across our food delivery portfolio. you will be responsible for designing and optimizing investment strategies across delivery platforms, managing advertising and promotional spend as structured capital allocation decisions. 

the ideal candidate combines strong quantitative ability with commercial judgment and a high level of ownership.

key responsibilities

own advertising and promotional strategies across grab, line man wongnai and shoppeefood from budget decisions to execution to results

dig into performance data daily to identify what's working, what isn't, and what to do about it

develop scalable playbooks and strategies from performance learnings that can be applied across the wider portfolio

manage relationships with restaurant partners and lead performance reviews with confidence

work cross-functionally to align strategy and flag risks before they become problems

understand how platform mechanics, promotional levers, and ad spend interact to drive p&l outcomes

take initiative on process improvements if there's a smarter way to work, we want you to build it

requirements

bachelor's degree in finance, economics, business, engineering, mathematics, data, or a related quantitative discipline

strong mathematical and analytical capability with a structured and logical approach to problem-solving

advanced excel proficiency including pivot tables, lookup functions, and analytical modeling

demonstrated ownership mindset able to manage multiple priorities, meet deadlines, and follow through independently

strong communication skills in both thai and english

experience in e-commerce, digital marketing, or food delivery platforms is an advantage but not required

fresh graduates with strong quantitative backgrounds are encouraged to apply

about us:

n-infinite is a growth partner for leading restaurant brands in thailand. we work alongside restaurant owners to scale their delivery businesses across major platforms such as grab, line man wongnai, and shopeefood.

by combining data analytics, pricing strategy, and operational expertise, our team helps restaurants optimize unit economics, grow revenue, and expand into new markets. our team brings together specialists in strategy, data, marketing, and operations who collaborate closely with brand founders to solve real business problems and unlock sustainable growth.

if you’re looking for a fast-paced environment where you can take ownership, work directly with business owners, and see the real impact of your decisions, n-infinite offers a unique opportunity to build and scale the next generation of restaurant brands.

apply now: ready to spice up your game? drop us a your resume sharing why you’re the perfect match for n-infinite and this role. email your application to recruit@n-infinite.com

at alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. from high-speed trains, metros, monorails, and trams, to turnkey systems, services, infrastructure, signalling and digital mobility, we offer our diverse customers the broadest portfolio in the industry. every day, 80,000 colleagues lead the way to greener and smarter mobility worldwide, connecting cities as we reduce carbon and replace cars.




could you be the full-time software architect in bangkok we’re looking for?

your future role

take on a new challenge and apply your software development expertise in a cutting-edge field. you’ll work alongside collaborative, innovative, and resourceful teammates.

you'll play a pivotal role in shaping the future of railway signalling systems by contributing to the development of alstom's healthhub product, which enhances monitoring and maintenance capabilities for signalling equipment. day-to-day, you’ll work closely with teams across the business (bangkok, france, and india) to ensure healthhub meets user expectations and delivers value for railway operators and maintainers, define software requirements, and much more.

you’ll specifically take care of elaborating and maintaining the software architecture of the healthhub software with a focus on configurability, but also implementing, testing, and delivering full-stack software within a complex software platform.

we’ll look to you for:

deeply understanding system requirements and defining software requirements accordingly

elaborating and maintaining the software architecture of healthhub software

defining software internal interface specifications

implementing, testing, and delivering full-stack software

managing configurations and deployments of applications

participating in technical meetings with system and software engineers across multiple global locations


all about you

we value passion and attitude over experience. that’s why we don’t expect you to have every single skill. instead, we’ve listed some that we think will help you succeed and grow in this role:

bachelor's or master's degree in computer engineering, software engineering, electrical engineering, electronic engineering, information systems, telecommunications, or a related field

experience in railway signalling systems

proficiency in programming languages such as c# and python

proven experience in web application development, including docker, javascript, and sql/nosql databases

knowledge of kubernetes (a plus)

experience with ci/cd configuration using gitlab

knowledge of network engineering

professional working proficiency (or above) in english

soft skills: autonomous, thorough, team-oriented, curious, quick learner, communicative, and resourceful


things you’ll enjoy join us on a life-long transformative journey – the rail industry is here to stay, so you can grow and develop new skills and experiences throughout your career. you’ll also:

enjoy stability, challenges and a long-term career free from boring daily routines

work with new security standards for rail signalling

collaborate with transverse teams and helpful colleagues

contribute to innovative projects

utilise our flexible and inclusive working environment

steer your career in whatever direction you choose across functions and countries

benefit from our investment in your development, through award-winning learning

progress towards senior leadership or expert technical roles

benefit from a fair and dynamic reward package that recognises your performance and potential, plus comprehensive and competitive social coverage (life, medical, pension)




you don’t need to be a train enthusiast to thrive with us. we guarantee that when you step onto one of our trains with your friends or family, you’ll be proud. if you’re up for the challenge, we’d love to hear from you!


important to note

as a global business, we’re an equal-opportunity employer that celebrates diversity across the 63 countries we operate in. we’re committed to creating an inclusive workplace for everyone.

Job_Description:
project manager (เจ้าหน้าที่บริหารโครงการเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ)

objectives of the position

บริหารโครงการที่ได้รับมอบหมาย ทั้งการวางแผนโครงการ จัดลำดับความสำคัญของโครงการ ติดตามตรวจสอบ ควบคุมเกี่ยวกับระยะเวลาการดำเนินงาน ค่าใช้จ่าย การใช้ทรัพยากร ความเสี่ยงด้านการปฏิบัติงานและด้านอื่น ๆ ของโครงการ ประสานงานกับผู้พัฒนาระบบ ผู้ใช้งาน และ vendor เพื่อจัดการงาน / โครงการที่ได้รับมอบหมายให้บรรลุตามเป้าหมาย




duties & responsibilities

1. ศึกษาความเป็นไปได้ (feasibility study) ของโครงการ ศึกษาถึงความจำเป็นและประโยชน์ที่คาดว่าจะได้รับของโครงการที่มีการนำเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศมาใช้

2. จัดลำดับความสำคัญของโครงการ ประเมินความเสี่ยงโครงการด้านเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ และผลกระทบที่อาจเกิดขึ้นกับฝ่ายงาน และระบบที่เกี่ยวข้อง วางแผนการดำเนินงานโครงการเพื่อให้มีการใช้ทรัพยากรอย่างคุ้มค่า

3. ควบคุมและติดตามการบริหารโครงการด้านเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ จัดทำรายงานความคืบหน้าโครงการ หรือการเปลี่ยนแปลงโครงการด้านเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศเพื่อใช้นำเสนอต่อผู้บริหาร

4. ดำเนินงานที่เกี่ยวกับการปิดโครงการด้านเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ ประสานงานรวบรวมข้อมูลเพื่อสรุปสิ่งที่ได้เรียนรู้จากโครงการด้านเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ

5. ควบคุมและติดตามการบริหารโครงการด้านเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศให้เป็นไปตามนโยบายบริหารจัดการทรัพยากรด้านเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ

we need a software project manager to bridge technical execution with business goals by:

ensuring on-time, on-budget delivery of high-quality software products.

optimising agile/devops processes to accelerate release cycles.

aligning cross-functional teams (application support, ux/ui design, developers, sa, qa) toward common objectives.

mitigating risks and resolving bottlenecks in software development lifecycles.

provide transparent updates to leadership via dashboards and kpis (e.g., velocity, burn-down charts).

translate technical jargon into business impact for non-tech stakeholders.

refine agile/devops practices to boost team productivity.

mentor pc/team members on best practices.




skills and experience:

bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, information systems, or a related technical field.

5+ years experienced in software project management (agile/scrum environments).

hands-on experience with jira, clickup, git, ci/cd tools.

strong understanding of sdlc, apis, cloud architecture, and databases.

domain expertise in [e.g., crm, pos, ecommerce].

pmp/cspo/csm certification or equivalent would be advantage.

knowledge of retails business.

experience in zendesk, cognizant, salesforce, pos/kiosk, and erp would be advantage.

english communication (toeic 700+)

Job_Title: AI Engineer (Digital Transformation) ประจำสีลม
Job_Description:
level : middle - manager

key responsibilities for ai engineer

develop and fine-tune ai models for natural language processing (nlp), image

recognition, and audio processing.

write programs to cleanse, label, and integrate diverse datasets (text, images, audio) in an efficient and reusable manner.

build and test services incorporating anomaly detection and ml models into production environments.

technical research: stay updated on the latest developments in tools like tensorflow, pytorch, and keras

by reading documentation and technical papers

qualifications

bachelor’s degree in ai /ml, computer science, data science, or a related quantitative field.

experienced in 1–3 years of hands-on experience in ai/ml implementation.

strong proficiency in python and familiarity with software development best practices.

solid understanding of deep learning concepts and frameworks (e.g., pytorch, tensorflow).

basic experience or strong interest in natural language processing(nlp), computer vision (e.g., opencv) and audio processing.

familiarity with azure ai services or other cloud platforms (aws/gcp).


key responsibilities for ai manager

lead the development of ai solutions incorporating computer vision, audio/speech processing, and natural language processing (nlp) to optimize business processes.

oversee the full ai lifecycle: from data cleansing and integration to model deployment and continuous monitoring.

implement cutting-edge frameworks such as agentic ai, multi-agent systems, and rag to solve complex enterprise problems.

oversee production-grade deployment using modern mlops / llmops frameworks to

ensure scalable ai architecture.

identify and prioritize ai use cases that drive revenue growth and cost optimization, translating business needs into technical roadmaps.

establish ai development standards and ensure solutions comply with data privacy, security, and regulatory requirements

qualifications

master’s degree or above in ai /ml, computer science, data science, or a related quantitative field.

experienced in 5–8 years in software or ai-related roles, with a proven track record of deploying productiongrade

ai systems.

strong knowledge of machine learning/deep learning, large language models (llm), and computer vision/audio processing techniques.

proficiency with azure cloud and ai services (e.g., azure openai, azure functions, azure data factory, and microsoft fabric).

expert in python and ml frameworks such as tensorflow, pytorch, or jax, along with orchestration tools (langchain, langgraph)

experience with vector databases (e.g., qdrant) and designing api-based, scalable architectures.

the business analyst intern will support healthcare consulting projects by working closely with cross-functional teams to deliver insights and solutions to healthcare clients. this role provides hands-on experience in healthcare business analysis, technology, and system implementation.

support healthcare technology intelligence initiatives, particularly in pharmacy and/or related healthcare areas.

support business requirement analysis, process mapping, and documentation for health information system (his) projects.

qualifications

currently studying in 3rd or 4th year of a bachelor’s degree (preferably in business analysis, healthcare management, it, or related fields).

good command of both thai and english, with strong written and verbal communication skills.

full stack developer

title: ai & full stack engineer

reports to: engineering manager

location: bangkok (head office – sathorn)

employment type: full-time, permanent




aura wellness group is one of thailand’s fastest-growing aesthetics and wellness platforms, with a portfolio that includes aura bangkok clinic, aura xpress, and aurasol wellness & spa. we serve both local and international clients with a full range of beauty, skin, and wellness solutions – from botox and fillers to laser treatments and spa programs.  from our head office in sathorn, we support a rapidly expanding network of clinics and wellness outlets in bangkok and key provinces. we are a performance-driven, yet friendly and collaborative organisation where ideas are valued, speed matters, and people who take ownership can grow quickly.




role purpose

build and ship ai tools that improve internal workflow efficiency, customer experiences, and more. you'll apply and fine-tune foundation models, leverage ml/dl techniques to solve complex business problems, and take use cases from idea → production with measurable impact, reliability, and safe handling of sensitive data.




key responsibilities

develop, fine-tune, and deploy ai/ml models for real-world business use cases e.g. demand forecasting and manpower planning.

own the end-to-end ml lifecycle — from data preparation, model development, and fine-tuning, through to building production-ready tools and deploying to scalable infrastructure.

implement retrieval-augmented generation (rag) from approved knowledge sources to reduce hallucinations and improve accuracy.

build evaluation and monitoring for quality, latency, and cost; iterate quickly based on real usage.

implement security/privacy patterns: role-based access, pii redaction, audit logs, and data retention (pdpa-aware).

collaborate with product teams to develop and ship product features, contributing across the full development lifecycle as needed.




qualifications

experience: 2+ years of experience in software/ml engineering with a proven track record of production delivery.

strong engineering foundation: demonstrated programming experience in python, go, or similar languages, with strong proficiency in sql.

ai & ml expertise: a strong background in foundation ml and ai, with hands-on experience building production-grade ai systems using generative ai frameworks and libraries in real-world business environments.

cloud experience: hands-on experience with cloud computing platforms such as google cloud, aws, or azure.

communication skills: ability to clearly articulate ideas and solutions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

agentic frameworks & architecture: proven expertise in building agentic ai systems using frameworks (e.g., langgraph, autogen, crewai), with a strong grasp of implementing architectural guardrails and safety layers for complex enterprise tasks.




life at aura

semi-flexible office hour: 9.30-18.30

smart casual dress code  

2-min walk from bts chongnonsi (sathon)

premium health and life insurance with family benefits

high yield, high pop up provident fund plan

child education benefits

travel allowance

clinic service for free or at great cost.

extra benefits to keep your professional look and feel fit.

free lunch (select days).

positive-energetic teammates

entertainment zone; nintendo switch, ps, board games etc.

shower room with hotel amenities.

luxury massage chair to keep office syndrome away

sleep box, take a rest and get up with fresher energy

Job_Title: Software Engineer/Developer (Fullstack) – Junior to Mid Level (Work Hybrid)
Job_Description:
software developer (c#, angular) – junior to mid level

location: true digital park, bts punnawithi (hybrid)
experience: 0–4 years

about the role

we are looking for fresh graduates, junior, and mid-level software developers who want to grow from learning core development fundamentals into owning features end-to-end.

in this role, you will work on real production systems using c#, .net, and angular, collaborating closely with senior developers, qa, and product teams. fresh graduates and junior developers will focus on building strong foundations in clean coding, testing, and development workflows with close guidance, while mid-level developers are expected to take increasing ownership of technical decisions, quality, and production readiness.

this role suits engineers who are curious, responsible, and willing to learn through real-world problem solving, feedback, and iteration — not just classroom knowledge. you will be supported by clear standards, mentoring, and code reviews, with clear expectations as you grow.

responsibilities

develop and maintain web applications using c#, .net, and angular.

implement assigned features with a clear understanding of requirements, constraints, expected outcomes, and timelines.

write clean, readable, and maintainable code that follows team standards and best practices.

participate in the full software development lifecycle, from development and testing to deployment and production support.

collaborate with product managers, qa, and other developers to clarify requirements and deliver high-quality solutions.

test own code thoroughly to ensure correctness, stability, and performance before qa handover.

identify, fix, and re-test defects related to owned features to prevent regressions.

support releases and monitor production behavior related to owned features, responding to issues when needed.

 

additional expectations by level

junior developer

deliver assigned tasks with guidance and code reviews from senior team members.

learn the system, codebase, and development practices quickly through hands-on work and feedback.

follow defined development, testing, and release processes.

communicate progress, risks, and blockers early.

mid-level developer

deliver features end-to-end, from requirement clarification to production release.

translate business requirements into clear technical solutions and resolve ambiguities early.

design and implement solutions with consideration for performance, scalability, and failure scenarios.

take ownership of quality, production readiness, and operational impact of owned features.

participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback to other developers.

qualifications

bachelor’s degree in computer science, computer engineering, it, or a related field

fresh graduate / junior:

ability to work on fullstack development with strong coding skills (particularly in c#, .net, react native; angular is a plus, but we are open to all stacks depending on your technical skills).

no minimum years of experience required for fresh graduates.

mid-level:

2–4 years of hands-on software development experience.

hands-on experience with c#, .net, and angular.

experience working with sql databases and data management.

understanding of software development fundamentals, clean code principles, and basic testing practices.

self-motivated, responsible, and able to learn quickly through hands-on work and feedback.

english proficiency, both written and spoken, at a working level is preferred (fluency is not required).




nice to have

experience with react native or other front-end frameworks.

familiarity with reporting tools or data-related features.

experience working in agile/scrum teams.

positive learning attitude, able to work under pressure with defined deadlines while maintaining high standards of quality.

interest in fintech or enterprise software products.

Job_Title: วิศวกรดูแลระบบการเงิน (Financial Application Support Engineer)
Job_Description:
1. ให้การสนับสนุนผู้ใช้งานระบบแอปพลิเคชันด้าน การเงิน (financial systems) และแก้ไขปัญหาที่เกิดขึ้นระหว่างการใช้งาน เช่น การใช้งานระบบ กระบวนการทางธุรกิจ (business logic) ขั้นตอนการทำงาน (workflow) และข้อผิดพลาดของระบบ

2. วิเคราะห์ปัญหา ให้คำแนะนำหรือจัดทำคู่มือการใช้งานแก่ผู้ใช้ พร้อมติดตามการแก้ไขปัญหาจนเสร็จสิ้น และรับการประเมินความพึงพอใจจากผู้ใช้งาน

3. มีความเข้าใจและเคยใช้งานระบบ oracle ebs financial modules เช่น

ap – accounts payable

ar – accounts receivable

gl – general ledger

fa – fixed assets

cst – cost management

4. ให้การสนับสนุนผู้ใช้งานโรงงานในภูมิภาค apac ได้แก่ ไทย เวียดนาม และอินโดนีเซีย หากไม่สามารถแก้ไขปัญหาได้หน้างาน ต้องดำเนินการ incident escalation และประสานงานกับทีมสำนักงานใหญ่ (l1) เพื่อแก้ไข ticket

5. ดูแลและติดตามกระบวนการแก้ไข ticket ให้เสร็จสมบูรณ์ครบวงจร (end-to-end closed loop)

6. ให้คำปรึกษาเกี่ยวกับกระบวนการทางธุรกิจและมาตรฐานการใช้งานระบบ it

7. ติดตามผลหลังจากมีการปรับปรุงหรือแก้ไขระบบที่เกี่ยวข้องกับ incident / change

8. จัดอบรมการใช้งานระบบให้กับผู้ใช้งานทั่วไปและ key user

9. ปรับปรุงและเพิ่มเติมข้อมูลคำถามหรือปัญหาที่ระบบ ai / chatbot ยังไม่สามารถตอบได้ เพื่อเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพในการให้บริการ

ตำแหน่งนี้เป็นการจ้างงานแบบ outsource โดยสังกัดบริษัทผู้ให้บริการ แต่เข้าไปปฏิบัติงานประจำที่บริษัท toshiba consumer products (thailand) co., ltd เพื่อดูแลและสนับสนุนระบบการเงิน (financial application support)

Job_Description:
an established international technology organization recognized for its leadership in intelligent automation solutions is selectively identifying a technical solutions consultant to support its continued expansion across thailand’s advanced manufacturing sector.

this appointment is particularly suited to engineers who are comfortable operating at the intersection of customer application design, technical consulting, and solution deployment, and who are motivated by working with globally respected technologies in precision automation environments.

the role offers meaningful exposure to complex customer applications together with close collaboration alongside regional technical specialists across the asia-pacific network.

key scope of responsibility

engage directly with industrial customers to assess application requirements and operational challenges

develop tailored automation solution concepts aligned with production objectives

support technical evaluation activities including demonstrations, validation trials, and proof-of-concept initiatives

provide structured engineering consultation across both pre-implementation and deployment stages

partner with internal commercial and technical stakeholders to strengthen overall solution positioning

translate engineering specifications into clear solution strategies for customer decision-makers

maintain awareness of developments across smart manufacturing and industrial automation technologies

contribute technical insight toward the continuous enhancement of solution frameworks and customer engagement approaches

this opportunity will suit professionals who bring:

a degree in electrical engineering, automation engineering, control engineering, instrumentation, mechatronics, or a related discipline

approximately 2–5 years of experience supporting industrial applications, automation platforms, sensing technologies, or technical solution environments

exposure to factory automation systems, industrial sensors, machine integration, or control-related applications

confidence working within customer-facing technical environments

strong analytical thinking and structured troubleshooting capability

a collaborative working style within cross-functional technical teams

interest in emerging industry 4.0 / smart manufacturing ecosystems

prior experience supporting application validation, customization activities, or technical solution demonstrations will be viewed favorably.

pipeline development: design, develop, and optimize robust etl/elt pipelines using python, pandas, and pyspark to handle massive datasets.

big data ecosystem: proven experience with apache spark (pyspark) for distributed data processing.

workflow orchestration: hands-on experience building and managing workflows in apache airflow.

devops & tools: proficiency with docker (dockerfile, compose) and version control via git (gitlab).

analytical skills: strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and a growth mindset

scalability: experience scaling data applications in a production environment.

data observability: knowledge of monitoring tools for data health and pipeline performance.

about the company:

factorytalk is an award winning software implementation, development, and consulting firm specializing in supporting life sciences manufacturers in industries such as pharmaceuticals, biotech, and medical devices. 

the company is headquartered in bangkok, thailand, with a subsidiary in the uk. it provides solutions using a variety of own software, partner products, consulting and development services, for major projects in asia, europe, and globally for local and multi-national customers. we are looking for highly motivated people to join our team to deliver business process excellence through digitalisation that improves manufacturing and quality.




job description:

you will become a specialist solutions engineer, installing, configuring, and delivering key systems and applications for worldwide life science customers. these tools are known as electronic quality management systems (eqms), electronic submission (esub), and electronic batch records (ebr). you will learn and enhance your engineering background while developing technical skills and understanding of the business requirements for this industry. you will work with a highly experienced team from factorytalk, and become an expert in delivering best-in-class solutions for customers.

our work mode is flexible, mostly remotely and from one of our offices, with travel to customer locations for key project meetings.

the solutions engineer collaborates within their team, working alongside a project lead and manager, customer’s teams and colleagues to install, configure, test, and provide training.




qualification requirements:

a bachelor's degree in information technology, computer science, or a related discipline. relevant experience is advantageous (see detail in beneficial requirement). 

fundamental understanding of computer science, software technologies, software configuration, integrations, and testing.

demonstrated ability to manage assigned work by allocating sufficient time, resulting in the ultimate benefit of requiring less supervision. this is underpinned by a strong commitment to delivering work on time with high quality.

adaptability and flexibility in responding to shifting priorities and challenges. 

ability to work internationally and communicate technical topics to business stakeholders and clients in an intuitive way.

comfortable collaborating with customers, partners, and internal resources through to project delivery.




beneficial requirements:

understanding of quality system in pharmaceutical industry and/or life sciences manufacturing.

experience with any electronic quality management system (eqms), electronic submission (esubmission), or electronic batch record (ebr).




key responsibilities:

lead and/or participate to ensure the production of high-quality system deliverables for customers within the specified timeframe and with high quality.

install, configure, testing, and provide training to customers. 

track configuration, test progression, and incidents, checking the quality against established standards and procedures.

create and maintain project documentation with completeness and accuracy.

communicate with project manager/team members/customer on the progress of assignments on the agreed schedules. alert project manager in advance when deliverables may not be achieved to allow enough time for the sensible course of action.

provide training for clients and educate them about system usage and maintenance.

take consideration on critical impacts to the project/ product’s quality/ effort and align understanding and actions with project manager.

support cases that arise during the operation and maintenance period by coordinating with senior system consultants and system partners.

competitive salary and benefits packages

healthcare

company trips

personal development, education, and professional training support

about us 




at exxonmobil, our vision is to lead in energy innovations that advance modern living and a net-zero future. as one of the world’s largest publicly traded energy and chemical companies, we are powered by a unique and diverse workforce fueled by the pride in what we do and what we stand for.




the success of our upstream, product solutions and low carbon solutions businesses is the result of the talent, curiosity and drive of our people. they bring solutions every day to optimize our strategy in energy, chemicals, lubricants and lower-emissions technologies.




we invite you to bring your ideas to exxonmobil to help create sustainable solutions that improve quality of life and meet society’s evolving needs. learn more about our what and our why and how we can work together




exxonmobil in thailand

 

we have provided quality essential products that facilitated thailand’s socio-economy development and helped thais improve their living standards for more than 130 years.

Job_Title: Senior IT Incident & Problem Management Associate
Job_Description:
the mission

in the fast-paced world of fintech, stability is our reputation. we are seeking a seasoned incident commander to safeguard our financial services. your role is to be the steady hand during service disruptions and the lead investigator ensuring those disruptions never happen twice. working within the itil framework, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to mitigate service disruptions and maintain high availability for our customers.

key responsibilities

incident leadership: act as the primary lead for service recovery, managing the end-to-end lifecycle to ensure restoration within target slas.

stakeholder coordination: serve as the central point of contact between internal it teams, external vendors, and business stakeholders.

clear communication: translate complex technical issues into professional, "human-readable" status updates for executive leadership and external partners.

root cause analysis (rca): lead post-incident reviews to identify underlying issues and document findings, and compose detailed incident reports.

proactive problem management: analyze incident trends to eliminate technical debt. follow up on "action items" from rcas to ensure long-term system stability.

operational excellence: develop technical recovery playbooks and sops to ensure the team operates with precision and consistency.

requirements & prerequisites

experience: 1–5years in incident/problem management, it ops, or l2/l3 service desk.

technical foundation: a bachelor’s degree in computer science or it. you should be conversant in cloud, apis, and databases to lead technical discussions effectively.

framework knowledge: proficiency in itsm tools and a solid grasp of itil frameworks. ability to learn independently and thrive with minimal supervision.

communication: strong command of both thai and english (written and verbal).

resilience: the ability to remain calm and decisive under high-pressure, time-sensitive situations. demonstrate a strong sense of urgency and ownership in driving incident resolution, ensuring minimal impact on business operations and customers.

soft skills: high resilience under pressure, a strong sense of urgency, and a "can-do" attitude in a 360-degree feedback environment. strong analytical and critical thinking skills to navigate complex technical issues.

bonus: background in banking/fintech or a frequent user of the truemoney app.

please note this role adopts a rotation on-call support during non-business hours and weekends.

at alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. from high-speed trains, metros, monorails, and trams, to turnkey systems, services, infrastructure, signalling, and digital mobility, we offer our diverse customers the broadest portfolio in the industry. every day, 80,000 colleagues lead the way to greener and smarter mobility worldwide, connecting cities as we reduce carbon and replace cars.

could you be the full-time system architect in bangkok we’re looking for?

your future role

you’ll specifically take care of system design and specifications, but also oversee technical reviews and decisions.

supporting workload estimations and contributing to continuous improvement initiatives

degree in engineering or a related field

comprehensive hmi/dmi development experience

ability to work transversally with engineering teams

knowledge of system design for safety and ram compliance

expertise in system engineering techniques

strong english communication skills

*** รับสมัครงาน qa / software tester *** เงินเดือน 20,000 - 45,000 บาท

qa hive ให้บริการทดสอบระบบของลูกค้าด้วย automated testing ในหลากหลายธุรกิจ อาทิ ecommerce, ธุรกิจประกัน, การเงิน ซึ่ง ทีม qa เปรียบเสมือนหัวใจหลักในการควบคุมคุณภาพ software ของลูกค้า
ทีม qa มีหน้าที่ในการพัฒนา automated test script เราใช้ test framework อาทิ robot framework, cucumber และ spec flow อีกทั้งทีมยังมีการพัฒนา test library ขึ้นมาใช้เอง
การทำงานภายในทีม จะใช้รูปแบบ scrum process โดยทีมจะทำงานร่วมกันอย่างใกล้ชิดกับ product owner และ development team

business philosophy:

ความสำเร็จของลูกค้า คือความสำเร็จของเรา

งานของเราช่วยสร้างความเชื่อมั่นในด้านคุณภาพให้กับงานของลูกค้า ด้วยการตรวจสอบที่ครบถ้วน อีกทั้งช่วยลดภาระการทำงานในแต่ละวันได้จริง

พนักงานซื่อสัตย์ จริงใจต่อตัวเองและผู้อื่น เพื่อสร้างบรรยากาศของการทำงานร่วมกัน ช่วยเหลือซึ่งกันและกัน

พนักงานทุกคนเรียนรู้ และพัฒนาการทำงานให้ได้ประสิทธิภาพมากขึ้น เพื่อทำให้สามารถพัฒนางานที่มีคุณภาพ เพื่อส่งมอบให้กับลูกค้า

responsibilities:

design test case ตาม business requirement ไปจนถึง create automated test script สำหรับ web application และ mobile application

execute smoke test, regression test และ จัดส่ง test report

ดูแล และให้คำปรึกษากับ qa ในทีม

สามารถสื่อสาร และแบ่งงานกับสมาชิกในทีม

จัดทำรายงาน ความคืบหน้าของโปรเจค

สามารถเดินทางเพื่อไป on-site ลูกค้าได้

qualifications:

ปริญญาตรีสาขาวิศวกรรมหรือวิทยาศาสตร์คอมพิวเตอร์ หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

มีความรู้และเข้าใจอย่างถูกต้องในเรื่อง การทดสอบระบบ, design test case, test execution รวมถึง test report

เข้าใจหน้าที่ ความรับผิดชอบของ qa ใน software development life cycle

มี growth mindset และยินดีที่จะเรียนรู้สิ่งใหม่ๆ และสอนให้กับคนอื่นได้

สามารถสื่อสารภาษาอังกฤษได้

สามารถทำงานภายใต้สภาวะกดดันได้

หากไม่มีความรู้ด้าน automated test ไม่เป็นไร เรามีผู้ช่วยเหลือและที่ปรึกษา พร้อมแผนการพัฒนาทักษะให้คุณโดยเฉพาะ

ยินดีพิจารณาเด็กจบใหม่

qualifications plus:

 มีประสบการณ์ manual test 0 - 2 ปี

 มีประสบการณ์ทำงานกับ automated test framework ในการทดสอบระบบ web application หรือ mobile application

 สามารถใช้ภาษา python, c# หรือ groovy เพื่อพัฒนาโปรแกรมได้อย่างชำนาญ

 มีความรู้ความเข้าใจการเขียน โปรแกรม เชิง oop เป็นอย่างดี

สามารถสื่อสารภาษาอังกฤษกับลูกค้าต่างชาติได้

welcome to our crafting & supply
the magic happens at our crafting facilities, where we combine centuries-old crafting traditions and high-quality materials with modern production techniques. you will be warmly greeted with over 13,000 craftspeople who are excellent at crafting and supplying the world’s largest jewellery brand with our craftsmanship. 

join a team that is as diverse and inclusive as our jewellery. we believe and value creative thinking and ensure that there’s equitable opportunities for all.

• foster your growth and craft opportunities through our learning and development programmes.

• at pandora, no effort or contribution goes unnoticed. we offer a wide range of opportunities and benefits to ensure that our employees feel valued, supported, and cared for.

• transportation services are also available to drop you at the closet bts station and other community areas.

about pandora crafting & supply

pandora started crafting its jewellery in thailand in 1989, where our founders fell in love with the delicate craftsmanship of the thai people. to date, there are two crafting facilities in thailand, bangkok, and lamphun, and we employ more than 13,000 skilled craftspeople. by the end of 2023, there are 107 million pieces sold globally, all of which were hand-finished here in thailand by our skilled craftspeople using high-quality raw materials and sustainable methods.

about pandora group

pandora is the world’s largest jewellery brand. designed in denmark and crafted in thailand, pandora jewellery provides endless opportunities for personalisation, allowing people to express their passions and show who they are. the company’s products are made from high-quality materials and sold in more than 100 countries through 6,700 points of sale, including 2,600 concept stores.

pandora is committed to leadership in sustainability and is sourcing lab-grown stones and recycled silver and gold for all its jewellery. headquartered in copenhagen, denmark, pandora employs 33,000 people worldwide, is listed on the nasdaq copenhagen stock exchange, and generated sales of dkk 28.1 billion (eur 3.8 billion) in 2023.

rank: manager


role overview
we are looking for an information security & governance manager to build and lead the company’s security and it governance function from the ground up across all four brands. this is a first-in-role position reporting to the head of tech, with broad ownership spanning security policy, enterprise controls, cloud security, third-party risk, and day-to-day it governance operations.

this role is directly responsible for execution — not just oversight. you will design the frameworks, implement the controls, run the programs, and own the outcomes. at the same time, you will need to communicate clearly with non-technical stakeholders and help the organization build a genuine security culture.

the right person is equally comfortable writing a policy framework, configuring a cloud security baseline, running a phishing simulation, and sitting across the table from a vendor to negotiate data protection terms.


key responsibilities:

build and own the company’s information security policy framework — policies, standards, guidelines, and procedures — across all brands. ensure policies are current, communicated organization-wide, and translated into measurable day-to-day controls.

establish and enforce data governance rules covering access to sensitive information, including patient treatment records, cctv footage, and shared company files, in compliance with pdpa section 26.

develop and maintain a business continuity plan (bcp) with related business units covering critical systems and data, including recovery priorities, escalation procedures, and periodic testing to ensure the organization can sustain operations during disruptions.

design, implement, and manage enterprise security controls covering both logical controls (iam, endpoint protection, dlp, email security, conditional access) and physical controls (access card systems, cctv governance, clean desk policies).

design, deploy, and manage network security architecture (firewalls, network segmentation, vpn, dns filtering, ids/ips) and cloud security across aws and azure/m365 environments, including identity governance, security configuration baselines, encryption controls, and cspm.

design and implement microsoft 365 compliance controls, including data classification, retention policies, dlp rules, sensitivity labels, and purview configurations.

identify security risks, vulnerabilities, and control gaps through continuous monitoring. prioritize and drive remediation with relevant teams, and formally document all security incidents to build a record of control effectiveness.

lead third-party risk management: assess the security posture of technology vendors, saas platforms, and external service providers at onboarding and on a periodic review cycle. define vendor security requirements and ensure contractual data protection obligations align with the company’s risk appetite.

design and manage an organization-wide security awareness training program, including onboarding induction, phishing simulation exercises, and targeted training for high-risk roles. track completion rates and use results to improve controls.

plan and manage security testing activities — vulnerability assessments, penetration tests, and configuration audits — across systems, applications, and cloud environments. track findings to closure and report risk ratings and timelines to management.

run it governance operations including user account lifecycle management (provisioning, access reviews, deprovisioning), it asset and license inventory, hardware procurement, and core system maintenance.

develop and maintain security and it governance metrics and reporting to provide clear visibility into security posture, control effectiveness, and operational health for senior management.


key qualifications & skills:

bachelor’s degree in information technology, computer science, cybersecurity, or a related field.

8+ years of hands-on experience in information security and it governance, with a proven track record of implementation — not only oversight.

deep understanding of enterprise security controls, covering both logical controls (iam, endpoint, dlp, email security) and physical controls (access card systems, cctv governance).

practical experience designing and implementing cloud security on aws or azure/m365, including identity governance, cspm, and compliance configurations.

experience managing third-party risk throughout the vendor lifecycle, including security assessments, contract requirements, and periodic reviews.

experience building security awareness programs, running phishing simulations, and planning security testing (vulnerability assessments, penetration tests).

hands-on experience with microsoft 365 compliance tools (purview, dlp, sensitivity labels, retention policies).

ability to write clear policies, translate them into actionable controls, and communicate security risk to both technical and non-technical audiences.

strong problem-solving, project management, and stakeholder management skills.


preferred qualifications

experience in a fast-growing, multi-brand, or retail/healthcare environment.

familiarity with thai pdpa, iso 27001, nist csf, cis benchmarks, or csa ccm.

experience supporting or leading an iso 27001 implementation or certification project.

certifications such as cissp, cism, ccsp, aws security specialty, iso 27001 lead implementer/auditor, comptia security+, or microsoft sc-series.

job title: fullstack software engineer

location: greater bangkok, thailand (nonthaburi)

reports to: engineering lead




about us

we are a publicly listed consumer finance company (set) with a mission to deliver essential financial services to the mass market, grassroots, and underserved communities. though now an established company, we retain our original startup spirit. we are on a mission to grow 10x over the next decade and are looking for a real doer to join our team.

our culture is defined by pace and passion. we are a team of doers who learn fast and deliver, and we know our success is powered by our people—our greatest asset. our team of over 2,500 is fueled by the energy of younger generations, who form the majority with an average age of 28, complemented and guided by the expertise of our experienced gen y leaders. we seek innovators who are ready to create and build, not just maintain. we value those who act, deliver, and drive real change.

this action-oriented approach makes collaboration central to our work. we believe strong relationships are built through daily in-person interaction, which is why we operate as a fully in-office team. our environment is vibrant, agile, and results-driven. while we respect those who seek a comfortable work-life balance, this is not that kind of role. we believe that creating anything truly great requires a level of dedication that mediocrity cannot match. we offer a place where you can accomplish in five years what might take others ten and make a tangible impact.




key responsibilities

fullstack system design & build: design, develop, and deploy scalable, end-to-end features—from backend services to responsive frontends using modern technologies.

ai-driven engineering: master and steer ai-driven development. you won't just use ai assistants (like copilot, rocoode, cline); you will critically guide, correct, and optimize their output to meet our high engineering standards.

performance & scalability: obsess over performance. profile, benchmark, and optimize systems to handle massive, high-concurrency workloads.

code quality & best practices: champion best-in-class engineering standards. write clean, testable, and maintainable code, and conduct rigorous code reviews.

cross-functional problem solving: partner with product managers and other units to translate complex business needs into simple, elegant technical solutions.

the ideal candidate: a profile of a high-impact builder

we are seeking a true 'builder'—an engineer who is a first-principles problem-solver. you see code as a tool to create massive impact. you are a fullstack, systems-level thinker. you have already embraced ai as a force multiplier for your own talent and are driven to build best-in-class products.

required experience & qualifications:

proven engineering experience: both fresh graduates and experienced people are welcome. however you need to have a minimum 3 years of software engineering experience (e.g., direct working experience, complex personal projects, open-source contributions).

strong educational background: a bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related quantitative field from a reputable university is required.

ai-driven engineering (mandatory): this is not about just using ai. this is about your proven ability to correct it. you must demonstrate how you critically review, steer, and take ownership of ai-generated code to ensure its quality, security, and performance.

strong cs fundamentals: strong understanding of data structures, algorithms, and system design.

technical proficiency: deep proficiency in modern, high-level programming languages and frameworks (e.g., c#, python, go, react, vue). we value your ability to build robust fullstack systems and adapt to the right tools, not your knowledge of a specific list.

essential qualities & skills

first-principles thinker: you can break down complex, ambiguous problems into their core components and build solutions from the ground up.

high-ownership & efficiency: you ship high-quality code efficiently. you take full ownership of your work, from initial concept to production and beyond.

intellectual curiosity: you are obsessed with learning and are constantly exploring new technologies, paradigms, and better ways of building.

pragmatic & results-driven: you understand the balance between perfect code and shipping on time. you are focused on delivering tangible business value.

clear communicator: you can articulate complex technical ideas clearly and concisely to both technical and non-technical audiences.

additional requirements

this role is based full-time at our headquarters in greater bangkok - pak kret.

we need hard workers. we believe that building anything great requires a level of focus and dedication that is incompatible with a conventional "work-life balance." we explicitly reject this mindset because it does not lead to extraordinary outcomes. this is a role for those who are passionate about their work and are willing to dedicate the long hours required for deep, impactful analysis.

compensation and benefits

your actual level and base salary will be determined on a case-by-case basis and may vary based on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience.

the base salary is just one part of your total rewards package. you will also receive access to comprehensive benefits, paid leave, and other company perks, which will be discussed during the interview process.

equal opportunity employer

our company is an equal opportunity employer; employment is governed on the basis of merit, competence, and qualifications and will not be influenced in any manner by race, religion, gender, disability status, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, or any other legally protected status.

Job_Title: โปรแกรมเมอร์
Job_Description:
โปรแกรมเมอร์ (สาขา นครราชสีมา)

สามารถทำงานประจำที่สาขาที่ระบุได้ (หรือออกต่างจังหวัดได้)วันเวลาการทำงาน : จันทร์-เสาร์เวลาทำงาน : 08.00-17.00น.สวัสดิการ-ประกันสังคม-วันหยุดตามประเพณี(ตามบริษัทกำหนด)-มียูนิฟอร์มให้หลังผ่านช่วงทดลองงาน

คุณสมบัติผู้สมัคร

-ประสบการณ์(3-5ปี): ด้านงานโปรแกรมเมอร์ พิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

-ระดับการศึกษา:ป.ตรี - ป.โท (it/computer )

-ภาษาโปรแกรมและเทคโนโลยี เชี่ยวชาญอย่างน้อย 1-2ภาษา เช่น php, java, python

-เข้าใจเรื่องระบบ เข้าใจ rest api, การเชื่อมต่อระบบ,และแนวคิด

-ความสามารถในการรักษาความลับ: สามารถรักษาความลับของข้อมูลและมีวิจารณญาณในการเผยแพร่ข้อมูลต่อสาธารณะ

-มีทักษะการแก้ปัญหา: สามารถวิเคราะห์ปัญหาและแก้ไขปัญหาเฉพาะหน้าได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

-มีทักษะการทำงานเป็นทีม: สามารถประสานงานและทำงานร่วมกับผู้อื่นได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

-มีทักษะการให้คำแนะนำ (coaching): สามารถให้คำแนะนำแก่พนักงาน ทีม และผู้บริหารได้

-ความรับผิดชอบ: มีความรับผิดชอบสูง สามารถทำงานให้สำเร็จตามกำหนดเวลาและทำงานในเวลาที่ยืดหยุ่นได้

-การทำงานภายใต้แรงกดดัน: สามารถทำงานได้ดีภายใต้สภาวะกดดัน

principal accountabilities:
 

establish sales objectives through forecasting. maintain sales volume, product mix and selling price by keeping current with supply and demand, changing trends, economic indicators and competitors

design and adjust to achieve a balanced customer portfolio according to the target orders and profit margin

actively approach and establish relationship with targeted business prospects to create and nurture sales leads

implement sales programs by developing field sales action plans and reviewing sales performance. allocate resources according to the designed customers portfolio.

design and implement appropriate sales processes for different customer segments

collaborate with cross-functional teams, including business development team, presale and delivery team, to co-develop solutions that align with customer needs and market demands.

act as the voice of the customer and sales representatives, providing valuable feedback and insights to enhance product features, usability, and overall value proposition. translate this feedback into actionable recommendations for the product development team

conduct thorough market research and competitor analysis to stay informed about industry trends, emerging technologies, and customer preferences. utilize this market intelligence to guide product development strategies and maintain a competitive edge in the market

maintain sales representatives through recruiting, selecting, orienting and training. evaluate their performance and provide appropriate training accordingly

assist clients during post-sales operation to provide seamless onboarding transition from sales to operation.

design and implement appropriate post-sales processes for different customer segments




qualifications:
 

bachelor's or master’s degree in an analytical field, business administration, economic, math or related field.

6+ years of experience in b2b sales in technology or cybersecurity services

familiarity with analytical productivity, and reporting tools such as salesforce

understanding and experience with the ability to practically apply to their product line. must link strategies to financial results.

proven track record of consistently meeting/surpassing targets and kpis, with the capability of consistently handling large ticket deals

presentation and analytical skills

management and leadership skills

dedication to providing great customer service

good command on both english and thai

รายละเอียดงาน (responsibilities)

ประสานงานรอบทิศ: เป็นตัวกลางในการสื่อสารระหว่างวิทยากร , ทีม production (graphic/video), และลูกค้า เพื่อให้โครงการดำเนินไปอย่างราบรื่น

คุณสมบัติที่เรามองหา (qualifications)

วุฒิปริญญาตรี ไม่จำกัดสาขา (หากจบด้านเทคโนโลยีการศึกษา, นิเทศศาสตร์ หรือบริหารธุรกิจจะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ)

มีทักษะการสื่อสารที่ยอดเยี่ยม ทั้งการพูดและการเขียน (สรุปเรื่องยากให้เป็นเรื่องง่ายได้)

มีความละเอียดรอบคอบสูง (high attention to detail) โดยเฉพาะการตรวจคำผิดและลำดับเนื้อหา

สามารถใช้งานโปรแกรมพื้นฐานได้ดี (ms office, google workspace) และหากเคยใช้เครื่องมือ project management (เช่น trello และซอร์ฟแวร์อื่นๆ) จะได้รับพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

มีความยืดหยุ่น พร้อมเรียนรู้เทคโนโลยีใหม่ๆ และรับมือกับความกดดันได้ดี

มีประสบการณ์การทำงานในสายงาน edtech มาแล้ว ขั้นต่ำ 3-5 ปีขึ้นไป

หากมีประสบการณ์ในธุรกิจ e-learning, digital agency หรือ production house จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

responsibilities;

working with agile project team of high performing people, who will catalyze each other to develop, grow and achieve great things together

analysis and understand client context and problems through secondary research (e.g. searching and analyzing data) and primary research (e.g. conducting interviews and focus groups with stakeholders such as clients and subject matter experts, conducting design thinking workshop and solutions)

back office applications engineer will be an integral part of the team, actively engaged in ensuring the smooth operation and continuous technical improvement of our critical back-office application systems. this role is responsible for hands-on experience by supporting vendor coordination, cross-checking technical deliverables against business requirements, preparing detailed test environments for uat and technical testing, documenting deployment procedures, and actively participating in system health and resilience monitoring, including bcp initiatives.

key accountabilities:

prepare and configure test environments for sit and support uat readiness.

performing technical testing during sit and uat phrase, also supporting tech lv testing.

managing cases by registering issues, tracking progress, and providing status updates to users.

document and assist in the execution of application deployment procedures and change management processes.

provide initial technical support and troubleshooting for application-related incidents.

supporting the integration of back-office applications with other internal and external financial software systems.

supporting sdlc, ci/cd, and agile methodologies for back-office application development.

supporting all back-office applications comply with internal it standards, regulatory requirements

collaborate with developers, network engineers, and it support to ensure smooth operations.




qualification required:

bachelor’s degree in computer engineering, information technology, or related field.

7+ years of software development experience preferably in financial back office system

proficiency in aix and linux operating systems with shell scripting for system administration.

proficiency in sql for querying and understanding database structures.

proficiency in writing scripting/automation skills (powershell, bash, python).

basic knowledge of financial market data, order management, and regulatory reporting is a plus.

familiarity with deployment and backup concepts and tools

knowledge of networking fundamentals (tcp/ip, routing, firewalls, vpn).

experience with virtualization platforms (vmware, hyper-v, or kvm) is a plus.

experience with system monitoring tools is a plus.

experience with virtualization technologies (e.g., vmware, docker, kubernetes) is a plus.

experience with agile methodologies and experience with ci/cd tools is a plus.

excellent verbal and written communication, negotiation, and vendor management skills.

excellent problem-solving, analytical, and debugging skills.

ability to manage complex projects and multiple priorities effectively.

high degree of accountability, proactivity, and commitment to it standards and procedures.

system analyst /incident & configuration support

provide prompt support and resolution for information technology system issues to minimize business impact and maintain operational efficiency.

analyze incidents, identify root causes, and coordinate with vendors to ensure timely fixes and preventive actions.

configure and adjust system settings in response to evolving user requirements to support business continuity.

maintain system readiness by ensuring accuracy, reliability, and up-to-date system performance at all times.

requirement specification (srs) documents, ensuring clarity, completeness, and alignment with business objectives.

recommend continuous improvements to enhance stability, user experience, and system performance.
