เปิดรับสมัคร cyber security engineer: ก้าวสู่สเต็ปถัดไปของสาย tech กับองค์กรที่ให้คุณได้ลุยงานจริงและเติบโตอย่างยั่งยืน

คุณกำลังมองหาพื้นที่ที่คุณจะได้ใช้ประสบการณ์ด้าน security อย่างเต็มที่ โดยไม่ต้องติดหล่มอยู่กับระบบเดิมๆ อยู่หรือเปล่า?

เรากำลังมองหา cyber security engineer ที่มีประสบการณ์ มาร่วมเป็นกำลังสำคัญในการยกระดับโครงสร้างพื้นฐานและปกป้องข้อมูลระดับ enterprise ของเรา หากคุณเป็นคนที่ชอบอัปเดตเทคโนโลยีใหม่ๆ ทำงานอย่างมีระบบ และต้องการเห็นผลลัพธ์ (impact) จากสิ่งที่คุณสร้าง นี่คือที่ของคุณ

โปรไฟล์ที่เรากำลังมองหา:

มีประสบการณ์ด้าน cyber security, network security หรือ system admin 3-5 ปีขึ้นไป (พร้อมลุยงานระดับ mid-senior)

มีความเข้าใจเชิงลึกและเคยจับระบบ enterprise จริงๆ (vmware, nutanix, windows server)

คุ้นเคยกับโซลูชันด้านความปลอดภัย เช่น threat intelligence, pam, nac หรือ data security solutions

มีทักษะการคิดวิเคราะห์ (analytical thinking) สามารถอธิบายเรื่องเทคนิคซับซ้อนให้ทีมอื่นๆ เข้าใจและร่วมมือกันได้

กล้าตัดสินใจ มีความเป็นเจ้าของงาน (ownership) และพร้อมที่จะเสนอไอเดียเพื่อปรับปรุงกระบวนการทำงานให้ดีขึ้น

สวัสดิการที่เข้าใจคนวัยทำงาน:

competitive salary: ค่าตอบแทนที่สะท้อนตามความสามารถและประสบการณ์จริงของคุณ

growth & upskill: มีงบประมาณสนับสนุนการสอบ certificate ระดับสากลและการฝึกอบรม เพื่อให้คุณไม่หยุดพัฒนา

flexibility & trust: รูปแบบการทำงานที่ยืดหยุ่น เน้นผลลัพธ์มากกว่าการตอกบัตรเข้าออฟฟิศ

well-being matters: เพราะเราเชื่อว่า "สุขภาพจิตที่ดี คือความมั่งคั่งที่แท้จริง" พร้อมประกันสุขภาพและสวัสดิการดูแลแบบองค์รวม

สภาพแวดล้อมการทำงานแบบมืออาชีพ ที่รับฟังความคิดเห็นและให้อำนาจในการตัดสินใจ

ส่ง cv หรือ linkedin profile ของคุณ พร้อมเล่าโปรเจกต์ด้าน security ที่คุณภูมิใจที่สุดมาให้เราอ่านได้

at alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. from high-speed trains, metros, monorails, and trams, to turnkey systems, services, infrastructure, signalling and digital mobility, we offer our diverse customers the broadest portfolio in the industry. every day, 80,000 colleagues lead the way to greener and smarter mobility worldwide, connecting cities as we reduce carbon and replace cars.




could you be the full-time automation testing and devops engineer in bangkok we’re looking for?


your future role

take on a new challenge and apply your automation testing and devops expertise in a cutting-edge field. you’ll work alongside collaborative and innovative teammates.

you'll play a critical role in ensuring our systems and processes are efficient, robust, and reliable. day-to-day, you’ll work closely with teams across the business (software developers, project managers, and quality assurance specialists), design and implement ci/cd pipelines, and much more.

you’ll specifically take care of automation testing processes and devops infrastructure setup, but also contribute to enhancing software quality and ensuring seamless integration and deployment workflows.

we’ll look to you for:

developing and maintaining automation testing frameworks using robot framework with python

performing various testing methods, including smoke testing, regression testing, functional testing, integration testing, system testing, exploratory testing, and robustness testing

writing test cases using test case design techniques

ensuring effective validation and verification processes

creating and managing v&v documentation, such as functional test specifications, requirement traceability matrices, user manuals, and release notes

developing and maintaining ci/cd pipelines using tools like jenkins, gitlab ci, or equivalent


all about you

we value passion and attitude over experience. that’s why we don’t expect you to have every single skill. instead, we’ve listed some that we think will help you succeed and grow in this role:

bachelor’s degree in computer engineering, computer science, engineering, or a related field

5+ years of experience in automation testing (robot framework with python)

3+ years of experience in a devops or related field

proficiency in linux, shell script, python, and git

understanding of validation and verification processes

familiarity with automated document generation using python or other frameworks

basic knowledge of embedded systems and networking

experience with agile development processes

strong analytical and problem-solving skills

proactive, solution-driven, and adaptable to dynamic environments

understanding of software testing life cycle (stlc) and software development life cycle (sdlc) is a plus

experience in software design and programming is a plus


things you’ll enjoy join us on a life-long transformative journey – the rail industry is here to stay, so you can grow and develop new skills and experiences throughout your career. you’ll also:

enjoy stability, challenges and a long-term career free from boring daily routines

work with new security standards for rail signalling

collaborate with transverse teams and helpful colleagues

contribute to innovative projects

utilise our flexible and collaborative working environment

steer your career in whatever direction you choose across functions and countries

benefit from our investment in your development, through award-winning learning

progress towards leadership or specialised technical roles

benefit from a fair and dynamic reward package that recognises your performance and potential, plus comprehensive and competitive social coverage (life, medical, pension)




you don’t need to be a train enthusiast to thrive with us. we guarantee that when you step onto one of our trains with your friends or family, you’ll be proud. if you’re up for the challenge, we’d love to hear from you!


important to note

as a global business, we’re an equal-opportunity employer that celebrates diversity across the 63 countries we operate in. we’re committed to creating an inclusive workplace for everyone.

job summary

the erp application support & integration role is responsible for supporting and maintaining the microsoft dynamics ax 2012 erp system and its integrations with other business systems. the position ensures smooth erp operations, timely incident resolution, and effective system support for business users.

responsibilities
1. application support

provide first-level application support for microsoft dynamics ax 2012.

ensure operational support services are delivered in accordance with agreed service level agreements (slas).

monitor, investigate, and resolve application issues, incidents, and system errors in a timely manner.

follow up on critical operational tickets and ensure proper closure.

perform system configuration and implement minor system enhancements when required.

2. business requirement support

gather and analyze business requirements from end-users and stakeholders.

support system improvements and assist in implementing effective business solutions.

collaborate closely with users to ensure the erp system effectively supports business operations.

3. erp integration support

support system integrations between microsoft dynamics ax and internal or external systems.

assist in troubleshooting integration issues, including apis, data interfaces, and system connectivity problems.

monitor data interface jobs and batch processes to ensure smooth operation.

ensure data accuracy, integrity, and consistency across integrated systems.

4. testing & deployment

prepare and execute functional test scenarios.

support user acceptance testing (uat) and track reported issues until resolution.

assist in system deployment activities and release coordination.

5. user support & training

provide user support and guidance on erp system usage.

conduct training sessions for super users and end-users when required.

prepare basic system documentation and user guides.

qualifications

Job_Title: Business Analyst (Microsoft Dynamics AX / Dynamics 365 Finance)
Job_Description:
business analyst will be responsible for the business process design, fit-gap analysis as well as validating functional deliverables of the system integrator / implementation partner (si) such as organization structure, master data, configuration, and customization choices.

this role will function as the connector between business needs and technology ensuring that we are always working on the things that creates value for our business. this also includes delivery of our new digital strategy, crafting & supply strategy, and the ambition of creating the smart factory and data-driven manufacturing focus on driving the product agenda for the most critical part of the strategy.

main responsibilities:

provide expertise on business processes and innovations on existing business processes from functional and technical perspectives.

support product manager in developing and maintaining product backlog / required business capabilities including improvement opportunities.

create the user stories with relevant acceptance criteria, scenarios, and estimate business value and tech requirements of product backlog items.

prepare user acceptance test cases, training/user manuals, provide post go-live support

engage with all stakeholders (business, technical, product manager) to ensure no gap at any level, prepare business analysis artifacts including process maps, design flow, specifications, and wireframes.

contribute to gap analysis to uncover functionality that may require further configuration or an additional solution.

perform functional analysis and the modelling of business processes concerning key results/targets and how it related to data & analytics, ensuring a cross-sectional view of the functional needs.

contribute to the design and testing of reports, interfaces, forms, and conversions (including validation and reconciliation of data conversions)

explore products as a subject matter expert and may be the first adopter of emerging technologies.

you will work with transformation and relentless improvement towards a more agile operating model creating faster time to market, better quality, and more efficiency.

identify and initiate process efficiencies to improve existing business processes. monitor and apply regulatory / legal changes that affect business processes and system functionality

job requirements

5+ years of business process improvement experience with agile mindset through applying the agile principles of business analysis to the outcomes you produce, while leveraging the agile manifesto for the work

experience from manufacturing, retail, fashion or fmcg preferred, as well as knowledge in any of the manufacturing technology disciplines including manufacturing operations management (mom), manufacturing erp

experience in any of microsoft dynamics ax / dynamics 365 finance or sap platforms including sap s/4hana erp, sap digital manufacturing cloud (sap dmc), sap manufacturing execution (sap me) would be an advantage

must have strong proficiency in ‘requirements lifecycle management’, ‘requirements analysis and design definition’ and ‘solution evaluation’

client-facing skills, including the ability to analyse complex problems, influence and negotiate with customers

independent, initiative-taking, and structured. ability to ensure progress and commitment to deadlines

understanding of agile methods and processes would be an advantage

professional business analysis certification (e.g., cbap) and / or sap certification would be an advantage.

welcome to our crafting & supply

the magic happens at our crafting facilities, where we combine centuries-old crafting traditions and high-quality materials with modern production techniques. you will be warmly greeted with over 13,000 craftspeople who are excellent at crafting and supplying the world’s largest jewellery brand with our craftsmanship. you will be part of a team of production team and report to senior vice president, manufacturing (bangkok)

join a team that is as diverse and inclusive as our jewellery. we believe and value creative thinking and ensure that there’s equitable opportunities for all.

foster your growth and craft opportunities through our learning and development programmes.

at pandora, no effort or contribution goes unnoticed. we offer a wide range of opportunities and benefits to ensure that our employees feel valued, supported, and cared for.

transportation services are also available to drop you at the closet bts station and other community areas.

about pandora crafting & supply

pandora started crafting its jewellery in thailand in 1989, where our founders fell in love with the delicate craftsmanship of the thai people. to date, there are two crafting facilities in thailand, bangkok, and lamphun, and we employ more than 13,000 skilled craftspeople. by the end of 2024, there are 113 million pieces sold globally, all of which were hand-finished here in thailand by our skilled craftspeople using high-quality raw materials and sustainable methods. 

 about pandora group

pandora is the world’s largest jewellery brand. designed in denmark and crafted in thailand, pandora jewellery provides endless opportunities for personalisation, allowing people to express their passions and show who they are. the company’s products are made from high-quality materials and sold in more than 100 countries through 6,800 points of sale, including 2,600 concept stores.

pandora is committed to leadership in sustainability and is sourcing lab-grown stones and recycled silver and gold for all its jewellery. headquartered in copenhagen, denmark, pandora employs 37,000 people worldwide, is listed on the nasdaq copenhagen stock exchange, and generated sales of dkk 31.7 billion (eur 4.25 billion) in 2024.

job summary

we are seeking an it support engineer to provide first-line technical support to end users. this role is responsible for managing support tickets, troubleshooting basic it issues, coordinating with local it operations, and ensuring timely resolution of incidents and service requests. the ideal candidate should have strong problem-solving skills, good communication abilities, and a service-oriented mindset.

key responsibilities

provide first-level technical support for hardware, software, and network-related issues

monitor and manage incoming support tickets via the ticketing system

open, support, escalate, and follow up on incidents and service requests with regional it operations

troubleshoot and resolve basic it issues in a timely manner

escalate complex or unresolved issues to second-level or specialized teams

create summary reports on a daily, weekly, monthly basis, or upon request

maintain accurate documentation of incidents, resolutions, and it assets

document and maintain run books and operational documents

enforce it standards and procedures, and provide feedback to continuously improve operational processes

follow company it policies and best practices

qualifications

bachelor’s degree in information technology, computer science, or related field (or equivalent experience)

1–3 years of experience in it support, service desk, or helpdesk role

basic knowledge of windows os, microsoft 365, and networking fundamentals

familiarity with ticketing systems

good communication skills in english (spoken and written)

strong problem-solving skills and customer service mindset

Job_Title: Business Analyst for the Cybersecurity app (Android and iOS)
Job_Description:
job summary
we are seeking an experienced ba to lead the delivery of it applications and security products, including mobile and communication-related solutions. this role is responsible for defining product vision, managing the backlog, and ensuring secure, compliant, and high-quality solutions that align with business and cybersecurity objectives.

key responsibilities

translate business, technical, and security requirements into clear and well-defined user stories

prioritise features by balancing business value, security risk, regulatory compliance, and delivery timelines

embed security-by-design principles across the full product lifecycle

lead the delivery of mobile applications (android and ios), including security-focused features

collaborate closely with commercial, product development, it engineers, vendors, data scientists, and business stakeholders

lead backlog refinement, sprint planning, and acceptance of deliverables in agile environments

support product releases, incident follow-ups, and continuous improvement initiatives

identify delivery and technical risks (e.g. integration delays with third-party threat intelligence apis) and develop mitigation strategies

required qualifications & experience

proven experience as a product owner or product manager in it, mobile, or security-focused products

strong technical understanding of:

android and ios mobile application development

network and communication protocols, including sip/rtp for voip and sms handling

experience delivering security and fraud-prevention solutions, such as:

blocking scam calls and sms using pattern recognition and real-time filtering

url and phishing detection using threat intelligence databases (e.g. openphish) and machine-learning-based analysis

solid knowledge of application security, enterprise it, and cloud environments

experience working in agile / scrum or hybrid delivery models

scrum master or agile certification is an advantage

experience managing and coordinating cross-functional teams (mobile developers, security engineers, data scientists)

skills & competencies

strong ability to communicate complex technical concepts (e.g. sip-based scam detection) clearly to non-technical stakeholders

proven stakeholder management and coordination skills across internal teams and external partners

structured, risk-aware approach to product delivery

comfortable operating in security-sensitive and compliance-driven environments

responsibilities

collaborate with stakeholders/end users to understand and anticipate their needs and translate them into product/project high level requirements, and actionable roadmaps.

collaborate with designers and developers to create intuitive and engaging user experiences, including prototyping, and ui design.

lead the successful delivery process from feature definition, specification, implementation, testing, user acceptance, deployment and adoption to ensure solutions meet user needs and maintain a high standard of quality and usability.

collaborate with tester teams to define test case, conduct user acceptance testing (uat), and ensure the quality and usability of the products.

provide training and communication support to both internal and external users.

work with cross-functional teams, including developer, designer, tester, data analytics, crm, market planner, regulators, and call center, to ensure their requirements are captured and delivered as expected.

handle production issues after product release




qualifications

at least 2 years of experience in user-centric product creation

knowledge of principles of sdlc, waterfall management, agile with scrum (or relevant framework)

knowledge of testing methodology

strong in user interface design with figma

knowledge in query data via sql for validation

excellent organizational and time management skills.

experience in real-estate related products is a plus

strong in user experience design, particularly as applied to web-based applications

outstanding communication, presentation and leadership skills.

strong problem-solving skills, logical thinking and analytical skills

"work where wow, happens every day"

become our: senior venture architect (product owner)

why you’ll love being part of our team:

join kbtg – where innovation drives impact! with a purposeful mission, collaborative spirit, and a positive attitude, we create fintech solutions that empower. be part of the future!

how you’ll make an impact:

define and drive the product vision and roadmap for ainu’s ai-powered identity verification platform aligned with business goals

translate ai/ml capabilities into customer-centric product features that enhance identity verification, fraud prevention, and compliance

conduct market and competitor analysis to identify opportunities in digital identity and fraud detection

own and prioritize the product backlog based on business value, roi, and customer impact

create clear user stories and acceptance criteria to guide engineering teams through product development

lead sprint planning and collaborate with scrum teams to ensure timely and effective product delivery

act as the key liaison between business stakeholders, enterprise customers, and development teams

gather and translate customer feedback into product improvements and new feature opportunities

work closely with ai/ml engineers, developers, ux designers, and qa teams to ensure high-quality product delivery

monitor product performance using kpis and customer insights to drive continuous improvement

develop and support go-to-market strategies for new product features and releases

stay updated on ai/ml trends and regulatory requirements to ensure the platform remains competitive and compliant

what will set you up for success:

bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, information management, data engineering, or a related field.

5+ years of experience in product owner, product manager, or similar product roles within technology companies

proven experience managing products end-to-end from concept to launch

hands-on experience working in agile/scrum environments with cross-functional engineering teams

strong understanding of software development processes, web technologies, and api integrations

experience or interest in ai/ml products, identity verification, security, or fintech solutions

familiarity with ai/ml concepts, computer vision, or biometric technologies is highly preferred

understanding of identity verification standards, kyc/ekyc processes, and fraud prevention technologies

knowledge of data privacy regulations and security compliance (e.g., iso, ibeta, gdpr, pdpa)


embracing idea (inclusion, diversity, equity, and accessibility):

at kbtg, diversity fuels innovation.  we embrace different perspectives, foster an inclusive culture, and create opportunities for growth. be yourself, make an impact, and grow with us. join us.

rewards that go beyond the paycheck:

hybrid working – balance office collaboration and remote flexibility.

wellness & comfort – recharge in our nap room, enjoy occasional massages, and access mental wellness support via occa.

business travel & commuting support – enjoy grab for business rides and other travel perks for professional journey with ease and convenience.

continuous learning – access udemy, coursera, and top training programs.

k point reward – earn points and enjoy exciting rewards as you grow with us.

Job_Title: Cloud Operations and Support Engineer - AWS
Job_Description:
ภาพรวม

ทีม operations & support ของเราทุ่มเทในการดูแลระบบที่มีความสำคัญสูงต่อการบริหารงานของลูกค้า (mission-critical) ด้วยเทคโนโลยีที่ทันสมัยและมีประสิทธิภาพ เราใช้เครื่องมือและวิธีการที่หลากหลายในการแก้ปัญหา เพื่อให้ระบบของลูกค้าทำงานได้อย่างราบรื่น ภายในทีม คุณจะได้เรียนรู้และมีประสบการณ์ในการจัดการปัญหาที่เกี่ยวข้องกับ amazon web services และผู้ให้บริการรายอื่น เพื่อให้แน่ใจว่าเราสามารถนำเสนอวิธีแก้ปัญหาที่เหมาะสมและมีประสิทธิภาพสูงสุดแก่ลูกค้า ซึ่งจะนำไปสู่ประสบการณ์การใช้คลาวด์ที่สมบูรณ์แบบ

ทางเดลิเทคกำลังมองหาบุคลากรที่มีความกระตือรือร้นในการแก้ปัญหา สามารถทำงานร่วมกับลูกค้าได้อย่างมืออาชีพ และมีความรู้ด้านเทคโนโลยีอย่างกว้างขวาง ทั้งในด้านระบบปฏิบัติการ linux และ windows การดูแลระบบ เครือข่าย การเขียนโปรแกรม ความปลอดภัย และพร้อมร่วมงานกับทีมพัฒนาแอปพลิเคชันเพื่อยกระดับระบบสู่ production

รายละเอียดเพิ่มเติม

คุณจะได้ทำอะไร - คุณจะรับผิดชอบการจัดการและดูแลระบบปฏิบัติการ บริหารเซิร์ฟเวอร์ จัดการเครือข่าย สร้างแดชบอร์ดแสดงกราฟ และปรับปรุงระบบต่างๆ คุณจะต้องเข้าใจสถาปัตยกรรมระบบที่ได้รับมอบหมาย เพื่อวางแผนและแก้ไขปัญหาได้อย่างมืออาชีพ ทั้งแบบแมนนวลและอัตโนมัติ นอกจากนี้ คุณจะพัฒนาสคริปต์หรือโปรแกรมเพื่อลดความซ้ำซ้อนของกระบวนการทำงาน

ทำไมงานนี้ถึงสำคัญ - เรามุ่งมั่นปฏิบัติตามข้อตกลงระดับการให้บริการ (service level agreement - sla) เพื่อสร้างความมั่นใจให้ลูกค้าในด้านความเสถียรและความสามารถของระบบที่เราดูแล โดยระบบของเราให้บริการต่อเนื่องตลอด 24 ชั่วโมงโดยไม่หยุดชะงัก

อะไรเป็นความท้าทาย - การจัดการและดูแลระบบเป็นงานที่หลากหลายและท้าทาย สะท้อนถึงการเปลี่ยนแปลงอย่างรวดเร็วของเทคโนโลยีคลาวด์ ในบทบาทนี้ คุณจะได้ศึกษาและประยุกต์ใช้ความรู้เพื่อแก้ปัญหาทั้งด้านเทคนิคและธุรกิจ คุณจะเป็นส่วนสำคัญในการพัฒนาและปรับปรุงกระบวนการทำงานให้มีประสิทธิภาพ ผ่านการจัดทำ sla แผนภาพ ขั้นตอนการทำงาน เครื่องมือเฉพาะทาง และเอกสารอ้างอิง รวมถึงการวางแผนและคาดการณ์เหตุการณ์ในอนาคต

คุณสมบัติขั้นต่ำ

วุฒิการศึกษาระดับปริญญาตรีขึ้นไปในสาขาคอมพิวเตอร์หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

มีความรู้และความเข้าใจด้านเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศและการสื่อสารอย่างลึกซึ้ง

สื่อสารภาษาอังกฤษได้ดีในการทำงาน

มีความสนใจและ/หรือประสบการณ์ด้าน amazon web services

คุณสมบัติพิจารณาเพิ่มเติม

มีประสบการณ์ในการดูแลและจัดการระบบและเครือข่าย

มีความรู้และประสบการณ์เฉพาะทางด้านระบบ เครือข่าย หรือความปลอดภัยข้อมูล

มีความเชี่ยวชาญด้านเครื่องมือและโปรแกรมของ linux/unix

มีประสบการณ์ดูแลระบบแบบ 24x7 และจัดการปัญหาผ่านระบบ ticket

มีประสบการณ์ใช้เครื่องมือดูแลระบบเฉพาะด้าน server หรือ application

สามารถวิเคราะห์ปัญหาและจัดการ operations สำหรับระบบขนาดใหญ่

คุณสมบัติส่วนตัว

มุ่งมั่นในการเรียนรู้และพัฒนาตนเองอย่างต่อเนื่อง

มีความอดทนและมุ่งมั่นในการแก้ไขปัญหา

ทำงานร่วมกับทีมได้ดีและสนับสนุนเพื่อนร่วมงาน

พร้อมรับและปรับตัวต่อการเปลี่ยนแปลงด้านเทคโนโลยีและนวัตกรรม

overview

our operations & support team is dedicated to managing mission-critical systems for customer operations through modern, efficient technologies. we employ diverse tools and methods to ensure our clients' systems operate smoothly. within the team, you'll gain hands-on experience handling issues related to amazon web services and other vendors, ensuring we deliver optimal solutions to our clients. this leads to an exceptional cloud experience.

dailitech seeks individuals who are passionate about problem-solving, work professionally with clients, and possess extensive technical knowledge. this includes expertise in linux and windows operating systems, system administration, networking, programming, security, and readiness to collaborate with application development teams to deploy systems to production.

more details

what you will do - you'll manage operating systems, servers, and networks, create data visualization dashboards, and implement system upgrades. you must understand the architecture of assigned systems to plan and execute solutions professionally, both manually and through automation. additionally, you'll develop scripts and programs to streamline processes.

why this job is important - we are committed to meeting service level agreements (slas) to ensure our customers trust in the stability and capability of our managed systems. this is demonstrated through our continuous 24/7 system operation without interruption.

what the challenge is - system management is a diverse and challenging field that reflects the rapid evolution of cloud technology. in this role, you'll apply your expertise to address both technical and business challenges. you'll be instrumental in developing efficient operational processes, demonstrated through slas, diagrams, workflows, specialized tools, and documentation. you'll play a key role in planning and preparing for future scenarios.

minimum qualifications

bachelor's degree or higher in computer science or related field

in-depth knowledge and understanding of information technology and communications

strong english communication skills for workplace interaction

interest and/or experience in amazon web services

additional qualifications considered

proven experience in system and network management

specialized knowledge in systems, networks, or data security

expertise in linux/unix tools and software

track record of 24x7 system management with ticket-based issue resolution

experience with server or application-specific management tools

capability to analyze and manage operations for large-scale systems

personal qualifications

committed to continuous learning and self-development

patient and determined in problem-solving

strong team player who supports colleagues

adaptable to technological changes and innovation

additional information

please click on this link to learn more about working with us. [link removed]

Job_Title: Business Analyst / Senior Manager - Revenue Management
Job_Description:
job overview:

a leading, large-scale digital and services-driven organization is appointing a senior manager –

revenue management to strengthen revenue performance, forecasting accuracy, and commercial

insight across a diversified portfolio of digital products.

this role sits at a critical intersection of digital product, commercial, and finance, with direct

exposure to senior leadership. the mandate is to elevate revenue predictability, unlock growth

opportunities, and establish robust governance and analytics as the organization continues to

scale its digital offerings.




key responsibilities:

revenue performance & forecasting

• own end-to-end revenue performance management for digital product portfolios,

identifying growth opportunities, revenue drivers, risks, and underperformance areas.

• lead weekly and periodic revenue projections in collaboration with digital product

stakeholders, providing data-backed insights and constructive challenge to assumptions.

• oversee revenue forecasting, target setting, and variance analysis to ensure alignment with

strategic and financial objectives.

• review, reconcile, and validate revenue booking items to ensure accuracy, compliance, and

consistency across business units.




business analysis & strategic insights

• monitor, analyze, and interpret key commercial and financial kpis to evaluate business

performance and inform decision-making.

• conduct deep-dive business, customer, and market analyses, including customer behavior,

segmentation, and market trends, to support strategic initiatives.

• deliver standardized management reporting as well as ad-hoc analyses in response to

evolving business needs and leadership requests.




data management, reporting & visualization

• ensure ongoing data validation, extraction, and quality checks to maintain consistency and

reliability across reporting outputs.

• design, build, and maintain automated dashboards and visualizations using tools such as

power bi or tableau, integrating multiple data sources.

• define and manage data structures that support analytical and business requirements,

ensuring data integrity and historical tracking for trend analysis.

• translate complex datasets into clear, actionable insights for both technical and non

technical stakeholders.




leadership & cross-functional collaboration

• lead, coach, and develop a team of analysts, fostering a strong performance culture and

high standards of analytical excellence.

• continuously improve analytical processes, tools, and workflows to enhance efficiency,

scalability, and accuracy.

• partner closely with cross-functional stakeholders, including digital business units,

finance, and technology teams, to support strategic planning and operational execution.




qualifications & experience: 

• commercially driven analytics leader with 5-10+ years’ experience in revenue

management, commercial analytics, or business performance roles.

• strong exposure to digital products, subscription-based, or telecom-style business

models.

• proven ability to translate complex data into clear, executive-level insights.

• hands-on capability with excel, sql, and modern bi tools (e.g., power bi, tableau).

• confident stakeholder manager, comfortable influencing senior leaders and cross

functional teams.

• experience leading or developing analytical teams is strongly preferred.

at alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. from high-speed trains, metros, monorails, and trams, to turnkey systems, services, infrastructure, signalling and digital mobility, we offer our diverse customers the broadest portfolio in the industry. every day, 80,000 colleagues lead the way to greener and smarter mobility worldwide, connecting cities as we reduce carbon and replace cars.

 

 

could you be the full-time software v&v designer in bangkok we’re looking for?


your future role

take on a new challenge and apply your automation testing and software validation expertise in a cutting-edge field. you’ll work alongside collaborative and innovative teammates.

you'll play a key role in ensuring the quality and reliability of our software systems, helping us deliver exceptional solutions to the mobility challenges of tomorrow. day-to-day, you’ll work closely with teams across the business (e.g., qa, development, and ci/cd teams), contribute to the integration of automation into our testing processes, and much more.

you’ll specifically take care of designing, developing, and maintaining automated test scripts using robot framework, but also creating custom libraries and keywords to support complex test scenarios.

we’ll look to you for:

designing, developing, and maintaining automated test scripts using robot framework and other automation tools

creating custom libraries and keywords to support complex test scenarios

writing bash/shell scripts for automation tasks and linux environment setup

analyzing and understanding existing code (c/c++) to create effective automated tests

collaborating with qa and development teams to integrate automation into the testing process

contributing to ci/cd pipeline integration for automated testing


all about you

we value passion and attitude over experience. that’s why we don’t expect you to have every single skill. instead, we’ve listed some that we think will help you succeed and grow in this role:

bachelor’s degree in software engineering, computer engineering, computer science, engineering, or a related field

4+ years of experience in automation testing, particularly with robot framework and python

experience in a leadership position (advantageous)

strong people management skills

experience working in international teams

ability to process overall ideas, manage multiple targets, and prioritize tasks from stakeholders

background in robot framework and python (c++ experience is a plus)

strong problem-solving skills with the ability to stay calm, confident, and committed under pressure


things you’ll enjoy join us on a life-long transformative journey – the rail industry is here to stay, so you can grow and develop new skills and experiences throughout your career. you’ll also:

enjoy stability, challenges, and a long-term career free from boring daily routines

work with new security standards for rail signalling

collaborate with transverse teams and helpful colleagues

contribute to innovative projects

utilise our agile and flexible working environment

steer your career in whatever direction you choose across functions and countries

benefit from our investment in your development, through award-winning learning

progress towards leadership or technical expert roles

benefit from a fair and dynamic reward package that recognises your performance and potential, plus comprehensive and competitive social coverage (life, medical, pension)

 

you don't need to be a train enthusiast to thrive with us. we guarantee that when you step onto one of our trains with your friends or family, you'll be proud. if you're up for the challenge, we'd love to hear from you!

​job purpose 

​the it integration engineer is responsible for acquiring integration knowledge from external providers and transforming it into internal capability, with the ultimate objective of taking over the integration strategy and reducing vendor dependency. ensures seamless communication across platforms, learning and reverse-engineering existing integrations, and evolves into owning, improving, and leading the transformation of the integration landscape across logistics, erp, and hr systems 

​core responsibilities 

​knowledge acquisition from vendors 

​work closely with integration providers to fully understand: 

​existing integration architecture 

​data flows, mappings, and dependencies 

​middleware configurations (jitterbit) 

​actively extract knowledge (not passively receive it) 

​challenge gaps, unclear logic, and undocumented processes. data flow & synchronization 

​internalization of integration ownership 

​translate vendor knowledge into:  

​clear internal documentation  

​standardized integration models  

​build internal expertise to:  

​support integrations independently  

​reduce reliance on external partners  

​become the internal reference for all integration topics 

​system integration 

​support integration setup between applications 

​maintain apis , middleware to enable secure data exchange 

​ensure compatibility between systems and platforms 

​data management 

​monitor data flows across applications and service 

​maintain data integrity, consistency and security 

​troubleshoot and resolve data synchronization issues 

​application and project support 

​provide technical support for integration related tickets 

​collaborate with teams to deliver integration projects 

​participate in testing, deployment and upgrade cycles for integrated systems. 

​continual improvement 

​identity opportunities to automate workflows and reduce manual processes 

​documentation & governance 

​own and maintain:  

​integration architecture diagrams  

​data flow mappings  

​interface specifications  

​define integration standards and best practices  

​ensure auditability and traceability of data flows 

​qualification 

​bachelor’s degree in computer science, information technology, or related field 

​proven experience in system integration, application support, or software development 

​strong knowledge of apis (rest, soap), middleware, and data integration tools 

​familiarity with enterprise applications such as wms, tms , hrms 

​understanding of itil processes and service management frameworks 

​solid understanding of system architecture and data flows 

​required skills 

​fluent in thai and english both writing and speaking  

​strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills 

​scripting or programming e.g. python , javascript or similar 

​hands-on experience with integration platforms e.g. power automate , boomi  

​knowledge of authentication and security protocols e.g. oauth , saml 

​project management 

​data transformation e.g. json , xml 

​ability to work cross-functionally (it, finance, operations, hr)

supervise and give advice on work systems and development techniques to get an efficient work system and meet the needs of customers

Company: บริษัท แอสเซนด์ กรุ๊ป จำกัด
Job_Description:
we are seeking a driven and highly coordinated data center design manager / specialist to lead the end-to-end design lifecycle of our mission-critical facilities. in this role, you will bridge the gap between technical engineering, architectural design, and project execution. you will act as the primary design authority, managing external consultants and coordinating cross-functional internal teams to ensure our data centers are designed for maximum reliability, efficiency, and scalability.

the ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in electrical, mechanical, or architectural design, coupled with practical experience in critical infrastructure environments.

key responsibilities

design management & coordination

end-to-end design leadership: manage the complete design lifecycle for new data center builds and retrofits, from conceptual design and schematic design (sd) through design development (dd) and issued for construction (ifc) documents.

multidisciplinary integration: lead the integration of architectural, civil, structural, mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (mep) systems, ensuring zero spatial conflicts and 100% design cohesion.

standardization: ensure all facility designs align with global corporate standards, uptime requirements, and operational capacity roadmaps.

stakeholder & consultant management

consultant oversight: direct external architects of record (aor), mep engineers, and specialty consultants. manage scopes of work, deliverables, and performance against project schedules.

cross-functional collaboration: partner closely with internal stakeholders, including construction, operations, it/network infrastructure, and sustainability teams, to translate business requirements into technical design solutions.

design reviews: chair recurring design coordination meetings and lead comprehensive milestone design reviews with executive leadership and technical teams.

technical review & quality assurance

due diligence: assist in technical site due diligence, feasibility studies, and test-fit layouts for prospective greenfield and brownfield data center projects.

quality control: perform rigorous qa/qc on all design packages, ensuring compliance with local building codes, jurisdictional standards, and industry best practices (e.g., ashrae, uptime institute).

value engineering: identify opportunities for cost optimization and schedule acceleration through value engineering (ve) workshops, without compromising mission-critical performance or safety.

construction support

field coordination: provide continuous design oversight during the pre-construction and construction phases.

rfi & submittal management: rapidly evaluate and resolve engineering challenges, respond to requests for information (rfis), and review technical submittals for long-lead equipment.

basic qualifications

education: bachelor’s degree in electrical engineering, mechanical engineering, architecture, or a closely related technical discipline.

experience: 3 to 5 years of professional experience in engineering design, design management, or project management.

industry background: demonstrated experience working on critical infrastructure projects (e.g., data centers, hospitals, power plants, semiconductor fabs, or laboratories).

technical fluency: strong working knowledge of critical mep systems (e.g., hvac cooling systems, chillers, ups, switchgear, generators, and power distribution).

software skills: proficiency with design and coordination software such as autocad, revit, navisworks (bim clash detection), and bluebeam.

preferred qualifications

certifications: professional engineer (pe) license, registered architect (ra), or project management professional (pmp) certification.

hyperscale/colocation experience: direct experience designing or managing the design of hyperscale or commercial colocation data centers.

sustainability focus: familiarity with sustainable design practices, energy efficiency standards (leed, energy star), and advanced cooling technologies.

soft skills: exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to translate complex engineering tradeoffs to non-technical business leaders.

job summary :
the retail operations analyst (ai specialist) is responsible for bridging the gap between retail data and front-line execution. you will leverage generative ai and prompt engineering to transform sales dashboards into automated, actionable coaching scripts and operational directives. your goal is to ensure that every store receives high-quality, data-driven guidance that sounds human, empathetic, and strategically sound.

job description :
prompt engineering & ai implementation:

develop and maintain a library of structured prompts that convert retail kpis into daily "action plans" for store staff.

refine the ai’s "voice" to ensure it aligns with the company's leadership tone—assertive yet highly motivational.

perform constant a/b testing on ai outputs to improve the accuracy and effectiveness of the coaching scripts.

data analysis & structuring:

monitor daily/weekly retail metrics (sales target vs. actual, %run rate, atv, upt, and stock turnover).

clean and structure raw data into formats compatible with ai models (llms) to ensure "zero-hallucination" results.

identify sales trends and "underperformance triggers" that require immediate ai-generated intervention.

operational integration:

coordinate with the area managers to ensure the ai store manager’s directives are being adopted and executed on the floor.

gather feedback from front-line employees to humanize and improve the ai’s communication style.

workflow automation:

assist in building and maintaining simple automation workflows  to push ai insights directly to communication platforms (eg.line)

qualifications :
experience: 2–4 years of experience in retail operations, sales analysis, or business development.

ai savvy: proven ability to use llms (chatgpt, claude, gemini) beyond basic chatting. you must understand system prompts, constraints, and logic-based prompting.

analytical skills: strong ability to read dashboards (tableau, powerbi, or excel) and translate "cold data" into "warm insights."

retail fluency: deep understanding of retail jargon and floor dynamics (e.g., knowing why a staff member might struggle with upselling or trade-ins).

technical tools: advanced excel/google sheets. familiarity with sql or low-code automation tools is a significant plus.

mindset: highly empathetic toward front-line workers, systematic in thinking, and comfortable with rapid experimentation.

we are seeking a high-caliber business analyst to join scbx group. this role focuses on gathering, analyzing, and translating business requirements into clear documentation and actionable insights, supporting the design and delivery of ai-driven products and solutions across the group.




key responsibilities :

gather and analyze business requirements from stakeholders, translating them into structured documentation for product and technology teams.

collaborate closely with business and technology squads to ensure solutions align with defined objectives and user needs.

prepare clear and comprehensive process flows, functional specifications, and supporting documentation throughout the project lifecycle.

support user acceptance testing by defining test scenarios and validating that delivered solutions meet business requirements.

monitor and track project progress, flagging risks or gaps to relevant stakeholders in a timely manner.

contribute to continuous improvement of business analysis practices across the team.




if you meet below qualifications and are ready to take on a challenging role, we encourage you to apply.

experience in business analysis or a related field.

strong ability to gather, document, and communicate requirements across both business and technology stakeholders.

proficiency in process mapping, functional specification writing, and requirements management.

analytical mindset with structured problem-solving and attention to detail.

experience working in agile or squad-based delivery environments.

exposure to financial services, fintech, or ai-driven product development is an advantage.




about us

scbx is the mothership of the financial technology business group comprising siam commercial bank, scb 10x co., ltd., card x co., ltd., innovestx securities co., ltd., and other companies. scbx drives and powers the development and execution of strategic initiatives, with a particular emphasis on financial enterprises and digital technologies. this includes pursuing new business opportunities, m&a, strategic investments, partnerships, and divestitures. it captures some of the biggest growth opportunities with superior returns, by adapting to consumers' changing behaviors and demands in a timely manner. these industries will improve the overall quality of life while serving a greater purpose. the company conducts business with flexibility and prudence in governance and risk management and has the potential to compete equally in global competitions.

job responsibilities

1. provide 24-hour response to operational failures of the bank's core banking system, covering business anomalies in application systems (e.g., deposit, loan, report, and document systems) and infrastructure anomalies (e.g., cloud services, databases, and networks);

2. conduct real-time monitoring of system issues and respond promptly; escalate issues to the subsequent handling process in a timely manner, and assist in extracting logs and data required for issue analysis;

3. upon receiving the bank's ma support request, initiate the response process within 15 minutes, and quickly complete preliminary localization through troubleshooting of abnormal phenomena, log analysis, and data verification;

4. cooperate efficiently with the bank to resolve serv1 or serv2-level system issues;

5. prepare detailed incident reports, and accurately communicate the results of root cause analysis to the bank and support teams;

6. organize the ma processes of the core system, iteratively update the ma support manual, and ensure the implementation of standardized ma practices.




job requirements

1. a bachelor's degree or above, majoring in computer science, software engineering, or related fields.

2. have in-depth familiarity with the application architecture of the bank's core systems, master relevant knowledge of cloud environment operation and maintenance, and possess professional knowledge of it service management (itsm) best practices.

3. have excellent written and verbal communication skills, and be able to convey complex information clearly and concisely. thai or english communication skills are required (candidates who can speak chinese will be given priority).

4. recognize and accept the 24-hour, 7-day shift system, and be able to adapt to night shifts and holiday duty (each shift includes 30-minute shift-handover time).

5. have strong coordination and organizational abilities, and be able to manage multiple tasks efficiently and prioritize them clearly.

6. be familiar with the spring boot framework and have java coding and development capabilities.

7. be familiar with the access operations of mainstream databases (mysql, postgresql), and have the ability to optimize sql, tune performance, and optimize batch tasks.

8. be proficient in mainstream development tools such as eclipse and intellij idea, be skilled in using version management tools such as git and svn, and log management and analysis tools such as kibana.

9. be able to work stably in thailand for a long time, have good self-learning ability, and be able to quickly adapt to business and technological updates.

Company: Charoen Pokphand Foods Public Company Limited
Job_Description:
job purpose

เพื่อให้มั่นใจว่าระบบเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ (it) และระบบเทคโนโลยีการดำเนินงาน (ot) ของบริษัททั้งหมดทำงานได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพและต่อเนื่อง โดยเป็น first-level support ในการรับแจ้ง, ตรวจสอบ, วิเคราะห์, และแก้ไขปัญหาทางเทคนิคต่าง ๆ ด้วยตนเองอย่างรวดเร็วและแม่นยำรวมถึงประสานงานกับหน่วยงานภายในและภายนอกเพื่อแก้ไขปัญหาระดับที่ซับซ้อนขึ้น มีส่วนร่วมในการคัดเลือกและบริหารจัดการผู้ให้บริการ/ผู้จำหน่าย (vendor)ระบบ, การวางแผนและบริหารจัดการงบประมาณ it/ot ทั้งงบประมาณการลงทุน (capex) และงบประมาณค่าใช้จ่ายในการดาเนินงาน(opex) อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ และการควบคุมการดำเนินงานตามโครงการ เพื่อสนับสนุนการดำเนินงานทางธุรกิจให้เป็นไปอย่างราบรื่น ลดผลกระทบต่อการผลิตและประสิทธิภาพการทำงานของพนักงาน และส่งเสริมการลงทุนด้านเทคโนโลยีให้เกิดประโยชน์สูงสุดภายใต้งบประมาณที่กำหนด

responsibility

การสนับสนุนและการแก้ไขปัญหา (first-level support & troubleshooting)

การบำรุงรักษาและดูแลระบบ (system maintenance & monitoring)

การประสานงาน (coordination & escalation)

Job_Description:
job purpose

ตำแหน่งนี้ทำหน้าที่ออกแบบและวางสถาปัตยกรรมระบบคลาวด์ขององค์กร กำหนดมาตรฐานและรูปแบบการใช้งาน (cloud governance) เพื่อสนับสนุนการปรับปรุงโครงสร้างพื้นฐานและระบบงานขององค์กรให้มีประสิทธิภาพ ปลอดภัย และสามารถควบคุมต้นทุนได้ ตำแหน่งนี้ยังมีบทบาทสำคัญในการวางรากฐานและขับเคลื่อน cloud center of excellence (ccoe) เพื่อสร้างมาตรฐาน วิธีปฏิบัติ (best practices) และความสามารถด้านคลาวด์ให้กับทั้งองค์กร

job expectation

จัดการ และกำหนดมาตรการด้านความปลอดภัย (security protocols) ของ cloud environments

ประสานงาน และร่วมมือกับ technology teams ต่างๆ เพื่อให้แน่ใจว่าการแก้ปัญหาคลาวด์ตรงตามความต้องการขององค์กร

สร้าง cloud architecture ที่เป็นมาตรฐานในระดับองค์กร และรองรับกลยุทธ์ it modernization

จัดทำเอกสารเกี่ยวกับการออกแบบสถาปัตยกรรม การกำหนดค่า และแนวทางปฏิบัติที่ดีที่สุด

ช่วยควบคุมต้นทุน cloud ระดับองค์กรด้วยการออกแบบที่ cost-efficient

functional competency (skill & knowledge and qualification)
core technical skills

เชี่ยวชาญด้านการออกแบบ cloud architecture (aws / azure / gcp / huawei อย่างน้อยหนึ่งรายในระดับ architect)

ออกแบบโครงสร้างพื้นฐานระดับองค์กร เช่น:

cloud landing zone, multi-account/multi-subscription structure

secure network architecture (vpc/firewall/transit/zero trust)

iam architecture และ key management

high availability, dr และ data protection

มีประสบการณ์ด้าน application modernization (microservices, api-first, container orchestration)

เข้าใจ data architecture เบื้องต้นเพื่อสนับสนุน data modernization

ความเชี่ยวชาญ cloud governance: policy, standards, tagging, resource model, workload classification

security architecture (iam, encryption, vulnerability management, logging, monitoring)

มีประสบการณ์ในการจัดตั้งหรือดำเนินการ cloud center of excellence (ccoe) จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

compliance framework เช่น iso 27001, nist, pdpa

qualification

ปริญญาตรี/โท สาขา computer engineering, computer science, it หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

มีประสบการณ์ด้าน cloud architecture 5 ปีขึ้นไป

มี cloud solution architect certificate จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

key responsibility

1. cloud architecture design

ออกแบบ enterprise cloud architecture ครอบคลุม network, security, compute, storage, integration

จัดทำ architecture blueprint, reference architecture และ reusable patterns

2. cloud governance & compliance

จัดทำ cloud governance framework ให้ครอบคลุม iam, tagging, cicd, finops, compliance

ประสานงานกับ cloud operations เพื่อให้ architecture ถูกนำไป implement อย่างถูกต้อง

3. cloud center of excellence (ccoe) setup & leadership

เป็นผู้ขับเคลื่อน ccoe

นิยาม scope, operating model, process และ governance ของ ccoe

สร้าง cloud capability ให้ทีมภายใน เช่น training, playbook

4. cloud migration/modernization

ช่วยวิเคราะห์และออกแบบทางเลือก modernization (rehost/replatform/refactor/replace)

ทำงานกับทีม application/data เพื่อวางสถาปัตยกรรมระบบเป้าหมาย

สนับสนุนการสร้าง landing zone และ migration foundation

maintain effective communication and collaboration with both internal stakeholders and government officials

qualifications

bachelor's degree / master's degree in it, computer engineer, computer science, management information system or related fields.

5+ years experience in it project management, it software delivery or it consulting.

knowledge of fundamental project management processes, methodologies, tools, and techniques.

strong experience managing it projects in the public sector, particularly those involving government clients

solid knowledge of public procurement rules and tor development

proven ability to coordinate across multiple internal teams and external parties, including government representatives

experience working with system integrators or vendors servicing government contracts is a strong advantage

highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple projects under pressure

fluent in thai and english, with excellent skills in formal communication and documentation

if have project management certificate such as pmp or agile certificate is plus.

about the role

our client, a fast-growing martech / loyalty solutions platform, is looking for a frontend developer to lead the development of high-performance web applications. this role is ideal for someone who enjoys building scalable, user-centric products while guiding junior developers and shaping frontend best practices.




key responsibilities

lead frontend development using modern frameworks and best practices

translate product requirements into technical designs, sequence diagrams, and api specifications

develop and maintain scalable web applications, including api integration and unit testing

review source code and solution designs to ensure quality, consistency, and security standards

optimize applications for performance, scalability, and user experience

implement and manage caching strategies and version control for client-side delivery

collaborate with product, backend, and design teams on feature development

prepare build artifacts and support deployment and release processes

mentor junior developers and contribute to a strong engineering culture




tech stack

frontend: react.js, next.js, vue.js, angularjs

cdn: aws cloudfront

tagging & analytics: gtm, ga4, pixel, appsflyer

devops: docker




qualifications

minimum 4 years of frontend development experience

strong proficiency in at least one modern framework (react, vue, or angular)

solid understanding of html5, css3/4, and responsive design principles

experience with typescript, git, and testing (unit & integration)

knowledge of web performance optimization, caching, and deployment strategies

familiarity with seo, accessibility, and frontend security (owasp top 10)

exposure to ci/cd pipelines and devops practices is a plus

ability to mentor team members and take ownership of projects

role overview

we are seeking an security solution architect lead to join our technology & information architectures team. in this role, you will be responsible for defining, reviewing, and integrating application security architecture across complex digital platforms and workstreams.

you will act as a security subject matter expert, providing architectural leadership, advisory support, and decision‑making across multiple teams. this role requires strong technical depth in application security, the ability to influence stakeholders, and experience embedding security into all phases of the application lifecycle.

key responsibilities

define, review, and integrate application security requirements across applications and platforms.

review and provide input into application security technical architecture, ensuring security considerations are embedded into final design decisions.

act as a security architecture lead, owning security decisions across multiple teams and workstreams.

collaborate with cross‑functional teams (architecture, development, infrastructure, and delivery) to ensure security is integrated throughout the sdlc.

conduct application security risk assessments, identify vulnerabilities, and recommend appropriate mitigation strategies.

provide solutions to cross‑team security challenges, addressing both technical and business risks.

develop and maintain application security standards, policies, and procedures.

stay up to date with emerging security threats, technologies, and best practices to continuously improve application security posture.

provide guidance, mentoring, and training to team members on application security principles and best practices.

act as a trusted advisor to stakeholders, providing security recommendations and influencing key architectural decisions.

required skills & experience

strong experience in application security architecture or application security lead roles.

expert proficiency in application security, including secure design, threat modeling, and vulnerability management.

experience performing application security assessments and translating findings into actionable remediation plans.

strong understanding of enterprise application architectures and system integration.

proven ability to work across multiple teams and influence architectural and security decisions.

strong analytical, problem‑solving, and communication skills.

nice to have

experience in enterprise or financial services environments.

exposure to digital transformation or large‑scale platform initiatives.

knowledge of secure integration patterns, apis, and modern application platforms.

background in consulting or project‑based delivery environments.

key responsibilities

design, build, and maintain scalable ci/cd platforms, pipelines, and workflows to accelerate software delivery.

define and enforce devops best practices and standards, collaborating closely with development and operations teams.

partner with development teams to ensure applications are built with scalability, resilience, security, and performance in mind.

contribute to system architecture and software development activities, ensuring devops principles are embedded throughout.

lead and support incident triage, root cause analysis, and troubleshooting of production issues.

develop automation using coding languages and scripting to streamline operations and workflows.

implement and champion devsecops practices across the software development lifecycle.

proactively identify opportunities for improvement, propose new solutions, and leverage emerging technologies.

drive knowledge sharing with development and operations teams on devops tools, platforms, and practices.



essential skills & prerequisites

5+ years of proven experience in devops, site reliability engineering, or related fields.

solid understanding and hands-on experience in all phases of the software development lifecycle.

expertise in ci/cd tools such as jenkins, helm, ansible, terraform, git, nexus, etc.

strong knowledge in modern devops/sre tools: argocd, hashicorp vault, cert manager, keycloak, service mesh, event-driven/streaming platforms, etc.

deep experience with linux operating systems and automation scripting.

proficiency in multiple programming and scripting languages (e.g., java, reactjs, angularjs, nodejs, python, bash, golang).

experience with observability and monitoring platforms such as opensearch, logstash, elk stack, prometheus, loki, mimir, grafana, opentelemetry, jaeger, etc.

expertise in containerization, kubernetes, cloud, and virtualization platforms (docker, cri-o, aws, gcp, eks, openshift, vmware, etc.).

proven track record with high availability, large-scale, and performance-critical systems.

strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with effective collaboration and communication abilities.

continuous learner with a passion for emerging technologies and innovation.

positive, proactive mindset with empathy and a strong team-first attitude.

why bonfire gathering?

at bonfire gathering, you’ll join an innovative and fast-growing team that blends gaming creativity with modern digital solution development. whether you’re building systems that support our games or delivering high-impact software for external partners, you will be part of a collaborative, agile environment that values ownership, problem-solving, and continuous improvement. here, your work directly contributes to shaping both our gaming experiences and our expanding digital ecosystem—ranging from commercial applications to enterprise platforms and cloud-driven solutions. if you are passionate about creating meaningful technology, driving impactful projects, and growing with a company that pushes the boundaries of what’s possible across multiple industries, we encourage you to apply. apply today by sending an email to career@bonfiregathering.com with your resume and portfolio attached. please include your expected salary in your application.




about us:

bonfire gathering is a new and dynamic player in the game industry, led by oat pramote pathan, committed to delivering immersive gaming experiences to thai players. we are dedicated to fostering innovation and creativity in the world of gaming. at bonfire gathering, we value passion, teamwork, and a relentless pursuit of excellence.

beyond gaming, we are expanding into a full digital ecosystem that spans software house and enterprise solution development, commercial web and mobile applications, cloud and infrastructure services, data and analytics platforms, as well as automation tools and internal productivity systems. our goal is to build technology that empowers both our players and our partners across multiple industries.

we are currently seeking talented and enthusiastic individuals to join our team and contribute to our mission. whether you’re passionate about gaming or driven to build impactful digital products, we encourage you to explore the exciting career opportunities with us. join us in creating memorable experiences, developing innovative solutions, and pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in the digital world.

Company: Bank of Ayudhya Public Company Limited
Job_Description:
solution architect

is a "hands-on" architect responsible for the structural integrity of a specific business domain. this role acts as the bridge between business requirements and technical execution, ensuring that solutions are not only functional but also secure, scalable, and compliant with the bank's "golden paths"




core responsibilities

architectural artifacts: serves as the primary author of the high-level design (hld) andthe architecture definition document (add) using arc42 standards

system modeling: utilizes the c4 model to create detailed component models anddocumentation that eliminate developer interpretation.

technical governance: ensures project-level "gate" success and prevents localizedtechnical debt or security leaks.

design precision: defines system building blocks (sbbs) and formal api specifications(openapi/swagger).

decision management: records all architectural trade-offs as architecture decisionrecords (adrs) in a version-controlled repository.




cloud & container technology

platform expertise: architectural design and management within openshift (ocp) and kubernetes (k8s) environments. 

secret & key management: integration of vault and hardware security modules (hsm)for robust cryptographic operations and secret management.

service mesh: implementation of istio for traffic management and securecommunication.

governance: applying gitops governance and integrating security scanning into ci/cdpipelines.




banking security & regulatory standards

cyber resilience: alignment with the bank of thailand (bot) cyber resilienceframework to ensure systemic safety.

data privacy (pdpa): designing field-level encryption and masking for personallyidentifiable information (pii) to comply with pdpa regulations.

identity & access: enforcing multi-factor authentication (mfa) and utilizing oidc/oauth2 and jwt (jws/jwe) for secure identity.

audit readiness: acting as a technical contact for bot it examinations and ensuring alldesign assets are ready for regulatory audit.

payment standards: knowledge of pci-dss for cardholder data security




technical skills & patterns

microservices patterns: expertise in database-per-service, circuit breaker, sidecar, and saga patterns (distributed transactions)

messaging & integration: proficiency in apache kafka (ensuring idempotency), grpc,and rest (level 3).

distributed systems: application of cap theorem and event sourcing in high-availability environments.

resilience: implementing strangler fig patterns for legacy migration and automateddisaster recovery (drp) plans.

Job_Description:

นำเครื่องมือและเทคโนโลยี เช่น power bi, rpa, machine learning, ai ฯลฯ มาประยุกต์ใช้ เพื่อให้การจัดทำงบประมาณและการนำเสนอรายงานเพื่อการบริหารมีประสิทธิภาพมากยิ่งขึ้น

การศึกษาปริญญาตรี หรือสูงขึ้นไป สาขาบัญชี, การเงิน หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

Job_Title: Tencent Cloud Senior Strategic Sales Executive - Thailand
Job_Description:
business unit
cloud & smart industries group (csig) is responsible for promoting the company's cloud and industry internet strategy. csig explores the interactions between users and industries to create innovative solutions for smart industries via technological advancements such as cloud, ai, and network security. while driving the digitalization of retail, medical, education, transportation and other industries, csig helps companies serve users in smarter ways, building a new ecosystem of intelligent industries that connect users and businesses.

what the role entails

are you ready to take on the challenge of driving tencent cloud's growth in thailand? we are looking for a passionate and dynamic senior strategic sales executive to drive our expansion efforts, connecting businesses with cutting-edge cloud solutions. in this exciting role, you will tap into your expert networking skills, build relationships with high-level executives, and strategically position tencent cloud's services to meet the evolving needs of enterprises across various industries. you'll be at the forefront of cloud innovation, collaborating with talented teams to deliver tailored solutions that drive value for our customers. if you're a proactive sales professional with a hunger for success and a passion for technology, this is your opportunity to make a real impact in one of southeast asia's fastest-growing markets!

responsibilities

leverage networking and prospecting skills to generate leads and identify strategic sales opportunities within the indonesian market.
build and nurture high-value relationships with key stakeholders, driving enterprise-level sales.
partner with the business contracts manager to lead contract negotiations with customers.
meet and exceed sales goals, sustain revenue growth, and develop recommendations to enhance account growth and revenue potential.
prepare and execute strategic account plans, sales forecasts, status reports, and quota attainment.
gain deep proficiency in tencent cloud's offerings and provide tailored service solutions that align with customer needs.
develop strategic plans for key industries based on market trends and customer analysis.
collaborate closely with the solution architecture team to ensure customers receive maximum value from their investments.
manage the entire sales lifecycle, from lead generation to closing deals, across all accounts.

who we look for


bachelor's degree in computer science or its equivalents
minimum 5 years of experience selling cloud services, managing large high-profile accounts (this is essential). knowledge of cloud services, cdn, saas, and the broader internet space.
bilingual proficiency in thai and english is required; mandarin language skill is a plus.
proven "hunter" mentality with exceptional ability to close sales and generate leads.
experience selling to c-level executives with a strong record of closing high-value deals.
strong technical sensibility, with the ability to understand complex solutions and translate them into customer benefits.
proven ability to grow revenue, manage enterprise accounts, and articulate complex cloud and saas solutions to decision-makers.
experience analyzing data, trends, and market conditions to develop key selling points and strategies.

#:li-jy1

equal employment opportunity at tencent

as an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. we foster an environment where every employee of tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.

ตำแหน่ง: sap business one (sap b1) consultant

บริษัท softpower it co., ltd. มองหา sap b1 consultant ที่มีความเชี่ยวชาญในการส่งมอบโซลูชัน sap b1 ที่มีคุณภาพสูงสุดให้กับลูกค้า คุณจะได้ร่วมวางแผน ออกแบบ และนำระบบ sap b1 ไปปรับใช้ในธุรกิจของลูกค้า ซึ่งเป็นบทบาทที่มีความสำคัญต่อการเติบโตของธุรกิจและเป็นโอกาสที่ยอดเยี่ยมในการพัฒนาทักษะซึ่งจะเป็นการเปิดทางไปสู่ความก้าวหน้าในอาชีพของคุณ




หน้าที่หลัก:

ทำความเข้าใจความต้องการของลูกค้า วิเคราะห์และออกแบบโซลูชันที่เหมาะสมด้วยระบบ sap b1

ระบุปัญหาและข้อจำกัดในระบบ และเสนอแนะแนวทางแก้ไขที่เหมาะสม

ปรับใช้ระบบ sap b1 ให้เหมาะสมกับธุรกิจของลูกค้า รวมถึงการกำหนดค่าตั้งระบบ การนำเข้าข้อมูล และการทดสอบระบบ

ฝึกอบรมและให้คำปรึกษาแก่ผู้ใช้งาน เพื่อให้มั่นใจว่าสามารถใช้ระบบได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

ให้คำปรึกษาแก่ลูกค้าในกรณีเกิดปัญหาระหว่างการใช้งานระบบ
 

ทักษะ คุณสมบัติ และประสบการณ์:

มีประสบการณ์การเป็น consultant หรือมีประสบการณ์ในการใช้ระบบ sap b1 จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

มีความเข้าใจอย่างลึกซึ้งเกี่ยวกับระบบ sap b1 ในด้านฟังก์ชันการทำงาน 

มีทักษะในการแก้ปัญหา และเป็นผู้ที่สามารถวิเคราะห์ปัญหาและนำเสนอแนวทางการแก้ไขได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

มีทักษะการสื่อสารที่ดี สามารถนำเสนอและอธิบายเกี่ยวกับระบบ sap b1 ให้ผู้ใช้งานเข้าใจได้ง่าย

มีความกระตือรือร้นในการพัฒนาความรู้ด้านระบบ erp โดยเฉพาะ sap business one

สามารถเข้าใจความต้องการของลูกค้าและฟังก์ชันของระบบได้อย่างรวดเร็ว

สามารถวิเคราะห์ปัญหาและแก้ไขสถานการณ์เฉพาะหน้าได้ดี

มีทักษะการคิดวิเคราะห์ การแก้ไขปัญหา และการนำเสนอแนวทางแก้ไขอย่างเป็นระบบ

มีทักษะการสื่อสารที่ดี สามารถอธิบายเรื่องทางเทคนิคให้ผู้ใช้งานเข้าใจได้ง่าย

มีความสามารถในการเรียนรู้และปรับตัวได้ดี เพื่อรับมือกับการเปลี่ยนแปลงและความต้องการของลูกค้า

หากมีความรู้เรื่อง ms sql การเขียน query และ crystal report จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

สามารถเรียนรู้ระบบหรือกระบวนการใหม่ ๆ ได้อย่างรวดเร็วและมีประสิทธิภาพ

มีทักษะในการใช้งานโปรแกรม microsoft office (excel, word, powerpoint) ได้ดี

มีใบรับรองการฝึกอบรมหรือประกาศนียบัตรจาก sap b1 จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ 

สามารถเดินทางไปทำงานกับโครงการลูกค้าที่ต่างจังหวัดได้เป็นระยะ

หากมีพาหนะส่วนตัวจะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

at chaixi corporation, we are passionate about delivering exceptional customer experiences, and we know that great it infrastructure plays a pivotal role in making this happen. we are currently looking for an experienced team lead – it to join our team and manage all internal it support and infrastructure operations to ensure our systems run smoothly and efficiently. 

key responsibilities: 

internal it support management 

lead and manage it support operations for all internal users, ensuring efficient troubleshooting and resolution of hardware, software, and network issues. 

develop and implement it support policies and procedures to optimize system performance and user experience. 

ensure all it incidents, service requests, and system outages are tracked, addressed, and resolved in a timely manner. 

infrastructure & systems management 

oversee the company’s it infrastructure, including servers, networks, cloud solutions, and pos systems for food retail operations. 

ensure it systems are secure, reliable, and scalable to support the growing needs of chaixi’s businesses. 

manage software licensing, hardware inventory, and it asset lifecycle to maintain optimal system performance. 

it support for food retail & business operations 

provide end-to-end it support for food retail outlets, ensuring seamless operation of pos systems, digital payment solutions, and backend systems. 

work closely with restaurant and franchise teams to optimize it solutions for store operations, inventory management, and customer transactions. 

support it infrastructure for new store openings, ensuring smooth system integration and minimal disruption. 

collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement technology-driven improvements for business efficiency. 

security, compliance & it strategy 

ensure it security protocols and data protection measures are in place across all business units. 

develop business continuity and disaster recovery plans to minimize it disruptions. 

stay updated on emerging it trends and recommend new technologies to improve operational efficiency. 

manage it budgets and vendor relationships to optimize cost and service quality.


qualifications:

bachelor's degree in information technology, computer science, or related field.

minimum 7+ years of experience in it support and infrastructure management, preferably in multi-location businesses.

strong expertise in networking, cloud computing, pos systems, and it security.

proven experience managing it support teams and working with cross-functional business units.

excellent troubleshooting, problem-solving, and communication skills.

ability to manage multiple it projects, from system upgrades to store openings.

familiarity with managing microsoft 365 (m365), entra id, and intune.

experience in managing and supporting wired and wireless infrastructure.

proven experience in rolling out internal it projects.

หน้าที่และความรับผิดชอบ:

documentation: จัดเตรียมเอกสารที่เกี่ยวข้องกับข้อเสนอโครงการ และเอกสารสนับสนุนอื่น ๆ 

requirements: เก็บและวิเคราะห์ requirement ของลูกค้าในกลุ่มรัฐบาล/รัฐวิสาหกิจเพื่อออกแบบ it solution ที่เหมาะสม สามารถนำเสนอแนวความคิดในการออกแบบ และประโยชน์ที่จะได้รับ

risk assessment: ประเมินและบริหารความเสี่ยงของโครงการ พร้อมทั้งนำเสนอให้กับผู้บริหาร

cost management: จัดหา hardware และ/หรือ software vendors เพื่อประเมินราคาในการจัดทำโครงการ

proof of concept: จัดเตรียมการนำเสนอความเป็นไปได้ของระบบ และสรุปผลการทดสอบ เพื่อสร้างความเชื่อมั่นให้กับลูกค้าและผู้เกี่ยวข้องได้

communication: ประสานงานกับทีม business analysts และทีม service delivery เพื่อให้โครงการประสบความสำเร็จตรงตามวัตถุประสงค์และได้ตามเวลาที่กำหนด




คุณสมบัติ:

วุฒิปริญญาตรีขึ้นไป สาขา computer science, computer engineering, it หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

ประสบการณ์ทำงานไม่น้อยกว่า 3-5 ปี ในสายงาน presales / system analyst

มีประสบการณ์ในรับผิดชอบโครงการ it solution แบบ end-to-end อย่างน้อย 1-5 โครงการ

พิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ หากมีประสบการณ์ตรงในการทำงานโครงการพัฒนาระบบให้กับหน่วยงานภาครัฐ (system integrate)

พิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ หากเคยจัดทำเอกสารชงงบ / tor / proposal / bidding / poc

พิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ หากมีความสามารถในการเขียนโปรแกรม




ทักษะ:

requirement gathering & analysis – สามารถสัมภาษณ์ วิเคราะห์ และสรุปความต้องการของลูกค้าภาครัฐ

technical knowledge – เข้าใจพื้นฐานด้าน application, database, network, security, ai

solution design & architecture – ออกแบบสถาปัตยกรรมระบบ (application, infrastructure, network, security)

documentation & presentation – จัดทำเอกสารนำเสนอ solution, presentation และการนำเสนอที่ตอบโจทย์ลูกค้า

project awareness – มองภาพรวมโครงการได้ เข้าใจ timeline, risk, resource และการส่งมอบ

budget & costing – จัดทำงบประมาณทั้ง project development cost และ client proposal budget

tor & proposal writing – จัดทำเอกสาร tor, ข้อกำหนดทางเทคนิค, proposal เพื่อประมูลภาครัฐ

vendor & partner management – คัดเลือก เปรียบเทียบ เจรจา vendor ทางด้าน technology

presentation & demo – สามารถนำเสนอ solution, ทำ poc (proof of concept) และ demo

ai-driven solution design – นำ ai มาออกแบบหรือเพิ่มมูลค่าใน solution (เช่น ai chatbot, ai security, predictive analytics) ให้ตรงตามโจทย์ลูกค้าภาครัฐ

ai tools utilization – ใช้เครื่องมือ ai (เช่น chatgpt, copilot, ai diagram, ai proposal generator) เพื่อเร่งการทำงานด้าน requirement, solution design, และ tor/proposal
