Job_Description:
your responsibility as a database administrator (dba) will be the performance, capacity, integrity and security of a database. you'll be involved in the planning and development of the database with the fit recommendation and technology, as well as in troubleshooting any issues

role and responsibilities / หน้าที่ความรับผิดชอบ: 

installation, upgrades, migrations and configuration database.

design and build databases, schemas, stored procedures, and other database objects.

design backup recovery strategy based on application requirements like schedule, retention etc.

maintains database security and integrity follow policy and governance.

set up routine database backup procedures and disaster recovery procedures.

perform database performance tuning and capacity planning.

setup monitoring and alerting on database performance, system metrics, trends.

maintain, and manage the database system in accordance with the service level agreement (sla).

supporting day-to-day operation, incident and change.

assist developers and end-users with database usage, query development, and tuning.

provides help to junior dba with complex database tasks.

competent to work at the highest level of all phases of database administration.

advance database administration – replication, migration, data distribution, etc.

qualifications / คุณสมบัติ:


experience 5+ years in database administration and related db software tools management.

must have extensive knowledge of oracle rdbms, rac and data guard/ ms sql server.

knowledge of mysql, mariadb and postgresql are advantages.

experience working in the azure data lake and other rds on cloud environments.

experience working in the  etl tool (ibm datastage, ms ssis) is an added advantage.

experienced in data warehouse and big data on design and performance tuning

knowledge of nosql (mongodb), graphql (dgraph) and elastic are advantages.

knowledge of in-memory database (redis) is an added advantage.

on-call / on-site requirements to ensure 24 x 7 support of database operations

unix and windows batch scripting knowledge is mandatory.

knowledge of automation framework (jenkins,terraform, ansible, git) are advantages.

we are looking for a curious, hungry mid-level engineer to join us as a core builder. we are a small, ambitious founding team moving fast. we build with ai at our core — not as a gimmick, but as a genuine multiplier for a lean team with big ambitions.

our platform has two sides: a merchant-facing portal where brands submit product data, and a consumer-facing platform. you will work on every layer of the product — from merchant data submission flows to consumer product discovery — and you will do it using modern ai-assisted development (what some call vibe coding). this is not a role for someone who wants to be handed a ticket queue. it is for someone who wants to learn how to build full-stack software with ai as a collaborator, ship fast, and grow into a senior engineer by doing real work on a product that matters.

merchant partner portal

•        onboarding flows for brands to register, submit product data, and upload sustainability documentation

•        ai-assisted data validation pipelines that flag inconsistencies and prompt merchants for missing information

•        dashboard for merchants to track verification status, feedback, and referral performance

consumer discovery platform

•        product listing pages with sustainability scores, labels, and rich product detail

•        search, filtering, and recommendation features that surface the right products to the right customers

•        referral and conversion tracking tied to our fee-based business model

platform & infrastructure

•        api design and backend logic connecting both sides of the marketplace

•        authentication, role-based access, and multi-tenant data architecture

•        integrations with third-party tools for payments, analytics, and communications

•        previous experience in mobile app and basics for website

experience

•        2–5 years of professional software engineering experience

•        familiarity with full-stack web development — you have shipped something end-to-end before

•        comfort working across the stack: ui components, api routes, database queries, deployments

•        experience with at least one modern framework (react, next.js, vue, or similar)

•        working knowledge of relational or document databases (postgresql, mongodb, or similar)

Job_Title: Senior Back End Developer / Full Stack - GO Lang

experience with database systems, scalable architectures, and message brokers (e.g., rabbitmq, kafka).

knowledge of ci/cd pipelines and cloud platforms (aws, azure, or gcp).

soft skills:

passion for solving complex technical challenges.

open-minded, adaptable, and able to work in a flexible, collaborative environment.

15 days of annual leave.

hybrid working model (onsite 2 days at siam).

what we offer 

we offer impactful and challenging work with mentorship and support from direct managers and subject matter experts. you will have autonomy to manage your career path with endless opportunities for professional growth. our comprehensive benefit package covers medical insurance, life, accident and disability insurance, wellness allowance, vaccination allowance, providence fund, flexible working arrangement, and professional certification. bluebik provides opportunities to become the best version of yourself!

Company: Bank of Ayudhya Public Company Limited
Job_Description:
quality assurance team lead (krungsri nimble) 

summary and description: 

at krungsri nimble, we are the innovation-driven tech arm of krungsri group, and we’re seeking an experienced, proactive qa lead to own quality assurance for our banking applications. the role requires strong cross‑functional coordination, the ability to define and execute end‑to‑end testing strategies across integrated systems, and leadership to build and mentor a high‑performing qa team. this person will champion a quality‑first mindset, establish quality gates from design through delivery, and ensure the team delivers reliable, high‑quality products end‑to‑end. 

what you’ll be doing: 

• lead qa strategy for a largescale digital banking platform across backend, frontend, mobile, and mini apps. 
• define and drive end-to-end testing with both manual and automated approaches. 
• partner with engineering and product teams to ensure early defect prevention and strong test coverage. 
• oversee e2e test execution, including data setup, environments, and cross system risks. 
• accelerate automation with high impact initiatives and guide sdets using typescript frameworks (playwright, cypress). 
• monitor and improve key quality metrics and uncover root causes through coverage and defect trend analysis. 
• mentor a qa team of 6–12 engineers, fostering ownership and technical excellence. 
• continuously improve qa workflows, tools, and practices across squads. 

what will make you a great fit: 

• 5+ years in qa, including 2+ years in a lead role. 
• strong functional testing experience (banking/finance a plus). 
• hands on in api testing (rest, json/xml, postman), mobile (ios/android), and mini app testing. 
• proven ability to plan and execute e2e tests across complex systems. 
• effective cross team coordination with multiple stakeholders. 
• experience partnering with automation teams and contributing to automation strategy. 
• background in scaling automation within ci/cd pipelines. 
• solid grasp of qa processes, test management, and defect tracking. 

why you’ll love working with us 

at krungsri nimble, you’ll join a passionate team working at the intersection of technology and banking innovation. we embrace an agile mindset where you’ll have real ownership and the opportunity to influence system design and business outcomes. in our collaborative and transparent environment, we prioritize continuous learning to stay ahead of the curve. if you're looking for a role where you can make a responsible impact, grow your expertise, and help shape the future of digital banking, this is where you belong.  

apply now and build something transformative with us!

job title: cloudnurse product manager / designer

level: mid-level | full product lifecycle ownership

location: bangkok, thailand (hybrid – 1 day wfh)




about cloudnurse 

at cloudnurse, we are building the future of nursing operations. our platform is a comprehensive nursing information system that combines ehr (electronic health records) and erp (enterprise resource planning) to help nursing facilities run their businesses better. we build tools that empower everyone — from nurse aides on the floor to nurse managers and business owners — ensuring better care and smoother operations. 

the role 

we are looking for a mid-level product manager / designer to join our small, lean, and fast-moving team. this is a combined role where you will own the full product lifecycle — from discovery and user research through design and specification to launch, measurement, and continuous improvement. 

you won’t just be making things look good or writing specs in isolation. you will have high ownership over the “why,” “what,” and “how” we build. you will talk directly to users, design solutions using ai-powered tools, write detailed prds, hand off to development, define success metrics, track usage post-launch, and drive adoption through documentation, training, and education. 

for your first 3–6 months, your primary goals will be to drive the design and specification of brand-new product features, establish a scalable design system, and set up measurement frameworks to track feature adoption and impact. 




what you’ll do 

discovery & user research 

• conduct user interviews and usability testing with nursing staff, nurse managers, and business owners to uncover pain points and validate solutions. 

• synthesize research findings into actionable insights that inform product direction and feature prioritization. 

• develop and maintain user personas that represent the distinct needs of nurse aides, nurse managers, and facility owners. 

design & prototyping (ai-assisted) 

• create ui/ux designs for new features, leveraging ai design tools such as figma ai, google stitch, and similar platforms to accelerate the design process. 

• build, document, and maintain the official cloudnurse design system to ensure consistency and speed up development. 

• translate complex healthcare and business workflows into intuitive interfaces, balancing quick data entry (ehr) with complex business management (erp). 

product specification & development handoff 

• write detailed product requirements documents (prds) that include user stories, acceptance criteria, edge cases, and technical considerations. 

• define scope, requirements, and priorities for new features and improvements.

• hand off complete specs and designs to the development team with clear documentation, ensuring smooth implementation. 

measurement & analytics 

• define success metrics and kpis for every feature launched — what to measure, how to measure it, and what targets to hit. 

• set up and monitor product analytics (e.g., posthog) to track feature adoption, usage patterns, and user behavior post-launch. 

• build dashboards and reports that give the team visibility into how features are performing. 

adoption, training & continuous improvement 

• analyze usage data to identify drop-off points, underused features, and opportunities for improvement. 

• plan and execute adoption strategies based on data — including writing or improving help documentation, user guides, and in-app guidance. 

• coordinate on-site training sessions and educational materials for nursing staff and facility managers to drive feature adoption. 

• iterate on designs and workflows based on real usage data and user feedback, closing the build–measure–learn loop. 




what we’re looking for 

• experience: ~3+ years in product design, product management, or a combined role — ideally with saas, b2b, or complex dashboard products. 

• design fundamentals & systems: strong understanding of ui/ux fundamentals (typography, spacing, hierarchy). solid experience with component-based design and building scalable design systems. 

• product & strategy mindset: you understand that good design solves business problems. comfortable conducting user research, defining requirements, writing prds, and shaping product strategy. 

• tool stack: highly proficient in figma. comfortable using ai-powered design tools (figma ai, google stitch, or similar) to accelerate design and research workflows. 

• analytics & measurement: familiarity with product analytics platforms (e.g., posthog) to define metrics, track usage, and make data-driven decisions. 

• communication & education: strong ability to articulate design decisions, write clear documentation, and create training materials. comfortable presenting to stakeholders and leading user training sessions. 

• bonus: experience in healthcare, nursing, or regulated industries. 

location, language & work arrangement 

• location: must be based in bangkok, thailand. this is a hybrid position with 1 day work-from-home per week. 

• thai language: native-level fluency in spoken and written thai is required. • english language: professional proficiency in spoken and written english is required.

why join us? 

real ownership

own the full product lifecycle — from user research and design through prds, analytics, and adoption. shape the product roadmap and build the design system from scratch.

impact 

build software that directly improves the lives of healthcare workers and the efficiency of nursing businesses.

flexibility 

hybrid work setup in bangkok (1 wfh day per week).

imagine being responsible in the production area plays a key role in supporting decision-making and improving production efficiency through data and must be detail-oriented and able to work collaboratively with various teams.

we love that you will…

key accountabilities:

 delivery & technical leadership

design, develop and maintain data collection systems in production, such as creating applications or data recording systems.

lead to develop dashboards and reports using bi tools such as power bi and excel to provide accurate and timely information for reporting kpis, productivity, scrap, rework, etc., for relevant departments.

architect data models and lead complex analyses (spc, regression/forecasting, doe), experimentation/a-b tests, and narrative insights.

digitalization & integration

co-lead integration of mes/scada/historians/iot with erp; field governance.

plan and lead to execute pilots and scale-ups; manage uat, cutovers, and post-go-live stabilization.

data governance & quality

own data dictionary, lineage, and access controls; set slas for timeliness, completeness, accuracy.

implement monitoring/alerting; drive root-cause elimination for recurrent data issues.

ensure pdpa and internal policy compliance.

people & change

coach team (incl. entry-level analysts) with clear learning paths and standards.

enable stakeholders via clinics/training on data literacy and bi self-service.

translate data insights into actions with line leaders and track realized value.




we love that you are…

bachelor’s degree or above in data science, statistics, engineering, or a related field.

strong in english & thai communication.

proficiency in data analysis tools and software such as sql, python, r, and excel.

experience with data visualization tools like tableau or power bi.

knowledge of ai and machine learning concepts and tools.

strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to interpret complex data sets.

excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present data findings clearly to stakeholders.

training on data literacy and bi self-service.

high level of accuracy and attention to detail in data analysis and reporting.

 

welcome to our crafting & supply

the magic happens at our crafting facilities, where we combine centuries-old crafting traditions and high-quality materials with modern production techniques. you will be warmly greeted with over 13,000 craftspeople who are excellent at crafting and supplying the world’s largest jewellery brand with our craftsmanship. you will be part of a team of production team and report to director, fe production (aaa)

join a team that is as diverse and inclusive as our jewellery. we believe and value creative thinking and ensure that there’s equitable opportunities for all.

·       foster your growth and craft opportunities through our learning and development programmes.

·       at pandora, no effort or contribution goes unnoticed. we offer a wide range of opportunities and benefits to ensure that our employees feel valued, supported, and cared for.

·       transportation services are also available to drop you at the closet bts station and other community areas.




about pandora crafting & supply

pandora started crafting its jewellery in thailand in 1989, where our founders fell in love with the delicate craftsmanship of the thai people. to date, there are two crafting facilities in thailand, bangkok, and lamphun, and we employ more than 13,000 skilled craftspeople. by the end of 2024, there are 113 million pieces sold globally, all of which were hand-finished here in thailand by our skilled craftspeople using high-quality raw materials and sustainable methods. 

 

about pandora group

pandora is the world’s largest jewellery brand. designed in denmark and crafted in thailand, pandora jewellery provides endless opportunities for personalisation, allowing people to express their passions and show who they are. the company’s products are made from high-quality materials and sold in more than 100 countries through 6,800 points of sale, including 2,600 concept stores.

pandora is committed to leadership in sustainability and is sourcing lab-grown stones and recycled silver and gold for all its jewellery. headquartered in copenhagen, denmark, pandora employs 37,000 people worldwide, is listed on the nasdaq copenhagen stock exchange, and generated sales of dkk 31.7 billion (eur 4.25 billion) in 2024.

this position leads the system, network, and it operations team to ensure seamless service delivery, while maintaining readiness for customer and compliance audits. the ideal candidate combines strong technical expertise with leadership capability to guide a high-performing infrastructure team.

responsibilities

strong analytical, problem-solving, and documentation skills.

proactive, service-minded, and able to perform under pressure.

good command of english and thai, both spoken and written.

สร้าง modernization blueprint สำหรับระบบ legacy

2. define target architecture

ออกแบบ target application architecture แบบ modular, cloud-native

สร้าง reference architecture, design guidelines และ reusable patterns

3. technology portfolio rationalization

วิเคราะห์และคัดเลือกเทคโนโลยีที่เหมาะสมในองค์กร

พิจารณาระบบที่ต้อง retire/replace เพื่อลด complexity และ cost

เสนอ tco/roi เพื่อให้ผู้บริหารตัดสินใจได้ง่ายขึ้น

4. vendor & partner management

ทำงานกับ vendor ในการออกแบบ solution modernization

ประเมิน proposal และควบคุมคุณภาพงานของ vendor

Company: บริษัท แอสเซนด์ กรุ๊ป จำกัด
Job_Description:
job summary:

the senior data engineer will be a foundational member of our team, responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable and robust data pipelines and infrastructure. this role will be critical in integrating vast and diverse datasets from across our group businesses into a unified data platform. the senior data engineer will ensure data quality, accessibility, and performance, enabling our data analysts to derive actionable insights that drive business growth.

key responsibilities:

• design, develop, and maintain robust etl/elt pipelines to ingest, transform, and load data from various source systems into our central data warehouse.

• build and optimize data models within the data warehouse (e.g., bigquery) to support analytical and reporting needs. • ensure data quality, consistency, and reliability across all integrated datasets.

• implement and manage data governance best practices, including data lineage, metadata management, and access controls.

• collaborate closely with data analysts to understand their data requirements and optimize data structures for analytical performance.

• manage and optimize cloud data infrastructure, ensuring scalability, cost-efficiency, and security.

• troubleshoot data-related issues and implement solutions to ensure continuous data flow.

• evaluate and recommend new data technologies and tools to enhance our data platform capabilities.

qualifications:

• bachelor's or master's degree in computer science, software engineering, data engineering, or a related technical field.

• minimum of 5-7 years of extensive experience in data engineering, building and maintaining large scale data pipelines.

• expert proficiency in sql and python for data manipulation, scripting, and pipeline development.

• deep hands-on experience with cloud data platforms, specifically google cloud platform (gcp), including bigquery, cloud storage, dataflow, cloud composer (airflow), and pub/sub.

• strong understanding of data warehousing concepts, data modeling (e.g., kimball, inmon), and schema design. • experience with various data integration patterns (batch, streaming) and tools.

• familiarity with data governance principles and data security best practices.

• excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work with complex, diverse datasets.

• experience with distributed computing frameworks (e.g., spark) is a plus

job responsibilities

responding and managing in a timely manner to it services issues and requests.

providing technical support and advising across the company, this may be over the phone or in person.

acting as a point of contact for all it services and issues, assigning work to other team members as appropriate.

installing and configuring computer hardware, software, systems, networks, printers and other it related devices.

ensuring it assets are properly managed.

managing ticketing system with standard itil approach.

identifying opportunities that can improve the efficiency of the it support process.


job qualifications

bachelor’s degree or higher in computer engineering, computer science, information technology or related fields.

minimum 2 years’ experience in administrative with some knowledge of it support (pc, windows, ms office, network), (new graduate who is a high–potential and seeking for challenging job is also welcome).

experience or knowledge in itlt would be an advantage.

good understanding of fundamental it applications and setup i.e. microsoft office, active directory, password policy and so on.

possess of strong interpersonal and influential skills towards peers and stakeholders within and outside the team.

possess of strong sense of urgency and quality assurance.

service mind, flexible thinking, learning agility and computer literacy.

fluent in english both written and verbal (minimum 650 toeic score).

goal-oriented, unity, learning, flexible.

key responsibilities

develop and maintain cross-platform mobile applications using react native for both ios and android platforms.

build responsive, scalable, and high-performance mobile user interfaces.

integrate restful apis and manage asynchronous data flow within the application.

collaborate with backend developers, ux/ui designers, and qa engineers to deliver high-quality products.

troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance and usability.

write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following development best practices.

participate in code reviews and technical discussions with the engineering team.

qualifications

minimum 3 years of experience in frontend or mobile application development.

strong proficiency in react native.

experience working with restful apis and asynchronous requests.

solid understanding of javascript / typescript fundamentals.

knowledge of html5, css3, and responsive design principles.

familiarity with git version control and modern development workflows.

strong problem-solving skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.

responsibilities and duties:

the test data software engineer will manage and develop web applications and systems related to test data, yield management, and preventive maintenance. the role involves streamlining processes, integrating new customer equipment, and improving standard software applications throughout their lifecycle. the ideal candidate will have experience in debugging, software development, and maintaining high software quality standards.




key responsibilities:

= manage & develop test data center:

• oversee the management and development of the test data center for web applications.

• implement solutions to eliminate paperwork and manual data entry in the test yield management system.




= system debugging & maintenance:

• debug and enhance the work-in-progress (wip) management system.

• oversee the preventive maintenance of test equipment and manage the test spare parts control system.




= test yield actions & analysis:

• monitor and take action on test yield data to ensure efficiency.

• perform engineering analysis on web applications related to testing systems.




= software development for customer integration:

• develop software applications for integrating new customer test equipment into internal systems.

• prepare technical proposals and, upon project approval, lead the development process.




= software development & enhancement:

• design, develop, and enhance standard software applications through their entire lifecycle.

• ensure that all developed software meets company standards and user requirements.




= documentation & standards:

• create detailed documentation of programming algorithms, database structures, and coding strategies.

• adhere to internal standards for software testing, debugging, and performance optimization.




= user interaction & support:

• collaborate with end-users to analyze needs and provide technical solutions.

• maintain a customer-focused approach when addressing software requirements and troubleshooting.




= quality control & process improvement:

• enforce and maintain software quality control according to team and organizational standards.

• drive continuous improvements in processes and software development practices.




= general software engineering functions:

• perform tasks related to standard software engineering.





qualifications:

• education: bachelor or master degree of engineering computer

• experience: 1 - 3 years

• skills:

mssql server (query and store procedure)

python, c#, vb.net, php, angular, bootstrap, java, vb6 , power bi (optional)

new technology learner

fluent in both written and spoken english

proficiency in web application development, debugging, and software maintenance.

experience in developing systems for test yield management, preventive maintenance, and data management.

strong understanding of database structure design, coding strategies, and software lifecycle management.




soft skills: managing time to handle large volumes of data and meet deadlines for reports. interacting with different teams to understand data requirements and translating them into actionable insights.

responsibilities

analyst requirement, provide proper solution and effort estimation.

develop, and test scalable, secure, and high-performance software applications using go programming language.

be part of an agile development team.

collaborate with other teams to integrate solutions and resolve technical issues.

support, investigate and analyze the root causes of reported issues of the developed application.

research/proof of concepts of new technologies for on-demand needs and requirements of the product.

keep up-to-date with the latest advancements in new technology and recommend changes as necessary.




qualification

bachelor's degree in computer science, computer engineer, it or related fields.

at least 2–5 years of experience as a software developer or software engineer.

strong programming concepts and logic.

ability to write clean and testable code, knowledge of clean architecture is a plus.

experience in designing and developing restful apis and microservices.

knowledge of data structures, algorithms, object-oriented programming and design patterns.

knowledge of go programming language would be an advantage.

knowledge of database technologies, such as postgresql, mysql, oracle or mongodb, and experience in database design and query optimization.

experience in amazon web services, google cloud platform, or huawei cloud is a plus.

basic knowledge of docker and kubernetes.

knowledge of ci/cd would be an advantage.

knowledge of event driven technologies such as kafka, rabbit mq etc. is a plus.

knowledge and understanding of jwt and oauth2.

knowledge and understanding of owasp security.

experience in git version control.

experience working in an agile development process.

problem solving skill, good attitude and teamwork also fast learner.

job summary:

the mis is responsible for managing and maintaining the organization’s it infrastructure, ensuring stable, secure, and scalable physical and virtual servers, as well as network systems, to support uninterrupted business operations.




duties / responsibilities:

🔹 network management & security

·       design, implement, and maintain enterprise network infrastructure (lan, wan, vpn, vlan)

·       manage and troubleshoot network devices including cisco routers, switches, and wireless access points

·       implement and monitor security solutions such as firewalls (e.g., fortinet) and intrusion detection systems

·       continuously monitor and optimize network performance (bandwidth, latency, capacity planning)

🔹 server & infrastructure administration

·       administer windows server environments (2016/2019/2022), including dns and dhcp services

·       manage virtualization platforms such as vmware vsphere or microsoft hyper-v

·       develop and maintain data backup strategies and disaster recovery (dr) plans

·       oversee storage systems (nas/san)

🔹 system maintenance & level 2/3 support

·       ensure system security through patch management, antivirus updates, and endpoint protection

·       manage user access control in accordance with security policies

·       provide advanced technical support (level 2/3) for infrastructure and server-related issues

🔹 global coordination & compliance

·       act as the main point of contact with global it teams

·       ensure compliance with corporate it security policies and standards

·       support global it projects, system upgrades, and technology rollouts

·       maintain and update local it procedures in alignment with global standards




required qualifications:

·       bachelor’s degree in business administration, marketing, it, or related field

·       minimum 3–5 years of b2b sales experience in it products

·       experience in commercial notebook, workstation, or open platform product sales is highly preferred

·       strong network with corporate customers or enterprise accounts

·       good understanding of it hardware, open platforms, and system compatibility

·       excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills

·       ability to work independently and as part of a team

·       good command of english (written and spoken)




technical tools & stack:

hardware: cisco systems, fortigate, servers

os: windows server, linux

virtualization & backup: vmware, hyper-v, veeam

monitoring: prtg, zabbix, solarwinds

remote management: anydesk, teamviewer, vpn

general description of duties and responsibilities:


achieve assigned data storage sales quota.

managing the entire product line life cycle from strategic planning to tactical activities.

working in partnership with our territory channel sales team to market and promote data storage products in conjunction with our key channel sales activities.

preparing enablement plans and training for our channels.

analyzing potential partner for the solutions

ownership of technical engagement, responding to rfps, and achieving ultimate success around specific technical projects.

specifying channel market requirements for current and future data storage products by conducting market research.

support channel sales sector, including management of product roll-out programs and coordination of culinary and technical programs.

build up partner technical relationship for marketing promotion and driving sales target.




candidate requirements:


at least bachelor degree in telecommunication engineering, information technology or related field.

at least 4 years work experience in telecommunication industry or related vendors.

good knowledge in cloud, data storage solution will be an advantage.

good communication and presentation skill in both thai and english.

positive attitude and able to work under challenging assignments, good handle with pressure.

certificates from other vendors as cisco, polycom and avaya are advantages.

- ติดตั้งหุ่นยนต์ amr และเชื่อมอุปกรณ์ iot ที่หน้างานเข้ากับระบบ

- ศึกษาและเข้าใจระบบ robot control system (rcs, fms)﻿

﻿และ warehouse management system (wms)

- เชื่อมต่อ api ของระบบหุ่นยนต์เข้ากับระบบคลังสินค้าของลูกค้า เช่น wms, erp หรือ mes

- ติดตั้งและดูแลระบบเซิร์ฟเวอร์สำหรับควบคุมและเชื่อมต่อหุ่นยนต์ amr ที่หน้างาน

- ตรวจเช็คปัญหาของ amr, server ประสานงานและแก้ไขได้

- ร่วมวางแผนโปรเจกต์และส่งมอบงานตาม timeline

-รับผิดชอบยอดขายให้เป็นไปตามเป้าหมายที่บริษัทกำหนด

คุณสมบัติ

-จบวุฒิการศึกษาปริญญาตรี สาขาวิศวกรรมคอมพิวเตอร์

-มีความรับผิดชอบสูง บุคลิกภาพดี มีมนุษย์สัมพันธ์ ทำงานเป็นทีมได้ และมีทักษะในการเจรจาต่อรอง

-มีความสามารถในการวางแและบริหารจัดการเวลาได้ดี

-สามารถทำงานภายใต้แรงกดดัน และมีเป้าหมายยอดขายที่ต้องทำให้ได้ตามที่บริษัทกำหนด

สวัสดิการทางบริษัท

1.เงินเดือน

2.เบี้ยขยัน 300 400 500 600 700 1,000 ทดลองงานคงที่ 300 ผ่านทดลองงานปรับตามขั้นบันได

3.ค่าข้าว วันละ 50 บาท (จ-ศ) ผ่านทดลองงานได้ค่าข้าว

4.เงินสะสมกองทุนบริษัทฯ (พนักฝากตามจำนวน สิ้นปีทางบริษัทมีเงินปันผลให้ตาม %)

5.กองทุนสำรองเลี้ยงชีพ (นายจ้างสะสม 3 %)

6.โบนัส (ตามผลประกอบการ)

7.เงินช่วยเหลือ งานศพ ครอบครัวพนักงาน (กรณี บิดา มารดา เสียชีวิต )

8.สวัสดิการวันเกิด พนักงาน

9.งานเลี้ยงสังสรรค์ ปีใหม่

10.และสวัสดิการอื่นๆ

11.ทำงาน จ-ศ หยุดเสาร์-อาทิตย์

Company: Bank of Ayudhya Public Company Limited
Job_Description:
role overview

we are seeking a senior open system specialist/infrastructure architect to lead the design, implementation, and support of enterprise-grade it infrastructure. this role combines deep technical expertise with project leadership to ensure our systems are secure, scalable, and aligned with business needs.

key responsibilities

provide consultation on server/storage architecture and modern open system technologies.

design and deliver infrastructure solutions aligned with it standards and business requirements.

lead and coordinate it infrastructure projects, ensuring quality, budget, and timeline adherence.

manage vendors and outsourcing teams to deliver high-performance it operations.

evaluate new technologies, conduct proof of concepts, and drive modernization initiatives.

ensure compliance with it governance, security, and service-level agreements.

mentor teams and provide technical guidance to support organizational growth.

qualifications

bachelor’s or master’s in computer engineering, computer science, or related field.

4+ years of experience in it infrastructure design, management, and operations.

strong expertise in unix/windows platforms, storage, backup systems, and middleware.

hands-on experience with virtualization, containers, and cloud platforms (aws, azure, gcp).

knowledge of hyperconverged infrastructure and automation (e.g., ansible).

strong leadership, communication, and vendor management skills.

relevant certifications (red hat, microsoft, vmware, openshift) preferred.

banking or financial services experience is a plus.

fluent in thai and english.

our client is one of most reputable fintech expert consulting companies within the apac region, specialised in driving digital transformation initiatives for major banking and financial institutions. with 2000+ staff regionally, and with various vertical fintech domain leaders covering digital banking, core banking, wealth, regulatory and even blockchain technologies, they have established a prime position as a value-adding expert within the financial industry.

they are currently in search of multiple senior java developers (both backend & full stack) for their new office in bangkok, where they are currently working in partnership with a prominent bank on a new virtual banking consortium in thailand.




responsibilities:

design technical architecture solutions and develop new mission-critical banking systems

partner with technical team to ensure smooth system integration

produce necessary documentation whenever applicable

analyze and define user requirements

handle production incidents and provide necessary support




requirements:

5-8+ years of hands-on working experience as a hands-on java development specialist

sound understanding of backend frameworks such as java spring, spring boot, postgresql and restful

candidates with frontend development skills (reactjs, typescript) can also be considered for full stack developer roles

must have recent experience working on banking systems (experience in bank payment technologies or deposit systems would be a plus)

capable of designing and developing high quality finance systems under microservices architecture

exposure with api technologies would be an added advantage

ability to gather requirements effectively and work with both business & technical stakeholders

professional level of spoken & written skills in english and thai




interested candidates shall be contacted through email. in case of any first emails dropping into the spam/junk folder, please check regularly to avoid missed communication.

Company: Bank of Ayudhya Public Company Limited
Job_Description:
1.   job purpose / วัตถุประสงค์หลักของตำแหน่งงาน:

system analyst works as a technical developer who design, develops and delivers an ambitious tech vision and business vision into a product.  he needs to leverage deep technical knowledge to solve more complex business problems and actively deliver code quality with speed and functional and nonfunctional pipelines.  he ensures to work closely with solution architect, business analyst, other developers, automated testers, etc. in order to deliver requirements as clean and quality codes as possible.  he needs to work with business and it stakeholders, users, smes (subject matter experts) to ensure that the technical solution delivered responding to business and it requirements within agreed time and quality.




2.   major accountabilities / หน้าที่ความรับผิดชอบหลัก:

·    collaborate with business stakeholders to gather and understand system requirements.

·    conduct thorough analysis of business processes and user needs to formulate effective java-based solutions.

·    design and architect java-based systems, ensuring scalability, reliability, and performance.

·    develop system specifications, including flowcharts, diagrams, and documentation.

·    maintain comprehensive documentation of system designs, configurations, and changes.

·    exposure in devops toolchain and able to integrate with devops toolchain

·    exposure in docker, kubernetes and cloud platforms

·    strong experience in reviewing code and investigating issues

·    strong experience in performing root-cause analysis and preliminary problem diagnosis

·    be a thought leader who has the capability to provide technical guidance for a team. 

·    able to define the flow of data between the applications that must be integrated and map business process activities to the applications that support them.

·    collaborate the activities of development and ensure adherence to standards and continuous improvement.

·    identify the impact to business and it architecture from development point of view and able to propose the proper solution.

·    promote, develop, maintain, and support api/microservices based on our krungsri api/microservices standards and ensure that all exposed apis are upto the defined standards.  

·    maintain and refresh development tool stacks related to development, so the team can maintain the development speed and application quality.  also, promote the use of these tools to other teams when required.

·    help other api development teams by co-creating when required.




3.   job qualification / คุณสมบัติของผู้ดำรงตำแหน่ง:

bachelor’s degree/master’s degree in computer science, computer engineering or related fields

4+ years of experience as system analyst (backend/microservices)

5+ years of strong experience in java, spring cloud / netflix oss framework

3+ years of back-end and microservices development experience

0-3 years of experience in management level

banking business knowledge is an advantage.

proven experience as a systems analyst with a focus on java technologies.

strong proficiency in java programming language and related frameworks (spring, hibernate, etc.).

desired to have experience on multiple frontend technologies like angular, react etc.

very good understanding of object-oriented design (ood)

experience with test-driven development

any exposure to angular framework is plus

experience in cloud native development, docker, and kubernetes

experience working in banking/ financial payment service projects

experience in working with and applying design patterns to solve problems

knowledge of api/microservices development

knowledge of it governance, it development and operations methods (e.g. sdlc, agile, scrum, devops)

knowledge cloud platform aws or openshift

strong experience in performing root-cause analysis and preliminary problem diagnosis

good english written, documentation, and verbal communication skills.

responsibility

​- workflow optimization: วิเคราะห์ขั้นตอนการทํางานปัจจุบันของทีม it support เพื่อค้นหาจุดที่ล่าช้า (bottleneck) และออกแบบ workflow ใหม่ที่ทํางานได้โดยอัตโนมัติมากขึ้น

- ai implementation: ค้นหา พัฒนา และประยุกต์ใชเ้ครื่องมือ ai (เช่น llms, chatbots, หรือ ai agents) เพื่อช่วยตอบคําถามเบื้องต้น (l1 support) และจัดหมวดหมู่ ticket โดยอัตโนมัติ

- tool development & integration: พัฒนาเครื่องมือขนาดเล็ก (internal tools) หรือใช้แพลตฟอร์ม low-code/no-code (เช่น microsoft power automate) เชื่อมต่อระบบต่าง ๆ เข้าด้วยกัน

- self-service portal management: สร้างและดูแลระบบ self-service เพื่อให้ผู้ใช้งานสามารถแก้ไขปัญหาเบื้องต้นได้ด้วยตัวเองผ่านฐานข้อมูลความรู้ (knowledge base) ที่ขับเคลื่อนด้วย ai

- monitoring & analytics: ออกแบบ dashboard เพื่อติดตามประสิทธิภาพของ automation และนําข้อมูลมาวิเคราะห์เพื่อพัฒนาความแม่นยําของ ai อย่างต่อเนื่อง

- mentoring & knowledge sharing: ใหค้ําแนะนําแก่ทีม support ในการใช้เครื่องมือใหม่ๆ และสร้างวัฒนธรรมการทํางานที่เน้น tech-driven mindset 

qualification

​- ประสบการณ์ 2-5 ปีในสายงาน it support, system admin หรือสายงานที่เกี่ยวข้องกับ it operations

- มีความเชี่ยวชาญในการใช้เครื่องมือ automation tools (เช่น power automate, python scripting)

- มีทักษะในการใช้งานและปรับแต่ง ai tools/prompt engineering เพื่อใช้ในงานสารสนเทศ

- เข้าใจระบบ itsm (it service management) และโครงสร้างของ ticketing system

- มีทักษะการคิดเชิงวิพากษ์ (critical thinking) เพื่อมองภาพรวมของปัญหา และความสามารถในการสื่อสารเรื่องเทคนิคใหเ้ข้าใจง่าย

responsibilities:


implement & management the private cloud infrastructure and related platforms such as redhat linux enterprise

implement, manage and maintain support the automation workflows for deployment

performance management and capacity planning.

incident handling and problem solving.

contribute ideas and researching (technological and product) to enhance the overall service experience.

enable the continuous improvement of structure, processes, tooling to enable the teams to deliver more value

able to support out of office hours

 qualifications:

bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering or a related fields

at least 3 years of experiences in system engineer, system administrator for  unix, linux operating system

proven working experience in installing, configuring and troubleshooting unix /linux based environments

understanding of virtualization and containerization

solid experience in the administration and performance tuning of application stacks (e.g.,tomcat, jboss, apache, nginx)

experience with monitoring systems

have knowledge scripting skills (e.g., shell scripts, perl)

Company: ÆON Thana Sinsap (Thailand) Public Co., Ltd.
Job_Description:
about us


æon thana sinsap (thailand) plc (aeonts) is a financial services company located in bangkok city, thailand our company provides a range of services including loans, credit cards, insurance broker and installment programs to our customers. we are committed to providing exceptional customer experience and value to our customers

we’re hiring! we’re looking for a "online management manager" to join us on this journey of growth

about job

the online management manager is responsible for ensuring the stability, performance, and scalability of the back-end infrastructure supporting our mobile applications. this role bridges the gap between development, operations, and business teams. you will lead the monitoring strategy, manage technical support escalations, and implement devops practices to ensure a seamless 24/7 user experience.

system reliability & monitoring:

define and implement a comprehensive observability and monitoring strategy (infrastructure, api latency, and app health).

monitor system performance using tools to identify bottlenecks and ensure high availability (99.9% uptime).

back-end & mobile app support:

lead the l2/l3 technical support team to troubleshoot complex back-end and mobile application issues.

analyze logs and perform root cause analysis (rca) for system incidents, collaborating with developers to deploy permanent fixes.

devops & automation:

oversee and optimize ci/cd pipelines to ensure fast, reliable, and frequent application releases to the app store and google play.

drive automation for routine operational tasks, such as automated health checks, environment provisioning, and scaling.

incident & release management:

act as the incident commander during major outages, coordinating communication and technical recovery efforts.

manage the release lifecycle, ensuring back-end compatibility with new mobile app versions.

technical qualifications :

back-end expertise: deep understanding of microservices architecture, restful/graphql apis, and database management (sql and nosql).

devops toolchain: proficiency in:

containerization: docker and kubernetes (k8s).

ci/cd tools: jenkins, gitlab ci, github actions, or circleci.

cloud platforms: aws, azure, or google cloud platform (gcp).

monitoring & observability: hands-on experience with tools like new relic, datadog, grafana, prometheus, or elk stack.

infrastructure as code (iac): knowledge of terraform or ansible is a significant plus.

requirements :

experience: 5+ years of experience in it operations, software engineering, or qa, with at least 2 years in a leadership or management role.

education: bachelor’s degree in computer science, information technology, or a related field.

mindset: strong devops mindset—prioritizing automation, collaboration, and continuous improvement.

communication: excellent english and thai communication skills, with the ability to translate technical issues into business impact for stakeholders.

problem-solving: proven ability to work under pressure and manage critical incidents in a fast-paced environment




location : sermmit tower (work from office)

if you are interested in the above position, please send your full resume to hrssc-recruitment (rcmheadoffice@aeon.co.th) tel. 02-302-4771

about the role

we are looking for an ai product owner to define, build, and scale ai-powered products that deliver measurable business value. in this role, you will bridge business strategy, product development, and ai capabilities to create innovative solutions using machine learning, generative ai, large language models (llms), and data-driven technologies.




key responsibilities
1. ai product strategy

define the ai product vision, roadmap, and strategy aligned with company objectives.

identify high‑impact ai use cases across operations, customer experience, analytics, and productivity.

translate business problems into ai-driven solutions using ml, llms, and automation.

prioritize features based on business value, feasibility, and risk.

2. ai product development & delivery

lead the full lifecycle of ai products: discovery → design → build → launch → iteration.

collaborate with ai engineers, data scientists, designers, and business stakeholders.

define product requirements:
• data needs
• model capabilities
• performance metrics
• safety & compliance constraints

manage product backlog, sprint planning, and delivery milestones.

3. data & ai performance management

define evaluation metrics for ai performance (accuracy, latency, reliability, cost efficiency).

track and improve ai product success metrics.

ensure data pipelines and data quality standards support ai features.

monitor and optimize performance of deployed ai systems.

4. stakeholder communication

present ai product vision and roadmap to business leaders and executives.

translate complex ai concepts into clear business value.

prepare executive‑level presentations, dashboards, and reports.




skills & qualifications
required

bachelor’s degree in it, software engineering, computer science, or related field.

strong understanding of ai/ml concepts, including llms and generative ai.

background in data analytics or technology fields.

strong analytical, mathematical, and problem‑solving skills.

excellent communication skills for cross‑functional collaboration.

ability to explain complex technical topics in a clear, concise way.

leadership and team collaboration skills.

preferred

experience with agile/scrum methodologies.

experience with ai/ml product development or mlops environments.

ability to manage multiple stakeholders and prioritize effectively.

Job_Title: Full Stack Developer (Java Springboot, Typescript, React)
Job_Description:
the role focuses on maintaining the existing platform while redesigning and modernizing key features to enhance scalability, performance, long-term maintainability and works closely with the product owner, development team, and qa to translate business requirements into well-structured technical solutions, contribute to system design and code quality, and provide technical guidance through code reviews to ensure the delivery of reliable and sustainable software solutions.

job description :

lead the architectural design for re-writing legacy features into modern solutions (microservices or modular monolith).

design, develop, and maintain robust backend services using java (spring boot) (or .net depending on the module).

implement and optimize high-performance apis using grpc, rest, and graphql based on specific functional requirements.

manage data persistence and caching strategies using sql server, mongodb, and redis.

develop responsive user interfaces using preact (leveraging your react knowledge) for high performance.

utilize tailwind css to create consistent, maintainable, and pixel-perfect ui components.

bridge the gap between design (figma) and technical implementation, ensuring seamless ux.

conduct rigorous code reviews, enforce coding standards, and ensure high test coverage (unit/integration tests).

mentor junior developers, conduct pair programming sessions, and help the team solve complex technical blockers.

collaborate closely with the product owner (po) and qa team to refine requirements and ensure delivery quality.

lead specific feature developments or mini-teams, taking ownership from design to deployment in a ci/cd environment (gitlab/jenkins).

produce and executes on well-documented technical designs

responsible for software quality and performance which require to implement unit testing, contract testing or performance testing.

strategically refactoring legacy code while delivering new business value without regression.

manage the complexity of data fetching and state management efficiently between the java/.net backend and the preact frontend.

driving a culture of technical excellence and shifting the team mindset towards automated testing and clean architecture

qualifications :

bachelor’s degree/master’s degree in computer engineering, computer science or related fields.

4-7 year of working experiences in bank or non-bank (financial product & services).

computer language & core:

strong in java (ecosystem) and modern javascript/typescript.

understanding of object-oriented programming (oop), design patterns, and clean architecture.

backend development:

deep knowledge of spring boot framework and build tools like maven.

familiarity with .net is a plus (as the system may interact with these services)

experience with api design and implementation using restful, grpc, and graphql.

understanding of secure coding practices (e.g., owasp top 10) to prevent common vulnerabilities.

proficiency in data encryption techniques, including symmetric and asymmetric encryption.

knowledge of secure api authentication and authorization (e.g., oauth2, jwt, mtls for grpc).

write and maintain unit tests to meet defined code coverage requirements.

frontend development:

proficient in modern frontend frameworks, specifically preact (or react with a willingness to use preact) and build tools like vite.

understanding of javascript and typescript fundamentals, including modern language features and best practices.

experience with utility-first css frameworks (tailwind css).

database & data persistence:

strong sql skills (e.g., sql server) and experience with nosql databases (mongodb).

knowledge of caching mechanisms like redis.

infrastructure & ci/cd:

hands-on experience with containerization (docker) and orchestration (kubernetes / openshift).

proficient in using gitlab or jenkins for ci/cd pipelines.

Job_Title: Lead Cyber Security (Key & Vault Management Specialist)
Company: Bank of Ayudhya Public Company Limited
Job_Description:
scope overview

implement, and operate enterprise-grade cryptographic key management and secrets management solutions within a banking environment. the role will be responsible for ensuring secure key lifecycle management, hsm operations, vault administration, and compliance with regulatory and security standards.

hands-on experience with thales luna hsm is highly preferred.




what you'll do

cryptographic key management

manage end-to-end cryptographic key lifecycle (generation, distribution, rotation, backup, archival, destruction).

administer and operate hardware security modules (hsms), preferably thales luna hsm.

define and enforce key management policies and procedures aligned with banking regulations and industry standards (e.g., pci dss, iso 27001).

support encryption key integration across banking applications, core systems, payment systems, and digital channels.

conduct key ceremonies and maintain audit logs.

vault & secrets management

administer enterprise vault platforms (e.g., hashicorp vault or similar).

manage secrets lifecycle (api keys, certificates, tokens, database credentials).

configure access control policies, role-based access, and segregation of duties.

integrate vault solutions with applications, devops pipelines, and cloud/on-prem infrastructure.

monitor vault security posture and perform regular health checks.

security & compliance

ensure compliance with regulatory requirements (bot, pci dss, swift csp, etc.).

perform risk assessments related to cryptographic controls.

support audit activities and provide evidence for internal/external auditors.

participate in incident response related to key compromise or vault breaches.

architecture & improvement

contribute to cryptographic architecture design and secure key management framework.

support post-quantum cryptography transition planning (if applicable).

recommend best practices and continuous improvements for key and secrets management.




apply now if you have these advantages

bachelor’s degree or higher in computer science/ data science or any related field.

minimum of 3-7 years of experience in information security or cryptography (banking financial industries are advantage)

·       3–7+ years of experience in information security or cryptography.

·       hands-on experience with hsm (thales luna preferred).

·       experience in vault or secrets management platforms (e.g., hashicorp vault).

·       experience in banking or financial services environment is highly preferred.

strong understanding of cryptographic principles (pki, symmetric/asymmetric encryption, tls, key wrapping, key derivation).

experience with key lifecycle management processes.

knowledge of pki, certificate management, and ca integration.

familiarity with pci dss encryption requirements.

scripting skills (e.g., bash, python, powershell) are a plus




why join krungsri?

as a part of mufg (mitsubishi ufj financial group), we a truly a global bank with networks all over the world.

we offer a striking work-life balance culture with hybrid work policies (3 days in office per week).

unbelievable benefits such as attractive bonuses, employee loan with special rates and many more.

role summary

we are hiring an ai business analyst who specialises in building systems and workflows. your core mission is to make our lean team operate like a much larger one — by designing repeatable ai-powered processes, connecting tools, and ensuring ai adoption spreads across the entire organisation.

this is not a traditional analyst role. you will be our first dedicated ai adoption hire, working directly with senior management to define and build the company's internal ai infrastructure.




key responsibilities

ai workflow design & automation

•    build and maintain a company-wide prompt library covering customer service, product listings, research, and reporting

•    design and document repeatable ai workflows for high-frequency tasks (weekly reports, listing creation, review analysis)

•    use no-code tools such as make or zapier to automate manual handoffs between team members

•    audit current team workflows and identify the highest-impact areas for ai automation




vibe coding & lightweight tool building

•    use ai-assisted coding tools (cursor, github copilot, claude) to build small internal tools, dashboards, and scripts — no formal engineering background required

•    rapidly prototype solutions using vibe coding: describe what you need, let ai generate the code, iterate until it works

•    build simple web apps, google sheets automations, or internal bots that solve real team problems

•    maintain and improve these tools over time based on team feedback

•    collaborate with senior management to scope and prioritise what gets built next




internal ai training & adoption

•    run monthly hands-on ai skills sessions for team members — practical, not theoretical

•    maintain an internal ai tool tracker: evaluate new tools monthly and recommend adoption

•    create onboarding materials so new hires can immediately use ai tools in their role

•    document all workflows, prompts, and tool decisions for team-wide access




operations & performance support

•    help maintain and evolve the company performance scorecard — flag anomalies and generate weekly summaries

•    build dashboards or templates giving the team real-time visibility on key metrics

•    improve operational efficiency through ai-assisted templates and standard operating procedures




qualifications

required

•    demonstrated experience building workflows or automations using ai tools

•    comfortable with no-code platforms such as notion, airtable, make, or zapier

•    able to write effective prompts for claude or chatgpt from scratch for a wide range of tasks

•    comfortable using ai coding assistants to build simple tools — curiosity and willingness to learn matter more than formal coding experience

•    systems-oriented mindset: documents everything and builds for team repeatability

•    self-starter who can scope and deliver from a vague problem statement

•    clear communication in both thai and english

•    bachelor's degree in any field




preferred

•    has built internal tools or bots using vibe coding (cursor, replit, claude artifacts, or similar)

•    basic python or google apps script

•    familiarity with e-commerce seller dashboards (shopee, tiktok shop)

•    data visualisation experience (google looker studio, tableau)

what we offer

•    first dedicated ai adoption hire — you define the role and own the impact

•    work directly with senior management on strategy and tooling

•    budget for ai tools and subscriptions

•    fast-track growth path: ai ops analyst → ai ops lead → head of digital operations

•    salary: 25,000 – 40,000 thb/month based on experience

•    location: bangkok, near bts ekkamai

job summary

the it infrastructure manager will be responsible for leading the design, implementation, and management of enterprise it infrastructure solutions, supporting business growth and client delivery across thailand. this role oversees end-to-end infrastructure projects within a system integration environment, including network, server, cloud, and security solutions, ensuring high performance, scalability, and reliability for both internal operations and external clients. the position involves managing the full project lifecycle — from requirement gathering and solution design to deployment, optimization, and ongoing support. the successful candidate will work closely with cross-functional teams, including sales, presales, and delivery units, to ensure solutions are aligned with client requirements and industry best practices

lead infrastructure delivery: oversee the design, implementation, and management of enterprise it infrastructure solutions, including network, server, cloud, and security systems, ensuring high availability and performance for client environments.

lead and develop team: manage, mentor, and develop a team of infrastructure engineers, fostering a high-performance culture and supporting career growth and capability building.

ensure governance & compliance: maintain compliance with internal policies, client requirements, and industry standards related to it infrastructure, security, and data protection.

manage vendor & partner relations: coordinate with technology vendors and partners to ensure successful solution delivery, support, and alignment with project requirements.

report & communicate effectively: provide regular updates on project status, risks, and performance metrics to senior management and key stakeholders.

job requirements

proven years of experience in it infrastructure within a system integration or enterprise it services environment.

strong knowledge of it infrastructure technologies, including network, server, virtualization, cloud platforms, and cybersecurity solutions.

proven ability to manage end-to-end infrastructure projects, with solid experience in planning, execution, risk management, and delivery within timelines and budget.

demonstrated experience in leading, mentoring, and managing technical teams, with the ability to drive performance, accountability, and continuous improvement.

ability to work closely with cross-functional teams (e.g., sales, presales, and clients) to translate business requirements into effective technical solutions.

experience working with enterprise clients, preferably within manufacturing or industrial sectors, is highly advantageous.

strong communication and presentation skills in both thai and english, with the ability to engage both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

strong analytical thinking and troubleshooting skills, with the ability to manage complex technical challenges in dynamic environments.

Job_Description:
role purpose

own and strengthen the digital backbone of the minburi factory.

enable secure, reliable, and compliant it/ot connectivity, data flow, and system integration across manufacturing, utilities, safety, and quality digital platforms.

act as the technical integrator for all site digital programs and cybersecurity compliance.




key accountabilities

industrial it/ot network ownership

end‑to‑end responsibility for industrial networks (switches, vlans, firewalls, gateways, wi‑fi).

ensure ≥99% uptime for manufacturing, warehouse, utilities, safety cctv, and quality systems.

instrumentation connectivity & data management

own instrument tagging, tag lists, and signal mapping.

ensure accurate, reliable data from sensors/meters through plcs, gateways, and digital platforms.

validate data quality for spc, ems, qms, dashboards, and traceability.

cybersecurity (ot & it)

implement and govern magnum / unilever ot cyber security standards (ucss).

maintain ot asset inventory, patching, backups, access control, and endpoint protection.

lead ot cyber risk assessments and incident response with it and global teams.

digital systems integration

technical enablement of: dfos, spc, ems, cbms, wms, qms, traceability, and inline inspection.

ensure stable, secure integration of machines, sensors, and digital platforms.

safety cctv ownership

own cctv network, storage, cybersecurity compliance, uptime, and recovery.

support integration with safety analytics where applicable.

governance & compliance

maintain documentation: tag lists, network topology, ot architecture, cctv maps.

enforce change management, backups, and audit readiness (it/ot, cyber, quality, safety).

vendor & stakeholder management

manage ot, cctv, instrumentation, quality system, and cybersecurity vendors.

collaborate with engineering, production, she, quality, digital sc, and it.




key deliverables

100% compliance with ucss and unilever ot standards.

≥99% uptime of industrial network, cctv, and quality digital systems.

complete and validated instrument tag database.

stable commissioning of all digital platforms.

zero high‑risk cybersecurity audit findings.

reliable data for quality, safety, production, and control tower dashboards.




experience & qualifications (essentials)

bachelor’s degree in instrumentation, automation, electronics, or related.

at least 2 years hands‑on experience in instrumentation, ot networking, and data acquisition.

proficiency in english communication

strong knowledge of industrial protocols and ot cybersecurity fundamentals.

experience with cctv and digital quality systems.

location: close to mrt phetchaburi station.

10f emporium tower 622 sukhumvit soi 24 klongton, klongtoey, bangkok 10110

contact : k. phattranuch

office number: 099-287-3253

time: 9.00 am - 6.00 pm

about the role

humanica public company limited is seeking a talented cybersecurity engineer to join our team in pathum wan, bangkok. this full-time position is crucial in ensuring the security and integrity of our organisation's digital infrastructure. as a cybersecurity engineer, you will play a key role in protecting our systems, data, and assets from cyber threats, while also driving innovation and implementing cutting-edge security solutions.

job summary:

we are seeking a cybersecurity engineer to safeguard our cloud-based platform. this role involves monitoring security operations, defending against threats, and ensuring compliance with regulatory standards (e.g., iso 27001, soc 2, pdpa/gdpr). you will work closely with devops, cloud infrastructure, and development teams to secure our cloud-based environments and protect sensitive customer data.




key responsibilities:
security monitoring & incident response

monitor security operations center (soc) alerts and respond to incidents in real-time.

investigate and contain threats targeting web/mobile applications and cloud workloads.

perform root cause analysis and coordinate incident response efforts.

cloud security & infrastructure hardening

implement and manage cloud-native security controls (e.g., iam policies, security groups, encryption).

ensure secure configuration and monitoring of saas cloud environments (e.g., aws/huawei).

review and enforce access controls across infrastructure and development pipelines.

application security (web/mobile)

work with developers to integrate secure coding practices and perform code reviews.

support dynamic (dast) and static (sast) application security testing tools in ci/cd pipelines.

identify and remediate vulnerabilities affecting saas components (e.g., apis, authentication flows).

endpoint & identity protection

oversee endpoint security solutions for laptops, mobile devices, and remote workforces.

support multi-factor authentication (mfa), single sign-on (sso), and role-based access control (rbac).

compliance & risk management

assist with the implementation of iso 27001, soc 2 type 2, and local data protection laws (pdpa, gdpr).

maintain documentation and evidence for audit readiness and customer trust programs.

perform risk assessments, participate in third-party vendor security reviews, and support privacy-by-design.

threat intelligence & reporting

stay up to date with threats impacting the saas and hr/payroll landscape.

analyze logs using siem tools and provide insights for proactive defense.

generate monthly security reports for leadership and customers.

qualifications:
education & certifications

bachelor's degree in cybersecurity, information technology, computer science, or a related field.

industry certifications such as comptia security+, sscp, or isc2 certified in cybersecurity.

experience

1–2 years in cybersecurity, preferably in saas, fintech, or application environments.

experience securing aws/huawei environments and containerized applications (e.g., docker, kubernetes).

hands-on knowledge of siem, endpoint protection, vulnerability scanners, and cloud security tools.




what we offer

at humanica, we are committed to providing a supportive and rewarding work environment for our employees. we offer competitive remuneration, comprehensive benefits, and ample opportunities for professional development and growth. our company culture is built on collaboration, innovation, and a shared passion for excellence. join us in our mission to redefine the future of cybersecurity and make a meaningful impact on our organization and the industry.

apply now to become our next cybersecurity engineer and be a part of our dynamic and forward-thinking team.

overview roles:

the position oversees functional support, process optimization, training, data accuracy, and the coordination of business requirements for system enhancements, driving continuous improvement and successful system adoption across the organization.

key responsibilities

1. business process management & optimization

lead the review, documentation, and improvement of erp-enabled business processes.

work with process owners to identify inefficiencies and implement erp-driven solutions.

ensure business processes are standardized and aligned with corporate policies.

ensure data accuracy and perform periodic data audits.

collaborate and coordinate with teams to enhance data governance, improve reporting efficiency, and maintain data consistency across systems and departments.

experience with cross-functional business processes in automotive or manufacturing operations, with strong understanding of sales, crm, financial & accounting, product development, procurement, production, inventory control and after-sales.

about the job


google isn't just a software company. the hardware operations team is responsible for monitoring the state-of-the-art physical infrastructure behind google's powerful search technology. as a hardware operations manager, you will manage a team of data center technicians. you will oversee the quality installation of server hardware and components and take charge of complicated installations/troubleshooting.

your team will install, configure, test, troubleshoot and maintain hardware (like servers and its components) and server software (like google's linux cluster). they will also take on the configuration of more complex components such as networks, routers, hubs, bridges, switches and networking protocols. they may lead small project teams on larger installations and develop project contingency plans.

in this role, you will lead a team of data center technicians who perform quality installations of server and network hardware and their components, and maintain and troubleshoot any tests while modeling teamwork with a positive impact to site culture. you will also manage day-to-day operations and guide the team through the installation, configuration, testing, troubleshooting and decommissioning of our servers. in a similar fashion, you will also oversee the deployment of network components of the data center, lead teams on installations and develop project contingency plans.

the ai and infrastructure team is redefining what’s possible. we empower google customers with breakthrough capabilities and insights by delivering ai and infrastructure at unparalleled scale, efficiency, reliability and velocity. our customers include googlers, google cloud customers, and billions of google users worldwide.

we're the driving force behind google's groundbreaking innovations, empowering the development of our cutting-edge ai models, delivering unparalleled computing power to global services, and providing the essential platforms that enable developers to build the future. from software to hardware our teams are shaping the future of world-leading hyperscale computing, with key teams working on the development of our tpus, vertex ai for google cloud, google global networking, data center operations, systems research, and much more.

partner with teams to meet goals and stakeholders to manage facility activities and set/implement short and long-term strategies.

maintain, monitor, and execute security and operational procedures and track/analyze trends to identify opportunities for improvements ensuring alignment with organizational policies.

repair, fix, and perform preventative maintenance on equipment, servers, machines, or infrastructure based on identified issues.

support and contribute to the implementation of environmental health and safety (ehs) and other compliance programs and initiatives in collaboration with other teams to ensure environmental and safety incidents are investigated, resolved, and reported.
